              ,type_position
                        ,subfund_currency subfnd_currency_org
                        ,srq1.date_campagne
                        ,counterparty_name
                        ,counterparty_country
                        ,operation_type_name
                        ,collateral_type_name
                        ,contractpool_status_name
                        ,security_issuer_name
                        ,contract_currency
                        ,collateral_cash_eur
                        ,collateral_cash_currency
                        ,mtm_in_eur_after_marginhaircut
                        ,mtm_in_usd_after_marginhaircut
                    from
                        (
                        select
                            qs.id_structure
                            ,qs.libelle_long
                            ,qasgc.position
                            ,qc.fnd_lng_description
                            ,srq_date_vl.id_neve_nav_date
                            ,srq.*
                        from
                            (
                            /*Positions pour le tableau Securities Lendings*/
                            select
                                '1' type_position
                                ,qspc.*
                            from 
                                qxp.qxp_sup_pos_caceis qspc
                            where
                                qspc.date_campagne=last_day(?)
                                and contractpool_status_name ='Settled'
                                and operation_type_name='Loan'
                            
                            union all
                            
                            /*Positions pour le tableau Collaterals*/
                            select
                                '2' type_position
                                ,qspc.*
                            from 
                                qxp.qxp_sup_pos_caceis qspc
                            where
                                qspc.date_campagne=last_day(?)
                                and contractpool_status_name ='Settled'
                                and operation_type_name='Received Collateral'
                            )srq
                        /*Récupération de la date de VL pour les positions utiles*/
                        left join 
                            (
                            select
                                qsmpi.id_fnd_code
                                ,qsmpi.id_neve_nav_date
                            from 
                                qxp.qxp_sup_pos_caceis qspc
                            join qxp.qxp_sup_meb_photo_inventaires qsmpi on qspc.id_fnd_code=qsmpi.id_fnd_code
                                and qspc.date_campagne=qsmpi.date_campagne
                            where
                                qspc.date_campagne=last_day(?)
                                and contractpool_status_name ='Settled'
                                and operation_type_name in ('Loan','Received Collateral')
                            group by
                                qsmpi.id_fnd_code
                                ,qsmpi.id_neve_nav_date
                            )srq_date_vl on srq.id_fnd_code=srq_date_vl.id_fnd_code
                        left join qxp.qxp_asso_struct_comp qasc on srq.id_fnd_code=qasc.id_fnd_code
                        left join qxp.qxp_structure qs on qasc.id_structure=qs.id_structure
                        left join qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc on qasc.id_structure=qasgc.id_structure
                            and qasgc.id_gabarit = ?
                            and srq.id_fnd_code=qasgc.id_fnd_code                                    
                        left join qxp.qxp_compartiment qc on srq.id_fnd_code=qc.id_fnd_code
                        where
                            qasc.id_structure=?
                            and srq.date_campagne=last_day(?)
                            and (qc.date_fin_compart is null or qc.date_fin_compart >=?)
                )srq1
            /*Gestion des Master-Feeders*/
            left join qxp_sup_mapping qsm on qsm.code_mapping_cible=srq1.id_fnd_code
                and qsm.type_mapping in 'MASTER-FEEDERS'
                and qsm.date_campagne in '31/12/2199'
            )srq2
        )srq3
    where
         /*Conserver une seule ligne cumulée par compartiment*/
         (srq3.type_position=1 and srq3.index_regroupement_lend=1) 
         or 
         (srq3.type_position=2 and srq3.index_regroupement_coll=1)
         
    )srq4    
where            
    (
    type_position='1' and
        (
        /*Titre de la note*/    
        (niveau='N01' and rupture_tableau_asc=1)         
        /*Ligne d'introduction*/    
        or (niveau='N02' and rupture_tableau_asc=1)         
        /*Entete de colonne*/
        or (niveau='N03' and rupture_compart_asc=1)    
        /*Ligne de détail*/
        or (niveau='N04')
        /*Ligne de totalisation compartiment*/
        or (niveau='N05' and rupture_compart_desc=1)
        )
    )
    or 
    (
    type_position='2' and
        (
        /*Ligne d'introduction*/    
        (niveau='N06' and rupture_tableau_asc=1)         
        /*Titre nom du compartiment*/
        or (niveau='N07' and rupture_compart_asc=1)    
        /*Entete de colonne*/
        or (niveau='N08' and rupture_compart_asc=1)    
        /*Ligne de détail*/
        or (niveau='N09')
        /*Template séparateur de tableaux*/
        or (niveau='N11' and rupture_compart_desc=1)
        )
    )
order by
    id_ligne
    ,id_colonne
    )]; ORA-01843: not a valid month

            ,'2-N07-1',fnd_lng_description

            ,'2-N09-4',fnd_currency
            ,'2-N09-5',collateral_type_name
            ,'2-N11-1',null

    ,'LEND_'||decode(niveau,'N01','N01','N02','N02','N03','N03','N04','N04','N05','N05','N06','N06','N07','N07','N08','N08','N09',case when rupture_contrep_emetteur_desc>1 then 'N09' else 'N10' end,'N11','N11') template
    ,decode(niveau,'N01',1,'N02',2,'N03',3,'N04',4,'N05',5,'N06',6,'N07',7,'N08',8,'N09',9,'N11',11) row_level
     /*Données de DATA_STORAGE*/    
     /*DESCRIPTION_BLOC*/
     ,decode(type_position||'-'||niveau||'-'||id_colonne
            /*Partie Securities Lendings de la note*/

         ||'[ic]'||'[/ic]'

from
    (
        select
            dense_rank() over(order by type_position,position,niveau,rupture_note_asc) id_ligne                                
            ,srq4.*
            ,srq5.*
        from
            (
            /*Titre de la note*/
            select 'N01' as niveau, 1 as id_colonne from dual 
                union
            /*Ligne d'introduction - Securities lendings*/
            select 'N02',1 from dual 
                union
            /*Titre de colonne - Securities lendings*/
            select 'N03',1 from dual 
                union
            /*Ligne de détail - Securities lendings*/
            select 'N04',1 from dual union select 'N04',2 from dual union select 'N04',3 from dual union select 'N04',4 from dual
                union
            /*Ligne de totalisation - Securities lendings*/
            select 'N05',1 from dual 
                union
            /*Ligne d'introduction - Collateral*/
            select 'N06',1 from dual 
                union
            /*Titre nom du compartiment - Collateral*/
            select 'N07',1 from dual 
                union
            /*Titre de colonne - Collateral*/
            select 'N08',1 from dual 
                union
            /*Ligne de détail - Collateral*/
            select 'N09',1 from dual union select 'N09',2 from dual union select 'N09',3 from dual union select 'N09',4 from dual union select 'N09',5 from dual
                union
            /*Template séparateur de tableaux*/
            select 'N11',1 from dual
            )srq5    
                ,    
            (
            select                                    
                row_number() over(order by type_position,position,case when type_position='1' then market_value_lend else market_value_ctrp_coll end desc,case when type_position='1' then null else market_value_issuer_coll end desc,counterparty_name,case when type_position='1' then null else security_issuer_name end) rupture_note_asc
                ,row_number() over(order by type_position desc,position desc,case when type_position='1' then market_value_lend else market_value_ctrp_coll end asc,case when type_position='1' then null else market_value_issuer_coll end asc,counterparty_name desc,case when type_position='1' then null else security_issuer_name end desc) rupture_note_desc

                ,row_number() over(partition by type_position order by position,case when type_position='1' then market_value_lend else market_value_ctrp_coll end desc,case when type_position='1' then null else market_value_issuer_coll end desc,counterparty_name,case when type_position='1' then null else security_issuer_name end) rupture_tableau_asc
                ,row_number() over(partition by type_position order by position desc,case when type_position='1' then market_value_lend else market_value_ctrp_coll end asc,case when type_position='1' then null else market_value_issuer_coll end asc,counterparty_name desc,case when type_position='1' then null else security_issuer_name end desc) rupture_tableau_desc                

                ,row_number() over(partition by type_position,position order by case when type_position='1' then market_value_lend else market_value_ctrp_coll end desc,case when type_position='1' then null else market_value_issuer_coll end desc,counterparty_name,case when type_position='1' then null else security_issuer_name end) rupture_compart_asc
                ,row_number() over(partition by type_position,position order by case when type_position='1' then market_value_lend else market_value_ctrp_coll end asc,case when type_position='1' then null else market_value_issuer_coll end asc,counterparty_name desc,case when type_position='1' then null else security_issuer_name end desc) rupture_compart_desc

                ,row_number() over(partition by type_position,position,counterparty_name order by market_value_issuer_coll desc,security_issuer_name) rupture_contrep_emetteur_asc
                ,row_number() over(partition by type_position,position,counterparty_name order by market_value_issuer_coll asc,security_issuer_name desc) rupture_contrep_emetteur_desc                

                ,sum(market_value_lend) over (partition by type_position, id_fnd_code) market_value_lend_sum

                ,srq3.*
            from
                (
                /*Requete brute GP3*/
                select
                    row_number() over(partition by type_position, id_fnd_code, counterparty_name order by position,mtm_in_eur_after_marginhaircut) index_regroupement_lend                   
                    ,sum(case when fnd_currency = 'EUR' then mtm_in_eur_after_marginhaircut else mtm_in_usd_after_marginhaircut end) over (partition by type_position, id_fnd_code, counterparty_name) market_value_lend

                    ,row_number() over(partition by type_position, id_fnd_code, counterparty_name, case when type_position='1' then null else security_issuer_name end order by position, mtm_in_eur_after_marginhaircut) index_regroupement_coll
                    ,sum(case when fnd_currency = 'EUR' then mtm_in_eur_after_marginhaircut else mtm_in_usd_after_marginhaircut end) over (partition by type_position, id_fnd_code, counterparty_name) market_value_ctrp_coll
                    ,sum(case when fnd_currency = 'EUR' then mtm_in_eur_after_marginhaircut else mtm_in_usd_after_marginhaircut end) over (partition by type_position, id_fnd_code, counterparty_name, security_issuer_name) market_value_issuer_coll
                    ,srq2.*
                from
                    (
                    select                        
                        id_structure
                        ,libelle_long
                        /*Exception Master-Feeder*/
                        ,nvl(
                               (
                               select distinct
                                   qasgc.position
                               from qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc
                               where
                                   qasgc.id_structure=?
                                   and qasgc.id_gabarit=?
                                   and qasgc.id_fnd_code=qsm.code_mapping_source
                               ),srq1.position)position
                        /*Exception Master-Feeder*/
                        ,nvl(qsm.code_mapping_source,srq1.id_fnd_code)id_fnd_code
                        /*Exception Master-Feeder*/
                        ,nvl(
                                (
                                select distinct
                                   srq_photo.id_neve_nav_date
                                from qxp_sup_meb_photo_inventaires srq_photo 
                                where 
                                   srq_photo.id_fnd_code=qsm.code_mapping_source
                                   and srq_photo.id_gabarit = ?
                                   and srq_photo.date_campagne=srq1.date_campagne
                                ),srq1.id_neve_nav_date)id_neve_nav_date
                        /*Exception Master-Feeder*/
                        ,nvl(
                                (
                                select distinct
                                   qc.fnd_lng_description
                                from qxp_compartiment qc 
                                where 
                                   qc.id_fnd_code=qsm.code_mapping_source
                                   and (qc.date_fin_compart is null or qc.date_fin_compart >=?)
                                ),srq1.fnd_lng_description)fnd_lng_description
                        /*Exception Master-Feeder*/
                        ,nvl(
                                (
                                select distinct
                                   qspc.subfund_currency
                                from qxp.qxp_sup_pos_caceis qspc 
                                where 
                                   qspc.id_fnd_code=qsm.code_mapping_source
                                   and qspc.date_campagne=srq1.date_campagne
                                ),srq1.subfund_currency)fnd_currency
                        ,type_position
                        ,subfund_currency subfnd_currency_org
                        ,srq1.date_campagne
                        ,counterparty_name
                        ,counterparty_country
                        ,operation_type_name
                        ,collateral_type_name
                        ,contractpool_status_name
                        ,security_issuer_name
                        ,contract_currency
                        ,collateral_cash_eur
                        ,collateral_cash_currency
                        ,mtm_in_eur_after_marginhaircut
                        ,mtm_in_usd_after_marginhaircut
                    from
                        (
                        select
                            qs.id_structure
                            ,qs.libelle_long
                            ,qasgc.position
                            ,qc.fnd_lng_description
                            ,srq_date_vl.id_neve_nav_date
                            ,srq.*
                        from
                            (
                            /*Positions pour le tableau Securities Lendings*/
                            select
                                '1' type_position
                                ,qspc.*
                            from 
                                qxp.qxp_sup_pos_caceis qspc
                            where
                                qspc.date_campagne=last_day(?)
                                and contractpool_status_name ='Settled'
                                and operation_type_name='Loan'
                            
                            union all
                            
                            /*Positions pour le tableau Collaterals*/
                            select
                                '2' type_position
                                ,qspc.*
                            from 
                                qxp.qxp_sup_pos_caceis qspc
                            where
                                qspc.date_campagne=last_day(?)
                                and contractpool_status_name ='Settled'
                                and operation_type_name='Received Collateral'
                            )srq
                        /*Récupération de la date de VL pour les positions utiles*/
                        left join 
                            (
                            select
                                qsmpi.id_fnd_code
                                ,qsmpi.id_neve_nav_date
                            from 
                                qxp.qxp_sup_pos_caceis qspc
                            join qxp.qxp_sup_meb_photo_inventaires qsmpi on qspc.id_fnd_code=qsmpi.id_fnd_code
                                and qspc.date_campagne=qsmpi.date_campagne
                            where
                                qspc.date_campagne=last_day(?)
                                and contractpool_status_name ='Settled'
                                and operation_type_name in ('Loan','Received Collateral')
                            group by
                                qsmpi.id_fnd_code
                                ,qsmpi.id_neve_nav_date
                            )srq_date_vl on srq.id_fnd_code=srq_date_vl.id_fnd_code
                        left join qxp.qxp_asso_struct_comp qasc on srq.id_fnd_code=qasc.id_fnd_code
                        left join qxp.qxp_structure qs on qasc.id_structure=qs.id_structure
                        left join qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc on qasc.id_structure=qasgc.id_structure
                            and qasgc.id_gabarit = ?
                            and srq.id_fnd_code=qasgc.id_fnd_code                                    
                        left join qxp.qxp_compartiment qc on srq.id_fnd_code=qc.id_fnd_code
                        where
                            qasc.id_structure=?
                            and srq.date_campagne=last_day(?)
                            and (qc.date_fin_compart is null or qc.date_fin_compart >=?)
                )srq1
            /*Gestion des Master-Feeders*/
            left join qxp_sup_mapping qsm on qsm.code_mapping_cible=srq1.id_fnd_code
                and qsm.type_mapping in 'MASTER-FEEDERS'
                and qsm.date_campagne in '31/12/2199'
            )srq2
        )srq3
    where
         /*Conserver une seule ligne cumulée par compartiment*/
         (srq3.type_position=1 and srq3.index_regroupement_lend=1) 
         or 
         (srq3.type_position=2 and srq3.index_regroupement_coll=1)
         
    )srq4    
where            
    (
    type_position='1' and
        (
        /*Titre de la note*/    
        (niveau='N01' and rupture_tableau_asc=1)         
        /*Ligne d'introduction*/    
        or (niveau='N02' and rupture_tableau_asc=1)         
        /*Entete de colonne*/
        or (niveau='N03' and rupture_compart_asc=1)    
        /*Ligne de détail*/
        or (niveau='N04')
        /*Ligne de totalisation compartiment*/
        or (niveau='N05' and rupture_compart_desc=1)
        )
    )
    or 
    (
    type_position='2' and
        (
        /*Ligne d'introduction*/    
        (niveau='N06' and rupture_tableau_asc=1)         
        /*Titre nom du compartiment*/

        or (niveau='N08' and rupture_compart_asc=1)    
        /*Ligne de détail*/
        or (niveau='N09')
        /*Template séparateur de tableaux*/
        or (niveau='N11' and rupture_compart_desc=1)
        )
    )
order by
    id_ligne
    ,id_colonne

        ||'[ga]'||(select distinct id_gabarit from qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc where qasgc.id_fnd_code = ?)||'[/ga]'
         ||'[st]'||(select distinct id_structure from qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc where qasgc.id_fnd_code = ?)||'[/st]'
         ||'[dt]'||?||'[/dt]'
         ||'[fd][/fd]' 
         ||'[tl][/tl]'
         ||'[tb]TAB_FX_RATES[/tb]'
         ||'[co]'||index_col||'[/co]'
         ||'[li]'||dense_rank() over(order by niveau,index_lig_asc)||'[/li]'
         ||'[gr]'||dense_rank() over(order by niveau,index_lig_asc)||'[/gr]'
         ||'[ni]'||niveau||'[/ni]'
         ||'[vb][/vb]'              
        ||'[ic]'||case 
                       when niveau='N2' and index_col in (1,2) then devise||'_'||id_exr_quotation_cur_col1
                       when niveau='N2' and index_col in (3,4) then devise||'_'||id_exr_quotation_cur_col2               
                       end 
                ||'[/ic]'
    /*root*/
    ||'[/root]' info_bloc
from
    (
    -- En-tetes de colonnes (2)
    select 1 as index_col,'N1' as niveau from dual union select 2,'N1' from dual 
    union
    --- En-tetes de ligne détail
    select 1,'N2' from dual union select 2,'N2' from dual union select 3,'N2' from dual union select 4,'N2' from dual
    )srq6 
    ,
    (        
    select
        srq4.*        
    from
        (
        select
            index_lig_tmp
            ,index_lig_asc
            ,num_col
            ,devise
            ,decode(num_col,1,exr_exchange_rate)exr_exchange_rate_col1
            ,decode(num_col,1,id_exr_quotation_cur)id_exr_quotation_cur_col1
            ,decode(num_col,1,lead(exr_exchange_rate,1) over (order by index_lig_tmp,num_col))exr_exchange_rate_col2
            ,decode(num_col,1,lead(id_exr_quotation_cur,1) over (order by index_lig_tmp,num_col))id_exr_quotation_cur_col2        
        from
            (
            select
                row_number() over(partition by num_col order by srq2.id_exr_quotation_cur) index_lig_tmp
                ,srq2.*
            from
                (    
                select
                    row_number() over(order by srq1.id_exr_quotation_cur) index_lig_asc
                    ,case when row_number() over(order by srq1.id_exr_quotation_cur) <= (count(*) over()/2 +0.5) then 1 else 2 end num_col
--                    ,case when mod(row_number() over(order by srq1.id_exr_quotation_cur),2)=0 then 2 else 1 end num_col
                    ,devise
                    ,srq1.exr_exchange_rate
                    ,srq1.id_exr_quotation_cur        
                from
                    (            
                    select distinct
                         srq.id_structure
                        ,srq.devise
                        ,srq.exr_exchange_rate
                        ,srq.id_exr_quotation_cur
                    from
                        (
                        select
                            row_number() over(partition by srq_fx.id_exr_quotation_cur, fnd_fx_fixing order by srq_fx.id_exr_quotation_cur, fnd_fx_fixing) index_a_filtrer
                            ,
                            qs.id_structure
                            ,qs.devise
                            ,rf.id_fnd_code
                            ,rf.fnd_lng_description
                            ,rf.fnd_fx_fixing
                            ,srq_fx.id_exr_quoted_cur
                            ,srq_fx.id_exr_quotation_date
                            ,srq_fx.id_exr_quotation_cur
                            ,srq_fx.exr_exchange_rate
                            ,srq_tmp.id_neve_nav_date    
                        from
                            qxp.qxp_structure qs
                            join qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc on qs.id_structure=qasgc.id_structure
                                and qasgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                                and qasgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
                            join owb_dwh.ref_fund rf on qasgc.id_fnd_code=rf.id_fnd_code
                            join
                                    ( 
                                    select distinct
                                        max(ne.key_ref_fund) over(partition by rf.id_fnd_code) key_ref_fund
                                        ,max(ne.key_nav_sequence) over(partition by rf.id_fnd_code) key_nav_sequence
                                        ,max(ne.id_neve_nav_date) over(partition by rf.id_fnd_code) id_neve_nav_date
                                        ,max(ne.id_neve_nav_date) over () id_neve_nav_date_max
                                    from
                                        qxp.qxp_structure qs
                                        join qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc on qs.id_structure=qasgc.id_structure
                                             and qasgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                                             and qasgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
                                        join owb_dwh.ref_fund rf on qasgc.id_fnd_code=rf.id_fnd_code
                                        join owb_dwh.nav_event ne on rf.key_ref_fund=ne.key_ref_fund    
                                             and ne.id_neve_nav_date <= ?
                                             and ne.ID_NEVE_NAV_TYPE = 'MAIN'
                                             and ne.NEVE_VALIDITY_STATUS = 'Y'
                                        left join qxp.qxp_compartiment qslc on qslc.id_fnd_code=qasgc.id_fnd_code
                                    where
                                        (qslc.date_fin_compart is null or qslc.date_fin_compart>=?)
                                    )srq_tmp on rf.key_ref_fund=srq_tmp.key_ref_fund
                            join owb_dwh.nav_detailed_net_asset ndna on srq_tmp.key_nav_sequence = ndna.key_nav_sequence
                            join owb_dwh.ref_instrument ri on ndna.key_ref_instrument=ri.key_ref_instrument
                                 and ri.id_ins_category in ('VMOB','CRNE','CAT','FUTU','OPTI','SWAT','TRES')--Inclure TRES ? A priori non
                            join
                                (                                
                                select distinct
                                    her.id_exr_quoted_cur
                                    ,her.id_exr_quotation_date
                                    ,her.id_exr_quotation_cur
                                    ,her.exr_exchange_rate                                
                                from
                                    qxp.qxp_structure qs
                                join qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc on qs.id_structure=qasgc.id_structure
                                    and qasgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                                    and qasgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
                                join owb_dwh.ref_fund rf on qasgc.id_fnd_code=rf.id_fnd_code                            
                                join owb_dwh.his_exchange_rate her on id_exr_fx_fixing=fnd_fx_fixing
                                     and her.id_exr_quoted_cur =qs.devise
                                join 
                                /*Sous requête de sélection de dernier objectif de cours le plus fréquent*/
                                     (
                                        select distinct 
                                            rfa.ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE,
                                            first_value(rfa.FND_FX_FIXING) over(order by rfa.nb_fix desc,decode(rfa.fnd_fx_fixing,'FIXING\WMC',1,2) ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) AS choix_fixing 
                                        from
                                        (
                                        select 
                                            rfs.ID_FND_CODE
                                            ,max (nes.ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE) over () as ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE
                                            ,rfs.FND_FX_FIXING
                                            ,count (rfs.FND_FX_FIXING) over(partition by rfs.FND_FX_FIXING) as nb_fix
                                        from
                                            qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
                                        join owb_dwh.ref_fund rfs on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = rfs.ID_FND_CODE
                                        join owb_dwh.nav_event nes on rfs.key_ref_fund = nes.KEY_REF_FUND
                                        where 
                                            asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                                            and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
                                            and nes.ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE <= to_date(?)
                                            and nes.ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE > to_date(?)-31
--                                            and nes.ID_NEVE_NAV_SORT = 'OFF'
                                            and nes.ID_NEVE_NAV_TYPE = 'MAIN'
                                            and nes.NEVE_VALIDITY_STATUS = 'Y'
                                            and nes.KEY_NAV_SEQUENCE in 
                                                (
                                                select distinct
                                                    max(nei.KEY_NAV_SEQUENCE) over(partition by asgc.ID_FND_CODE) as KEY_NAV_SEQUENCE
                                                from 
                                                    qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
                                                    join owb_dwh.ref_fund rfi on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = rfi.ID_FND_CODE
                                                    join owb_dwh.nav_event nei on rfi.key_ref_fund = nei.KEY_REF_FUND
                                                where 
                                                    asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                                                    and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
                                                    and nei.ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE <= to_date(?)
                                                    and nei.ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE > to_date(?)-31
--                                                    and nei.ID_NEVE_NAV_SORT = 'OFF'
                                                    and nei.ID_NEVE_NAV_TYPE = 'MAIN'
                                                    and nei.NEVE_VALIDITY_STATUS = 'Y'
                                                )
                                            order by count (rfs.FND_FX_FIXING) over(partition by rfs.FND_FX_FIXING) desc,decode(rfs.fnd_fx_fixing,'FIXING\WMC',1,2)
                                        )rfa
                                     )srq0 on her.id_exr_fx_fixing= srq0.choix_fixing
                                            and her.id_exr_quotation_date=srq0.id_neve_nav_date
                                    where
                                         her.id_exr_quoted_cur<>her.id_exr_quotation_cur
                                )srq_fx on ndna.ndna_quotation_cur=srq_fx.id_exr_quotation_cur
                    ) srq
                    where
                         srq.index_a_filtrer=1
                    ) srq1
                    where id_structure like ('_P%')
                 )srq2
            order by
                index_lig_tmp
                ,num_col
            )srq3
        )srq4
    where
         num_col=1
    )srq5
where
    --Entetes colonnes        
    (niveau='N1' and index_lig_asc=1 )    
    --Lignes Détails        
    or (niveau='N2')        
order by
    niveau, index_lig_asc,index_col 
)

UNION

(

/* Amundi Fund EN - FX rates niveau structure*/
    select
         niveau
         ,id_ligne id_groupe    
         ,id_ligne    
         ,id_colonne    
        ,'FX_RATES_'||niveau||'L'||id_ligne||'C'||id_colonne nom_bloc    
        /* Valeur Bloc*/
        ,decode(niveau||'-'||id_colonne
                ,'N00-1',rtrim(to_char(last_day(id_neve_nav_date),'dd Month','nls_date_language=english'))
                        ||to_char(id_neve_nav_date,' yyyy','nls_date_language=english')
                ,'N01-1',null
                ,'N02-1',id_exr_quoted_cur
                ,'N02-2',to_char(exr_exchange_rate,'FM999G990D000000','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''.,') 
                ,'N02-3',devise
                ) as valeur_bloc
        ,'FX_RATES_'||niveau as "TEMPLATE"
        /* champs facultatifs*/
        ,decode(niveau,'N00',1,'N01',2,'N02',3) row_level
     /*Données de DATA_STORAGE*/    
    ,decode(niveau||'-'||id_colonne
            ,'N00-1','Titre de la note'
            ,'N01-1','Phrase d''intro de la note'
            ,'N02-1','Code devise de la structure'
            ,'N02-2','Parité de change'
            ,'N02-3','Code devise de cotation'
           ) as description_bloc    
    /*root*/
    ,'[root]'
        ||'[ga]'||?||'[/ga]'
         ||'[st]'||id_structure||'[/st]'
         ||'[dt]'||?||'[/dt]'
         ||'[tb]DIV_FX_RATES[/tb]'
         ||'[co]'||id_colonne||'[/co]'
         ||'[li]'||id_ligne||'[/li]'
         ||'[gr]'||id_ligne||'[/gr]'
         ||'[ni]'||niveau||'[/ni]'
         ||'[ic]'||
         case 
            when niveau='N02' then id_exr_quoted_cur||'/'||devise||'[/ic]'
            end
         ||'[/ic]'
    /*root*/
    ||'[/root]'
    as info_bloc
    from
        (
        select
            dense_rank() over(order by niveau,srq4.id_exr_quoted_cur) id_ligne                                    
            ,srq4.*
        from
            (
            select
                srq3.*
                ,srq2.*
            from
                (
                /*Titre Note*/
                select 1 as id_colonne,'N00' as niveau from dual
                union
                /* Commentaire introduction*/
                select 1,'N01' as niveau from dual
                union
                /*Lignes détail*/
                select 1,'N02' from dual union select 2,'N02' from dual union select 3,'N02' from dual
                )srq3 
                ,
                (        
                select
                    row_number() over(order by srq1.id_exr_quoted_cur) index_lig
                    ,srq1.*        
                from
                    (
                                select distinct
                                    srq.id_structure
                                    ,srq.devise
                                    ,srq.exr_exchange_rate
                                    ,srq.id_exr_quoted_cur
                                    ,max(srq.id_neve_nav_date) over()id_neve_nav_date
                                from
                                    (
                                    select
                                        row_number() over(partition by srq_fx.id_exr_quoted_cur, fnd_fx_fixing order by srq_fx.id_exr_quoted_cur, fnd_fx_fixing) index_a_filtrer
                                        ,qs.id_structure
                                        ,qs.devise
                                        ,rf.id_fnd_code
                                        ,rf.fnd_lng_description
                                        ,rf.fnd_fx_fixing
                                        ,srq_fx.id_exr_quoted_cur
                                        ,srq_fx.id_exr_quotation_date
                                        ,srq_fx.id_exr_quotation_cur
                                        ,srq_fx.exr_exchange_rate
                                        ,srq_tmp.id_neve_nav_date    
                                    from
                                        qxp.qxp_structure qs
                                        join qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc on qs.id_structure=qasgc.id_structure
                                            and qasgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                                            and qasgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
                                        join owb_dwh.ref_fund rf on qasgc.id_fnd_code=rf.id_fnd_code
                                        join
                                                ( 
                                                select distinct
                                                    max(ne.key_ref_fund) over(partition by rf.id_fnd_code) key_ref_fund
                                                    ,max(ne.key_nav_sequence) over(partition by rf.id_fnd_code) key_nav_sequence
                                                    ,max(ne.id_neve_nav_date) over(partition by rf.id_fnd_code) id_neve_nav_date
                                                    ,max(ne.id_neve_nav_date) over () id_neve_nav_date_max
                                                from
                                                    qxp.qxp_structure qs
                                                    join qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc on qs.id_structure=qasgc.id_structure
                                                         and qasgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                                                         and qasgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
                                                    join owb_dwh.ref_fund rf on qasgc.id_fnd_code=rf.id_fnd_code
                                                    join owb_dwh.nav_event ne on rf.key_ref_fund=ne.key_ref_fund    
                                                         and ne.id_neve_nav_date <= to_date(?)
                                                         and ne.ID_NEVE_NAV_TYPE = 'MAIN'
                                                         and ne.NEVE_VALIDITY_STATUS = 'Y'
                                                )srq_tmp on rf.key_ref_fund=srq_tmp.key_ref_fund
                                        join
                                            (                                
                                            select distinct
                                                her.id_exr_quoted_cur
                                                ,her.id_exr_quotation_date
                                                ,her.id_exr_quotation_cur
                                                ,her.exr_exchange_rate                                
                                            from
                                                qxp.qxp_structure qs
                                            join qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc on qs.id_structure=qasgc.id_structure
                                                and qasgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                                                and qasgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
                                            join owb_dwh.ref_fund rf on qasgc.id_fnd_code=rf.id_fnd_code   
                                                and rf.fnd_end_validity='31/12/2199'
                                            join owb_dwh.his_exchange_rate her on id_exr_fx_fixing=rf.fnd_fx_fixing
                                                 and her.id_exr_quotation_cur =qs.devise
                                            join 
                                            /*Sous requête de sélection de dernier objectif de cours le plus fréquent*/
                                                 (
                                                    select distinct 
                                                        rfa.ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE,
                                                        first_value(rfa.FND_FX_FIXING) over(order by rfa.nb_fix desc,decode(rfa.fnd_fx_fixing,'FIXING\WMC',1,2) ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) AS choix_fixing 
                                                    from
                                                    (
                                                    select 
                                                        rfs.ID_FND_CODE
                                                        ,max (nes.ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE) over () as ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE
                                                        ,rfs.FND_FX_FIXING
                                                        ,count (rfs.FND_FX_FIXING) over(partition by rfs.FND_FX_FIXING) as nb_fix
                                                    from
                                                        qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
                                                    join owb_dwh.ref_fund rfs on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = rfs.ID_FND_CODE
                                                    join owb_dwh.nav_event nes on rfs.key_ref_fund = nes.KEY_REF_FUND
                                                    where 
                                                        asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                                                        and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
                                                        and nes.ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE <= to_date(?)
                                                        and nes.ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE > to_date(?)-30
                                                        and nes.ID_NEVE_NAV_TYPE = 'MAIN'
                                                        and nes.NEVE_VALIDITY_STATUS = 'Y'
                                                        and nes.KEY_NAV_SEQUENCE in 
                                                            (
                                                            select distinct
                                                                max(nei.KEY_NAV_SEQUENCE) over(partition by asgc.ID_FND_CODE) as KEY_NAV_SEQUENCE
                                                            from 
                                                                qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
                                                                join owb_dwh.ref_fund rfi on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = rfi.ID_FND_CODE
                                                                join owb_dwh.nav_event nei on rfi.key_ref_fund = nei.KEY_REF_FUND
                                                                left join qxp.qxp_compartiment qslc on qslc.id_fnd_code=asgc.id_fnd_code
                                                            where
                                                                (qslc.date_fin_compart is null or qslc.date_fin_compart>=to_date(?))
                                                                and asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                                                                and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
                                                                and nei.ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE <= to_date(?)
                                                                and nei.ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE > to_date(?)-30
                                                                and nei.ID_NEVE_NAV_TYPE = 'MAIN'
                                                                and nei.NEVE_VALIDITY_STATUS = 'Y'
                                                            )
                                                        order by count (rfs.FND_FX_FIXING) over(partition by rfs.FND_FX_FIXING) desc,decode(rfs.fnd_fx_fixing,'FIXING\WMC',1,2)
                                                    )rfa
                                                 )srq0 on her.id_exr_fx_fixing= srq0.choix_fixing
                                                        and her.id_exr_quotation_date=srq0.id_neve_nav_date
                                                where
                                                     her.id_exr_quoted_cur<>her.id_exr_quotation_cur
                                            )srq_fx on rf.fnd_currency=srq_fx.id_exr_quoted_cur
                                ) srq
                                where
                                     srq.index_a_filtrer=1
                    )srq1
                    where id_structure not like ('_P%')
                )srq2
            )srq4
        where
             /*Titre Note*/        
             (niveau='N00' and index_lig=1)    
             /* Commentaire introduction*/        
             or (niveau='N01' and index_lig=1)    
            /*Lignes Détail*/        
            or (niveau='N02')        
        order by
            niveau,id_ligne,id_colonne
        )
)


]; ORA-01830: date format picture ends before converting entire input string


org.springframework.dao.DataIntegrityViolationException: PreparedStatementCallback; SQL [select 
niveau
,id_groupe
,id_ligne
,id_colonne
,nom_bloc
,valeur_bloc
,"Template"
,row_level
,description_bloc
,info_bloc
from
(
/* Pioneer EN - FX rates niveau structure RAF */
select
     niveau
     ,dense_rank() over(order by niveau,index_lig_asc) id_groupe
     ,dense_rank() over(order by niveau,index_lig_asc) id_ligne
     ,index_col id_colonne
    ,'FX_RATES_N'||decode(niveau,'N1',1,'N2',2)||'L'||dense_rank() over(order by niveau,index_lig_asc)||'C'||index_col nom_bloc    
    ,decode(niveau||'-'||index_col
            ,'N1-1','1 '||devise|| ' ='
            ,'N1-2','1 '||devise|| ' ='
            ,'N2-1',to_char(exr_exchange_rate_col1,'FM999G990D00000','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''.,') 
            ,'N2-2',id_exr_quotation_cur_col1
            ,'N2-3',to_char(exr_exchange_rate_col2,'FM999G990D00000','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''.,') 
            ,'N2-4',id_exr_quotation_cur_col2
            ) as valeur_bloc
    ,'FX_RATES_N'||decode(niveau,'N1',1,'N2',2)||'_C' "Template"
    ,decode(niveau,'N1',1,'N2',2) row_level
    ,decode(niveau||'-'||index_col
            ,'N1-1','En-tete colonne 1'
            ,'N1-2','En-tete colonne 2'
            ,'N2-1','Data colonne 1'
            ,'N2-2','Data colonne 2'
            ,'N2-3','Data colonne 3'
            ,'N2-4','Data colonne 4'
            ) as description_bloc
    /*root*/
    ,'[root]'
        ||'[ga]'||(select distinct id_gabarit from qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc where qasgc.id_fnd_code = ?)||'[/ga]'
         ||'[st]'||(select distinct id_structure from qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc where qasgc.id_fnd_code = ?)||'[/st]'
         ||'[dt]'||?||'[/dt]'
         ||'[fd][/fd]' 
         ||'[tl][/tl]'
         ||'[tb]TAB_FX_RATES[/tb]'
         ||'[co]'||index_col||'[/co]'
         ||'[li]'||dense_rank() over(order by niveau,index_lig_asc)||'[/li]'
         ||'[gr]'||dense_rank() over(order by niveau,index_lig_asc)||'[/gr]'
         ||'[ni]'||niveau||'[/ni]'
         ||'[vb][/vb]'              
        ||'[ic]'||case 
                       when niveau='N2' and index_col in (1,2) then devise||'_'||id_exr_quotation_cur_col1
                       when niveau='N2' and index_col in (3,4) then devise||'_'||id_exr_quotation_cur_col2               
                       end 
                ||'[/ic]'
    /*root*/
    ||'[/root]' info_bloc
from
    (
    -- En-tetes de colonnes (2)
    select 1 as index_col,'N1' as niveau from dual union select 2,'N1' from dual 
    union
    --- En-tetes de ligne détail
    select 1,'N2' from dual union select 2,'N2' from dual union select 3,'N2' from dual union select 4,'N2' from dual
    )srq6 
    ,
    (        
    select
        srq4.*        
    from
        (
        select
            index_lig_tmp
            ,index_lig_asc
            ,num_col
            ,devise
            ,decode(num_col,1,exr_exchange_rate)exr_exchange_rate_col1
            ,decode(num_col,1,id_exr_quotation_cur)id_exr_quotation_cur_col1
            ,decode(num_col,1,lead(exr_exchange_rate,1) over (order by index_lig_tmp,num_col))exr_exchange_rate_col2
            ,decode(num_col,1,lead(id_exr_quotation_cur,1) over (order by index_lig_tmp,num_col))id_exr_quotation_cur_col2        
        from
            (
            select
                row_number() over(partition by num_col order by srq2.id_exr_quotation_cur) index_lig_tmp
                ,srq2.*
            from
                (    
                select
                    row_number() over(order by srq1.id_exr_quotation_cur) index_lig_asc
                    ,case when row_number() over(order by srq1.id_exr_quotation_cur) <= (count(*) over()/2 +0.5) then 1 else 2 end num_col
--                    ,case when mod(row_number() over(order by srq1.id_exr_quotation_cur),2)=0 then 2 else 1 end num_col
                    ,devise
                    ,srq1.exr_exchange_rate
                    ,srq1.id_exr_quotation_cur        
                from
                    (            
                    select distinct
                         srq.id_structure
                        ,srq.devise
                        ,srq.exr_exchange_rate
                        ,srq.id_exr_quotation_cur
                    from
                        (
                        select
                            row_number() over(partition by srq_fx.id_exr_quotation_cur, fnd_fx_fixing order by srq_fx.id_exr_quotation_cur, fnd_fx_fixing) index_a_filtrer
                            ,
                            qs.id_structure
                            ,qs.devise
                            ,rf.id_fnd_code
                            ,rf.fnd_lng_description
                            ,rf.fnd_fx_fixing
                            ,srq_fx.id_exr_quoted_cur
                            ,srq_fx.id_exr_quotation_date
                            ,srq_fx.id_exr_quotation_cur
                            ,srq_fx.exr_exchange_rate
                            ,srq_tmp.id_neve_nav_date    
                        from
                            qxp.qxp_structure qs
                            join qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc on qs.id_structure=qasgc.id_structure
                                and qasgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                                and qasgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
                            join owb_dwh.ref_fund rf on qasgc.id_fnd_code=rf.id_fnd_code
                            join
                                    ( 
                                    select distinct
                                        max(ne.key_ref_fund) over(partition by rf.id_fnd_code) key_ref_fund
                                        ,max(ne.key_nav_sequence) over(partition by rf.id_fnd_code) key_nav_sequence
                                        ,max(ne.id_neve_nav_date) over(partition by rf.id_fnd_code) id_neve_nav_date
                                        ,max(ne.id_neve_nav_date) over () id_neve_nav_date_max
                                    from
                                        qxp.qxp_structure qs
                                        join qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc on qs.id_structure=qasgc.id_structure
                                             and qasgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                                             and qasgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
                                        join owb_dwh.ref_fund rf on qasgc.id_fnd_code=rf.id_fnd_code
                                        join owb_dwh.nav_event ne on rf.key_ref_fund=ne.key_ref_fund    
                                             and ne.id_neve_nav_date <= ?
                                             and ne.ID_NEVE_NAV_TYPE = 'MAIN'
                                             and ne.NEVE_VALIDITY_STATUS = 'Y'
                                        left join qxp.qxp_compartiment qslc on qslc.id_fnd_code=qasgc.id_fnd_code
                                    where
                                        (qslc.date_fin_compart is null or qslc.date_fin_compart>=?)
                                    )srq_tmp on rf.key_ref_fund=srq_tmp.key_ref_fund
                            join owb_dwh.nav_detailed_net_asset ndna on srq_tmp.key_nav_sequence = ndna.key_nav_sequence
                            join owb_dwh.ref_instrument ri on ndna.key_ref_instrument=ri.key_ref_instrument
                                 and ri.id_ins_category in ('VMOB','CRNE','CAT','FUTU','OPTI','SWAT','TRES')--Inclure TRES ? A priori non
                            join
                                (                                
                                select distinct
                                    her.id_exr_quoted_cur
                                    ,her.id_exr_quotation_date
                                    ,her.id_exr_quotation_cur
                                    ,her.exr_exchange_rate                                
                                from
                                    qxp.qxp_structure qs
                                join qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc on qs.id_structure=qasgc.id_structure
                                    and qasgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                                    and qasgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
                                join owb_dwh.ref_fund rf on qasgc.id_fnd_code=rf.id_fnd_code                            
                                join owb_dwh.his_exchange_rate her on id_exr_fx_fixing=fnd_fx_fixing
                                     and her.id_exr_quoted_cur =qs.devise
                                join 
                                /*Sous requête de sélection de dernier objectif de cours le plus fréquent*/
                                     (
                                        select distinct 
                                            rfa.ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE,
                                            first_value(rfa.FND_FX_FIXING) over(order by rfa.nb_fix desc,decode(rfa.fnd_fx_fixing,'FIXING\WMC',1,2) ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) AS choix_fixing 
                                        from
                                        (
                                        select 
                                            rfs.ID_FND_CODE
                                            ,max (nes.ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE) over () as ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE
                                            ,rfs.FND_FX_FIXING
                                            ,count (rfs.FND_FX_FIXING) over(partition by rfs.FND_FX_FIXING) as nb_fix
                                        from
                                            qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
                                        join owb_dwh.ref_fund rfs on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = rfs.ID_FND_CODE
                                        join owb_dwh.nav_event nes on rfs.key_ref_fund = nes.KEY_REF_FUND
                                        where 
                                            asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                                            and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
                                            and nes.ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE <= to_date(?)
                                            and nes.ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE > to_date(?)-31
--                                            and nes.ID_NEVE_NAV_SORT = 'OFF'
                                            and nes.ID_NEVE_NAV_TYPE = 'MAIN'
                                            and nes.NEVE_VALIDITY_STATUS = 'Y'
                                            and nes.KEY_NAV_SEQUENCE in 
                                                (
                                                select distinct
                                                    max(nei.KEY_NAV_SEQUENCE) over(partition by asgc.ID_FND_CODE) as KEY_NAV_SEQUENCE
                                                from 
                                                    qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
                                                    join owb_dwh.ref_fund rfi on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = rfi.ID_FND_CODE
                                                    join owb_dwh.nav_event nei on rfi.key_ref_fund = nei.KEY_REF_FUND
                                                where 
                                                    asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                                                    and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
                                                    and nei.ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE <= to_date(?)
                                                    and nei.ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE > to_date(?)-31
--                                                    and nei.ID_NEVE_NAV_SORT = 'OFF'
                                                    and nei.ID_NEVE_NAV_TYPE = 'MAIN'
                                                    and nei.NEVE_VALIDITY_STATUS = 'Y'
                                                )
                                            order by count (rfs.FND_FX_FIXING) over(partition by rfs.FND_FX_FIXING) desc,decode(rfs.fnd_fx_fixing,'FIXING\WMC',1,2)
                                        )rfa
                                     )srq0 on her.id_exr_fx_fixing= srq0.choix_fixing
                                            and her.id_exr_quotation_date=srq0.id_neve_nav_date
                                    where
                                         her.id_exr_quoted_cur<>her.id_exr_quotation_cur
                                )srq_fx on ndna.ndna_quotation_cur=srq_fx.id_exr_quotation_cur
                    ) srq
                    where
                         srq.index_a_filtrer=1
                    ) srq1
                    where id_structure like ('_P%')
                 )srq2
            order by
                index_lig_tmp
                ,num_col
            )srq3
        )srq4
    where
         num_col=1
    )srq5
where
    --Entetes colonnes        
    (niveau='N1' and index_lig_asc=1 )    
    --Lignes Détails        
    or (niveau='N2')        
order by
    niveau, index_lig_asc,index_col 
)

UNION

(

/* Amundi Fund EN - FX rates niveau structure*/
    select
         niveau
         ,id_ligne id_groupe    
         ,id_ligne    
         ,id_colonne    
        ,'FX_RATES_'||niveau||'L'||id_ligne||'C'||id_colonne nom_bloc    
        /* Valeur Bloc*/
        ,decode(niveau||'-'||id_colonne
                ,'N00-1',rtrim(to_char(last_day(id_neve_nav_date),'dd Month','nls_date_language=english'))
                        ||to_char(id_neve_nav_date,' yyyy','nls_date_language=english')
                ,'N01-1',null
                ,'N02-1',id_exr_quoted_cur
                ,'N02-2',to_char(exr_exchange_rate,'FM999G990D000000','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''.,') 
                ,'N02-3',devise
                ) as valeur_bloc
        ,'FX_RATES_'||niveau as "TEMPLATE"
        /* champs facultatifs*/
        ,decode(niveau,'N00',1,'N01',2,'N02',3) row_level
     /*Données de DATA_STORAGE*/    
    ,decode(niveau||'-'||id_colonne
            ,'N00-1','Titre de la note'
            ,'N01-1','Phrase d''intro de la note'
            ,'N02-1','Code devise de la structure'
            ,'N02-2','Parité de change'
            ,'N02-3','Code devise de cotation'
           ) as description_bloc    
    /*root*/
    ,'[root]'
        ||'[ga]'||?||'[/ga]'
         ||'[st]'||id_structure||'[/st]'
         ||'[dt]'||?||'[/dt]'
         ||'[tb]DIV_FX_RATES[/tb]'
         ||'[co]'||id_colonne||'[/co]'
         ||'[li]'||id_ligne||'[/li]'
         ||'[gr]'||id_ligne||'[/gr]'
         ||'[ni]'||niveau||'[/ni]'
         ||'[ic]'||
         case 
            when niveau='N02' then id_exr_quoted_cur||'/'||devise||'[/ic]'
            end
         ||'[/ic]'
    /*root*/
    ||'[/root]'
    as info_bloc
    from
        (
        select
            dense_rank() over(order by niveau,srq4.id_exr_quoted_cur) id_ligne                                    
            ,srq4.*
        from
            (
            select
                srq3.*
                ,srq2.*
            from
                (
                /*Titre Note*/
                select 1 as id_colonne,'N00' as niveau from dual
                union
                /* Commentaire introduction*/
                select 1,'N01' as niveau from dual
                union
                /*Lignes détail*/
                select 1,'N02' from dual union select 2,'N02' from dual union select 3,'N02' from dual
                )srq3 
                ,
                (        
                select
                    row_number() over(order by srq1.id_exr_quoted_cur) index_lig
                    ,srq1.*        
                from
                    (
                                select distinct
                                    srq.id_structure
                                    ,srq.devise
                                    ,srq.exr_exchange_rate
                                    ,srq.id_exr_quoted_cur
                                    ,max(srq.id_neve_nav_date) over()id_neve_nav_date
                                from
                                    (
                                    select
                                        row_number() over(partition by srq_fx.id_exr_quoted_cur, fnd_fx_fixing order by srq_fx.id_exr_quoted_cur, fnd_fx_fixing) index_a_filtrer
                                        ,qs.id_structure
                                        ,qs.devise
                                        ,rf.id_fnd_code
                                        ,rf.fnd_lng_description
                                        ,rf.fnd_fx_fixing
                                        ,srq_fx.id_exr_quoted_cur
                                        ,srq_fx.id_exr_quotation_date
                                        ,srq_fx.id_exr_quotation_cur
                                        ,srq_fx.exr_exchange_rate
                                        ,srq_tmp.id_neve_nav_date    
                                    from
                                        qxp.qxp_structure qs
                                        join qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc on qs.id_structure=qasgc.id_structure
                                            and qasgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                                            and qasgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
                                        join owb_dwh.ref_fund rf on qasgc.id_fnd_code=rf.id_fnd_code
                                        join
                                                ( 
                                                select distinct
                                                    max(ne.key_ref_fund) over(partition by rf.id_fnd_code) key_ref_fund
                                                    ,max(ne.key_nav_sequence) over(partition by rf.id_fnd_code) key_nav_sequence
                                                    ,max(ne.id_neve_nav_date) over(partition by rf.id_fnd_code) id_neve_nav_date
                                                    ,max(ne.id_neve_nav_date) over () id_neve_nav_date_max
                                                from
                                                    qxp.qxp_structure qs
                                                    join qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc on qs.id_structure=qasgc.id_structure
                                                         and qasgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                                                         and qasgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
                                                    join owb_dwh.ref_fund rf on qasgc.id_fnd_code=rf.id_fnd_code
                                                    join owb_dwh.nav_event ne on rf.key_ref_fund=ne.key_ref_fund    
                                                         and ne.id_neve_nav_date <= to_date(?)
                                                         and ne.ID_NEVE_NAV_TYPE = 'MAIN'
                                                         and ne.NEVE_VALIDITY_STATUS = 'Y'
                                                )srq_tmp on rf.key_ref_fund=srq_tmp.key_ref_fund
                                        join
                                            (                                
                                            select distinct
                                                her.id_exr_quoted_cur
                                                ,her.id_exr_quotation_date
                                                ,her.id_exr_quotation_cur
                                                ,her.exr_exchange_rate                                
                                            from
                                                qxp.qxp_structure qs
                                            join qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc on qs.id_structure=qasgc.id_structure
                                                and qasgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                                                and qasgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
                                            join owb_dwh.ref_fund rf on qasgc.id_fnd_code=rf.id_fnd_code   
                                                and rf.fnd_end_validity='31/12/2199'
                                            join owb_dwh.his_exchange_rate her on id_exr_fx_fixing=rf.fnd_fx_fixing
                                                 and her.id_exr_quotation_cur =qs.devise
                                            join 
                                            /*Sous requête de sélection de dernier objectif de cours le plus fréquent*/
                                                 (
                                                    select distinct 
                                                        rfa.ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE,
                                                        first_value(rfa.FND_FX_FIXING) over(order by rfa.nb_fix desc,decode(rfa.fnd_fx_fixing,'FIXING\WMC',1,2) ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) AS choix_fixing 
                                                    from
                                                    (
                                                    select 
                                                        rfs.ID_FND_CODE
                                                        ,max (nes.ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE) over () as ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE
                                                        ,rfs.FND_FX_FIXING
                                                        ,count (rfs.FND_FX_FIXING) over(partition by rfs.FND_FX_FIXING) as nb_fix
                                                    from
                                                        qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
                                                    join owb_dwh.ref_fund rfs on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = rfs.ID_FND_CODE
                                                    join owb_dwh.nav_event nes on rfs.key_ref_fund = nes.KEY_REF_FUND
                                                    where 
                                                        asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                                                        and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
                                                        and nes.ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE <= to_date(?)
                                                        and nes.ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE > to_date(?)-30
                                                        and nes.ID_NEVE_NAV_TYPE = 'MAIN'
                                                        and nes.NEVE_VALIDITY_STATUS = 'Y'
                                                        and nes.KEY_NAV_SEQUENCE in 
                                                            (
                                                            select distinct
                                                                max(nei.KEY_NAV_SEQUENCE) over(partition by asgc.ID_FND_CODE) as KEY_NAV_SEQUENCE
                                                            from 
                                                                qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
                                                                join owb_dwh.ref_fund rfi on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = rfi.ID_FND_CODE
                                                                join owb_dwh.nav_event nei on rfi.key_ref_fund = nei.KEY_REF_FUND
                                                                left join qxp.qxp_compartiment qslc on qslc.id_fnd_code=asgc.id_fnd_code
                                                            where
                                                                (qslc.date_fin_compart is null or qslc.date_fin_compart>=to_date(?))
                                                                and asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                                                                and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
                                                                and nei.ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE <= to_date(?)
                                                                and nei.ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE > to_date(?)-30
                                                                and nei.ID_NEVE_NAV_TYPE = 'MAIN'
                                                                and nei.NEVE_VALIDITY_STATUS = 'Y'
                                                            )
                                                        order by count (rfs.FND_FX_FIXING) over(partition by rfs.FND_FX_FIXING) desc,decode(rfs.fnd_fx_fixing,'FIXING\WMC',1,2)
                                                    )rfa
                                                 )srq0 on her.id_exr_fx_fixing= srq0.choix_fixing
                                                        and her.id_exr_quotation_date=srq0.id_neve_nav_date
                                                where
                                                     her.id_exr_quoted_cur<>her.id_exr_quotation_cur
                                            )srq_fx on rf.fnd_currency=srq_fx.id_exr_quoted_cur
                                ) srq
                                where
                                     srq.index_a_filtrer=1
                    )srq1
                    where id_structure not like ('_P%')
                )srq2
            )srq4
        where
             /*Titre Note*/        
             (niveau='N00' and index_lig=1)    
             /* Commentaire introduction*/        
             or (niveau='N01' and index_lig=1)    
            /*Lignes Détail*/        
            or (niveau='N02')        
        order by
            niveau,id_ligne,id_colonne
        )
)
