Caused by: org.springframework.dao.DataIntegrityViolationException: PreparedStatementCallback; SQL [select 
niveau
,id_groupe
,id_ligne
,id_colonne
,nom_bloc
,valeur_bloc
,"Template"
,row_level
,description_bloc
,info_bloc
from
(
/* Pioneer EN - FX rates niveau structure RAF */
select
     niveau
     ,dense_rank() over(order by niveau,index_lig_asc) id_groupe
     ,dense_rank() over(order by niveau,index_lig_asc) id_ligne
     ,index_col id_colonne
    ,'FX_RATES_N'||decode(niveau,'N1',1,'N2',2)||'L'||dense_rank() over(order by niveau,index_lig_asc)||'C'||index_col nom_bloc    
    ,decode(niveau||'-'||index_col
            ,'N1-1','1 '||devise|| ' ='
            ,'N1-2','1 '||devise|| ' ='
            ,'N2-1',to_char(exr_exchange_rate_col1,'FM999G990D00000','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''.,') 
            ,'N2-2',id_exr_quotation_cur_col1
            ,'N2-3',to_char(exr_exchange_rate_col2,'FM999G990D00000','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''.,') 
            ,'N2-4',id_exr_quotation_cur_col2
            ) as valeur_bloc
    ,'FX_RATES_N'||decode(niveau,'N1',1,'N2',2)||'_C' "Template"
    ,decode(niveau,'N1',1,'N2',2) row_level
    ,decode(niveau||'-'||index_col
            ,'N1-1','En-tete colonne 1'
            ,'N1-2','En-tete colonne 2'
            ,'N2-1','Data colonne 1'
            ,'N2-2','Data colonne 2'
            ,'N2-3','Data colonne 3'
            ,'N2-4','Data colonne 4'
            ) as description_bloc
    /*root*/
    ,'[root]'
        ||'[ga]'||(select distinct id_gabarit from qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc where qasgc.id_fnd_code = ?)||'[/ga]'
         ||'[st]'||(select distinct id_structure from qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc where qasgc.id_fnd_code = ?)||'[/st]'
         ||'[dt]'||?||'[/dt]'
         ||'[fd][/fd]' 
         ||'[tl][/tl]'
         ||'[tb]TAB_FX_RATES[/tb]'
         ||'[co]'||index_col||'[/co]'
         ||'[li]'||dense_rank() over(order by niveau,index_lig_asc)||'[/li]'
         ||'[gr]'||dense_rank() over(order by niveau,index_lig_asc)||'[/gr]'
         ||'[ni]'||niveau||'[/ni]'
         ||'[vb][/vb]'              
        ||'[ic]'||case 
                       when niveau='N2' and index_col in (1,2) then devise||'_'||id_exr_quotation_cur_col1
                       when niveau='N2' and index_col in (3,4) then devise||'_'||id_exr_quotation_cur_col2               
                       end 
                ||'[/ic]'
    /*root*/
    ||'[/root]' info_bloc
from
    (
    -- En-tetes de colonnes (2)
    select 1 as index_col,'N1' as niveau from dual union select 2,'N1' from dual 
    union
    --- En-tetes de ligne détail
    select 1,'N2' from dual union select 2,'N2' from dual union select 3,'N2' from dual union select 4,'N2' from dual
    )srq6 
    ,
    (        
    select
        srq4.*        
    from
        (
        select
            index_lig_tmp
            ,index_lig_asc
            ,num_col
            ,devise
            ,decode(num_col,1,exr_exchange_rate)exr_exchange_rate_col1
            ,decode(num_col,1,id_exr_quotation_cur)id_exr_quotation_cur_col1
            ,decode(num_col,1,lead(exr_exchange_rate,1) over (order by index_lig_tmp,num_col))exr_exchange_rate_col2
            ,decode(num_col,1,lead(id_exr_quotation_cur,1) over (order by index_lig_tmp,num_col))id_exr_quotation_cur_col2        
        from
            (
            select
                row_number() over(partition by num_col order by srq2.id_exr_quotation_cur) index_lig_tmp
                ,srq2.*
            from
                (    
                select
                    row_number() over(order by srq1.id_exr_quotation_cur) index_lig_asc
                    ,case when row_number() over(order by srq1.id_exr_quotation_cur) <= (count(*) over()/2 +0.5) then 1 else 2 end num_col
--                    ,case when mod(row_number() over(order by srq1.id_exr_quotation_cur),2)=0 then 2 else 1 end num_col
                    ,devise
                    ,srq1.exr_exchange_rate
                    ,srq1.id_exr_quotation_cur        
                from
                    (            
                    select distinct
                         srq.id_structure
                        ,srq.devise
                        ,srq.exr_exchange_rate
                        ,srq.id_exr_quotation_cur
                    from
                        (
                        select
                            row_number() over(partition by srq_fx.id_exr_quotation_cur, fnd_fx_fixing order by srq_fx.id_exr_quotation_cur, fnd_fx_fixing) index_a_filtrer
                            ,
                            qs.id_structure
                            ,qs.devise
                            ,rf.id_fnd_code
                            ,rf.fnd_lng_description
                            ,rf.fnd_fx_fixing
                            ,srq_fx.id_exr_quoted_cur
                            ,srq_fx.id_exr_quotation_date
                            ,srq_fx.id_exr_quotation_cur
                            ,srq_fx.exr_exchange_rate
                            ,srq_tmp.id_neve_nav_date    
                        from
                            qxp.qxp_structure qs
                            join qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc on qs.id_structure=qasgc.id_structure
                                and qasgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                                and qasgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
                            join owb_dwh.ref_fund rf on qasgc.id_fnd_code=rf.id_fnd_code
                            join
                                    ( 
                                    select distinct
                                        max(ne.key_ref_fund) over(partition by rf.id_fnd_code) key_ref_fund
                                        ,max(ne.key_nav_sequence) over(partition by rf.id_fnd_code) key_nav_sequence
                                        ,max(ne.id_neve_nav_date) over(partition by rf.id_fnd_code) id_neve_nav_date
                                        ,max(ne.id_neve_nav_date) over () id_neve_nav_date_max
                                    from
                                        qxp.qxp_structure qs
                                        join qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc on qs.id_structure=qasgc.id_structure
                                             and qasgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                                             and qasgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
                                        join owb_dwh.ref_fund rf on qasgc.id_fnd_code=rf.id_fnd_code
                                        join owb_dwh.nav_event ne on rf.key_ref_fund=ne.key_ref_fund    
                                             and ne.id_neve_nav_date <= ?
                                             and ne.ID_NEVE_NAV_TYPE = 'MAIN'
                                             and ne.NEVE_VALIDITY_STATUS = 'Y'
                                        left join qxp.qxp_compartiment qslc on qslc.id_fnd_code=qasgc.id_fnd_code
                                    where
                                        (qslc.date_fin_compart is null or qslc.date_fin_compart>=?)
                                    )srq_tmp on rf.key_ref_fund=srq_tmp.key_ref_fund
                            join owb_dwh.nav_detailed_net_asset ndna on srq_tmp.key_nav_sequence = ndna.key_nav_sequence
                            join owb_dwh.ref_instrument ri on ndna.key_ref_instrument=ri.key_ref_instrument
                                 and ri.id_ins_category in ('VMOB','CRNE','CAT','FUTU','OPTI','SWAT','TRES')--Inclure TRES ? A priori non
                            join
                                (                                
                                select distinct
                                    her.id_exr_quoted_cur
                                    ,her.id_exr_quotation_date
                                    ,her.id_exr_quotation_cur
                                    ,her.exr_exchange_rate                                
                                from
                                    qxp.qxp_structure qs
                                join qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc on qs.id_structure=qasgc.id_structure
                                    and qasgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                                    and qasgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
                                join owb_dwh.ref_fund rf on qasgc.id_fnd_code=rf.id_fnd_code                            
                                join owb_dwh.his_exchange_rate her on id_exr_fx_fixing=fnd_fx_fixing
                                     and her.id_exr_quoted_cur =qs.devise
                                join 
                                /*Sous requête de sélection de dernier objectif de cours le plus fréquent*/
                                     (
                                        select distinct 
                                            rfa.ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE,
                                            first_value(rfa.FND_FX_FIXING) over(order by rfa.nb_fix desc,decode(rfa.fnd_fx_fixing,'FIXING\WMC',1,2) ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) AS choix_fixing 
                                        from
                                        (
                                        select 
                                            rfs.ID_FND_CODE
                                            ,max (nes.ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE) over () as ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE
                                            ,rfs.FND_FX_FIXING
                                            ,count (rfs.FND_FX_FIXING) over(partition by rfs.FND_FX_FIXING) as nb_fix
                                        from
                                            qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
                                        join owb_dwh.ref_fund rfs on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = rfs.ID_FND_CODE
                                        join owb_dwh.nav_event nes on rfs.key_ref_fund = nes.KEY_REF_FUND
                                        where 
                                            asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                                            and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
                                            and nes.ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE <= to_date(?)
                                            and nes.ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE > to_date(?)-31
--                                            and nes.ID_NEVE_NAV_SORT = 'OFF'
                                            and nes.ID_NEVE_NAV_TYPE = 'MAIN'
                                            and nes.NEVE_VALIDITY_STATUS = 'Y'
                                            and nes.KEY_NAV_SEQUENCE in 
                                                (
                                                select distinct
                                                    max(nei.KEY_NAV_SEQUENCE) over(partition by asgc.ID_FND_CODE) as KEY_NAV_SEQUENCE
                                                from 
                                                    qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
                                                    join owb_dwh.ref_fund rfi on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = rfi.ID_FND_CODE
                                                    join owb_dwh.nav_event nei on rfi.key_ref_fund = nei.KEY_REF_FUND
                                                where 
                                                    asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                                                    and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
                                                    and nei.ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE <= to_date(?)
                                                    and nei.ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE > to_date(?)-31
--                                                    and nei.ID_NEVE_NAV_SORT = 'OFF'
                                                    and nei.ID_NEVE_NAV_TYPE = 'MAIN'
                                                    and nei.NEVE_VALIDITY_STATUS = 'Y'
                                                )
                                            order by count (rfs.FND_FX_FIXING) over(partition by rfs.FND_FX_FIXING) desc,decode(rfs.fnd_fx_fixing,'FIXING\WMC',1,2)
                                        )rfa
                                     )srq0 on her.id_exr_fx_fixing= srq0.choix_fixing
                                            and her.id_exr_quotation_date=srq0.id_neve_nav_date
                                    where
                                         her.id_exr_quoted_cur<>her.id_exr_quotation_cur
                                )srq_fx on ndna.ndna_quotation_cur=srq_fx.id_exr_quotation_cur
                    ) srq
                    where
                         srq.index_a_filtrer=1
                    ) srq1
                    where id_structure like ('_P%')
                 )srq2
            order by
                index_lig_tmp
                ,num_col
            )srq3
        )srq4
    where
         num_col=1
    )srq5
where
    --Entetes colonnes        
    (niveau='N1' and index_lig_asc=1 )    
    --Lignes Détails        
    or (niveau='N2')        
order by
    niveau, index_lig_asc,index_col 
)

UNION

(

/* Amundi Fund EN - FX rates niveau structure*/
    select
         niveau
         ,id_ligne id_groupe    
         ,id_ligne    
         ,id_colonne    
        ,'FX_RATES_'||niveau||'L'||id_ligne||'C'||id_colonne nom_bloc    
        /* Valeur Bloc*/
        ,decode(niveau||'-'||id_colonne
                ,'N00-1',rtrim(to_char(last_day(id_neve_nav_date),'dd Month','nls_date_language=english'))
                        ||to_char(id_neve_nav_date,' yyyy','nls_date_language=english')
                ,'N01-1',null
                ,'N02-1',id_exr_quoted_cur
                ,'N02-2',to_char(exr_exchange_rate,'FM999G990D000000','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''.,') 
                ,'N02-3',devise
                ) as valeur_bloc
        ,'FX_RATES_'||niveau as "TEMPLATE"
        /* champs facultatifs*/
        ,decode(niveau,'N00',1,'N01',2,'N02',3) row_level
     /*Données de DATA_STORAGE*/    
    ,decode(niveau||'-'||id_colonne
            ,'N00-1','Titre de la note'
            ,'N01-1','Phrase d''intro de la note'
            ,'N02-1','Code devise de la structure'
            ,'N02-2','Parité de change'
            ,'N02-3','Code devise de cotation'
           ) as description_bloc    
    /*root*/
    ,'[root]'
        ||'[ga]'||?||'[/ga]'
         ||'[st]'||id_structure||'[/st]'
         ||'[dt]'||?||'[/dt]'
         ||'[tb]DIV_FX_RATES[/tb]'
         ||'[co]'||id_colonne||'[/co]'
         ||'[li]'||id_ligne||'[/li]'
         ||'[gr]'||id_ligne||'[/gr]'
         ||'[ni]'||niveau||'[/ni]'
         ||'[ic]'||
         case 
            when niveau='N02' then id_exr_quoted_cur||'/'||devise||'[/ic]'
            end
         ||'[/ic]'
    /*root*/
    ||'[/root]'
    as info_bloc
    from
        (
        select
            dense_rank() over(order by niveau,srq4.id_exr_quoted_cur) id_ligne                                    
            ,srq4.*
        from
            (
            select
                srq3.*
                ,srq2.*
            from
                (
                /*Titre Note*/
                select 1 as id_colonne,'N00' as niveau from dual
                union
                /* Commentaire introduction*/
                select 1,'N01' as niveau from dual
                union
                /*Lignes détail*/
                select 1,'N02' from dual union select 2,'N02' from dual union select 3,'N02' from dual
                )srq3 
                ,
                (        
                select
                    row_number() over(order by srq1.id_exr_quoted_cur) index_lig
                    ,srq1.*        
                from
                    (
                                select distinct
                                    srq.id_structure
                                    ,srq.devise
                                    ,srq.exr_exchange_rate
                                    ,srq.id_exr_quoted_cur
                                    ,max(srq.id_neve_nav_date) over()id_neve_nav_date
                                from
                                    (
                                    select
                                        row_number() over(partition by srq_fx.id_exr_quoted_cur, fnd_fx_fixing order by srq_fx.id_exr_quoted_cur, fnd_fx_fixing) index_a_filtrer
                                        ,qs.id_structure
                                        ,qs.devise
                                        ,rf.id_fnd_code
                                        ,rf.fnd_lng_description
                                        ,rf.fnd_fx_fixing
                                        ,srq_fx.id_exr_quoted_cur
                                        ,srq_fx.id_exr_quotation_date
                                        ,srq_fx.id_exr_quotation_cur
                                        ,srq_fx.exr_exchange_rate
                                        ,srq_tmp.id_neve_nav_date    
                                    from
                                        qxp.qxp_structure qs
                                        join qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc on qs.id_structure=qasgc.id_structure
                                            and qasgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                                            and qasgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
                                        join owb_dwh.ref_fund rf on qasgc.id_fnd_code=rf.id_fnd_code
                                        join
                                                ( 
                                                select distinct
                                                    max(ne.key_ref_fund) over(partition by rf.id_fnd_code) key_ref_fund
                                                    ,max(ne.key_nav_sequence) over(partition by rf.id_fnd_code) key_nav_sequence
                                                    ,max(ne.id_neve_nav_date) over(partition by rf.id_fnd_code) id_neve_nav_date
                                                    ,max(ne.id_neve_nav_date) over () id_neve_nav_date_max
                                                from
                                                    qxp.qxp_structure qs
                                                    join qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc on qs.id_structure=qasgc.id_structure
                                                         and qasgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                                                         and qasgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
                                                    join owb_dwh.ref_fund rf on qasgc.id_fnd_code=rf.id_fnd_code
                                                    join owb_dwh.nav_event ne on rf.key_ref_fund=ne.key_ref_fund    
                                                         and ne.id_neve_nav_date <= to_date(?)
                                                         and ne.ID_NEVE_NAV_TYPE = 'MAIN'
                                                         and ne.NEVE_VALIDITY_STATUS = 'Y'
                                                )srq_tmp on rf.key_ref_fund=srq_tmp.key_ref_fund
                                        join
                                            (                                
                                            select distinct
                                                her.id_exr_quoted_cur
                                                ,her.id_exr_quotation_date
                                                ,her.id_exr_quotation_cur
                                                ,her.exr_exchange_rate                                
                                            from
                                                qxp.qxp_structure qs
                                            join qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc on qs.id_structure=qasgc.id_structure
                                                and qasgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                                                and qasgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
                                            join owb_dwh.ref_fund rf on qasgc.id_fnd_code=rf.id_fnd_code   
                                                and rf.fnd_end_validity='31/12/2199'
                                            join owb_dwh.his_exchange_rate her on id_exr_fx_fixing=rf.fnd_fx_fixing
                                                 and her.id_exr_quotation_cur =qs.devise
                                            join 
                                            /*Sous requête de sélection de dernier objectif de cours le plus fréquent*/
                                                 (
                                                    select distinct 
                                                        rfa.ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE,
                                                        first_value(rfa.FND_FX_FIXING) over(order by rfa.nb_fix desc,decode(rfa.fnd_fx_fixing,'FIXING\WMC',1,2) ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) AS choix_fixing 
                                                    from
                                                    (
                                                    select 
                                                        rfs.ID_FND_CODE
                                                        ,max (nes.ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE) over () as ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE
                                                        ,rfs.FND_FX_FIXING
                                                        ,count (rfs.FND_FX_FIXING) over(partition by rfs.FND_FX_FIXING) as nb_fix
                                                    from
                                                        qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
                                                    join owb_dwh.ref_fund rfs on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = rfs.ID_FND_CODE
                                                    join owb_dwh.nav_event nes on rfs.key_ref_fund = nes.KEY_REF_FUND
                                                    where 
                                                        asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                                                        and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
                                                        and nes.ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE <= to_date(?)
                                                        and nes.ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE > to_date(?)-30
                                                        and nes.ID_NEVE_NAV_TYPE = 'MAIN'
                                                        and nes.NEVE_VALIDITY_STATUS = 'Y'
                                                        and nes.KEY_NAV_SEQUENCE in 
                                                            (
                                                            select distinct
                                                                max(nei.KEY_NAV_SEQUENCE) over(partition by asgc.ID_FND_CODE) as KEY_NAV_SEQUENCE
                                                            from 
                                                                qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
                                                                join owb_dwh.ref_fund rfi on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = rfi.ID_FND_CODE
                                                                join owb_dwh.nav_event nei on rfi.key_ref_fund = nei.KEY_REF_FUND
                                                                left join qxp.qxp_compartiment qslc on qslc.id_fnd_code=asgc.id_fnd_code
                                                            where
                                                                (qslc.date_fin_compart is null or qslc.date_fin_compart>=to_date(?))
                                                                and asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                                                                and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
                                                                and nei.ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE <= to_date(?)
                                                                and nei.ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE > to_date(?)-30
                                                                and nei.ID_NEVE_NAV_TYPE = 'MAIN'
                                                                and nei.NEVE_VALIDITY_STATUS = 'Y'
                                                            )
                                                        order by count (rfs.FND_FX_FIXING) over(partition by rfs.FND_FX_FIXING) desc,decode(rfs.fnd_fx_fixing,'FIXING\WMC',1,2)
                                                    )rfa
                                                 )srq0 on her.id_exr_fx_fixing= srq0.choix_fixing
                                                        and her.id_exr_quotation_date=srq0.id_neve_nav_date
                                                where
                                                     her.id_exr_quoted_cur<>her.id_exr_quotation_cur
                                            )srq_fx on rf.fnd_currency=srq_fx.id_exr_quoted_cur
                                ) srq
                                where
                                     srq.index_a_filtrer=1
                    )srq1
                    where id_structure not like ('_P%')
                )srq2
            )srq4
        where
             /*Titre Note*/        
             (niveau='N00' and index_lig=1)    
             /* Commentaire introduction*/        
             or (niveau='N01' and index_lig=1)    
            /*Lignes Détail*/        
            or (niveau='N02')        
        order by
            niveau,id_ligne,id_colonne
        )
)


]; ORA-01830: date format picture ends before converting entire input string

2026-06-27T07:18:16.115+05:30  WARN 15080 --- [quark-engine-service] [nio-8080-exec-2] [b81aaabf5ef12b37f8da9614b6d9dc8f-413ffd0b28168757] .e.s.t.i.CompartimentTaskProcessStrategy : No run found for compartment [409417] in task [3010], run [488654]
2026-06-27T07:18:16.292+05:30 ERROR 15080 --- [quark-engine-service] [nio-8080-exec-2] [b81aaabf5ef12b37f8da9614b6d9dc8f-413ffd0b28168757] c.s.s.a.q.e.i.d.i.DynamicQueryPortImpl   : DynamicQueryPort SQL execution failed: PreparedStatementCallback; SQL [/* Pioneer EN - FX rates niveau structure
RAF
*/
select
     niveau
     ,dense_rank() over(order by niveau,index_lig_asc) id_groupe
     ,dense_rank() over(order by niveau,index_lig_asc) id_ligne
     ,index_col id_colonne
    ,'FX_RATES_N'||decode(niveau,'N1',1,'N2',2)||'L'||dense_rank() over(order by niveau,index_lig_asc)||'C'||index_col nom_bloc    
    ,decode(niveau||'-'||index_col
            ,'N1-1','1 '||devise|| ' ='
            ,'N1-2','1 '||devise|| ' ='
            ,'N2-1',to_char(exr_exchange_rate_col1,'FM999G990D00000','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''.,') 
            ,'N2-2',id_exr_quotation_cur_col1
            ,'N2-3',to_char(exr_exchange_rate_col2,'FM999G990D00000','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''.,') 
            ,'N2-4',id_exr_quotation_cur_col2
            ) as valeur_bloc
    ,'FX_RATES_N'||decode(niveau,'N1',1,'N2',2)||'_C' "Template"
    ,decode(niveau,'N1',1,'N2',2) row_level
    ,decode(niveau||'-'||index_col
            ,'N1-1','En-tete colonne 1'
            ,'N1-2','En-tete colonne 2'
            ,'N2-1','Data colonne 1'
            ,'N2-2','Data colonne 2'
            ,'N2-3','Data colonne 3'
            ,'N2-4','Data colonne 4'
            ) as description_bloc
    /*root*/
    ,'[root]'
        ||'[ga]'||(select distinct id_gabarit from qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc where qasgc.id_fnd_code = ?)||'[/ga]'
         ||'[st]'||(select distinct id_structure from qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc where qasgc.id_fnd_code = ?)||'[/st]'
         ||'[dt]'||?||'[/dt]'
         ||'[fd][/fd]' 
         ||'[tl][/tl]'
         ||'[tb]TAB_FX_RATES[/tb]'
         ||'[co]'||index_col||'[/co]'
         ||'[li]'||dense_rank() over(order by niveau,index_lig_asc)||'[/li]'
         ||'[gr]'||dense_rank() over(order by niveau,index_lig_asc)||'[/gr]'
         ||'[ni]'||niveau||'[/ni]'
         ||'[vb][/vb]'              
        ||'[ic]'||case 
                       when niveau='N2' and index_col in (1,2) then devise||'_'||id_exr_quotation_cur_col1
                       when niveau='N2' and index_col in (3,4) then devise||'_'||id_exr_quotation_cur_col2               
                       end 
                ||'[/ic]'
    /*root*/
    ||'[/root]'
from
    (
    -- En-tetes de colonnes (2)
    select 1 as index_col,'N1' as niveau from dual union select 2,'N1' from dual 
    union
    --- En-tetes de ligne détail
    select 1,'N2' from dual union select 2,'N2' from dual union select 3,'N2' from dual union select 4,'N2' from dual
    )srq6 
    ,
    (        
    select
        srq4.*        
    from
        (
        select
            index_lig_tmp
            ,index_lig_asc
            ,num_col
            ,devise
            ,decode(num_col,1,exr_exchange_rate)exr_exchange_rate_col1
            ,decode(num_col,1,id_exr_quotation_cur)id_exr_quotation_cur_col1
            ,decode(num_col,1,lead(exr_exchange_rate,1) over (order by index_lig_tmp,num_col))exr_exchange_rate_col2
            ,decode(num_col,1,lead(id_exr_quotation_cur,1) over (order by index_lig_tmp,num_col))id_exr_quotation_cur_col2        
        from
            (
            select
                row_number() over(partition by num_col order by srq2.id_exr_quotation_cur) index_lig_tmp
                ,srq2.*
            from
                (    
                select
                    row_number() over(order by srq1.id_exr_quotation_cur) index_lig_asc
                    ,case when row_number() over(order by srq1.id_exr_quotation_cur) <= (count(*) over()/2 +0.5) then 1 else 2 end num_col
--                    ,case when mod(row_number() over(order by srq1.id_exr_quotation_cur),2)=0 then 2 else 1 end num_col
                    ,devise
                    ,srq1.exr_exchange_rate
                    ,srq1.id_exr_quotation_cur        
                from
                    (            
                    select distinct
                         srq.id_structure
                        ,srq.devise
                        ,srq.exr_exchange_rate
                        ,srq.id_exr_quotation_cur
                    from
                        (
                        select
                            row_number() over(partition by srq_fx.id_exr_quotation_cur, fnd_fx_fixing order by srq_fx.id_exr_quotation_cur, fnd_fx_fixing) index_a_filtrer
                            ,
                            qs.id_structure
                            ,qs.devise
                            ,rf.id_fnd_code
                            ,rf.fnd_lng_description
                            ,rf.fnd_fx_fixing
                            ,srq_fx.id_exr_quoted_cur
                            ,srq_fx.id_exr_quotation_date
                            ,srq_fx.id_exr_quotation_cur
                            ,srq_fx.exr_exchange_rate
                            ,srq_tmp.id_neve_nav_date    
                        from
                            qxp.qxp_structure qs
                            join qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc on qs.id_structure=qasgc.id_structure
                                and qasgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                                and qasgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
                            join owb_dwh.ref_fund rf on qasgc.id_fnd_code=rf.id_fnd_code
                                /*and rf.fnd_end_validity='31/12/2199'*/
                            join
                                    ( 
                                    select distinct
                                        max(ne.key_ref_fund) over(partition by rf.id_fnd_code) key_ref_fund
                                        ,max(ne.key_nav_sequence) over(partition by rf.id_fnd_code) key_nav_sequence
                                        ,max(ne.id_neve_nav_date) over(partition by rf.id_fnd_code) id_neve_nav_date
                                        ,max(ne.id_neve_nav_date) over () id_neve_nav_date_max
                                    from
                                        qxp.qxp_structure qs
                                        join qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc on qs.id_structure=qasgc.id_structure
                                             and qasgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                                             and qasgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
                                        join owb_dwh.ref_fund rf on qasgc.id_fnd_code=rf.id_fnd_code
                                        join owb_dwh.nav_event ne on rf.key_ref_fund=ne.key_ref_fund    
                                             and ne.id_neve_nav_date <= ?
                                             and ne.ID_NEVE_NAV_TYPE = 'MAIN'
                                             and ne.NEVE_VALIDITY_STATUS = 'Y'
                                        left join qxp.qxp_compartiment qslc on qslc.id_fnd_code=qasgc.id_fnd_code
                                    where
                                        (qslc.date_fin_compart is null or qslc.date_fin_compart>=?)
                                    )srq_tmp on rf.key_ref_fund=srq_tmp.key_ref_fund
                            join owb_dwh.nav_detailed_net_asset ndna on srq_tmp.key_nav_sequence = ndna.key_nav_sequence
                            join owb_dwh.ref_instrument ri on ndna.key_ref_instrument=ri.key_ref_instrument
                                 and ri.id_ins_category in ('VMOB','CRNE','CAT','FUTU','OPTI','SWAT','TRES')--Inclure TRES ? A priori non
                            join
                                (                                
                                select distinct
                                    her.id_exr_quoted_cur
                                    ,her.id_exr_quotation_date
                                    ,her.id_exr_quotation_cur
                                    ,her.exr_exchange_rate                                
                                from
                                    qxp.qxp_structure qs
                                join qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc on qs.id_structure=qasgc.id_structure
                                    and qasgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                                    and qasgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
                                join owb_dwh.ref_fund rf on qasgc.id_fnd_code=rf.id_fnd_code                            
                                join owb_dwh.his_exchange_rate her on id_exr_fx_fixing=fnd_fx_fixing
                                     and her.id_exr_quoted_cur =qs.devise
                                join 
                                /*Sous requête de sélection de dernier objectif de cours le plus fréquent*/
                                     (
                                        select distinct 
                                            rfa.ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE,
                                            first_value(rfa.FND_FX_FIXING) over(order by rfa.nb_fix desc,decode(rfa.fnd_fx_fixing,'FIXING\WMC',1,2) ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) AS choix_fixing 
                                        from
                                        (
                                        select 
                                            rfs.ID_FND_CODE
                                            ,max (nes.ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE) over () as ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE
                                            ,rfs.FND_FX_FIXING
                                            ,count (rfs.FND_FX_FIXING) over(partition by rfs.FND_FX_FIXING) as nb_fix
                                        from
                                            qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
                                        join owb_dwh.ref_fund rfs on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = rfs.ID_FND_CODE
                                        join owb_dwh.nav_event nes on rfs.key_ref_fund = nes.KEY_REF_FUND
                                        where 
                                            asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                                            and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
                                            and nes.ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE <= to_date(?)
                                            and nes.ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE > to_date(?)-31
--                                            and nes.ID_NEVE_NAV_SORT = 'OFF'
                                            and nes.ID_NEVE_NAV_TYPE = 'MAIN'
                                            and nes.NEVE_VALIDITY_STATUS = 'Y'
                                            and nes.KEY_NAV_SEQUENCE in 
                                                (
                                                select distinct
                                                    max(nei.KEY_NAV_SEQUENCE) over(partition by asgc.ID_FND_CODE) as KEY_NAV_SEQUENCE
                                                from 
                                                    qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
                                                    join owb_dwh.ref_fund rfi on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = rfi.ID_FND_CODE
                                                    join owb_dwh.nav_event nei on rfi.key_ref_fund = nei.KEY_REF_FUND
                                                where 
                                                    asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                                                    and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
                                                    and nei.ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE <= to_date(?)
                                                    and nei.ID_NEVE_NAV_DATE > to_date(?)-31
--                                                    and nei.ID_NEVE_NAV_SORT = 'OFF'
                                                    and nei.ID_NEVE_NAV_TYPE = 'MAIN'
                                                    and nei.NEVE_VALIDITY_STATUS = 'Y'
                                                )
                                            order by count (rfs.FND_FX_FIXING) over(partition by rfs.FND_FX_FIXING) desc,decode(rfs.fnd_fx_fixing,'FIXING\WMC',1,2)
                                        )rfa
                                     )srq0 on her.id_exr_fx_fixing= srq0.choix_fixing
                                            and her.id_exr_quotation_date=srq0.id_neve_nav_date
                                    where
                                         her.id_exr_quoted_cur<>her.id_exr_quotation_cur
                                )srq_fx on ndna.ndna_quotation_cur=srq_fx.id_exr_quotation_cur

     ,index_col id_colonne

            ,'N1-1','1 '||devise|| ' ='
            ,'N1-2','1 '||devise|| ' ='
            ,'N2-1',to_char(exr_exchange_rate_col1,'FM999G990D00000','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''.,')

            ,'N2-3',to_char(exr_exchange_rate_col2,'FM999G990D00000','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''.,')

            ) as valeur_bloc

    ,decode(niveau,'N1',1,'N2',2) row_level
    ,decode(niveau||'-'||index_col
            ,'N1-1','En-tete colonne 1'
            ,'N1-2','En-tete colonne 2'
            ,'N2-1','Data colonne 1'
            ,'N2-2','Data colonne 2'
            ,'N2-3','Data colonne 3'
            ,'N2-4','Data colonne 4'
            ) as description_bloc
    /*root*/
    ,'[root]'

         ||'[dt]'||?||'[/dt]'

                    ,srq1.id_exr_quotation_cur

                                and qasgc.ID_GABARIT = ?

                                and qasgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?

                                    and qasgc.ID_GABARIT = ?

                                     and her.id_exr_quoted_cur =qs.devise

Select 

prim.ID_PRESENTATION 
,prim.LANGUE 
,prim.ID_FND_CODE
,prim.position
,prim.index_Section
,prim.page
,prim.page_section
,prim.Position_ptf_section
,prim.index_col
,prim.Index_Annee
,prim.ordre_rapport
,prim.ID_RUBRIQUE 
,prim.GROUPE 	
,prim.NIVEAUX 	
,prim.LIB_BALISE 
,prim.LIB_RAPPORT
,Devise.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
,titre_date.DDate
,Devise.FND_CURRENCY
,Donnees.VALEUR
,Donnees.Valeur_pres

,prim.ordre_rapport as ID_GROUPE
,prim.ordre_rapport AS ID_LIGNE

,'BILAM_S'||prim.index_Section||'P'||prim.page||'L'||prim.ordre_rapport||'C'||prim.index_col
||'D'||Case when prim.Index_Annee is null then 'LIB' else prim.Index_Annee end||'_'||prim.ID_FND_CODE as Nom_Bloc

,Case when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Lib fond' and prim.Index_Annee is null then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
	  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Lib fond' and prim.Index_Annee is not null then Devise.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
	  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Date' and prim.Index_Annee is null then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
	  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Date' and prim.Index_Annee is not null then titre_date.DDate
	  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Devise' and prim.Index_Annee is null then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
	  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Devise' and prim.Index_Annee is not null then Devise.FND_CURRENCY
	  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)in('B','E') and prim.Index_Annee is null and prim.index_col in(0) then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
	  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)in('C','D','F','G','H') and prim.Index_Annee is null then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
	  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)in('C','D','F','G','H') and prim.Index_Annee is not null then NVL(Donnees.Valeur_pres,'-')
	  end as valeur_bloc

,'BILAM_'||prim.page||'_'|| case when prim.NIVEAUX is null then 'N5'else prim.NIVEAUX end as "TEMPLATE"
,prim.page_section as ID_SECTION

from
(
    (
    ----------------- Debut de Gestion des presence de libellés en fonction de la page gauche ou droite 
    Select 
    tri.*
    -- tri.ID_TABLEAU
    -- ,tri.ID_PRESENTATION 
    -- ,tri.LANGUE 
    -- ,tri.ID_FND_CODE
    -- ,tri.position
    -- ,tri.index_Section
    -- ,tri.page
    -- ,tri.page_section
    -- ,tri.Position_ptf_section
    -- ,tri.index_col
    -- ,tri.Index_Annee
    -- ,tri.ordre_rapport
    -- ,tri.ID_RUBRIQUE 
    -- ,tri.GROUPE 	
    -- ,tri.NIVEAUX 	
    -- ,tri.LIB_BALISE 
    -- ,tri.LIB_RAPPORT
    
    from
        (
        Select
        
        presence_ligne.ID_TABLEAU
        ,presence_ligne.ID_PRESENTATION 
        ,presence_ligne.LANGUE 
        ,Cart.ID_FND_CODE
        ,Cart.position
        ,Cart.index_Section
        ,Cart.page
        ,Cart.page_section
        ,Cart.Position_ptf_section
        ,Cart.index_col
        ,Cart.Index_Annee
        ,presence_ligne.ordre_rapport
        ,presence_ligne.ID_RUBRIQUE 
        ,presence_ligne.GROUPE 	
        ,presence_ligne.NIVEAUX 	
        ,presence_ligne.LIB_BALISE 
        ,presence_ligne.LIB_RAPPORT 
        ,case when Cart.Index_Annee = 'N1' and presence_ligne.ID_RUBRIQUE = 'A0020' then 'X' 
              when Cart.ID_FND_CODE = '111111' and Cart.Index_Annee is null and Cart.page = '1G' and presence_ligne.ID_RUBRIQUE = 'A0020' and Cart.index_col = 0  then 'X'
              when Cart.ID_FND_CODE = '111111' and Cart.Index_Annee is null and Cart.page = '1G' and presence_ligne.ID_RUBRIQUE = 'A0030' and Cart.index_col = 0  then 'X' 
              else null end as doublon
        
        from
        
            (-------------- gestion Libelle rubrique avec Presence donnée  Debut
            Select 
            --brut.ID_CHARGEMENT
                brut.ID_TABLEAU
                ,brut.ID_PRESENTATION 
                ,brut.LANGUE 
                ,brut.ordre_rapport
                ,brut.ID_RUBRIQUE 
                ,brut.GROUPE 	
                ,brut.NIVEAUX 	
                ,brut.LIB_BALISE 
                ,brut.LIB_RAPPORT 
                ,brut.VALEUR
                ,brut.affichage
            
            from
            (Select distinct
                base.ID_TABLEAU
                ,trad.ID_PRESENTATION 
                ,trad.LANGUE 
                ,rls.ordre_rapport
                ,trad.ID_RUBRIQUE 
                ,base.GROUPE
                ,trad.NIVEAUX 	
                ,trad.LIB_BALISE 
                ,trad.LIB_RAPPORT 
                ,sum(base.VALEUR) over (partition by trad.ID_RUBRIQUE ) as VALEUR
                ,case when trad.NIVEAUX is null and (base.VALEUR is null or base.VALEUR = 0) then null
                      when trad.NIVEAUX is not null then 'X'
                      when base.VALEUR <> 0 then 'X'
                      end as affichage
                
                from 
                
                qxp.QXP_SUP_LUX_REF_TRAD trad
                join qxp.QXP_SUP_LUX_SURMAP_MBD rls on trad.ID_PRESENTATION = rls.ID_PRESENTATION and trad.ID_RUBRIQUE = rls.ID_RUBRIQUE
                Left join 
                    (Select
                        MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
                        ,MBD.ID_TABLEAU
                        ,MBD.ID_PRESENTATION 
                        ,MBD.VERSION_ID_PRESENTATION 
                        ,MBD.CODE_PTF 
            -- 			,MBD.ORDRE_RAPPORT 
                        ,MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE 
                        ,MBD.GROUPE 
                        ,MBD.VALEUR 
            
                        from
                        qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD
                        join 
                        (select distinct
                        max(fic.ID_CHARGEMENT)over(partition by fic.DATE_RAPPORT) as ID_CHARGEMENT
                        from 
                         qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX fic
                         join (Select
                                srq.DDate
                                ,srq.ID_GABARIT
                                from 
                                (Select to_date(?) as DDate 
                                       ,to_number(?) as ID_GABARIT from dual
                            )srq
                         ) gabdate on fic.DATE_RAPPORT = gabdate.DDate and fic.ID_GABARIT = gabdate.ID_GABARIT 
                         JOIN qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD ON fic.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
                        where 
                        fic.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                        and MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'BILAN'
                        )fichier on fichier.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
                        
                        Where 
                        MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'BILAN'
                        and MBD.CODE_PTF = '999999'
                        )base on trad.ID_PRESENTATION = base.ID_PRESENTATION
                                 and trad.ID_RUBRIQUE = base.ID_RUBRIQUE
                Where 
                trad.ID_PRESENTATION = (select distinct 
                                            asgc.ID_PRESENTATION_PATRIMOINE 	
                                            from 
                                            qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
                                            where
                                            asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                                            and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?)
                and trad.ID_LANGUE =  (Select
                                        gab.ID_LANGUE 
                                        from
                                        qxp.qxp_gabarit gab
                                        where 
                                        gab.ID_GABARIT = ?)
                
             )brut							
             Where 
             brut.affichage is not null
                                        
            --  order by 
            --  brut.ordre_rapport			
            -------------- gestion Libelle rubrique avec Presence donnée  Fin 
            )presence_ligne,
            ( ------------- Cartesien des données et des libellés Debut
                (-- calcul du nb de SECTIONS dans le rapport et produit cartesien
                Select 
                    '111111' as id_fnd_code
                    ,0 as position
                    ,srq.index_Section
                    ,'1G' as page
                    -- positionnement des ptf dans la page .
                    ,1 as page_section
                    ,1 as Position_ptf_section
                    ,0 as index_col
                -- 	,'N0' as Index_Annee
                    ,null as Index_Annee
                    
                    from
                    (
                    -- Calcul de nb de section dans le rapport 
                    select distinct
                    -- on dit ici 11 Ptf par section en comptant page de gauche plus page de droite (4 à gauche et 7 à droite)
                -- 		ptf.id_fnd_code
                -- 		,ptf.position
                        CEIL(ROW_NUMBER()over (ORDER BY ptf.position )/11) as index_Section
                    from
                    (
                        -- ici la table des structures 
                        (select 
                        asgc.ID_FND_CODE 
                        ,asgc.position
                        from 
                        qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
                        Left join qxp.qxp_compartiment lib on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = lib.id_fnd_code
                        left join qxp.qxp_sup_mapping qsm on qsm.code_mapping_cible=asgc.id_fnd_code
                            and qsm.type_mapping='MASTER-FEEDERS'
                        where
                        asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                        and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
                        and lib.DATE_FIN_COMPART is null
                        and qsm.code_mapping_cible is null
                        )		
                        union -- code fond pour combined
                        (select '999999' ,1000 from dual)
                        )ptf
                    )srq
                
                )
                Union
                (
                Select 
                    srq.id_fnd_code
                    ,srq.position
                    ,srq.index_Section
                    ,srq.page
                    ,srq.page_section
                    ,srq.Position_ptf_section
                    ,srq.Position_ptf_section as index_col
                    ,'N0' as Index_Annee
                    
                    From
                    (
                    --- partie gerant les Lib ptf et entete
                    Select 
                    sect.id_fnd_code
                    ,sect.position
                    ,sect.index_Section
                    -- positionnement des ptf dans la page .
                    ,row_number() over(partition by sect.index_section order by sect.position) as Position_ptf_section
                    ,case when 	row_number() over(partition by sect.index_section order by sect.position)<=4 then '1G'
                                Else '2D'end as page
                    ,case when 	row_number() over(partition by sect.index_section order by sect.position)<=4 then 1
                            Else 2 end as page_section		
                    from
                        (
                        -- Calcul de nb de section dans le rapport 
                        select distinct
                        -- on dit ici 11 Ptf par section en comptant page de gauche plus page de droite (4 à gauche et 7 à droite)
                            ptf.id_fnd_code
                            ,ptf.position
                            ,CEIL(ROW_NUMBER()over (ORDER BY ptf.position )/11) as index_Section
                        from
                            (
                                -- ici la table des structures 
                                (select 
                                    asgc.ID_FND_CODE 
                                    ,asgc.position
                                    from 
                                    qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
                                    Left join qxp.qxp_compartiment lib on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = lib.id_fnd_code
                                    left join qxp.qxp_sup_mapping qsm on qsm.code_mapping_cible=asgc.id_fnd_code
                                        and qsm.type_mapping='MASTER-FEEDERS'
                                    where
                                    asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                                    and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
                                    and lib.DATE_FIN_COMPART is null
                                    and qsm.code_mapping_cible is null
                                )		
                                union -- code fond pour combined
                                (select '999999' 
                                        ,1000 								
                                        from dual
                                )
                            )ptf
                        )sect	
                    )srq
                )
                --------- gestion des sections : Fin		
                ------------- Cartesien des données et des libellés Fin
            )Cart
        )tri
        where 
        tri.doublon is null
        ----------------- Fin de Gestion des presence de libellés en fonction de la page gauche ou droite 	
    )
)prim
Left join 
(
	----------------------------------------gestion du libellé du ptf + devise : Debut
Select
srq.id_fnd_code
,srq.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
,srq.FND_CURRENCY
from
    (
        (select distinct
                    asgc.id_fnd_code
                    ,case when lib.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION is null then 'Mettre à jour le fichier des libelles' else lib.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION  end as FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
                    ,rf.FND_CURRENCY
                from
                -- ici la table des structures 
                        qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
                        join OWB_DWH.ref_fund rf on rf.id_fnd_code = asgc.ID_FND_CODE
                        Left join qxp.qxp_compartiment lib on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = lib.id_fnd_code
                        left join qxp.qxp_sup_mapping qsm on qsm.code_mapping_cible=asgc.id_fnd_code
                            and qsm.type_mapping='MASTER-FEEDERS'			 	  								   		
                where
                    asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                    and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?	
                    and rf.FND_END_VALIDITY = '31/12/2199'
                    and lib.DATE_FIN_COMPART is null
                and qsm.code_mapping_cible is null
        )
        union
        (	
        select 
                '999999' as id_fnd_code
                ,'Combined' as FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
                ,qs.DEVISE 									
                
                from 
                qxp.qxp_structure  qs
                where
                qs.ID_STRUCTURE = ?			
        )		
    )srq	
----------------------------------------gestion du libellé du ptf + devise : Fin 
)Devise on prim.ID_FND_CODE = Devise.ID_FND_CODE
Left join
(---------------------------------------gestion de la date  : Debut
Select 
srq.id_fnd_code
,srq.DATE_FIN_COMPART
,'N0' as Index_Annee
,To_char(to_date(?),'dd/mm/yyyy') as DDATE 
	  
from
    (
    (select distinct
                asgc.id_fnd_code
                ,lib.DATE_FIN_COMPART
                ,asgc.ID_GABARIT
                ,qg.ID_TYPE_RAPPORT 
            from
                    qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
                    Left join qxp.qxp_compartiment lib on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = lib.id_fnd_code
                    join qxp.qxp_gabarit qg on asgc.ID_GABARIT = qg.ID_GABARIT
                    left join qxp.qxp_sup_mapping qsm on qsm.code_mapping_cible=asgc.id_fnd_code
                        and qsm.type_mapping='MASTER-FEEDERS'
                                                                    
            where
                asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?	
                and lib.DATE_FIN_COMPART is null
                and qsm.code_mapping_cible is null
    )			
    union
    (	
    select distinct
                '999999' as id_fnd_code
                ,null as DATE_FIN_COMPART
                ,asgc.ID_GABARIT
                ,qg.ID_TYPE_RAPPORT 
            from
                    qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
                    join qxp.qxp_gabarit qg on asgc.ID_GABARIT = qg.ID_GABARIT
                                                                    
            where
                asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?	)			
    )srq	
---------------------------------------gestion de la date
) titre_date on prim.ID_FND_CODE = titre_date.ID_FND_CODE
  			 and prim.Index_Annee = titre_date.Index_Annee	
Left join 
(-------------------------------------- Données :Debut 
Select
	MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
    	,fichier.DATE_RAPPORT
	,'N0' as Index_Annee
	,MBD.ID_TABLEAU
	,MBD.ID_PRESENTATION 
	,MBD.VERSION_ID_PRESENTATION 
	,MBD.CODE_PTF 
	,MBD.ORDRE_RAPPORT 
	,MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE 
	,MBD.GROUPE 
	,MBD.VALEUR 
	------------------- gestion des nombres en fonction de la presentation.
    ,Case when (MBD.VALEUR = 0 or MBD.VALEUR is null) then '-'  
          when MBD.GROUPE in ('ST_PML') then NVL(Trim(TO_CHAR(MBD.VALEUR ,'999,999,999,999,999,999')),'-')
          when MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE in ('C0260') and MBD.VALEUR <0 then Trim(TO_CHAR(MBD.VALEUR ,'999,999,999,999,999,999'))
          when MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE in ('F1150') and MBD.VALEUR >0 then '-'||Trim(TO_CHAR(MBD.VALEUR ,'999,999,999,999,999,999'))
          Else NVL(Trim(TO_CHAR(ABS(MBD.VALEUR) ,'999,999,999,999,999,999')),'-') end as Valeur_pres
	 
	from
	qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD
	join 
	(select distinct
	max(fic.ID_CHARGEMENT)over(partition by fic.DATE_RAPPORT) as ID_CHARGEMENT
    ,fic.DATE_RAPPORT
	from 
	 qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX fic
	 join (Select
				srq.DDate
				,srq.ID_GABARIT
				from 
				(Select to_date(?) as DDate 
					   ,to_number(?) as ID_GABARIT from dual
				)srq
	 ) gabdate on fic.DATE_RAPPORT = gabdate.DDate and fic.ID_GABARIT = gabdate.ID_GABARIT 
	 JOIN qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD ON fic.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
	where 
	fic.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
	and MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'BILAN'
	)fichier on fichier.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
	Where 
	MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'BILAN'
	-------------------------------------- Données :Fin
)Donnees on prim.ID_FND_CODE = Donnees.CODE_PTF 
		 and prim.Index_Annee = Donnees.Index_Annee
		 and prim.ordre_rapport = Donnees.ORDRE_RAPPORT 
		 and prim.ID_RUBRIQUE = Donnees.ID_RUBRIQUE

,Case when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Lib fond' and prim.Index_Annee is null then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
	  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Lib fond' and prim.Index_Annee is not null then Devise.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
	  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Date' and prim.Index_Annee is null then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
	  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Date' and prim.Index_Annee is not null then titre_date.DDate
	  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Devise' and prim.Index_Annee is null then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
	  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Devise' and prim.Index_Annee is not null then Devise.FND_CURRENCY
	  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)in('B','E') and prim.Index_Annee is null and prim.index_col in(0) then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
	  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)in('C','D','F','G','H') and prim.Index_Annee is null then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
	  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)in('C','D','F','G','H') and prim.Index_Annee is not null then NVL(Donnees.Valeur_pres,'-')
	  end as valeur_bloc

(
    (
    ----------------- Debut de Gestion des presence de libellés en fonction de la page gauche ou droite 
    Select 
    tri.*
    -- tri.ID_TABLEAU
    -- ,tri.ID_PRESENTATION 
    -- ,tri.LANGUE 
    -- ,tri.ID_FND_CODE
    -- ,tri.position
    -- ,tri.index_Section
    -- ,tri.page
    -- ,tri.page_section
    -- ,tri.Position_ptf_section
    -- ,tri.index_col
    -- ,tri.Index_Annee
    -- ,tri.ordre_rapport
    -- ,tri.ID_RUBRIQUE 
    -- ,tri.GROUPE 	
    -- ,tri.NIVEAUX 	
    -- ,tri.LIB_BALISE 
    -- ,tri.LIB_RAPPORT
    
    from
        (
        Select
        
        presence_ligne.ID_TABLEAU
        ,presence_ligne.ID_PRESENTATION 
        ,presence_ligne.LANGUE 
        ,Cart.ID_FND_CODE
        ,Cart.position
        ,Cart.index_Section
        ,Cart.page
        ,Cart.page_section
        ,Cart.Position_ptf_section
        ,Cart.index_col
        ,Cart.Index_Annee
        ,presence_ligne.ordre_rapport
        ,presence_ligne.ID_RUBRIQUE 
        ,presence_ligne.GROUPE 	
        ,presence_ligne.NIVEAUX 	
        ,presence_ligne.LIB_BALISE 
        ,presence_ligne.LIB_RAPPORT 
        ,case when Cart.Index_Annee = 'N1' and presence_ligne.ID_RUBRIQUE = 'A0020' then 'X' 
              when Cart.ID_FND_CODE = '111111' and Cart.Index_Annee is null and Cart.page = '1G' and presence_ligne.ID_RUBRIQUE = 'A0020' and Cart.index_col = 0  then 'X'
              when Cart.ID_FND_CODE = '111111' and Cart.Index_Annee is null and Cart.page = '1G' and presence_ligne.ID_RUBRIQUE = 'A0030' and Cart.index_col = 0  then 'X' 
              else null end as doublon
        
        from
        
            (-------------- gestion Libelle rubrique avec Presence donnée  Debut
            Select 
            --brut.ID_CHARGEMENT
                brut.ID_TABLEAU
                ,brut.ID_PRESENTATION 
                ,brut.LANGUE 
                ,brut.ordre_rapport
                ,brut.ID_RUBRIQUE 
                ,brut.GROUPE 	
                ,brut.NIVEAUX 	
                ,brut.LIB_BALISE 
                ,brut.LIB_RAPPORT 
                ,brut.VALEUR
                ,brut.affichage
            
            from
            (Select distinct
                base.ID_TABLEAU
                ,trad.ID_PRESENTATION 
                ,trad.LANGUE 
                ,rls.ordre_rapport
                ,trad.ID_RUBRIQUE 
                ,base.GROUPE
                ,trad.NIVEAUX 	
                ,trad.LIB_BALISE 
                ,trad.LIB_RAPPORT 
                ,sum(base.VALEUR) over (partition by trad.ID_RUBRIQUE ) as VALEUR
                ,case when trad.NIVEAUX is null and (base.VALEUR is null or base.VALEUR = 0) then null
                      when trad.NIVEAUX is not null then 'X'
                      when base.VALEUR <> 0 then 'X'
                      end as affichage
                
                from 
                
                qxp.QXP_SUP_LUX_REF_TRAD trad
                join qxp.QXP_SUP_LUX_SURMAP_MBD rls on trad.ID_PRESENTATION = rls.ID_PRESENTATION and trad.ID_RUBRIQUE = rls.ID_RUBRIQUE
                Left join 
                    (Select
                        MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
                        ,MBD.ID_TABLEAU
                        ,MBD.ID_PRESENTATION 
                        ,MBD.VERSION_ID_PRESENTATION 
                        ,MBD.CODE_PTF 
            -- 			,MBD.ORDRE_RAPPORT 
                        ,MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE 
                        ,MBD.GROUPE 
                        ,MBD.VALEUR 
            
                        from
                        qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD
                        join 
                        (select distinct
                        max(fic.ID_CHARGEMENT)over(partition by fic.DATE_RAPPORT) as ID_CHARGEMENT
                        from 
                         qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX fic
                         join (Select
                                srq.DDate
                                ,srq.ID_GABARIT
                                from 
                                (Select to_date(?) as DDate 
                                       ,to_number(?) as ID_GABARIT from dual
                            )srq
                         ) gabdate on fic.DATE_RAPPORT = gabdate.DDate and fic.ID_GABARIT = gabdate.ID_GABARIT 
                         JOIN qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD ON fic.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
                        where 
                        fic.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                        and MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'BILAN'
                        )fichier on fichier.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
                        
                        Where 
                        MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'BILAN'
                        and MBD.CODE_PTF = '999999'
                        )base on trad.ID_PRESENTATION = base.ID_PRESENTATION
                                 and trad.ID_RUBRIQUE = base.ID_RUBRIQUE
                Where 
                trad.ID_PRESENTATION = (select distinct 
                                            asgc.ID_PRESENTATION_PATRIMOINE 	
                                            from 
                                            qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
                                            where
                                            asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                                            and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?)
                and trad.ID_LANGUE =  (Select
                                        gab.ID_LANGUE 
                                        from
                                        qxp.qxp_gabarit gab
                                        where 
                                        gab.ID_GABARIT = ?)
                
             )brut							
             Where 
             brut.affichage is not null
                                        
            --  order by 
            --  brut.ordre_rapport			
            -------------- gestion Libelle rubrique avec Presence donnée  Fin 
            )presence_ligne,
            ( ------------- Cartesien des données et des libellés Debut
                (-- calcul du nb de SECTIONS dans le rapport et produit cartesien
                Select 
                    '111111' as id_fnd_code
                    ,0 as position
                    ,srq.index_Section
                    ,'1G' as page
                    -- positionnement des ptf dans la page .
                    ,1 as page_section
                    ,1 as Position_ptf_section
                    ,0 as index_col
                -- 	,'N0' as Index_Annee
                    ,null as Index_Annee
                    
                    from
                    (
                    -- Calcul de nb de section dans le rapport 
                    select distinct
                    -- on dit ici 11 Ptf par section en comptant page de gauche plus page de droite (4 à gauche et 7 à droite)
                -- 		ptf.id_fnd_code
                -- 		,ptf.position
                        CEIL(ROW_NUMBER()over (ORDER BY ptf.position )/11) as index_Section
                    from
                    (
                        -- ici la table des structures 
                        (select 
                        asgc.ID_FND_CODE 
                        ,asgc.position
                        from 
                        qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
                        Left join qxp.qxp_compartiment lib on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = lib.id_fnd_code
                        left join qxp.qxp_sup_mapping qsm on qsm.code_mapping_cible=asgc.id_fnd_code
                            and qsm.type_mapping='MASTER-FEEDERS'
                        where
                        asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                        and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
                        and lib.DATE_FIN_COMPART is null
                        and qsm.code_mapping_cible is null
                        )		
                        union -- code fond pour combined
                        (select '999999' ,1000 from dual)
                        )ptf
                    )srq
                
                )
                Union
                (
                Select 
                    srq.id_fnd_code
                    ,srq.position
                    ,srq.index_Section
                    ,srq.page
                    ,srq.page_section
                    ,srq.Position_ptf_section
                    ,srq.Position_ptf_section as index_col
                    ,'N0' as Index_Annee
                    
                    From
                    (
                    --- partie gerant les Lib ptf et entete
                    Select 
                    sect.id_fnd_code
                    ,sect.position
                    ,sect.index_Section
                    -- positionnement des ptf dans la page .
                    ,row_number() over(partition by sect.index_section order by sect.position) as Position_ptf_section
                    ,case when 	row_number() over(partition by sect.index_section order by sect.position)<=4 then '1G'
                                Else '2D'end as page
                    ,case when 	row_number() over(partition by sect.index_section order by sect.position)<=4 then 1
                            Else 2 end as page_section		
                    from
                        (
                        -- Calcul de nb de section dans le rapport 
                        select distinct
                        -- on dit ici 11 Ptf par section en comptant page de gauche plus page de droite (4 à gauche et 7 à droite)
                            ptf.id_fnd_code
                            ,ptf.position
                            ,CEIL(ROW_NUMBER()over (ORDER BY ptf.position )/11) as index_Section
                        from
                            (
                                -- ici la table des structures 
                                (select 
                                    asgc.ID_FND_CODE 
                                    ,asgc.position
                                    from 
                                    qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
                                    Left join qxp.qxp_compartiment lib on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = lib.id_fnd_code
                                    left join qxp.qxp_sup_mapping qsm on qsm.code_mapping_cible=asgc.id_fnd_code
                                        and qsm.type_mapping='MASTER-FEEDERS'
                                    where
                                    asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                                    and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
                                    and lib.DATE_FIN_COMPART is null
                                    and qsm.code_mapping_cible is null
                                )		
                                union -- code fond pour combined
                                (select '999999' 
                                        ,1000 								
                                        from dual
                                )
                            )ptf
                        )sect	
                    )srq
                )
                --------- gestion des sections : Fin		
                ------------- Cartesien des données et des libellés Fin
            )Cart
        )tri
        where 
        tri.doublon is null
        ----------------- Fin de Gestion des presence de libellés en fonction de la page gauche ou droite 	
    )
)prim
Left join 
(
	----------------------------------------gestion du libellé du ptf + devise : Debut
Select
srq.id_fnd_code
,srq.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
,srq.FND_CURRENCY
from
    (
        (select distinct
                    asgc.id_fnd_code
                    ,case when lib.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION is null then 'Mettre à jour le fichier des libelles' else lib.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION  end as FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
                    ,rf.FND_CURRENCY
                from
                -- ici la table des structures 
                        qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
                        join OWB_DWH.ref_fund rf on rf.id_fnd_code = asgc.ID_FND_CODE
                        Left join qxp.qxp_compartiment lib on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = lib.id_fnd_code
                        left join qxp.qxp_sup_mapping qsm on qsm.code_mapping_cible=asgc.id_fnd_code
                            and qsm.type_mapping='MASTER-FEEDERS'			 	  								   		
                where
                    asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                    and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?	
                    and rf.FND_END_VALIDITY = '31/12/2199'
                    and lib.DATE_FIN_COMPART is null
                and qsm.code_mapping_cible is null
        )
        union
        (	
        select 
                '999999' as id_fnd_code
                ,'Combined' as FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
                ,qs.DEVISE 									
                
                from 
                qxp.qxp_structure  qs
                where
                qs.ID_STRUCTURE = ?			
        )		
    )srq	
----------------------------------------gestion du libellé du ptf + devise : Fin 
)Devise on prim.ID_FND_CODE = Devise.ID_FND_CODE
Left join
(---------------------------------------gestion de la date  : Debut
Select 
srq.id_fnd_code
,srq.DATE_FIN_COMPART
,'N0' as Index_Annee
,To_char(to_date(?),'dd/mm/yyyy') as DDATE 
	  
from
    (
    (select distinct
                asgc.id_fnd_code
                ,lib.DATE_FIN_COMPART
                ,asgc.ID_GABARIT
                ,qg.ID_TYPE_RAPPORT 
            from
                    qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
                    Left join qxp.qxp_compartiment lib on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = lib.id_fnd_code
                    join qxp.qxp_gabarit qg on asgc.ID_GABARIT = qg.ID_GABARIT
                    left join qxp.qxp_sup_mapping qsm on qsm.code_mapping_cible=asgc.id_fnd_code
                        and qsm.type_mapping='MASTER-FEEDERS'
                                                                    
            where
                asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?	
                and lib.DATE_FIN_COMPART is null
                and qsm.code_mapping_cible is null
    )			
    union
    (	
    select distinct
                '999999' as id_fnd_code
                ,null as DATE_FIN_COMPART
                ,asgc.ID_GABARIT
                ,qg.ID_TYPE_RAPPORT 
            from
                    qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
                    join qxp.qxp_gabarit qg on asgc.ID_GABARIT = qg.ID_GABARIT
                                                                    
            where
                asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?	)			
    )srq	
---------------------------------------gestion de la date
) titre_date on prim.ID_FND_CODE = titre_date.ID_FND_CODE
  			 and prim.Index_Annee = titre_date.Index_Annee	
Left join 
(-------------------------------------- Données :Debut 
Select
	MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
    	,fichier.DATE_RAPPORT
	,'N0' as Index_Annee
	,MBD.ID_TABLEAU
	,MBD.ID_PRESENTATION 
	,MBD.VERSION_ID_PRESENTATION 
	,MBD.CODE_PTF 
	,MBD.ORDRE_RAPPORT 
	,MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE 
	,MBD.GROUPE 
	,MBD.VALEUR 
	------------------- gestion des nombres en fonction de la presentation.
    ,Case when (MBD.VALEUR = 0 or MBD.VALEUR is null) then '-'  
          when MBD.GROUPE in ('ST_PML') then NVL(Trim(TO_CHAR(MBD.VALEUR ,'999,999,999,999,999,999')),'-')
          when MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE in ('C0260') and MBD.VALEUR <0 then Trim(TO_CHAR(MBD.VALEUR ,'999,999,999,999,999,999'))
          when MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE in ('F1150') and MBD.VALEUR >0 then '-'||Trim(TO_CHAR(MBD.VALEUR ,'999,999,999,999,999,999'))
          Else NVL(Trim(TO_CHAR(ABS(MBD.VALEUR) ,'999,999,999,999,999,999')),'-') end as Valeur_pres
	 
	from
	qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD
	join 
	(select distinct
	max(fic.ID_CHARGEMENT)over(partition by fic.DATE_RAPPORT) as ID_CHARGEMENT
    ,fic.DATE_RAPPORT
	from 
	 qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX fic
	 join (Select
				srq.DDate
				,srq.ID_GABARIT
				from 
				(Select to_date(?) as DDate 
					   ,to_number(?) as ID_GABARIT from dual
				)srq
	 ) gabdate on fic.DATE_RAPPORT = gabdate.DDate and fic.ID_GABARIT = gabdate.ID_GABARIT 
	 JOIN qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD ON fic.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
	where 
	fic.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
	and MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'BILAN'
	)fichier on fichier.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
	Where 
	MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'BILAN'
	-------------------------------------- Données :Fin
)Donnees on prim.ID_FND_CODE = Donnees.CODE_PTF 
		 and prim.Index_Annee = Donnees.Index_Annee
		 and prim.ordre_rapport = Donnees.ORDRE_RAPPORT 
		 and prim.ID_RUBRIQUE = Donnees.ID_RUBRIQUE		 
	
------ pour tache realimentation
-- Where 
-- substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1) not in 'A'


order by
prim.index_Section
,prim.page
,prim.ordre_rapport
,prim.index_col]; ORA-01830: date format picture ends before converting entire input string

Caused by: org.springframework.dao.DataIntegrityViolationException: PreparedStatementCallback; SQL [/* 001 - Etat du Patrimoine AMUNDI MBD 20251117*/

------ pensez à mettre ou retirer le where pour tache realimentation

--- 10/11/2011 Retour au schema eos
