Select 

prim.ID_PRESENTATION 
,prim.LANGUE 
,prim.ID_FND_CODE
,prim.position
,prim.index_Section
,prim.page
,prim.page_section
,prim.Position_ptf_section
,prim.index_col
,prim.Index_Annee
,prim.ordre_rapport
,prim.ID_RUBRIQUE 
,prim.GROUPE 	
,prim.NIVEAUX 	
,prim.LIB_BALISE 
,prim.LIB_RAPPORT
,Devise.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
,titre_date.DDate
,Devise.FND_CURRENCY
,Donnees.VALEUR
,Donnees.Valeur_pres

,prim.ordre_rapport as ID_GROUPE
,prim.ordre_rapport AS ID_LIGNE

,'BILAM_S'||prim.index_Section||'P'||prim.page||'L'||prim.ordre_rapport||'C'||prim.index_col
||'D'||Case when prim.Index_Annee is null then 'LIB' else prim.Index_Annee end||'_'||prim.ID_FND_CODE as Nom_Bloc

,Case when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Lib fond' and prim.Index_Annee is null then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
	  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Lib fond' and prim.Index_Annee is not null then Devise.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
	  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Date' and prim.Index_Annee is null then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
	  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Date' and prim.Index_Annee is not null then titre_date.DDate
	  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Devise' and prim.Index_Annee is null then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
	  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Devise' and prim.Index_Annee is not null then Devise.FND_CURRENCY
	  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)in('B','E') and prim.Index_Annee is null and prim.index_col in(0) then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
	  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)in('C','D','F','G','H') and prim.Index_Annee is null then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
	  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)in('C','D','F','G','H') and prim.Index_Annee is not null then NVL(Donnees.Valeur_pres,'-')
	  end as valeur_bloc

,'BILAM_'||prim.page||'_'|| case when prim.NIVEAUX is null then 'N5'else prim.NIVEAUX end as "TEMPLATE"
,prim.page_section as ID_SECTION

from
(
    (
    ----------------- Debut de Gestion des presence de libellés en fonction de la page gauche ou droite 
    Select 
    tri.*
    -- tri.ID_TABLEAU
    -- ,tri.ID_PRESENTATION 
    -- ,tri.LANGUE 
    -- ,tri.ID_FND_CODE
    -- ,tri.position
    -- ,tri.index_Section
    -- ,tri.page
    -- ,tri.page_section
    -- ,tri.Position_ptf_section
    -- ,tri.index_col
    -- ,tri.Index_Annee
    -- ,tri.ordre_rapport
    -- ,tri.ID_RUBRIQUE 
    -- ,tri.GROUPE 	
    -- ,tri.NIVEAUX 	
    -- ,tri.LIB_BALISE 
    -- ,tri.LIB_RAPPORT
    
    from
        (
        Select
        
        presence_ligne.ID_TABLEAU
        ,presence_ligne.ID_PRESENTATION 
        ,presence_ligne.LANGUE 
        ,Cart.ID_FND_CODE
        ,Cart.position
        ,Cart.index_Section
        ,Cart.page
        ,Cart.page_section
        ,Cart.Position_ptf_section
        ,Cart.index_col
        ,Cart.Index_Annee
        ,presence_ligne.ordre_rapport
        ,presence_ligne.ID_RUBRIQUE 
        ,presence_ligne.GROUPE 	
        ,presence_ligne.NIVEAUX 	
        ,presence_ligne.LIB_BALISE 
        ,presence_ligne.LIB_RAPPORT 
        ,case when Cart.Index_Annee = 'N1' and presence_ligne.ID_RUBRIQUE = 'A0020' then 'X' 
              when Cart.ID_FND_CODE = '111111' and Cart.Index_Annee is null and Cart.page = '1G' and presence_ligne.ID_RUBRIQUE = 'A0020' and Cart.index_col = 0  then 'X'
              when Cart.ID_FND_CODE = '111111' and Cart.Index_Annee is null and Cart.page = '1G' and presence_ligne.ID_RUBRIQUE = 'A0030' and Cart.index_col = 0  then 'X' 
              else null end as doublon
        
        from
        
            (-------------- gestion Libelle rubrique avec Presence donnée  Debut
            Select 
            --brut.ID_CHARGEMENT
                brut.ID_TABLEAU
                ,brut.ID_PRESENTATION 
                ,brut.LANGUE 
                ,brut.ordre_rapport
                ,brut.ID_RUBRIQUE 
                ,brut.GROUPE 	
                ,brut.NIVEAUX 	
                ,brut.LIB_BALISE 
                ,brut.LIB_RAPPORT 
                ,brut.VALEUR
                ,brut.affichage
            
            from
            (Select distinct
                base.ID_TABLEAU
                ,trad.ID_PRESENTATION 
                ,trad.LANGUE 
                ,rls.ordre_rapport
                ,trad.ID_RUBRIQUE 
                ,base.GROUPE
                ,trad.NIVEAUX 	
                ,trad.LIB_BALISE 
                ,trad.LIB_RAPPORT 
                ,sum(base.VALEUR) over (partition by trad.ID_RUBRIQUE ) as VALEUR
                ,case when trad.NIVEAUX is null and (base.VALEUR is null or base.VALEUR = 0) then null
                      when trad.NIVEAUX is not null then 'X'
                      when base.VALEUR <> 0 then 'X'
                      end as affichage
                
                from 
                
                qxp.QXP_SUP_LUX_REF_TRAD trad
                join qxp.QXP_SUP_LUX_SURMAP_MBD rls on trad.ID_PRESENTATION = rls.ID_PRESENTATION and trad.ID_RUBRIQUE = rls.ID_RUBRIQUE
                Left join 
                    (Select
                        MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
                        ,MBD.ID_TABLEAU
                        ,MBD.ID_PRESENTATION 
                        ,MBD.VERSION_ID_PRESENTATION 
                        ,MBD.CODE_PTF 
            -- 			,MBD.ORDRE_RAPPORT 
                        ,MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE 
                        ,MBD.GROUPE 
                        ,MBD.VALEUR 
            
                        from
                        qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD
                        join 
                        (select distinct
                        max(fic.ID_CHARGEMENT)over(partition by fic.DATE_RAPPORT) as ID_CHARGEMENT
                        from 
                         qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX fic
                         join (Select
                                srq.DDate
                                ,srq.ID_GABARIT
                                from 
                                (Select to_date(?) as DDate 
                                       ,to_number(?) as ID_GABARIT from dual
                            )srq
                         ) gabdate on fic.DATE_RAPPORT = gabdate.DDate and fic.ID_GABARIT = gabdate.ID_GABARIT 
                         JOIN qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD ON fic.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
                        where 
                        fic.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                        and MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'BILAN'
                        )fichier on fichier.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
                        
                        Where 
                        MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'BILAN'
                        and MBD.CODE_PTF = '999999'
                        )base on trad.ID_PRESENTATION = base.ID_PRESENTATION
                                 and trad.ID_RUBRIQUE = base.ID_RUBRIQUE
                Where 
                trad.ID_PRESENTATION = (select distinct 
                                            asgc.ID_PRESENTATION_PATRIMOINE 	
                                            from 
                                            qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
                                            where
                                            asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                                            and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?)
                and trad.ID_LANGUE =  (Select
                                        gab.ID_LANGUE 
                                        from
                                        qxp.qxp_gabarit gab
                                        where 
                                        gab.ID_GABARIT = ?)
                
             )brut							
             Where 
             brut.affichage is not null
                                        
            --  order by 
            --  brut.ordre_rapport			
            -------------- gestion Libelle rubrique avec Presence donnée  Fin 
            )presence_ligne,
            ( ------------- Cartesien des données et des libellés Debut
                (-- calcul du nb de SECTIONS dans le rapport et produit cartesien
                Select 
                    '111111' as id_fnd_code
                    ,0 as position
                    ,srq.index_Section
                    ,'1G' as page
                    -- positionnement des ptf dans la page .
                    ,1 as page_section
                    ,1 as Position_ptf_section
                    ,0 as index_col
                -- 	,'N0' as Index_Annee
                    ,null as Index_Annee
                    
                    from
                    (
                    -- Calcul de nb de section dans le rapport 
                    select distinct
                    -- on dit ici 11 Ptf par section en comptant page de gauche plus page de droite (4 à gauche et 7 à droite)
                -- 		ptf.id_fnd_code
                -- 		,ptf.position
                        CEIL(ROW_NUMBER()over (ORDER BY ptf.position )/11) as index_Section
                    from
                    (
                        -- ici la table des structures 
                        (select 
                        asgc.ID_FND_CODE 
                        ,asgc.position
                        from 
                        qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
                        Left join qxp.qxp_compartiment lib on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = lib.id_fnd_code
                        left join qxp.qxp_sup_mapping qsm on qsm.code_mapping_cible=asgc.id_fnd_code
                            and qsm.type_mapping='MASTER-FEEDERS'
                        where
                        asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                        and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
                        and lib.DATE_FIN_COMPART is null
                        and qsm.code_mapping_cible is null
                        )		
                        union -- code fond pour combined
                        (select '999999' ,1000 from dual)
                        )ptf
                    )srq
                
                )
                Union
                (
                Select 
                    srq.id_fnd_code
                    ,srq.position
                    ,srq.index_Section
                    ,srq.page
                    ,srq.page_section
                    ,srq.Position_ptf_section
                    ,srq.Position_ptf_section as index_col
                    ,'N0' as Index_Annee
                    
                    From
                    (
                    --- partie gerant les Lib ptf et entete
                    Select 
                    sect.id_fnd_code
                    ,sect.position
                    ,sect.index_Section
                    -- positionnement des ptf dans la page .
                    ,row_number() over(partition by sect.index_section order by sect.position) as Position_ptf_section
                    ,case when 	row_number() over(partition by sect.index_section order by sect.position)<=4 then '1G'
                                Else '2D'end as page
                    ,case when 	row_number() over(partition by sect.index_section order by sect.position)<=4 then 1
                            Else 2 end as page_section		
                    from
                        (
                        -- Calcul de nb de section dans le rapport 
                        select distinct
                        -- on dit ici 11 Ptf par section en comptant page de gauche plus page de droite (4 à gauche et 7 à droite)
                            ptf.id_fnd_code
                            ,ptf.position
                            ,CEIL(ROW_NUMBER()over (ORDER BY ptf.position )/11) as index_Section
                        from
                            (
                                -- ici la table des structures 
                                (select 
                                    asgc.ID_FND_CODE 
                                    ,asgc.position
                                    from 
                                    qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
                                    Left join qxp.qxp_compartiment lib on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = lib.id_fnd_code
                                    left join qxp.qxp_sup_mapping qsm on qsm.code_mapping_cible=asgc.id_fnd_code
                                        and qsm.type_mapping='MASTER-FEEDERS'
                                    where
                                    asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                                    and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
                                    and lib.DATE_FIN_COMPART is null
                                    and qsm.code_mapping_cible is null
                                )		
                                union -- code fond pour combined
                                (select '999999' 
                                        ,1000 								
                                        from dual
                                )
                            )ptf
                        )sect	
                    )srq
                )
                --------- gestion des sections : Fin		
                ------------- Cartesien des données et des libellés Fin
            )Cart
        )tri
        where 
        tri.doublon is null
        ----------------- Fin de Gestion des presence de libellés en fonction de la page gauche ou droite 	
    )
)prim
Left join 
(
	----------------------------------------gestion du libellé du ptf + devise : Debut
Select
srq.id_fnd_code
,srq.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
,srq.FND_CURRENCY
from
    (
        (select distinct
                    asgc.id_fnd_code
                    ,case when lib.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION is null then 'Mettre à jour le fichier des libelles' else lib.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION  end as FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
                    ,rf.FND_CURRENCY
                from
                -- ici la table des structures 
                        qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
                        join OWB_DWH.ref_fund rf on rf.id_fnd_code = asgc.ID_FND_CODE
                        Left join qxp.qxp_compartiment lib on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = lib.id_fnd_code
                        left join qxp.qxp_sup_mapping qsm on qsm.code_mapping_cible=asgc.id_fnd_code
                            and qsm.type_mapping='MASTER-FEEDERS'			 	  								   		
                where
                    asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                    and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?	
                    and rf.FND_END_VALIDITY = '31/12/2199'
                    and lib.DATE_FIN_COMPART is null
                and qsm.code_mapping_cible is null
        )
        union
        (	
        select 
                '999999' as id_fnd_code
                ,'Combined' as FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
                ,qs.DEVISE 									
                
                from 
                qxp.qxp_structure  qs
                where
                qs.ID_STRUCTURE = ?			
        )		
    )srq	
----------------------------------------gestion du libellé du ptf + devise : Fin 
)Devise on prim.ID_FND_CODE = Devise.ID_FND_CODE
Left join
(---------------------------------------gestion de la date  : Debut
Select 
srq.id_fnd_code
,srq.DATE_FIN_COMPART
,'N0' as Index_Annee
,To_char(to_date(?),'dd/mm/yyyy') as DDATE 
	  
from
    (
    (select distinct
                asgc.id_fnd_code
                ,lib.DATE_FIN_COMPART
                ,asgc.ID_GABARIT
                ,qg.ID_TYPE_RAPPORT 
            from
                    qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
                    Left join qxp.qxp_compartiment lib on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = lib.id_fnd_code
                    join qxp.qxp_gabarit qg on asgc.ID_GABARIT = qg.ID_GABARIT
                    left join qxp.qxp_sup_mapping qsm on qsm.code_mapping_cible=asgc.id_fnd_code
                        and qsm.type_mapping='MASTER-FEEDERS'
                                                                    
            where
                asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?	
                and lib.DATE_FIN_COMPART is null
                and qsm.code_mapping_cible is null
    )			
    union
    (	
    select distinct
                '999999' as id_fnd_code
                ,null as DATE_FIN_COMPART
                ,asgc.ID_GABARIT
                ,qg.ID_TYPE_RAPPORT 
            from
                    qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
                    join qxp.qxp_gabarit qg on asgc.ID_GABARIT = qg.ID_GABARIT
                                                                    
            where
                asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?	)			
    )srq	
---------------------------------------gestion de la date
) titre_date on prim.ID_FND_CODE = titre_date.ID_FND_CODE
  			 and prim.Index_Annee = titre_date.Index_Annee	
Left join 
(-------------------------------------- Données :Debut 
Select
	MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
    	,fichier.DATE_RAPPORT
	,'N0' as Index_Annee
	,MBD.ID_TABLEAU
	,MBD.ID_PRESENTATION 
	,MBD.VERSION_ID_PRESENTATION 
	,MBD.CODE_PTF 
	,MBD.ORDRE_RAPPORT 
	,MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE 
	,MBD.GROUPE 
	,MBD.VALEUR 
	------------------- gestion des nombres en fonction de la presentation.
    ,Case when (MBD.VALEUR = 0 or MBD.VALEUR is null) then '-'  
          when MBD.GROUPE in ('ST_PML') then NVL(Trim(TO_CHAR(MBD.VALEUR ,'999,999,999,999,999,999')),'-')
          when MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE in ('C0260') and MBD.VALEUR <0 then Trim(TO_CHAR(MBD.VALEUR ,'999,999,999,999,999,999'))
          when MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE in ('F1150') and MBD.VALEUR >0 then '-'||Trim(TO_CHAR(MBD.VALEUR ,'999,999,999,999,999,999'))
          Else NVL(Trim(TO_CHAR(ABS(MBD.VALEUR) ,'999,999,999,999,999,999')),'-') end as Valeur_pres
	 
	from
	qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD
	join 
	(select distinct
	max(fic.ID_CHARGEMENT)over(partition by fic.DATE_RAPPORT) as ID_CHARGEMENT
    ,fic.DATE_RAPPORT
	from 
	 qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX fic
	 join (Select
				srq.DDate
				,srq.ID_GABARIT
				from 
				(Select to_date(?) as DDate 
					   ,to_number(?) as ID_GABARIT from dual
				)srq
	 ) gabdate on fic.DATE_RAPPORT = gabdate.DDate and fic.ID_GABARIT = gabdate.ID_GABARIT 
	 JOIN qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD ON fic.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
	where 
	fic.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
	and MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'BILAN'
	)fichier on fichier.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
	Where 
	MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'BILAN'
	-------------------------------------- Données :Fin
)Donnees on prim.ID_FND_CODE = Donnees.CODE_PTF 
		 and prim.Index_Annee = Donnees.Index_Annee
		 and prim.ordre_rapport = Donnees.ORDRE_RAPPORT 
		 and prim.ID_RUBRIQUE = Donnees.ID_RUBRIQUE

order by

Select 

prim.ID_PRESENTATION 
,prim.LANGUE 
,prim.ID_FND_CODE
,prim.position
,prim.index_Section
,prim.page
,prim.page_section
,prim.Position_ptf_section
,prim.index_col
,prim.Index_Annee
,prim.ordre_rapport
,prim.ID_RUBRIQUE 
,prim.GROUPE     
,prim.NIVEAUX     
,prim.LIB_BALISE 
,prim.LIB_RAPPORT
,Devise.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
,titre_date.DDate
,Devise.FND_CURRENCY
,Donnees.VALEUR
,Donnees.Valeur_pres

,prim.ordre_rapport as ID_GROUPE
,prim.ordre_rapport AS ID_LIGNE

,'CPTAM_S'||prim.index_Section||'P'||prim.page||'L'||prim.ordre_rapport||'C'||prim.index_col
||'D'||Case when prim.Index_Annee is null then 'LIB' else prim.Index_Annee end||'_'||prim.ID_FND_CODE as Nom_Bloc

,Case when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Lib fond' and prim.Index_Annee is null then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
      when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Lib fond' and prim.Index_Annee is not null then Devise.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
      when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Date' and prim.Index_Annee is null then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
      when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Date' and prim.Index_Annee is not null then titre_date.DDate
      when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Devise' and prim.Index_Annee is null then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
      when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Devise' and prim.Index_Annee is not null then Devise.FND_CURRENCY
    --  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)in('B','E','S') and prim.Index_Annee is null and prim.index_col in(0) then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
      when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)in('B','E','C','D','F','G','H','I','J','K','L','M','N','O','P','Q','R','S','Z') and prim.Index_Annee is null then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
      when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)in('B','E','C','D','F','G','H','I','J','K','L','M','N','O','P','Q','R','S','Z') and prim.Index_Annee is not null then NVL(Donnees.Valeur_pres,'-')
      end as valeur_bloc

,'CPTAM_'||prim.page||'_'|| case when prim.NIVEAUX is null then 'N5'else prim.NIVEAUX end as "TEMPLATE"          
,prim.page_section as ID_SECTION

from
(
(
----------------- Debut de Gestion des presence de libellés en fonction de la page gauche ou droite 
Select 
tri.*
-- tri.ID_TABLEAU
-- ,tri.ID_PRESENTATION 
-- ,tri.LANGUE 
-- ,tri.ID_FND_CODE
-- ,tri.position
-- ,tri.index_Section
-- ,tri.page
-- ,tri.page_section
-- ,tri.Position_ptf_section
-- ,tri.index_col
-- ,tri.Index_Annee
-- ,tri.ordre_rapport
-- ,tri.ID_RUBRIQUE 
-- ,tri.GROUPE     
-- ,tri.NIVEAUX     
-- ,tri.LIB_BALISE 
-- ,tri.LIB_RAPPORT

from
(
Select

presence_ligne.ID_TABLEAU
,presence_ligne.ID_PRESENTATION 
,presence_ligne.LANGUE 
,Cart.ID_FND_CODE
,Cart.position
,Cart.index_Section
,Cart.page
,Cart.page_section
,Cart.Position_ptf_section
,Cart.index_col
,Cart.Index_Annee
,presence_ligne.ordre_rapport
,presence_ligne.ID_RUBRIQUE 
,presence_ligne.GROUPE     
,presence_ligne.NIVEAUX     
,presence_ligne.LIB_BALISE 
,presence_ligne.LIB_RAPPORT 

,case when Cart.Index_Annee = 'N1' and presence_ligne.ID_RUBRIQUE = 'A0020' then 'X' 
      when Cart.ID_FND_CODE = '111111' and Cart.Index_Annee is null and Cart.page = '1G' and presence_ligne.ID_RUBRIQUE = 'A0020' and Cart.index_col = 0  then 'X'
      when Cart.ID_FND_CODE = '111111' and Cart.Index_Annee is null and Cart.page = '1G' and presence_ligne.ID_RUBRIQUE = 'A0030' and Cart.index_col = 0  then 'X' 
      else null end as doublon


from

(-------------- gestion Libelle rubrique avec Presence donnée  Debut
Select 
--brut.ID_CHARGEMENT
    brut.ID_TABLEAU
    ,brut.ID_PRESENTATION 
    ,brut.LANGUE 
    ,brut.ordre_rapport
    ,brut.ID_RUBRIQUE 
    ,brut.GROUPE     
    ,brut.NIVEAUX     
    ,brut.LIB_BALISE 
    ,brut.LIB_RAPPORT 
    ,brut.VALEUR
     ,brut.affichage

from
(Select distinct
    base.ID_TABLEAU
    ,trad.ID_PRESENTATION 
    ,trad.LANGUE 
    ,base.ID_TYPE_RAPPORT
    ,rls.ordre_rapport
    ,trad.ID_RUBRIQUE 
    ,base.GROUPE
    ,trad.NIVEAUX     
    ,trad.LIB_BALISE 
    ,Case when base.ID_TYPE_RAPPORT = 2 and base.GROUPE = 'NAV_DEBEX' then 'Net assets at the beginning of the period ('||to_char(last_day(add_months(?,-6))+1,'DD/MM/YY')||')'
          when base.ID_TYPE_RAPPORT = 2 and base.GROUPE = 'TOTAL' then 'Net assets at the end of the period'
          else trad.LIB_RAPPORT end as LIB_RAPPORT
    ,sum(base.VALEUR) over (partition by trad.ID_RUBRIQUE ) as VALEUR
    ,case when trad.NIVEAUX is null and (base.VALEUR is null or base.VALEUR = 0) then null
          when trad.NIVEAUX is not null then 'X'
          when base.VALEUR <> 0 then 'X'
          end as affichage
    
    from 
    qxp.qxp_SUP_LUX_REF_TRAD trad
    join qxp.qxp_SUP_LUX_SURMAP_MBD rls on trad.ID_PRESENTATION = rls.ID_PRESENTATION and trad.ID_RUBRIQUE = rls.ID_RUBRIQUE
    Left join 
        (Select
            MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
            ,MBD.ID_TABLEAU
            ,fichier.ID_TYPE_RAPPORT
            ,MBD.ID_PRESENTATION 
            ,MBD.VERSION_ID_PRESENTATION 
            ,MBD.CODE_PTF 
--             ,MBD.ORDRE_RAPPORT 
            ,MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE 
            ,MBD.GROUPE 
            ,MBD.VALEUR 

            from
            qxp.qxp_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD
            join 
            (select distinct
            max(fic.ID_CHARGEMENT)over(partition by fic.DATE_RAPPORT) as ID_CHARGEMENT
            ,gab.ID_TYPE_RAPPORT
                        from 
                         qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX fic
                         join (Select
                                srq.DDate
                                ,srq.ID_GABARIT
                                from 
                                (Select to_date(?) as DDate 
                                       ,to_number(?) as ID_GABARIT from dual
                            )srq
             ) gabdate on fic.DATE_RAPPORT = gabdate.DDate and fic.ID_GABARIT = gabdate.ID_GABARIT 
             JOIN qxp.qxp_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD ON fic.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
             join qxp.qxp_gabarit gab on fic.ID_GABARIT = gab.ID_GABARIT
            where 
            fic.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
            and MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'PNL'
            )fichier on fichier.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
            
            Where 
            MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'PNL'
            and MBD.CODE_PTF = '999999'
            )base on trad.ID_PRESENTATION = base.ID_PRESENTATION
                       and trad.ID_RUBRIQUE = base.ID_RUBRIQUE
    Where 
    trad.ID_PRESENTATION = (select distinct 
                                asgc.ID_PRESENTATION_COMPTE_RES     
                                from 
                                qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
                                where
                                asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                                and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?)
    and trad.ID_LANGUE =  (Select
                            gab.ID_LANGUE 
                            from
                            qxp.qxp_gabarit gab
                            where 
                            gab.ID_GABARIT = ?)
    
 )brut                            
 Where 
 brut.affichage is not null
                             
--  order by 
--  brut.ordre_rapport            
-------------- gestion Libelle rubrique avec Presence donnée  Fin 
)presence_ligne,

( ------------- Cartesien des données et des libellés Debut
(-- calcul du nb de SECTIONS dans le rapport et produit cartesien
Select 
    '111111' as id_fnd_code
    ,0 as position
    ,srq.index_Section
    ,'1G' as page
    -- positionnement des ptf dans la page .
    ,1 as page_section
    ,1 as Position_ptf_section
    ,0 as index_col
--     ,'N0' as Index_Annee
    ,null as Index_Annee
    
    from
    (
    -- Calcul de nb de section dans le rapport 
    select distinct
    -- on dit ici 11 Ptf par section en comptant page de gauche plus page de droite (4 à gauche et 7 à droite)
--         ptf.id_fnd_code
--         ,ptf.position
        CEIL(ROW_NUMBER()over (ORDER BY ptf.position )/11) as index_Section
    from
    (
        -- ici la table des structures 
        (select 
        asgc.ID_FND_CODE 
        ,asgc.position
        from 
        qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
        Left join qxp.qxp_compartiment lib on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = lib.id_fnd_code
        left join qxp.qxp_sup_mapping qsm on qsm.code_mapping_cible=asgc.id_fnd_code
            and qsm.type_mapping='MASTER-FEEDERS'
        where
        asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
        and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
        and qsm.code_mapping_cible is null
        )        
        union -- code fond pour combined
        (select '999999' ,1000 from dual)
        )ptf
    )srq

)
Union
(
Select 
    srq.id_fnd_code
    ,srq.position
    ,srq.index_Section
    ,srq.page
    ,srq.page_section
    ,srq.Position_ptf_section
    ,srq.Position_ptf_section as index_col
    ,'N0' as Index_Annee
    
    From
    (
    --- partie gerant les Lib ptf et entete
    Select 
    sect.id_fnd_code
    ,sect.position
    ,sect.index_Section
    -- positionnement des ptf dans la page .
    ,row_number() over(partition by sect.index_section order by sect.position) as Position_ptf_section
    ,case when     row_number() over(partition by sect.index_section order by sect.position)<=4 then '1G'
                  Else '2D'end as page
    ,case when     row_number() over(partition by sect.index_section order by sect.position)<=4 then 1
              Else 2 end as page_section            
    from
    (
    -- Calcul de nb de section dans le rapport 
    select distinct
-- on dit ici 11 Ptf par section en comptant page de gauche plus page de droite (4 à gauche et 7 à droite)
         ptf.id_fnd_code
        ,ptf.position
        ,CEIL(ROW_NUMBER()over (ORDER BY ptf.position )/11) as index_Section
    from
    (
        -- ici la table des structures 
        (select 
        asgc.ID_FND_CODE 
        ,asgc.position
        from 
        qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
        Left join qxp.qxp_compartiment lib on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = lib.id_fnd_code
        left join qxp.qxp_sup_mapping qsm on qsm.code_mapping_cible=asgc.id_fnd_code
            and qsm.type_mapping='MASTER-FEEDERS'
        where
        asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
        and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
        and qsm.code_mapping_cible is null
        )        
        union -- code fond pour combined
        (select '999999' 
                ,1000                               
                from dual)
        )ptf
        )sect    
    )srq
    )
--------- gestion des sections # Fin        
    ------------- Cartesien des données et des libellés Fin
    )Cart    
    )tri
    where 
    tri.doublon is null    
   ----------------- Fin de Gestion des presence de libellés en fonction de la page gauche ou droite     
    )
    )prim
    Left join 
    (
    ----------------------------------------gestion du libellé du ptf + devise # Debut
Select
srq.id_fnd_code
,srq.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
,srq.FND_CURRENCY
from
(
(select distinct
            asgc.id_fnd_code
            ,case when lib.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION is null then 'Mettre à jour le fichier des libelles' else lib.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION  end as FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
            ,rf.FND_CURRENCY
        from
        -- ici la table des structures 
            qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
        join OWB_DWH.ref_fund rf on rf.id_fnd_code = asgc.ID_FND_CODE
        Left join qxp.qxp_compartiment lib on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = lib.id_fnd_code
        left join qxp.qxp_sup_mapping qsm on qsm.code_mapping_cible=asgc.id_fnd_code
            and qsm.type_mapping='MASTER-FEEDERS'                                                                      
        where
            asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
            and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?    
            and rf.FND_END_VALIDITY = '31/12/2199'
            and qsm.code_mapping_cible is null
)
union
(    
select 
        '999999' as id_fnd_code
        ,'Combined' as FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
        ,qs.DEVISE
        from 
        qxp.qxp_structure  qs
        where
        qs.ID_STRUCTURE = ?            
)        
)srq    
----------------------------------------gestion du libellé du ptf + devise # Fin 
)Devise on prim.ID_FND_CODE = Devise.ID_FND_CODE

Left join
(---------------------------------------gestion de la date  # Debut
Select 
srq.id_fnd_code
,srq.DATE_FIN_COMPART
,'N0' as Index_Annee
,To_char(to_date(?),'dd/mm/yyyy') as DDATE  
from
((select distinct
            asgc.id_fnd_code
            ,lib.DATE_FIN_COMPART
            ,asgc.ID_GABARIT
            ,qg.ID_TYPE_RAPPORT 
        from
            qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
        Left join qxp.qxp_compartiment lib on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = lib.id_fnd_code
        join qxp.qxp_gabarit qg on asgc.ID_GABARIT = qg.ID_GABARIT
        left join qxp.qxp_sup_mapping qsm on qsm.code_mapping_cible=asgc.id_fnd_code
            and qsm.type_mapping='MASTER-FEEDERS'
        where
            asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
            and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?    
            and qsm.code_mapping_cible is null
)            
union
(    
select distinct
            '999999' as id_fnd_code
            ,null as DATE_FIN_COMPART
            ,asgc.ID_GABARIT
            ,qg.ID_TYPE_RAPPORT 
        from
                qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
                join qxp.qxp_gabarit qg on asgc.ID_GABARIT = qg.ID_GABARIT
                                                                       
        where
            asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
            and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?    )            
    )srq        
 ---------------------------------------gestion de la date
) titre_date on prim.ID_FND_CODE = titre_date.ID_FND_CODE
               and prim.Index_Annee = titre_date.Index_Annee    

Left join 
(-------------------------------------- Données #Debut
Select
    MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
    ,fichier.DATE_RAPPORT
	,'N0' as Index_Annee    
	,MBD.ID_TABLEAU
    ,MBD.ID_PRESENTATION 
    ,MBD.VERSION_ID_PRESENTATION 
    ,MBD.CODE_PTF 
    ,MBD.ORDRE_RAPPORT 
    ,MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE 
    ,MBD.GROUPE 
    ,MBD.VALEUR 

        ------------------- gestion des nombres en fonction de la presentation Avenir.
    ,case when (MBD.VALEUR = 0 or MBD.VALEUR is null) then '-'
          when substr(MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1) in('A','B','C','D','E','F','G') and MBD.VALEUR <> 0 then 
                                trim(to_char(Abs(MBD.VALEUR),'999,999,999,999,999'))
          when substr(MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1) not in('A','B','C','D','E','F','G') and MBD.VALEUR <> 0 then
                                   Trim(TO_CHAR(MBD.VALEUR ,'999,999,999,999,999'))
           end  as Valeur_pres

    from
    qxp.qxp_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD
    join 
    (select distinct
        max(fic.ID_CHARGEMENT)over(partition by fic.DATE_RAPPORT) as ID_CHARGEMENT
        ,fic.DATE_RAPPORT
        from 
         qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX fic
         join
         (Select
            srq.DDate
            ,srq.ID_GABARIT
            from 
            (Select to_date(?) as DDate 
                   ,to_number(?) as ID_GABARIT from dual
            )srq
         )gabdate on fic.DATE_RAPPORT = gabdate.DDate and fic.ID_GABARIT = gabdate.ID_GABARIT 
            JOIN qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD ON fic.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
        where 
        fic.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
        and MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'PNL'
    )fichier on fichier.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
    join qxp.qxp_IMPORT_LUX fic on fichier.ID_CHARGEMENT = fic.ID_CHARGEMENT 
    Where 
    MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'PNL'
    -------------------------------------- Données #Fin
)Donnees on prim.ID_FND_CODE = Donnees.CODE_PTF 
         and prim.Index_Annee = Donnees.Index_Annee
         and prim.ordre_rapport = Donnees.ORDRE_RAPPORT 
         and prim.ID_RUBRIQUE = Donnees.ID_RUBRIQUE

-- substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1) not in 'A'


order by
prim.index_Section
,prim.page
,prim.ordre_rapport
,prim.index_col

Select 

prim.ID_PRESENTATION 
,prim.LANGUE 
,prim.ID_FND_CODE
,prim.position
,prim.index_Section
,prim.page
,prim.page_section
,prim.Position_ptf_section
,prim.index_col
,prim.Index_Annee
,prim.ordre_rapport
,prim.ID_RUBRIQUE 
,prim.GROUPE     
,prim.NIVEAUX     
,prim.LIB_BALISE 
,prim.LIB_RAPPORT
,Devise.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
,titre_date.DDate
,Devise.FND_CURRENCY
,Donnees.VALEUR
,Donnees.Valeur_pres

,prim.ordre_rapport as ID_GROUPE
,prim.ordre_rapport AS ID_LIGNE

,'CPTAM_S'||prim.index_Section||'P'||prim.page||'L'||prim.ordre_rapport||'C'||prim.index_col
||'D'||Case when prim.Index_Annee is null then 'LIB' else prim.Index_Annee end||'_'||prim.ID_FND_CODE as Nom_Bloc

,Case when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Lib fond' and prim.Index_Annee is null then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
      when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Lib fond' and prim.Index_Annee is not null then Devise.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
      when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Date' and prim.Index_Annee is null then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
      when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Date' and prim.Index_Annee is not null then titre_date.DDate
      when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Devise' and prim.Index_Annee is null then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
      when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Devise' and prim.Index_Annee is not null then Devise.FND_CURRENCY
    --  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)in('B','E','S') and prim.Index_Annee is null and prim.index_col in(0) then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
      when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)in('B','E','C','D','F','G','H','I','J','K','L','M','N','O','P','Q','R','S','Z') and prim.Index_Annee is null then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
      when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)in('B','E','C','D','F','G','H','I','J','K','L','M','N','O','P','Q','R','S','Z') and prim.Index_Annee is not null then NVL(Donnees.Valeur_pres,'-')
      end as valeur_bloc

,'CPTAM_'||prim.page||'_'|| case when prim.NIVEAUX is null then 'N5'else prim.NIVEAUX end as "TEMPLATE"          
,prim.page_section as ID_SECTION

(

,presence_ligne.LIB_RAPPORT 

,case when Cart.Index_Annee = 'N1' and presence_ligne.ID_RUBRIQUE = 'A0020' then 'X' 
      when Cart.ID_FND_CODE = '111111' and Cart.Index_Annee is null and Cart.page = '1G' and presence_ligne.ID_RUBRIQUE = 'A0020' and Cart.index_col = 0  then 'X'
      when Cart.ID_FND_CODE = '111111' and Cart.Index_Annee is null and Cart.page = '1G' and presence_ligne.ID_RUBRIQUE = 'A0030' and Cart.index_col = 0  then 'X' 
      else null end as doublon


from

(-------------- gestion Libelle rubrique avec Presence donnée  Debut
Select 
--brut.ID_CHARGEMENT
    brut.ID_TABLEAU
    ,brut.ID_PRESENTATION 
    ,brut.LANGUE 
    ,brut.ordre_rapport
    ,brut.ID_RUBRIQUE 
    ,brut.GROUPE     
    ,brut.NIVEAUX     
    ,brut.LIB_BALISE 
    ,brut.LIB_RAPPORT 
    ,brut.VALEUR
     ,brut.affichage

from
(Select distinct
    base.ID_TABLEAU
    ,trad.ID_PRESENTATION 
    ,trad.LANGUE 
    ,base.ID_TYPE_RAPPORT
    ,rls.ordre_rapport
    ,trad.ID_RUBRIQUE 
    ,base.GROUPE
    ,trad.NIVEAUX     
    ,trad.LIB_BALISE 
    ,Case when base.ID_TYPE_RAPPORT = 2 and base.GROUPE = 'NAV_DEBEX' then 'Net assets at the beginning of the period ('||to_char(last_day(add_months(?,-6))+1,'DD/MM/YY')||')'
          when base.ID_TYPE_RAPPORT = 2 and base.GROUPE = 'TOTAL' then 'Net assets at the end of the period'
          else trad.LIB_RAPPORT end as LIB_RAPPORT
    ,sum(base.VALEUR) over (partition by trad.ID_RUBRIQUE ) as VALEUR
    ,case when trad.NIVEAUX is null and (base.VALEUR is null or base.VALEUR = 0) then null
          when trad.NIVEAUX is not null then 'X'
          when base.VALEUR <> 0 then 'X'
          end as affichage
    
    from 
    qxp.qxp_SUP_LUX_REF_TRAD trad
    join qxp.qxp_SUP_LUX_SURMAP_MBD rls on trad.ID_PRESENTATION = rls.ID_PRESENTATION and trad.ID_RUBRIQUE = rls.ID_RUBRIQUE
    Left join 
        (Select
            MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
            ,MBD.ID_TABLEAU
            ,fichier.ID_TYPE_RAPPORT
            ,MBD.ID_PRESENTATION 
            ,MBD.VERSION_ID_PRESENTATION 
            ,MBD.CODE_PTF 
--             ,MBD.ORDRE_RAPPORT 
            ,MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE 
            ,MBD.GROUPE 
            ,MBD.VALEUR 

            from
            qxp.qxp_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD
            join 
            (select distinct
            max(fic.ID_CHARGEMENT)over(partition by fic.DATE_RAPPORT) as ID_CHARGEMENT
            ,gab.ID_TYPE_RAPPORT
                        from 
                         qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX fic
                         join (Select
                                srq.DDate
                                ,srq.ID_GABARIT
                                from 
                                (Select to_date(?) as DDate 
                                       ,to_number(?) as ID_GABARIT from dual
                            )srq
             ) gabdate on fic.DATE_RAPPORT = gabdate.DDate and fic.ID_GABARIT = gabdate.ID_GABARIT 
             JOIN qxp.qxp_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD ON fic.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
             join qxp.qxp_gabarit gab on fic.ID_GABARIT = gab.ID_GABARIT
            where 
            fic.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
            and MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'PNL'
            )fichier on fichier.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
            
            Where 
            MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'PNL'
            and MBD.CODE_PTF = '999999'
            )base on trad.ID_PRESENTATION = base.ID_PRESENTATION
                       and trad.ID_RUBRIQUE = base.ID_RUBRIQUE
    Where 
    trad.ID_PRESENTATION = (select distinct 
                                asgc.ID_PRESENTATION_COMPTE_RES     
                                from 
                                qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
                                where
                                asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                                and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?)
    and trad.ID_LANGUE =  (Select
                            gab.ID_LANGUE 
                            from
                            qxp.qxp_gabarit gab
                            where 
                            gab.ID_GABARIT = ?)
    
 )brut                            
 Where 
 brut.affichage is not null
                             
--  order by 
--  brut.ordre_rapport            
-------------- gestion Libelle rubrique avec Presence donnée  Fin 
)presence_ligne,

( ------------- Cartesien des données et des libellés Debut
(-- calcul du nb de SECTIONS dans le rapport et produit cartesien
Select 
    '111111' as id_fnd_code
    ,0 as position
    ,srq.index_Section
    ,'1G' as page
    -- positionnement des ptf dans la page .
    ,1 as page_section
    ,1 as Position_ptf_section
    ,0 as index_col
--     ,'N0' as Index_Annee
    ,null as Index_Annee
    
    from
    (
    -- Calcul de nb de section dans le rapport 
    select distinct
    -- on dit ici 11 Ptf par section en comptant page de gauche plus page de droite (4 à gauche et 7 à droite)
--         ptf.id_fnd_code
--         ,ptf.position
        CEIL(ROW_NUMBER()over (ORDER BY ptf.position )/11) as index_Section
    from
    (
        -- ici la table des structures 
        (select 
        asgc.ID_FND_CODE 
        ,asgc.position
        from 
        qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
        Left join qxp.qxp_compartiment lib on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = lib.id_fnd_code
        left join qxp.qxp_sup_mapping qsm on qsm.code_mapping_cible=asgc.id_fnd_code
            and qsm.type_mapping='MASTER-FEEDERS'
        where
        asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
        and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
        and qsm.code_mapping_cible is null
        )        
        union -- code fond pour combined
        (select '999999' ,1000 from dual)
        )ptf
    )srq

)
Union
(
Select 
    srq.id_fnd_code
    ,srq.position
    ,srq.index_Section
    ,srq.page
    ,srq.page_section
    ,srq.Position_ptf_section
    ,srq.Position_ptf_section as index_col
    ,'N0' as Index_Annee
    
    From
    (
    --- partie gerant les Lib ptf et entete
    Select 
    sect.id_fnd_code
    ,sect.position
    ,sect.index_Section
    -- positionnement des ptf dans la page .
    ,row_number() over(partition by sect.index_section order by sect.position) as Position_ptf_section
    ,case when     row_number() over(partition by sect.index_section order by sect.position)<=4 then '1G'
                  Else '2D'end as page
    ,case when     row_number() over(partition by sect.index_section order by sect.position)<=4 then 1
              Else 2 end as page_section            
    from
    (
    -- Calcul de nb de section dans le rapport 
    select distinct
-- on dit ici 11 Ptf par section en comptant page de gauche plus page de droite (4 à gauche et 7 à droite)
         ptf.id_fnd_code
        ,ptf.position
        ,CEIL(ROW_NUMBER()over (ORDER BY ptf.position )/11) as index_Section
    from
    (
        -- ici la table des structures 
        (select 
        asgc.ID_FND_CODE 
        ,asgc.position
        from 
        qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
        Left join qxp.qxp_compartiment lib on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = lib.id_fnd_code
        left join qxp.qxp_sup_mapping qsm on qsm.code_mapping_cible=asgc.id_fnd_code
            and qsm.type_mapping='MASTER-FEEDERS'
        where
        asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
        and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
        and qsm.code_mapping_cible is null
        )        
        union -- code fond pour combined
        (select '999999' 
                ,1000                               
                from dual)
        )ptf
        )sect    
    )srq
    )
--------- gestion des sections # Fin        
    ------------- Cartesien des données et des libellés Fin
    )Cart    
    )tri
    where 
    tri.doublon is null

        Left join qxp.qxp_compartiment lib on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = lib.id_fnd_code
        left join qxp.qxp_sup_mapping qsm on qsm.code_mapping_cible=asgc.id_fnd_code
            and qsm.type_mapping='MASTER-FEEDERS'

            asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
            and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?    
            and rf.FND_END_VALIDITY = '31/12/2199'
            and qsm.code_mapping_cible is null

           end  as Valeur_pres

    from
    qxp.qxp_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD
    join 
    (select distinct
        max(fic.ID_CHARGEMENT)over(partition by fic.DATE_RAPPORT) as ID_CHARGEMENT
        ,fic.DATE_RAPPORT
        from 
         qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX fic
         join
         (Select
            srq.DDate
            ,srq.ID_GABARIT
            from 
            (Select to_date(?) as DDate 
                   ,to_number(?) as ID_GABARIT from dual
            )srq
         )gabdate on fic.DATE_RAPPORT = gabdate.DDate and fic.ID_GABARIT = gabdate.ID_GABARIT 
            JOIN qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD ON fic.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
        where 
        fic.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
        and MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'PNL'
    )fichier on fichier.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
    join qxp.qxp_IMPORT_LUX fic on fichier.ID_CHARGEMENT = fic.ID_CHARGEMENT 
    Where 
    MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'PNL'
    -------------------------------------- Données #Fin
)Donnees on prim.ID_FND_CODE = Donnees.CODE_PTF 
         and prim.Index_Annee = Donnees.Index_Annee
         and prim.ordre_rapport = Donnees.ORDRE_RAPPORT 
         and prim.ID_RUBRIQUE = Donnees.ID_RUBRIQUE         
    
------ pour tache realimentation
--  Where 
-- substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1) not in 'A'


order by
prim.index_Section
,prim.page
,prim.ordre_rapport
,prim.index_col

,'CPTAM_S'||prim.index_Section||'P'||prim.page||'L'||prim.ordre_rapport||'C'||prim.index_col
||'D'||Case when prim.Index_Annee is null then 'LIB' else prim.Index_Annee end||'_'||prim.ID_FND_CODE as Nom_Bloc

,Case when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Lib fond' and prim.Index_Annee is null then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
      when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Lib fond' and prim.Index_Annee is not null then Devise.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
      when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Date' and prim.Index_Annee is null then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
      when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Date' and prim.Index_Annee is not null then titre_date.DDate
      when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Devise' and prim.Index_Annee is null then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
      when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Devise' and prim.Index_Annee is not null then Devise.FND_CURRENCY
    --  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)in('B','E','S') and prim.Index_Annee is null and prim.index_col in(0) then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
      when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)in('B','E','C','D','F','G','H','I','J','K','L','M','N','O','P','Q','R','S','Z') and prim.Index_Annee is null then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
      when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)in('B','E','C','D','F','G','H','I','J','K','L','M','N','O','P','Q','R','S','Z') and prim.Index_Annee is not null then NVL(Donnees.Valeur_pres,'-')
      end as valeur_bloc

,'CPTAM_'||prim.page||'_'|| case when prim.NIVEAUX is null then 'N5'else prim.NIVEAUX end as "TEMPLATE"          
,prim.page_section as ID_SECTION

from
(
(
----------------- Debut de Gestion des presence de libellés en fonction de la page gauche ou droite 
Select 
tri.*
-- tri.ID_TABLEAU
-- ,tri.ID_PRESENTATION 
-- ,tri.LANGUE 
-- ,tri.ID_FND_CODE
-- ,tri.position
-- ,tri.index_Section
-- ,tri.page
-- ,tri.page_section
-- ,tri.Position_ptf_section
-- ,tri.index_col
-- ,tri.Index_Annee
-- ,tri.ordre_rapport
-- ,tri.ID_RUBRIQUE 
-- ,tri.GROUPE     
-- ,tri.NIVEAUX     
-- ,tri.LIB_BALISE 
-- ,tri.LIB_RAPPORT

from
(
Select

presence_ligne.ID_TABLEAU
,presence_ligne.ID_PRESENTATION 
,presence_ligne.LANGUE 
,Cart.ID_FND_CODE
,Cart.position
,Cart.index_Section
,Cart.page
,Cart.page_section
,Cart.Position_ptf_section
,Cart.index_col
,Cart.Index_Annee
,presence_ligne.ordre_rapport
,presence_ligne.ID_RUBRIQUE 
,presence_ligne.GROUPE     
,presence_ligne.NIVEAUX     
,presence_ligne.LIB_BALISE 
,presence_ligne.LIB_RAPPORT 

,case when Cart.Index_Annee = 'N1' and presence_ligne.ID_RUBRIQUE = 'A0020' then 'X' 
      when Cart.ID_FND_CODE = '111111' and Cart.Index_Annee is null and Cart.page = '1G' and presence_ligne.ID_RUBRIQUE = 'A0020' and Cart.index_col = 0  then 'X'
      when Cart.ID_FND_CODE = '111111' and Cart.Index_Annee is null and Cart.page = '1G' and presence_ligne.ID_RUBRIQUE = 'A0030' and Cart.index_col = 0  then 'X' 
      else null end as doublon


from

(-------------- gestion Libelle rubrique avec Presence donnée  Debut
Select 
--brut.ID_CHARGEMENT
    brut.ID_TABLEAU
    ,brut.ID_PRESENTATION 
    ,brut.LANGUE 
    ,brut.ordre_rapport
    ,brut.ID_RUBRIQUE 
    ,brut.GROUPE     
    ,brut.NIVEAUX     
    ,brut.LIB_BALISE 
    ,brut.LIB_RAPPORT 
    ,brut.VALEUR
     ,brut.affichage

from
(Select distinct
    base.ID_TABLEAU
    ,trad.ID_PRESENTATION 
    ,trad.LANGUE 
    ,base.ID_TYPE_RAPPORT
    ,rls.ordre_rapport
    ,trad.ID_RUBRIQUE 
    ,base.GROUPE
    ,trad.NIVEAUX     
    ,trad.LIB_BALISE 
    ,Case when base.ID_TYPE_RAPPORT = 2 and base.GROUPE = 'NAV_DEBEX' then 'Net assets at the beginning of the period ('||to_char(last_day(add_months(?,-6))+1,'DD/MM/YY')||')'
          when base.ID_TYPE_RAPPORT = 2 and base.GROUPE = 'TOTAL' then 'Net assets at the end of the period'
          else trad.LIB_RAPPORT end as LIB_RAPPORT
    ,sum(base.VALEUR) over (partition by trad.ID_RUBRIQUE ) as VALEUR
    ,case when trad.NIVEAUX is null and (base.VALEUR is null or base.VALEUR = 0) then null
          when trad.NIVEAUX is not null then 'X'
          when base.VALEUR <> 0 then 'X'
          end as affichage
    
    from 
    qxp.qxp_SUP_LUX_REF_TRAD trad
    join qxp.qxp_SUP_LUX_SURMAP_MBD rls on trad.ID_PRESENTATION = rls.ID_PRESENTATION and trad.ID_RUBRIQUE = rls.ID_RUBRIQUE
    Left join 
        (Select
            MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
            ,MBD.ID_TABLEAU
            ,fichier.ID_TYPE_RAPPORT
            ,MBD.ID_PRESENTATION 
            ,MBD.VERSION_ID_PRESENTATION 
            ,MBD.CODE_PTF 
--             ,MBD.ORDRE_RAPPORT 
            ,MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE 
            ,MBD.GROUPE 
            ,MBD.VALEUR 

            from
            qxp.qxp_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD
            join 
            (select distinct
            max(fic.ID_CHARGEMENT)over(partition by fic.DATE_RAPPORT) as ID_CHARGEMENT
            ,gab.ID_TYPE_RAPPORT
                        from 
                         qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX fic
                         join (Select
                                srq.DDate
                                ,srq.ID_GABARIT
                                from 
                                (Select to_date(?) as DDate 
                                       ,to_number(?) as ID_GABARIT from dual
                            )srq
             ) gabdate on fic.DATE_RAPPORT = gabdate.DDate and fic.ID_GABARIT = gabdate.ID_GABARIT 
             JOIN qxp.qxp_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD ON fic.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
             join qxp.qxp_gabarit gab on fic.ID_GABARIT = gab.ID_GABARIT
            where 
            fic.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
            and MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'PNL'
            )fichier on fichier.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
            
            Where 
            MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'PNL'
            and MBD.CODE_PTF = '999999'
            )base on trad.ID_PRESENTATION = base.ID_PRESENTATION
                       and trad.ID_RUBRIQUE = base.ID_RUBRIQUE
    Where 
    trad.ID_PRESENTATION = (select distinct 
                                asgc.ID_PRESENTATION_COMPTE_RES     
                                from 
                                qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
                                where
                                asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                                and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?)
    and trad.ID_LANGUE =  (Select
                            gab.ID_LANGUE 
                            from
                            qxp.qxp_gabarit gab
                            where 
                            gab.ID_GABARIT = ?)
    
 )brut                            
 Where 
 brut.affichage is not null
                             
--  order by 
--  brut.ordre_rapport            
-------------- gestion Libelle rubrique avec Presence donnée  Fin 
)presence_ligne,

( ------------- Cartesien des données et des libellés Debut
(-- calcul du nb de SECTIONS dans le rapport et produit cartesien
Select 
    '111111' as id_fnd_code
    ,0 as position
    ,srq.index_Section
    ,'1G' as page
    -- positionnement des ptf dans la page .
    ,1 as page_section
    ,1 as Position_ptf_section
    ,0 as index_col
--     ,'N0' as Index_Annee
    ,null as Index_Annee
    
    from
    (
    -- Calcul de nb de section dans le rapport 
    select distinct
    -- on dit ici 11 Ptf par section en comptant page de gauche plus page de droite (4 à gauche et 7 à droite)
--         ptf.id_fnd_code
--         ,ptf.position
        CEIL(ROW_NUMBER()over (ORDER BY ptf.position )/11) as index_Section
    from
    (
        -- ici la table des structures 
        (select 
        asgc.ID_FND_CODE 
        ,asgc.position
        from 
        qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
        Left join qxp.qxp_compartiment lib on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = lib.id_fnd_code
        left join qxp.qxp_sup_mapping qsm on qsm.code_mapping_cible=asgc.id_fnd_code
            and qsm.type_mapping='MASTER-FEEDERS'
        where
        asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
        and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
        and qsm.code_mapping_cible is null
        )        
        union -- code fond pour combined
        (select '999999' ,1000 from dual)
        )ptf
    )srq

)
Union
(
Select 
    srq.id_fnd_code
    ,srq.position
    ,srq.index_Section
    ,srq.page
    ,srq.page_section
    ,srq.Position_ptf_section
    ,srq.Position_ptf_section as index_col
    ,'N0' as Index_Annee
    
    From
    (
    --- partie gerant les Lib ptf et entete
    Select 
    sect.id_fnd_code
    ,sect.position
    ,sect.index_Section
    -- positionnement des ptf dans la page .
    ,row_number() over(partition by sect.index_section order by sect.position) as Position_ptf_section
    ,case when     row_number() over(partition by sect.index_section order by sect.position)<=4 then '1G'
                  Else '2D'end as page
    ,case when     row_number() over(partition by sect.index_section order by sect.position)<=4 then 1
              Else 2 end as page_section            
    from
    (
    -- Calcul de nb de section dans le rapport 
    select distinct
-- on dit ici 11 Ptf par section en comptant page de gauche plus page de droite (4 à gauche et 7 à droite)
         ptf.id_fnd_code
        ,ptf.position
        ,CEIL(ROW_NUMBER()over (ORDER BY ptf.position )/11) as index_Section
    from
    (
        -- ici la table des structures 
        (select 
        asgc.ID_FND_CODE 
        ,asgc.position
        from 
        qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
        Left join qxp.qxp_compartiment lib on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = lib.id_fnd_code
        left join qxp.qxp_sup_mapping qsm on qsm.code_mapping_cible=asgc.id_fnd_code
            and qsm.type_mapping='MASTER-FEEDERS'
        where
        asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
        and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
        and qsm.code_mapping_cible is null
        )        
        union -- code fond pour combined
        (select '999999' 
                ,1000                               
                from dual)
        )ptf
        )sect    
    )srq
    )
--------- gestion des sections # Fin        
    ------------- Cartesien des données et des libellés Fin
    )Cart    
    )tri
    where 
    tri.doublon is null    
   ----------------- Fin de Gestion des presence de libellés en fonction de la page gauche ou droite     
    )
    )prim
    Left join 
    (
    ----------------------------------------gestion du libellé du ptf + devise # Debut
Select
srq.id_fnd_code
,srq.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
,srq.FND_CURRENCY
from
(
(select distinct
            asgc.id_fnd_code
            ,case when lib.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION is null then 'Mettre à jour le fichier des libelles' else lib.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION  end as FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
            ,rf.FND_CURRENCY
        from
        -- ici la table des structures 
            qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
        join OWB_DWH.ref_fund rf on rf.id_fnd_code = asgc.ID_FND_CODE
        Left join qxp.qxp_compartiment lib on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = lib.id_fnd_code
        left join qxp.qxp_sup_mapping qsm on qsm.code_mapping_cible=asgc.id_fnd_code
            and qsm.type_mapping='MASTER-FEEDERS'                                                                      
        where
            asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
            and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?    
            and rf.FND_END_VALIDITY = '31/12/2199'
            and qsm.code_mapping_cible is null
)
union
(    
select 
        '999999' as id_fnd_code
        ,'Combined' as FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
        ,qs.DEVISE
        from 
        qxp.qxp_structure  qs
        where
        qs.ID_STRUCTURE = ?            
)        
)srq    
----------------------------------------gestion du libellé du ptf + devise # Fin 
)Devise on prim.ID_FND_CODE = Devise.ID_FND_CODE

Left join
(---------------------------------------gestion de la date  # Debut
Select 
srq.id_fnd_code
,srq.DATE_FIN_COMPART
,'N0' as Index_Annee
,To_char(to_date(?),'dd/mm/yyyy') as DDATE  
from
((select distinct
            asgc.id_fnd_code
            ,lib.DATE_FIN_COMPART
            ,asgc.ID_GABARIT
            ,qg.ID_TYPE_RAPPORT 
        from
            qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
        Left join qxp.qxp_compartiment lib on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = lib.id_fnd_code
        join qxp.qxp_gabarit qg on asgc.ID_GABARIT = qg.ID_GABARIT
        left join qxp.qxp_sup_mapping qsm on qsm.code_mapping_cible=asgc.id_fnd_code
            and qsm.type_mapping='MASTER-FEEDERS'
        where
            asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
            and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?    
            and qsm.code_mapping_cible is null
)            
union
(    
select distinct
            '999999' as id_fnd_code
            ,null as DATE_FIN_COMPART
            ,asgc.ID_GABARIT
            ,qg.ID_TYPE_RAPPORT 
        from
                qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
                join qxp.qxp_gabarit qg on asgc.ID_GABARIT = qg.ID_GABARIT
                                                                       
        where
            asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
            and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?    )            
    )srq        
 ---------------------------------------gestion de la date
) titre_date on prim.ID_FND_CODE = titre_date.ID_FND_CODE
               and prim.Index_Annee = titre_date.Index_Annee    

Left join 
(-------------------------------------- Données #Debut
Select
    MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
    ,fichier.DATE_RAPPORT
	,'N0' as Index_Annee    
	,MBD.ID_TABLEAU
    ,MBD.ID_PRESENTATION 
    ,MBD.VERSION_ID_PRESENTATION 
    ,MBD.CODE_PTF 
    ,MBD.ORDRE_RAPPORT 
    ,MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE 
    ,MBD.GROUPE 
    ,MBD.VALEUR 

        ------------------- gestion des nombres en fonction de la presentation Avenir.
    ,case when (MBD.VALEUR = 0 or MBD.VALEUR is null) then '-'
          when substr(MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1) in('A','B','C','D','E','F','G') and MBD.VALEUR <> 0 then 
                                trim(to_char(Abs(MBD.VALEUR),'999,999,999,999,999'))
          when substr(MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1) not in('A','B','C','D','E','F','G') and MBD.VALEUR <> 0 then
                                   Trim(TO_CHAR(MBD.VALEUR ,'999,999,999,999,999'))
           end  as Valeur_pres

    from
    qxp.qxp_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD
    join 
    (select distinct
        max(fic.ID_CHARGEMENT)over(partition by fic.DATE_RAPPORT) as ID_CHARGEMENT
        ,fic.DATE_RAPPORT
        from 
         qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX fic
         join
         (Select
            srq.DDate
            ,srq.ID_GABARIT
            from 
            (Select to_date(?) as DDate 
                   ,to_number(?) as ID_GABARIT from dual
            )srq
         )gabdate on fic.DATE_RAPPORT = gabdate.DDate and fic.ID_GABARIT = gabdate.ID_GABARIT 
            JOIN qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD ON fic.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
        where 
        fic.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
        and MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'PNL'
    )fichier on fichier.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
    join qxp.qxp_IMPORT_LUX fic on fichier.ID_CHARGEMENT = fic.ID_CHARGEMENT 
    Where 
    MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'PNL'
    -------------------------------------- Données #Fin
)Donnees on prim.ID_FND_CODE = Donnees.CODE_PTF 
         and prim.Index_Annee = Donnees.Index_Annee
         and prim.ordre_rapport = Donnees.ORDRE_RAPPORT 
         and prim.ID_RUBRIQUE = Donnees.ID_RUBRIQUE

	  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Date' and prim.Index_Annee is null then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
	  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Date' and prim.Index_Annee is not null then titre_date.DDate
	  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Devise' and prim.Index_Annee is null then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
	  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Devise' and prim.Index_Annee is not null then Devise.FND_CURRENCY
	  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)in('B','E') and prim.Index_Annee is null and prim.index_col in(0) then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
	  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)in('C','D','F','G','H') and prim.Index_Annee is null then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
	  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)in('C','D','F','G','H') and prim.Index_Annee is not null then NVL(Donnees.Valeur_pres,'-')
	  end as valeur_bloc
		  
,'BILAM_1G_'|| case when prim.NIVEAUX is null then 'N5'else prim.NIVEAUX end as "TEMPLATE"
,prim.index_Section as ID_SECTION

from
(
(
----------------- Debut de Gestion des presence de libellés en fonction de la page gauche ou droite 
Select 
tri.*
-- tri.ID_TABLEAU
-- ,tri.ID_PRESENTATION 
-- ,tri.LANGUE 
-- ,tri.ID_FND_CODE
-- ,tri.position
-- ,tri.index_Section
-- ,tri.page
-- ,tri.page_section
-- ,tri.Position_ptf_section
-- ,tri.index_col
-- ,tri.Index_Annee
-- ,tri.ordre_rapport
-- ,tri.ID_RUBRIQUE 
-- ,tri.GROUPE 	
-- ,tri.NIVEAUX 	
-- ,tri.LIB_BALISE 
-- ,tri.LIB_RAPPORT

from
(
Select

presence_ligne.ID_TABLEAU
,presence_ligne.ID_PRESENTATION 
,presence_ligne.LANGUE 
,Cart.ID_FND_CODE
,Cart.position
,Cart.index_Section
--,Cart.page
--,Cart.page_section
,Cart.Position_ptf_section
,Cart.index_col
,Cart.Index_Annee
,presence_ligne.ordre_rapport
,presence_ligne.ID_RUBRIQUE 
,presence_ligne.GROUPE 	
,presence_ligne.NIVEAUX 	
,presence_ligne.LIB_BALISE 
,presence_ligne.LIB_RAPPORT 

,case when Cart.Index_Annee = 'N1' and presence_ligne.ID_RUBRIQUE = 'A0020' then 'X' 
      when Cart.ID_FND_CODE = '111111' and Cart.Index_Annee is null and presence_ligne.ID_RUBRIQUE = 'A0020' and Cart.index_col = 0  then 'X'
      when Cart.ID_FND_CODE = '111111' and Cart.Index_Annee is null and presence_ligne.ID_RUBRIQUE = 'A0030' and Cart.index_col = 0  then 'X' 
      else null end as doublon
      
from

(-------------- gestion Libelle rubrique avec Presence donnée  Debut
Select 
--brut.ID_CHARGEMENT
	brut.ID_TABLEAU
	,brut.ID_PRESENTATION 
	,brut.LANGUE 
	,brut.ordre_rapport
	,brut.ID_RUBRIQUE 
	,brut.GROUPE 	
	,brut.NIVEAUX 	
	,brut.LIB_BALISE 
	,brut.LIB_RAPPORT 
	,brut.VALEUR
 	,brut.affichage

from
(Select distinct
	base.ID_TABLEAU
	,trad.ID_PRESENTATION 
	,trad.LANGUE 
	,rls.ordre_rapport
	,trad.ID_RUBRIQUE 
	,base.GROUPE
	,trad.NIVEAUX 	
	,trad.LIB_BALISE 
	,trad.LIB_RAPPORT 
	,sum(base.VALEUR) over (partition by trad.ID_RUBRIQUE ) as VALEUR
	,case when trad.NIVEAUX is null and (base.VALEUR is null or base.VALEUR = 0) then null
		  when trad.NIVEAUX is not null then 'X'
		  when base.VALEUR <> 0 then 'X'
		  end as affichage
	
	from 
	
	qxp.QXP_SUP_LUX_REF_TRAD trad
	join qxp.QXP_SUP_LUX_SURMAP_MBD rls on trad.ID_PRESENTATION = rls.ID_PRESENTATION and trad.ID_RUBRIQUE = rls.ID_RUBRIQUE
	Left join 
		(Select
			MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
			,MBD.ID_TABLEAU
			,MBD.ID_PRESENTATION 
			,MBD.VERSION_ID_PRESENTATION 
			,MBD.CODE_PTF 
-- 			,MBD.ORDRE_RAPPORT 
			,MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE 
			,MBD.GROUPE 
			,MBD.VALEUR 

			from
			qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD
			join 
			(select distinct
			max(fic.ID_CHARGEMENT)over(partition by fic.DATE_RAPPORT) as ID_CHARGEMENT
			from 
			 qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX fic
			 join (Select
                        srq.DDate
                        ,srq.ID_GABARIT
                        from 
                        (Select to_date(?) as DDate 
                               ,to_number(?) as ID_GABARIT from dual
                    )srq
			 ) gabdate on fic.DATE_RAPPORT = gabdate.DDate and fic.ID_GABARIT = gabdate.ID_GABARIT 
			 JOIN qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD ON fic.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
			where 
			fic.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
			and MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'BILAN'
			)fichier on fichier.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
			
			Where 
			MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'BILAN'
			and MBD.CODE_PTF = '999999'
			)base on trad.ID_PRESENTATION = base.ID_PRESENTATION
				  	 and trad.ID_RUBRIQUE = base.ID_RUBRIQUE
	Where 
	trad.ID_PRESENTATION = (select distinct 
								asgc.ID_PRESENTATION_PATRIMOINE 	
								from 
								qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
								where
								asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
								and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?)
	and trad.ID_LANGUE =  (Select
							gab.ID_LANGUE 
							from
							qxp.qxp_gabarit gab
							where 
							gab.ID_GABARIT = ?)
	
 )brut							
 Where 
 brut.affichage is not null
 							
--  order by 
--  brut.ordre_rapport			
-------------- gestion Libelle rubrique avec Presence donnée  Fin 
)presence_ligne,

( ------------- Cartesien des données et des libellés Debut
(-- calcul du nb de SECTIONS dans le rapport et produit cartesien
Select 
	'111111' as id_fnd_code
	,0 as position
	,srq.index_Section
	,1 as Position_ptf_section
	,0 as index_col
	,null as Index_Annee
	
	from
	(
	-- Calcul de nb de section dans le rapport 
	select distinct
	-- on dit ici 4 Ptf par section avec les libellés
    CEIL(ROW_NUMBER()over (ORDER BY ptf.position )/4) as index_Section
	from
	(
		-- ici la table des structures 
		(select 
		asgc.ID_FND_CODE 
		,asgc.position
		from 
		qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
		Left join qxp.qxp_compartiment lib on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = lib.id_fnd_code
        left join qxp.qxp_sup_mapping qsm on qsm.code_mapping_cible=asgc.id_fnd_code
            and qsm.type_mapping='MASTER-FEEDERS'
		where
		asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
		and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
		and lib.DATE_FIN_COMPART is null
        and qsm.code_mapping_cible is null
		)		
		union -- code fond pour combined
		(select '999999' ,500 from dual)
		)ptf
	)srq

)
Union
(
Select 
	srq.id_fnd_code
	,srq.position
	,srq.index_Section
    ,srq.Position_ptf_section
	,srq.Position_ptf_section as index_col
    ,'N0' as Index_Annee

	
	From
	(
	--- partie gerant les Lib ptf et entete
	Select 
	sect.id_fnd_code
	,sect.position
	,sect.index_Section
	-- positionnement des ptf dans la page .
	,row_number() over(partition by sect.index_section order by sect.position) as Position_ptf_section		
	from
	(
	-- Calcul de nb de section dans le rapport 
	select distinct
	-- on dit ici 4 Ptf par section avec les libellés
	 	ptf.id_fnd_code
		,ptf.position
		,CEIL(ROW_NUMBER()over (ORDER BY ptf.position )/4) as index_Section

	from
	(
		-- ici la table des structures 
		(select 
		asgc.ID_FND_CODE 
		,asgc.position
		from 
		qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
		Left join qxp.qxp_compartiment lib on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = lib.id_fnd_code
        left join qxp.qxp_sup_mapping qsm on qsm.code_mapping_cible=asgc.id_fnd_code
            and qsm.type_mapping='MASTER-FEEDERS'
		where
		asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
		and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
		and lib.DATE_FIN_COMPART is null
        and qsm.code_mapping_cible is null
		)		
		union -- code fond pour combined
		(select '999999' 
				,1000						
				from dual)
		)ptf
		)sect	
	)srq
--------- gestion des sections : Fin		
   )	
	------------- Cartesien des données et des libellés Fin
	)Cart	
	)tri
	where 
	tri.doublon is null	
    ----------------- Fin de Gestion des presence de libellés en fonction de la page gauche ou droite 	
	)
	)prim
	Left join 
	(
	----------------------------------------gestion du libellé du ptf + devise : Debut
Select
srq.id_fnd_code
,srq.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
,srq.FND_CURRENCY
from
(
(select distinct
			asgc.id_fnd_code
			,case when lib.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION is null then 'Mettre à jour le fichier des libelles' else lib.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION  end as FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
			,rf.FND_CURRENCY
		from
		-- ici la table des structures 
            qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
            join OWB_DWH.ref_fund rf on rf.id_fnd_code = asgc.ID_FND_CODE
            Left join qxp.qxp_compartiment lib on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = lib.id_fnd_code
            left join qxp.qxp_sup_mapping qsm on qsm.code_mapping_cible=asgc.id_fnd_code
                and qsm.type_mapping='MASTER-FEEDERS'
		where
			asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
			and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?	
			and rf.FND_END_VALIDITY = '31/12/2199'
			and lib.DATE_FIN_COMPART is null
            and qsm.code_mapping_cible is null
)
union
(	
select 
		'999999' as id_fnd_code
		,'Combined' as FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
		,qs.DEVISE 									
		
		from 
		qxp.qxp_structure  qs
		where
		qs.ID_STRUCTURE = ?			
)		
)srq	
----------------------------------------gestion du libellé du ptf + devise : Fin 
)Devise on prim.ID_FND_CODE = Devise.ID_FND_CODE

Left join
(---------------------------------------gestion de la date  : Debut
Select 
srq.id_fnd_code
,srq.DATE_FIN_COMPART
,'N0' as Index_Annee
,To_char(to_date(?),'dd/mm/yyyy') as DDATE 
	  
from
((select distinct
            asgc.id_fnd_code
            ,lib.DATE_FIN_COMPART
            ,asgc.ID_GABARIT
            ,qg.ID_TYPE_RAPPORT 
		from
            qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
        Left join qxp.qxp_compartiment lib on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = lib.id_fnd_code
        join qxp.qxp_gabarit qg on asgc.ID_GABARIT = qg.ID_GABARIT
        left join qxp.qxp_sup_mapping qsm on qsm.code_mapping_cible=asgc.id_fnd_code
            and qsm.type_mapping='MASTER-FEEDERS'
		where
			asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
			and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?	
			and lib.DATE_FIN_COMPART is null
            and qsm.code_mapping_cible is null
)			
union
(	
select distinct
			'999999' as id_fnd_code
			,null as DATE_FIN_COMPART
			,asgc.ID_GABARIT
			,qg.ID_TYPE_RAPPORT 
		from
				qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
				join qxp.qxp_gabarit qg on asgc.ID_GABARIT = qg.ID_GABARIT
					 	  								   	 	
		where
			asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
			and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?	)			
	)srq		
---------------------------------------gestion de la date    
) titre_date on prim.ID_FND_CODE = titre_date.ID_FND_CODE
  			 and prim.Index_Annee = titre_date.Index_Annee	

Left join 
(-------------------------------------- Données :Debut
Select
	MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
    ,fichier.DATE_RAPPORT
	,'N0' as Index_Annee	
    ,MBD.ID_TABLEAU
	,MBD.ID_PRESENTATION 
	,MBD.VERSION_ID_PRESENTATION 
	,MBD.CODE_PTF 
	,MBD.ORDRE_RAPPORT 
	,MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE 
	,MBD.GROUPE 
	,MBD.VALEUR 
	------------------- gestion des nombres
  ,Case when (MBD.VALEUR = 0 or MBD.VALEUR is null) then '-'  
        when MBD.GROUPE in ('ST_PML') then NVL(Trim(TO_CHAR(MBD.VALEUR ,'999,999,999,999,999,999')),'-')
        when MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE in ('C0260') and MBD.VALEUR <0 then Trim(TO_CHAR(MBD.VALEUR ,'999,999,999,999,999,999'))
        when MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE in ('F1150') and MBD.VALEUR >0 then '-'||Trim(TO_CHAR(MBD.VALEUR ,'999,999,999,999,999,999'))
        Else NVL(Trim(TO_CHAR(ABS(MBD.VALEUR) ,'999,999,999,999,999,999')),'-') end as Valeur_pres
	 
	from
	qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD
	join 
	(select distinct
	max(fic.ID_CHARGEMENT)over(partition by fic.DATE_RAPPORT) as ID_CHARGEMENT
    ,fic.DATE_RAPPORT
	from 
	 qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX fic
	 join (Select
				srq.DDate
				,srq.ID_GABARIT
				from 
				(Select to_date(?) as DDate 
					   ,to_number(?) as ID_GABARIT from dual
				)srq
	 ) gabdate on fic.DATE_RAPPORT = gabdate.DDate and fic.ID_GABARIT = gabdate.ID_GABARIT 
	 JOIN qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD ON fic.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
	where 
	fic.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
	and MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'BILAN'
	)fichier on fichier.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
	Where 
	MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'BILAN'
	-------------------------------------- Données :Fin
)Donnees on prim.ID_FND_CODE = Donnees.CODE_PTF 
		 and prim.Index_Annee = Donnees.Index_Annee
		 and prim.ordre_rapport = Donnees.ORDRE_RAPPORT 
		 and prim.ID_RUBRIQUE = Donnees.ID_RUBRIQUE

prim.index_Section

,prim.position

,Devise.FND_CURRENCY
,Donnees.VALEUR
,Donnees.Valeur_pres

,prim.ordre_rapport as ID_GROUPE
,prim.ordre_rapport AS ID_LIGNE

,'BILAM_S'||prim.index_Section||'L'||prim.ordre_rapport||'C'||prim.index_col||'D'||Case when prim.Index_Annee is null 
            then 'LIB' else prim.Index_Annee end||'_'||prim.ID_FND_CODE as Nom_Bloc

,Case when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Lib fond' and prim.Index_Annee is null then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
	  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Lib fond' and prim.Index_Annee is not null then Devise.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
	  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Date' and prim.Index_Annee is null then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
	  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Date' and prim.Index_Annee is not null then titre_date.DDate
	  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Devise' and prim.Index_Annee is null then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
	  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Devise' and prim.Index_Annee is not null then Devise.FND_CURRENCY
	  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)in('B','E') and prim.Index_Annee is null and prim.index_col in(0) then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
	  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)in('C','D','F','G','H') and prim.Index_Annee is null then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
	  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)in('C','D','F','G','H') and prim.Index_Annee is not null then NVL(Donnees.Valeur_pres,'-')
	  end as valeur_bloc

      when Cart.ID_FND_CODE = '111111' and Cart.Index_Annee is null and presence_ligne.ID_RUBRIQUE = 'A0020' and Cart.index_col = 0  then 'X'
      when Cart.ID_FND_CODE = '111111' and Cart.Index_Annee is null and presence_ligne.ID_RUBRIQUE = 'A0030' and Cart.index_col = 0  then 'X'

		  when base.VALEUR <> 0 then 'X'
