)presence_ligne,

( ------------- Cartesien des données et des libellés Debut
(-- calcul du nb de SECTIONS dans le rapport et produit cartesien
Select 
	'111111' as id_fnd_code
	,0 as position
	,srq.index_Section
	,1 as Position_ptf_section
	,0 as index_col
	,null as Index_Annee
	
	from
	(
	-- Calcul de nb de section dans le rapport 
	select distinct
	-- on dit ici 4 Ptf par section avec les libellés
    CEIL(ROW_NUMBER()over (ORDER BY ptf.position )/4) as index_Section
	from
	(
		-- ici la table des structures 
		(select 
		asgc.ID_FND_CODE 
		,asgc.position
		from 
		qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
		Left join qxp.qxp_compartiment lib on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = lib.id_fnd_code
        left join qxp.qxp_sup_mapping qsm on qsm.code_mapping_cible=asgc.id_fnd_code
            and qsm.type_mapping='MASTER-FEEDERS'
		where
		asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
		and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
		and lib.DATE_FIN_COMPART is null
        and qsm.code_mapping_cible is null
		)		
		union -- code fond pour combined
		(select '999999' ,500 from dual)
		)ptf
	)srq

)
Union
(
Select 
	srq.id_fnd_code
	,srq.position
	,srq.index_Section
    ,srq.Position_ptf_section
	,srq.Position_ptf_section as index_col
    ,'N0' as Index_Annee

	
	From
	(
	--- partie gerant les Lib ptf et entete
	Select 
	sect.id_fnd_code
	,sect.position
	,sect.index_Section
	-- positionnement des ptf dans la page .
	,row_number() over(partition by sect.index_section order by sect.position) as Position_ptf_section		
	from
	(
	-- Calcul de nb de section dans le rapport 
	select distinct
	-- on dit ici 4 Ptf par section avec les libellés
	 	ptf.id_fnd_code
		,ptf.position
		,CEIL(ROW_NUMBER()over (ORDER BY ptf.position )/4) as index_Section

	from
	(
		-- ici la table des structures 
		(select 
		asgc.ID_FND_CODE 
		,asgc.position
		from 
		qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
		Left join qxp.qxp_compartiment lib on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = lib.id_fnd_code
        left join qxp.qxp_sup_mapping qsm on qsm.code_mapping_cible=asgc.id_fnd_code
            and qsm.type_mapping='MASTER-FEEDERS'
		where
		asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
		and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
		and lib.DATE_FIN_COMPART is null
        and qsm.code_mapping_cible is null
		)		
		union -- code fond pour combined
		(select '999999' 
				,1000						
				from dual)
		)ptf
		)sect	
	)srq
--------- gestion des sections : Fin		
   )	
	------------- Cartesien des données et des libellés Fin
	)Cart	
	)tri
	where 
	tri.doublon is null	
    ----------------- Fin de Gestion des presence de libellés en fonction de la page gauche ou droite 	
	)
	)prim
	Left join 
	(
	----------------------------------------gestion du libellé du ptf + devise : Debut
Select
srq.id_fnd_code
,srq.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
,srq.FND_CURRENCY
from
(
(select distinct
			asgc.id_fnd_code
			,case when lib.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION is null then 'Mettre à jour le fichier des libelles' else lib.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION  end as FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
			,rf.FND_CURRENCY
		from
		-- ici la table des structures 
            qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
            join OWB_DWH.ref_fund rf on rf.id_fnd_code = asgc.ID_FND_CODE
            Left join qxp.qxp_compartiment lib on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = lib.id_fnd_code
            left join qxp.qxp_sup_mapping qsm on qsm.code_mapping_cible=asgc.id_fnd_code
                and qsm.type_mapping='MASTER-FEEDERS'
		where
			asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
			and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?	
			and rf.FND_END_VALIDITY = '31/12/2199'
			and lib.DATE_FIN_COMPART is null
            and qsm.code_mapping_cible is null
)
union
(	
select 
		'999999' as id_fnd_code
		,'Combined' as FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
		,qs.DEVISE 									
		
		from 
		qxp.qxp_structure  qs
		where
		qs.ID_STRUCTURE = ?			
)		
)srq	
----------------------------------------gestion du libellé du ptf + devise : Fin 
)Devise on prim.ID_FND_CODE = Devise.ID_FND_CODE

Left join
(---------------------------------------gestion de la date  : Debut
Select 
srq.id_fnd_code
,srq.DATE_FIN_COMPART
,'N0' as Index_Annee
,To_char(to_date(?),'dd/mm/yyyy') as DDATE 
	  
from
((select distinct
            asgc.id_fnd_code
            ,lib.DATE_FIN_COMPART
            ,asgc.ID_GABARIT
            ,qg.ID_TYPE_RAPPORT 
		from
            qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
        Left join qxp.qxp_compartiment lib on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = lib.id_fnd_code
        join qxp.qxp_gabarit qg on asgc.ID_GABARIT = qg.ID_GABARIT
        left join qxp.qxp_sup_mapping qsm on qsm.code_mapping_cible=asgc.id_fnd_code
            and qsm.type_mapping='MASTER-FEEDERS'
		where
			asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
			and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?	
			and lib.DATE_FIN_COMPART is null
            and qsm.code_mapping_cible is null
)			
union
(	
select distinct
			'999999' as id_fnd_code
			,null as DATE_FIN_COMPART
			,asgc.ID_GABARIT
			,qg.ID_TYPE_RAPPORT 
		from
				qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
				join qxp.qxp_gabarit qg on asgc.ID_GABARIT = qg.ID_GABARIT
					 	  								   	 	
		where
			asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
			and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?	)			
	)srq		
---------------------------------------gestion de la date    
) titre_date on prim.ID_FND_CODE = titre_date.ID_FND_CODE
  			 and prim.Index_Annee = titre_date.Index_Annee	

Left join 
(-------------------------------------- Données :Debut
Select
	MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
    ,fichier.DATE_RAPPORT
	,'N0' as Index_Annee	
    ,MBD.ID_TABLEAU
	,MBD.ID_PRESENTATION 
	,MBD.VERSION_ID_PRESENTATION 
	,MBD.CODE_PTF 
	,MBD.ORDRE_RAPPORT 
	,MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE 
	,MBD.GROUPE 
	,MBD.VALEUR 
	------------------- gestion des nombres
  ,Case when (MBD.VALEUR = 0 or MBD.VALEUR is null) then '-'  
        when MBD.GROUPE in ('ST_PML') then NVL(Trim(TO_CHAR(MBD.VALEUR ,'999,999,999,999,999,999')),'-')
        when MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE in ('C0260') and MBD.VALEUR <0 then Trim(TO_CHAR(MBD.VALEUR ,'999,999,999,999,999,999'))
        when MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE in ('F1150') and MBD.VALEUR >0 then '-'||Trim(TO_CHAR(MBD.VALEUR ,'999,999,999,999,999,999'))
        Else NVL(Trim(TO_CHAR(ABS(MBD.VALEUR) ,'999,999,999,999,999,999')),'-') end as Valeur_pres
	 
	from
	qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD
	join 
	(select distinct
	max(fic.ID_CHARGEMENT)over(partition by fic.DATE_RAPPORT) as ID_CHARGEMENT
    ,fic.DATE_RAPPORT
	from 
	 qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX fic
	 join (Select
				srq.DDate
				,srq.ID_GABARIT
				from 
				(Select to_date(?) as DDate 
					   ,to_number(?) as ID_GABARIT from dual
				)srq
	 ) gabdate on fic.DATE_RAPPORT = gabdate.DDate and fic.ID_GABARIT = gabdate.ID_GABARIT 
	 JOIN qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD ON fic.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
	where 
	fic.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
	and MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'BILAN'
	)fichier on fichier.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
	Where 
	MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'BILAN'
	-------------------------------------- Données :Fin
)Donnees on prim.ID_FND_CODE = Donnees.CODE_PTF 
		 and prim.Index_Annee = Donnees.Index_Annee
		 and prim.ordre_rapport = Donnees.ORDRE_RAPPORT 
		 and prim.ID_RUBRIQUE = Donnees.ID_RUBRIQUE

,prim.LANGUE

,prim.NIVEAUX 	
,prim.LIB_BALISE 
,prim.LIB_RAPPORT
,Devise.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
,titre_date.DDate
,Devise.FND_CURRENCY
,Donnees.VALEUR
,Donnees.Valeur_pres

,prim.ordre_rapport as ID_GROUPE
,prim.ordre_rapport AS ID_LIGNE

,'BILAM_S'||prim.index_Section||'L'||prim.ordre_rapport||'C'||prim.index_col||'D'||Case when prim.Index_Annee is null 
            then 'LIB' else prim.Index_Annee end||'_'||prim.ID_FND_CODE as Nom_Bloc

,Case when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Lib fond' and prim.Index_Annee is null then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
	  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Lib fond' and prim.Index_Annee is not null then Devise.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
	  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Date' and prim.Index_Annee is null then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
	  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Date' and prim.Index_Annee is not null then titre_date.DDate
	  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Devise' and prim.Index_Annee is null then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
	  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Devise' and prim.Index_Annee is not null then Devise.FND_CURRENCY
	  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)in('B','E') and prim.Index_Annee is null and prim.index_col in(0) then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
	  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)in('C','D','F','G','H') and prim.Index_Annee is null then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
	  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)in('C','D','F','G','H') and prim.Index_Annee is not null then NVL(Donnees.Valeur_pres,'-')
	  end as valeur_bloc
		  
,'BILAM_1G_'|| case when prim.NIVEAUX is null then 'N5'else prim.NIVEAUX end as "TEMPLATE"
,prim.index_Section as ID_SECTION

(Select distinct
	base.ID_TABLEAU
	,trad.ID_PRESENTATION 
	,trad.LANGUE 
	,rls.ordre_rapport
	,trad.ID_RUBRIQUE 
	,base.GROUPE
	,trad.NIVEAUX 	
	,trad.LIB_BALISE 
	,trad.LIB_RAPPORT 
	,sum(base.VALEUR) over (partition by trad.ID_RUBRIQUE ) as VALEUR
	,case when trad.NIVEAUX is null and (base.VALEUR is null or base.VALEUR = 0) then null
		  when trad.NIVEAUX is not null then 'X'
		  when base.VALEUR <> 0 then 'X'
		  end as affichage
	
	from 
	
	qxp.QXP_SUP_LUX_REF_TRAD trad
	join qxp.QXP_SUP_LUX_SURMAP_MBD rls on trad.ID_PRESENTATION = rls.ID_PRESENTATION and trad.ID_RUBRIQUE = rls.ID_RUBRIQUE
	Left join 
		(Select
			MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
			,MBD.ID_TABLEAU
			,MBD.ID_PRESENTATION 
			,MBD.VERSION_ID_PRESENTATION 
			,MBD.CODE_PTF

			qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD
			join 
			(select distinct
			max(fic.ID_CHARGEMENT)over(partition by fic.DATE_RAPPORT) as ID_CHARGEMENT
			from 
			 qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX fic
			 join (Select
                        srq.DDate
                        ,srq.ID_GABARIT
                        from 
                        (Select to_date(?) as DDate

                    )srq
			 ) gabdate on fic.DATE_RAPPORT = gabdate.DDate and fic.ID_GABARIT = gabdate.ID_GABARIT 
			 JOIN qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD ON fic.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
			where 
			fic.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
			and MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'BILAN'
			)fichier on fichier.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
			
			Where 
			MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'BILAN'
			and MBD.CODE_PTF = '999999'
			)base on trad.ID_PRESENTATION = base.ID_PRESENTATION
				  	 and trad.ID_RUBRIQUE = base.ID_RUBRIQUE
	Where 
	trad.ID_PRESENTATION = (select distinct 
								asgc.ID_PRESENTATION_PATRIMOINE 	
								from 
								qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
								where
								asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
								and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?)
	and trad.ID_LANGUE =  (Select
							gab.ID_LANGUE

							where 
							gab.ID_GABARIT = ?)
	
 )brut

Select

	,srq.index_Section

	from

	-- Calcul de nb de section dans le rapport 
	select distinct
	-- on dit ici 4 Ptf par section avec les libellés
    CEIL(ROW_NUMBER()over (ORDER BY ptf.position )/4) as index_Section
	from
	(
		-- ici la table des structures 
		(select 
		asgc.ID_FND_CODE

		from

            and qsm.type_mapping='MASTER-FEEDERS'
		where
		asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
		and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
		and lib.DATE_FIN_COMPART is null
        and qsm.code_mapping_cible is null
		)		
		union -- code fond pour combined
		(select '999999' ,500 from dual)
		)ptf
	)srq

)

,srq.DATE_FIN_COMPART
,'N0' as Index_Annee

        join qxp.qxp_gabarit qg on asgc.ID_GABARIT = qg.ID_GABARIT
        left join qxp.qxp_sup_mapping qsm on qsm.code_mapping_cible=asgc.id_fnd_code
            and qsm.type_mapping='MASTER-FEEDERS'

			asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
			and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?	
			and lib.DATE_FIN_COMPART is null
            and qsm.code_mapping_cible is null
)

			'999999' as id_fnd_code
			,null as DATE_FIN_COMPART
			,asgc.ID_GABARIT
			,qg.ID_TYPE_RAPPORT

				qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc

			asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
			and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?	)			
	)srq

) titre_date on prim.ID_FND_CODE = titre_date.ID_FND_CODE
  			 and prim.Index_Annee = titre_date.Index_Annee	

Left join 
(-------------------------------------- Données :Debut
Select
	MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
    ,fichier.DATE_RAPPORT
	,'N0' as Index_Annee	
    ,MBD.ID_TABLEAU
	,MBD.ID_PRESENTATION 
	,MBD.VERSION_ID_PRESENTATION 
	,MBD.CODE_PTF 
	,MBD.ORDRE_RAPPORT 
	,MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE 
	,MBD.GROUPE 
	,MBD.VALEUR 
	------------------- gestion des nombres
  ,Case when (MBD.VALEUR = 0 or MBD.VALEUR is null) then '-'  
        when MBD.GROUPE in ('ST_PML') then NVL(Trim(TO_CHAR(MBD.VALEUR ,'999,999,999,999,999,999')),'-')
        when MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE in ('C0260') and MBD.VALEUR <0 then Trim(TO_CHAR(MBD.VALEUR ,'999,999,999,999,999,999'))
        when MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE in ('F1150') and MBD.VALEUR >0 then '-'||Trim(TO_CHAR(MBD.VALEUR ,'999,999,999,999,999,999'))
        Else NVL(Trim(TO_CHAR(ABS(MBD.VALEUR) ,'999,999,999,999,999,999')),'-') end as Valeur_pres
	 
	from
	qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD
	join 
	(select distinct
	max(fic.ID_CHARGEMENT)over(partition by fic.DATE_RAPPORT) as ID_CHARGEMENT
    ,fic.DATE_RAPPORT
	from 
	 qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX fic
	 join (Select
				srq.DDate
				,srq.ID_GABARIT
				from 
				(Select to_date(?) as DDate 
					   ,to_number(?) as ID_GABARIT from dual
				)srq
	 ) gabdate on fic.DATE_RAPPORT = gabdate.DDate and fic.ID_GABARIT = gabdate.ID_GABARIT 
	 JOIN qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD ON fic.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
	where 
	fic.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
	and MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'BILAN'
	)fichier on fichier.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
	Where 
	MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'BILAN'
	-------------------------------------- Données :Fin
)Donnees on prim.ID_FND_CODE = Donnees.CODE_PTF 
		 and prim.Index_Annee = Donnees.Index_Annee
		 and prim.ordre_rapport = Donnees.ORDRE_RAPPORT 
		 and prim.ID_RUBRIQUE = Donnees.ID_RUBRIQUE

          when substr(MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1) in('A','B','C','D','E','F','G') and MBD.VALEUR <> 0 then

      when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Date' and prim.Index_Annee is null then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
      when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Date' and prim.Index_Annee is not null then titre_date.DDate
      when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Devise' and prim.Index_Annee is null then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
      when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Devise' and prim.Index_Annee is not null then Devise.FND_CURRENCY
    --  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)in('B','E','S') and prim.Index_Annee is null and prim.index_col in(0) then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
      when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)in('B','E','C','D','F','G','H','I','J','K','L','M','N','O','P','Q','R','S','Z') and prim.Index_Annee is null then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
      when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)in('C','D','F','G','H','I','J','K','L','M','N','O','P','Q','R','S','Z') and prim.Index_Annee is not null then NVL(Donnees.Valeur_pres,'-')
    -- on retire 'B','E' pour ne pas avoir de tirets sur ces lignes.
      end as valeur_bloc
          
,'CPTAM_1G_'|| case when prim.GROUPE not in ('REEVAL') and prim.NIVEAUX is null then 'N5' 
                    when prim.GROUPE = ('REEVAL') and prim.NIVEAUX is null then 'N6'
                else prim.NIVEAUX end as "TEMPLATE"
,prim.index_Section as ID_SECTION

from
(
(
----------------- Debut de Gestion des presence de libellÃ©s en fonction de la page gauche ou droite 
Select 
tri.*

from
(
Select

presence_ligne.ID_TABLEAU
,presence_ligne.ID_PRESENTATION 
,presence_ligne.LANGUE 
,Cart.ID_FND_CODE
,Cart.position
,Cart.index_Section
--,Cart.page
--,Cart.page_section
,Cart.Position_ptf_section
,Cart.index_col
,Cart.Index_Annee
,presence_ligne.ordre_rapport
,presence_ligne.ID_RUBRIQUE 
,presence_ligne.GROUPE     
,presence_ligne.NIVEAUX     
,presence_ligne.LIB_BALISE 
,presence_ligne.LIB_RAPPORT 

,case when Cart.Index_Annee = 'N1' and presence_ligne.ID_RUBRIQUE = 'A0020' then 'X' 
      when Cart.ID_FND_CODE = '111111' and Cart.Index_Annee is null and presence_ligne.ID_RUBRIQUE = 'A0020' and Cart.index_col = 0  then 'X'
      when Cart.ID_FND_CODE = '111111' and Cart.Index_Annee is null and presence_ligne.ID_RUBRIQUE = 'A0030' and Cart.index_col = 0  then 'X' 
      else null end as doublon


from

(-------------- gestion Libelle rubrique avec Presence donnÃ©e  Debut
Select 
--brut.ID_CHARGEMENT
    brut.ID_TABLEAU
    ,brut.ID_PRESENTATION 
    ,brut.LANGUE 
    ,brut.ordre_rapport
    ,brut.ID_RUBRIQUE 
    ,brut.GROUPE     
    ,brut.NIVEAUX     
    ,brut.LIB_BALISE 
    ,brut.LIB_RAPPORT 
    ,brut.VALEUR
     ,brut.affichage

from
(Select distinct
    base.ID_TABLEAU
    ,trad.ID_PRESENTATION 
    ,trad.LANGUE 
    ,base.ID_TYPE_RAPPORT
    ,rls.ordre_rapport
    ,trad.ID_RUBRIQUE 
    ,base.GROUPE
    ,trad.NIVEAUX     
    ,trad.LIB_BALISE 
    ,Case when base.ID_TYPE_RAPPORT = 2 and base.GROUPE = 'NAV_DEBEX' then 'Net assets at the beginning of the period ('||to_char(last_day(add_months(?,-6))+1,'DD/MM/YY')||')'
          when base.ID_TYPE_RAPPORT = 2 and base.GROUPE = 'TOTAL' then 'Net assets at the end of the period'
          else trad.LIB_RAPPORT end as LIB_RAPPORT
    ,sum(base.VALEUR) over (partition by trad.ID_RUBRIQUE ) as VALEUR
    ,case when trad.NIVEAUX is null and (base.VALEUR is null or base.VALEUR = 0) then null
          when trad.NIVEAUX is not null then 'X'
          when base.VALEUR <> 0 then 'X'
          end as affichage
    
    from 
    qxp.qxp_SUP_LUX_REF_TRAD trad
    join qxp.qxp_SUP_LUX_SURMAP_MBD rls on trad.ID_PRESENTATION = rls.ID_PRESENTATION and trad.ID_RUBRIQUE = rls.ID_RUBRIQUE
    Left join 
        (Select
            MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
            ,MBD.ID_TABLEAU
            ,fichier.ID_TYPE_RAPPORT
            ,MBD.ID_PRESENTATION 
            ,MBD.VERSION_ID_PRESENTATION 
            ,MBD.CODE_PTF 
--             ,MBD.ORDRE_RAPPORT 
            ,MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE 
            ,MBD.GROUPE 
            ,MBD.VALEUR 

            from
            qxp.qxp_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD
            join 
            (select distinct
            max(fic.ID_CHARGEMENT)over(partition by fic.DATE_RAPPORT) as ID_CHARGEMENT
            ,gab.ID_TYPE_RAPPORT
                        from 
                         qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX fic
                         join (Select
                                srq.DDate
                                ,srq.ID_GABARIT
                                from 
                                (Select to_date(?) as DDate 
                                       ,to_number(?) as ID_GABARIT from dual
                            )srq
             ) gabdate on fic.DATE_RAPPORT = gabdate.DDate and fic.ID_GABARIT = gabdate.ID_GABARIT 
             JOIN qxp.qxp_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD ON fic.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
             join qxp.qxp_gabarit gab on fic.ID_GABARIT = gab.ID_GABARIT
            where 
            fic.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
            and MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'PNL'
            )fichier on fichier.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
            
            Where 
            MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'PNL'
            and MBD.CODE_PTF = '999999'
            )base on trad.ID_PRESENTATION = base.ID_PRESENTATION
                       and trad.ID_RUBRIQUE = base.ID_RUBRIQUE
    Where 
    trad.ID_PRESENTATION = (select distinct 
                                asgc.ID_PRESENTATION_COMPTE_RES     
                                from 
                                qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
                                where
                                asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                                and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?)
    and trad.ID_LANGUE =  (Select
                            gab.ID_LANGUE 
                            from
                            qxp.qxp_gabarit gab
                            where 
                            gab.ID_GABARIT = ?)
    
 )brut                            
 Where 
 brut.affichage is not null

--  brut.ordre_rapport            
-------------- gestion Libelle rubrique avec Presence donnÃ©e  Fin 
)presence_ligne,

( ------------- Cartesien des donnÃ©es et des libellÃ©s Debut
(-- calcul du nb de SECTIONS dans le rapport et produit cartesien
Select 
    '111111' as id_fnd_code
    ,0 as position
    ,srq.index_Section

    ,0 as index_col
    ,null as Index_Annee
    
    from
    (
    -- Calcul de nb de section dans le rapport 
    select distinct
	-- on dit ici 6 Ptf par section en comptant page de gauche plus page de droite (2 Ã  gauche et 4 Ã  droite)
-- 		ptf.id_fnd_code
-- 		,ptf.position
  -- on dit ici 4 Ptf par section
    CEIL(ROW_NUMBER()over (ORDER BY ptf.position )/4) as index_Section
    from
    (
        -- ici la table des structures

        asgc.ID_FND_CODE 
        ,asgc.position

            and qsm.type_mapping='MASTER-FEEDERS'
        where
        asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
        and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
        and qsm.code_mapping_cible is null
        )        
        union -- code fond pour combined
        (select '999999' ,1000 from dual)
        )ptf
    )srq

)

(-------------------------------------- DonnÃ©es #Debut
Select
    MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
    ,fichier.DATE_RAPPORT
	,'N0' as Index_Annee  
    ,MBD.ID_TABLEAU
    ,MBD.ID_PRESENTATION 
    ,MBD.VERSION_ID_PRESENTATION 
    ,MBD.CODE_PTF 
    ,MBD.ORDRE_RAPPORT 
    ,MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE 
    ,MBD.GROUPE 
    ,MBD.VALEUR 

        ------------------- gestion des nombres en fonction de la presentation Avenir.
    ,case when (MBD.VALEUR = 0 or MBD.VALEUR is null) then null
          when substr(MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1) in('A','B','C','D','E','F','G') and MBD.VALEUR <> 0 then 
                                trim(to_char(Abs(MBD.VALEUR),'999,999,999,999,999'))
          when substr(MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1) not in('A','B','C','D','E','F','G') and MBD.VALEUR <> 0 then
                                   Trim(TO_CHAR(MBD.VALEUR ,'999,999,999,999,999'))
           end  as Valeur_pres

    from
    qxp.qxp_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD
    join 
    (select distinct
        max(fic.ID_CHARGEMENT)over(partition by fic.DATE_RAPPORT) as ID_CHARGEMENT
        ,fic.DATE_RAPPORT

         join

            srq.DDate

            from

                   ,to_number(?) as ID_GABARIT from dual
            )srq
         )gabdate on fic.DATE_RAPPORT = gabdate.DDate and fic.ID_GABARIT = gabdate.ID_GABARIT 
            JOIN qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD ON fic.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
        where 
        fic.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
        and MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'PNL'
    )fichier on fichier.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
    join qxp.qxp_IMPORT_LUX fic on fichier.ID_CHARGEMENT = fic.ID_CHARGEMENT 
    Where 
    MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'PNL'
    -------------------------------------- DonnÃ©es #Fin

            then 'LIB' else prim.Index_Annee end||'_'||prim.ID_FND_CODE as Nom_Bloc

,Case when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Lib fond' and prim.Index_Annee is null then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
      when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Lib fond' and prim.Index_Annee is not null then Devise.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
      when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Date' and prim.Index_Annee is null then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
      when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Date' and prim.Index_Annee is not null then titre_date.DDate
      when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Devise' and prim.Index_Annee is null then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
      when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A' and prim.LIB_BALISE = 'Devise' and prim.Index_Annee is not null then Devise.FND_CURRENCY
    --  when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)in('B','E','S') and prim.Index_Annee is null and prim.index_col in(0) then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
      when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)in('B','E','C','D','F','G','H','I','J','K','L','M','N','O','P','Q','R','S','Z') and prim.Index_Annee is null then prim.LIB_RAPPORT
      when  substr(prim.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)in('C','D','F','G','H','I','J','K','L','M','N','O','P','Q','R','S','Z') and prim.Index_Annee is not null then NVL(Donnees.Valeur_pres,'-')
    -- on retire 'B','E' pour ne pas avoir de tirets sur ces lignes.
      end as valeur_bloc
          
,'CPTAM_1G_'|| case when prim.GROUPE not in ('REEVAL') and prim.NIVEAUX is null then 'N5'

(-------------- gestion Libelle rubrique avec Presence donnÃ©e  Debut
Select 
--brut.ID_CHARGEMENT
    brut.ID_TABLEAU
    ,brut.ID_PRESENTATION 
    ,brut.LANGUE 
    ,brut.ordre_rapport
    ,brut.ID_RUBRIQUE 
    ,brut.GROUPE     
    ,brut.NIVEAUX     
    ,brut.LIB_BALISE 
    ,brut.LIB_RAPPORT 
    ,brut.VALEUR
     ,brut.affichage

from
(Select distinct
    base.ID_TABLEAU
    ,trad.ID_PRESENTATION 
    ,trad.LANGUE 
    ,base.ID_TYPE_RAPPORT
    ,rls.ordre_rapport
    ,trad.ID_RUBRIQUE 
    ,base.GROUPE
    ,trad.NIVEAUX     
    ,trad.LIB_BALISE 
    ,Case when base.ID_TYPE_RAPPORT = 2 and base.GROUPE = 'NAV_DEBEX' then 'Net assets at the beginning of the period ('||to_char(last_day(add_months(?,-6))+1,'DD/MM/YY')||')'
          when base.ID_TYPE_RAPPORT = 2 and base.GROUPE = 'TOTAL' then 'Net assets at the end of the period'
          else trad.LIB_RAPPORT end as LIB_RAPPORT
    ,sum(base.VALEUR) over (partition by trad.ID_RUBRIQUE ) as VALEUR
    ,case when trad.NIVEAUX is null and (base.VALEUR is null or base.VALEUR = 0) then null
          when trad.NIVEAUX is not null then 'X'
          when base.VALEUR <> 0 then 'X'
          end as affichage
    
    from 
    qxp.qxp_SUP_LUX_REF_TRAD trad
    join qxp.qxp_SUP_LUX_SURMAP_MBD rls on trad.ID_PRESENTATION = rls.ID_PRESENTATION and trad.ID_RUBRIQUE = rls.ID_RUBRIQUE
    Left join 
        (Select
            MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
            ,MBD.ID_TABLEAU
            ,fichier.ID_TYPE_RAPPORT
            ,MBD.ID_PRESENTATION 
            ,MBD.VERSION_ID_PRESENTATION 
            ,MBD.CODE_PTF 
--             ,MBD.ORDRE_RAPPORT 
            ,MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE 
            ,MBD.GROUPE 
            ,MBD.VALEUR 

            from
            qxp.qxp_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD
            join 
            (select distinct
            max(fic.ID_CHARGEMENT)over(partition by fic.DATE_RAPPORT) as ID_CHARGEMENT
            ,gab.ID_TYPE_RAPPORT
                        from 
                         qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX fic
                         join (Select
                                srq.DDate
                                ,srq.ID_GABARIT
                                from 
                                (Select to_date(?) as DDate 
                                       ,to_number(?) as ID_GABARIT from dual
                            )srq
             ) gabdate on fic.DATE_RAPPORT = gabdate.DDate and fic.ID_GABARIT = gabdate.ID_GABARIT 
             JOIN qxp.qxp_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD ON fic.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
             join qxp.qxp_gabarit gab on fic.ID_GABARIT = gab.ID_GABARIT
            where 
            fic.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
            and MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'PNL'
            )fichier on fichier.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
            
            Where 
            MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'PNL'
            and MBD.CODE_PTF = '999999'
            )base on trad.ID_PRESENTATION = base.ID_PRESENTATION
                       and trad.ID_RUBRIQUE = base.ID_RUBRIQUE
    Where 
    trad.ID_PRESENTATION = (select distinct 
                                asgc.ID_PRESENTATION_COMPTE_RES     
                                from 
                                qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
                                where
                                asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                                and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?)
    and trad.ID_LANGUE =  (Select
                            gab.ID_LANGUE 
                            from
                            qxp.qxp_gabarit gab
                            where 
                            gab.ID_GABARIT = ?)
    
 )brut                            
 Where 
 brut.affichage is not null
                             
--  order by 
--  brut.ordre_rapport            
-------------- gestion Libelle rubrique avec Presence donnÃ©e  Fin 
)presence_ligne,

( ------------- Cartesien des donnÃ©es et des libellÃ©s Debut
(-- calcul du nb de SECTIONS dans le rapport et produit cartesien
Select 
    '111111' as id_fnd_code
    ,0 as position
    ,srq.index_Section
    ,1 as Position_ptf_section
    ,0 as index_col
    ,null as Index_Annee
    
    from
    (
    -- Calcul de nb de section dans le rapport 
    select distinct
	-- on dit ici 6 Ptf par section en comptant page de gauche plus page de droite (2 Ã  gauche et 4 Ã  droite)
-- 		ptf.id_fnd_code
-- 		,ptf.position
  -- on dit ici 4 Ptf par section
    CEIL(ROW_NUMBER()over (ORDER BY ptf.position )/4) as index_Section
    from
    (
        -- ici la table des structures 
        (select 
        asgc.ID_FND_CODE 
        ,asgc.position
        from 
        qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
        Left join qxp.qxp_compartiment lib on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = lib.id_fnd_code
        left join qxp.qxp_sup_mapping qsm on qsm.code_mapping_cible=asgc.id_fnd_code
            and qsm.type_mapping='MASTER-FEEDERS'
        where
        asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
        and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
        and qsm.code_mapping_cible is null
        )        
        union -- code fond pour combined
        (select '999999' ,1000 from dual)
        )ptf
    )srq

)
Union
(
Select 
    srq.id_fnd_code
    ,srq.position
    ,srq.index_Section
    ,srq.Position_ptf_section
    ,srq.Position_ptf_section as index_col
    ,'N0' as Index_Annee
    
    From
    (
    --- partie gerant les Lib ptf et entete
    Select 
    sect.id_fnd_code
    ,sect.position
    ,sect.index_Section
    -- positionnement des ptf dans la page
    ,row_number() over(partition by sect.index_section order by sect.position) as Position_ptf_section        
    from
    (
    -- Calcul de nb de section dans le rapport 
    select distinct
         ptf.id_fnd_code
        ,ptf.position
    -- on dit ici 4 Ptf par section avec les libellÃ©s
        ,CEIL(ROW_NUMBER()over (ORDER BY ptf.position )/4) as index_Section
        
    from
    (
        -- ici la table des structures 
        (select 
        asgc.ID_FND_CODE 
        ,asgc.position
        from 
        qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc
        Left join qxp.qxp_compartiment lib on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = lib.id_fnd_code
        left join qxp.qxp_sup_mapping qsm on qsm.code_mapping_cible=asgc.id_fnd_code
            and qsm.type_mapping='MASTER-FEEDERS'
        where
        asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
        and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?
        and qsm.code_mapping_cible is null
        )        
        union -- code fond pour combined
        (select '999999' 
                ,1000                               
                from dual)
        )ptf

,srq.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
,srq.FND_CURRENCY
from
(
(select distinct
            asgc.id_fnd_code
            ,case when lib.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION is null then 'Mettre Ã  jour le fichier des libelles' else lib.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION  end as FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION

        Left join qxp.qxp_compartiment lib on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = lib.id_fnd_code

            and qsm.type_mapping='MASTER-FEEDERS'

        qs.ID_STRUCTURE = ?

,srq.DATE_FIN_COMPART

            qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc

        join qxp.qxp_gabarit qg on asgc.ID_GABARIT = qg.ID_GABARIT
        left join qxp.qxp_sup_mapping qsm on qsm.code_mapping_cible=asgc.id_fnd_code
            and qsm.type_mapping='MASTER-FEEDERS'
        where
            asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
            and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?    
            and qsm.code_mapping_cible is null
)            
union
(

            '999999' as id_fnd_code
            ,null as DATE_FIN_COMPART
            ,asgc.ID_GABARIT
            ,qg.ID_TYPE_RAPPORT

            qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc

            asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
            and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?    )

               and prim.Index_Annee = titre_date.Index_Annee

Select
    MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
    ,fichier.DATE_RAPPORT
	,'N0' as Index_Annee  
    ,MBD.ID_TABLEAU
    ,MBD.ID_PRESENTATION 
    ,MBD.VERSION_ID_PRESENTATION 
    ,MBD.CODE_PTF 
    ,MBD.ORDRE_RAPPORT 
    ,MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE 
    ,MBD.GROUPE 
    ,MBD.VALEUR 

        ------------------- gestion des nombres en fonction de la presentation Avenir.
    ,case when (MBD.VALEUR = 0 or MBD.VALEUR is null) then null
          when substr(MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1) in('A','B','C','D','E','F','G') and MBD.VALEUR <> 0 then 
                                trim(to_char(Abs(MBD.VALEUR),'999,999,999,999,999'))
          when substr(MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1) not in('A','B','C','D','E','F','G') and MBD.VALEUR <> 0 then
                                   Trim(TO_CHAR(MBD.VALEUR ,'999,999,999,999,999'))
           end  as Valeur_pres

    from
    qxp.qxp_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD
    join 
    (select distinct
        max(fic.ID_CHARGEMENT)over(partition by fic.DATE_RAPPORT) as ID_CHARGEMENT
        ,fic.DATE_RAPPORT
        from 
         qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX fic
         join
         (Select
            srq.DDate
            ,srq.ID_GABARIT
            from 
            (Select to_date(?) as DDate 
                   ,to_number(?) as ID_GABARIT from dual
            )srq
         )gabdate on fic.DATE_RAPPORT = gabdate.DDate and fic.ID_GABARIT = gabdate.ID_GABARIT 
            JOIN qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD ON fic.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
        where 
        fic.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
        and MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'PNL'
    )fichier on fichier.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
    join qxp.qxp_IMPORT_LUX fic on fichier.ID_CHARGEMENT = fic.ID_CHARGEMENT 
    Where 
    MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'PNL'

         and prim.ID_RUBRIQUE = Donnees.ID_RUBRIQUE

select 
    id_section
    ,niveau
    ,id_ligne id_groupe
    ,id_ligne
    ,id_colonne
    ,'FEES_RATES_'||niveau||'L'||id_ligne||'C'||id_colonne nom_bloc
    /*Valeur Bloc*/
    ,decode(niveau
        ,'N0',replace(to_char(last_day(ref_date_campagne),'dd/mm/yy','nls_date_language=english'),' ') /*En-tête de page - Date rapport*/
        ,'N1',null /*Titre de la note*/
        ,'N2',to_char(last_day(ref_date_campagne),'dd ','nls_date_language=english')
               ||trim(to_char(ref_date_campagne,'Month','nls_date_language=english'))
               ||to_char(ref_date_campagne,' yyyy','nls_date_language=english') 
        ,'N3',ref_groupe_part /*En-tête de tableau*/
        ,'N4',ref_groupe_part /*En-tête de tableau (continued)*/
        ,'N5',case /*Niveau détail*/
                  when id_colonne=1 then ref_fnd_lng_description 
                  else 
                      case
                          when mgf_rate is null or mgf_rate=0 then '*'
                          else to_char(mgf_rate,'FM9G999G999G999G999G999G990D00'||nb_dec_significatives,'NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''. ')||'%'
                          end
                  end 
        ,'N6',null /*Pied de tableau*/
           ) as valeur_bloc
    /*TEMPLATE*/
    ,'FEES_RATES_'||niveau
                 || case when niveau in 'N2' then '_'||ref_type_commission end
                 || case when niveau in ('N3','N4') then '_C'||to_char(nb_colonnes + 1,'FM00') end
                 || case when niveau in 'N5' then '_C'||to_char(nb_colonnes,'FM00')
                        ||case 
                              when nb_colonnes > 10 and length(ref_fnd_lng_description) > 60 then '_L2' 
                              when nb_colonnes = 10 and length(ref_fnd_lng_description) > 90 then '_L2' 
                              when nb_colonnes > 5 and length(ref_fnd_lng_description) > 140 then '_L2' 
                              when nb_colonnes > 0 and length(ref_fnd_lng_description) > 150 then '_L2' 
                              else '_L1' 
                              end
                          end template
    ,substr(niveau,2,1) row_level
    /*Données de DATA_STORAGE*/
    /*DESCRIPTION_BLOC*/
    ,decode(niveau
        ,'N0','En-tête de page - Date rapport'
        ,'N1','Titre de la note'
        ,'N2','Phrase d''introduction'
        ,'N3','En-tête de tableau avec nom des parts'
        ,'N4','En-tête de tableau avec nom des parts (continued)'
        ,'N5','Données détail'
        ,'N6','Pied de tableau'
            ) as description_bloc
from
    (
    select
        row_number() over(partition by ref_type_commission order by id_ligne desc,rupture_note_desc)rupture_section_desc
        ,row_number() over(partition by ref_type_commission,niveau,ref_position,id_ligne order by rupture_note_asc )id_colonne
        ,sum(1) over(partition by ref_type_commission,niveau,ref_position,id_ligne)nb_colonnes
        ,srq9.*
    from
        (
        select
            dense_rank() over(order by id_section,niveau,ref_position) id_ligne
            ,dense_rank() over(order by id_section desc,niveau desc,ref_position desc) id_ligne_desc
            ,case
                when round(mgf_rate*1000,0)=0 then '00'
                when round(mgf_rate*100,0)=0 then '0'
                else''
                end nb_dec_significatives
            ,srq8.*
            ,srq7.*
        from
            (
            /*En-tête de page*/
            select 'N0' as niveau, 1 as id_col from dual
            union
            /*Titre de la note*/
            select 'N1', 1 from dual
            union
            /*Phrase d'introduction*/
            select 'N2', 1 from dual
            union
            /*En-tête de tableau - 15 parts max*/
            select 'N3', 1 from dual
            union
            /*En-tête de tableau (continued) - 15 parts max*/
            select 'N4', 1 from dual
            union
            /*Niveau détail*/
            select 'N5', 1 from dual union select 'N5', 2 from dual
            union
            /*Pied de tableau*/
            select 'N6', 1 from dual
            )srq8
            ,
            (
            select
                    row_number() over(order by ref_type_commission desc,ref_position,ref_groupe_part,mgf_fee_start_day,mgf_end_validity) rupture_note_asc
                    ,row_number() over(order by ref_type_commission asc,ref_position desc,ref_groupe_part desc,mgf_fee_start_day desc,mgf_end_validity desc) rupture_note_desc
                    ,row_number() over(partition by ref_type_commission order by ref_position,ref_groupe_part,mgf_fee_start_day,mgf_end_validity) rupture_tableau_asc
                    ,row_number() over(partition by ref_type_commission order by ref_position desc,ref_groupe_part desc,mgf_fee_start_day desc,mgf_end_validity desc) rupture_tableau_desc
                    ,row_number() over(partition by ref_type_commission,ref_position order by ref_groupe_part,mgf_fee_start_day,mgf_end_validity) rupture_compartiment_asc
                    ,row_number() over(partition by ref_type_commission,ref_position order by ref_groupe_part desc,mgf_fee_start_day desc,mgf_end_validity desc) rupture_compartiment_desc
                ,srq6.*
            from
                (
                select
                    case when sum(mgf_rate)over(partition by ref_id_structure,ref_groupe_part)>0 then 1 end nb_fees_par_ref_groupe_part
                    ,srq5.*
                    ,srq4.*
                from
                    (
                     select
                        *
                     from
                        (select ? ref_id_structure,last_day(?)ref_date_campagne from dual)
                        ,
                        (
                        select 'F110' ref_type_commission,1 id_section from dual
                        union
                        select 'F104',2 id_section from dual
                        )
                        ,

                        select 
                            row_number()over(order by qasgc.position) ref_position

                            ,fnd_lng_description ref_fnd_lng_description
                        from qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc
                        join qxp_compartiment qc on qc.id_fnd_code=qasgc.id_fnd_code
                        where
                            id_structure = ?
                            and id_gabarit = ?
                            and (qc.date_fin_compart is null or qc.date_fin_compart>=?)
                        )
                        ,
                        (
                        select 'Class A' ref_groupe_part from dual 
                        union 
                        select 'Class B' from dual union select 'Class C' from dual union select 'Class D' from dual union select 'Class E' from dual
                        union
                        select 'Class F' from dual union select 'Class G' from dual union select 'Class H' from dual union select 'Class I' from dual union select 'Class J' from dual
                        union
                        select 'Class K' from dual union select 'Class L' from dual union select 'Class M' from dual union select 'Class N' from dual union select 'Class O' from dual
                        union
                        select 'Class P' from dual union select 'Class Q' from dual union select 'Class R' from dual union select 'Class S' from dual union select 'Class T' from dual
                        union
                        select 'Class U' from dual union select 'Class V' from dual union select 'Class W' from dual union select 'Class W1' from dual union select 'Class X' from dual
                        union
                        select 'Class Y' from dual union select 'Class Z' from dual
                        )
                    )srq5
                left join
                    (
                    select
                        srq3.*
                    from
                        (    
                        select
                            /*Identifiant dernier taux en vigueur*/
                            row_number()over(partition by id_structure, position,groupe_part,type_commission order by mgf_end_validity desc)incr_fee_par_part_desc
                            /*Identifie les changements de taux en cours d'exercice par part*/
                            ,count(*)over(partition by id_structure, position,groupe_part)
                                - count(*)over(partition by id_structure, position,groupe_part,type_commission,mgf_rate)nb_doublons_fee 
                            /*Détermine le nombre de types de commissions dans la structure*/
                            ,case
                                /*Si pas de F104 alors une seule commission*/
                                when sum(case when type_commission in 'F104' and mgf_rate<>0 then 1 end)over() > 0
                                then 2
                                else 1
                                end nb_type_commisions
                            ,srq2.*
                        from
                            (
                            select
                                case substr(trim(unit_lng_description),7,2)
                                    when 'W1' then substr(trim(unit_lng_description),1,8)
                                    else substr(trim(unit_lng_description),1,7)
                                    end groupe_part
                                ,substr(id_mgf_fee_type,1,4) type_commission
                                ,srq1.*
                            from
                                (
                                /*Requete brute GP3*/
                                select
                                    last_day(?)date_campagne
                                    ,qg.id_type_rapport
                                    ,qs.id_structure
                                    ,qs.libelle_long libelle_long_structure
                                    ,qasgc.position
                                    ,rf.id_fnd_code
                                    ,qc.date_fin_compart

                                    ,nvl(qc.fnd_lng_description,qasgc.id_fnd_code||' - #Libellé compartiment absent#')fnd_lng_description
                                    ,rf.fnd_inv_policy
                                    ,rf.fnd_currency
                                    ,ru.unit_id_ins_code
                                    ,ru.id_unit_code
                                    ,ru.unit_sht_description
                                    ,ru.unit_lng_description
                                    ,rmf.id_mgf_fee_type
                                    ,rmf.mgf_fee_cur
                                    ,rmf.mgf_rate
                                    ,rmf.mgf_rate_frequency
                                    ,rmf.mgf_fee_sequence
                                    ,rmf.mgf_fee_start_day
                                    ,rmf.id_mgf_start_validity
                                    ,rmf.mgf_end_validity
                                from
                                    qxp.qxp_structure qs
                                join qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc on qs.id_structure=qasgc.id_structure
                                    and qasgc.id_structure = ?
                                    and qasgc.id_gabarit = ?
                                join qxp.qxp_gabarit qg on qg.id_gabarit=qasgc.id_gabarit
                                join owb_dwh.ref_fund rf on qasgc.id_fnd_code=rf.id_fnd_code
                                         and rf.fnd_end_validity='31/12/2199'
                                join qxp.qxp_compartiment qc on qc.id_fnd_code=qasgc.id_fnd_code
                                join
                                    (
                                    /*Eléments première et dernière VL*/
                                    select
                                        id_fnd_code
                                        ,fnd_last_fiscal_year_end
                                        ,key_nav_sequence_debut
                                        ,ne.id_neve_nav_date id_neve_nav_date_debut
                                        ,ne.neve_creation_date neve_creation_date_debut
                                        ,key_nav_sequence_fin
                                        ,id_neve_nav_date_fin
                                        ,neve_creation_date_fin
                                    from
                                        (
                                        /*Eléments de derniere VL et pointeur de première VL*/
                                        select
                                            rf.id_fnd_code
                                            ,min(ne2.key_nav_sequence)key_nav_sequence_debut
                                            ,ne.key_nav_sequence key_nav_sequence_fin
                                            ,rf.fnd_last_fiscal_year_end
                                            ,ne.id_neve_nav_date id_neve_nav_date_fin
                                            ,ne.neve_creation_date neve_creation_date_fin
                                       from
                                            (
                                            /*Pointeur de dernière VL*/
                                            select
                                                max(ne.key_nav_sequence)key_nav_sequence_max
                                            from
                                                qxp.qxp_structure qs
                                                join qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc on qs.id_structure=qasgc.id_structure
                                                    and qasgc.id_structure = ?
                                                    and qasgc.id_gabarit = ?
                                                join owb_dwh.nav_event ne on ne.neve_fund_code=qasgc.id_fnd_code
                                                    and ne.id_neve_nav_date <= last_day(?)
                                                    and ne.id_neve_nav_date > add_months(last_day(?),-24)
                                                    and ne.id_neve_nav_sort in 'OFF'
                                                    and ne.id_neve_nav_type in 'MAIN'
                                                    and ne.neve_validity_status = 'Y'
                                                group by
                                                    ne.neve_fund_code
                                            )srq_tmp3
                                        join owb_dwh.nav_event ne on ne.key_nav_sequence=srq_tmp3.key_nav_sequence_max
                                        join owb_dwh.ref_fund rf on rf.key_ref_fund=ne.key_ref_fund
                                        join owb_dwh.nav_event ne2 on ne2.neve_fund_code=rf.id_fnd_code
                                            and ne2.id_neve_nav_date between 
                                                                        nvl(rf.fnd_last_fiscal_year_end,add_months(ne.id_neve_nav_date,-24))
                                                                        and ne.id_neve_nav_date
                                            and ne2.id_neve_nav_stock=ne.id_neve_nav_stock
                                            and ne2.id_neve_nav_type in 'MAIN'
                                            and ne2.id_neve_nav_sort in 'OFF'
                                            and ne2.neve_validity_status = 'Y'
                                        group by
                                            rf.id_fnd_code
                                            ,rf.fnd_last_fiscal_year_end
                                            ,ne.id_neve_nav_date
                                            ,ne.neve_creation_date
                                            ,ne.key_nav_sequence
                                        )srq_tmp2
                                    join owb_dwh.nav_event ne on ne.key_nav_sequence=srq_tmp2.key_nav_sequence_debut
                                    )srq_tmp on rf.id_fnd_code=srq_tmp.id_fnd_code
                                join owb_dwh.nav_net_unit nnu on nnu.key_nav_sequence=srq_tmp.key_nav_sequence_fin
                                        and nnu.nnuv_currency_fx=1
                                join owb_dwh.ref_unit ru2 on ru2.key_ref_unit=nnu.key_ref_unit
                                join owb_dwh.ref_unit ru on ru.id_unit_fund_code=ru2.id_unit_fund_code
                                        and ru.id_unit_code=ru2.id_unit_code
                                        and ru.unit_end_validity='31/12/2199'
                                join owb_dwh.ref_management_fee rmf on rmf.id_mgf_fund_code=srq_tmp.id_fnd_code
                                    and substr(rmf.id_mgf_fee_type,1,4) in ('F110','F104')
                                    and substr(rmf.mgf_dedicated_object,6)=ru.id_unit_code
                                    and not rmf.id_mgf_start_validity > srq_tmp.neve_creation_date_fin
                                    and not rmf.mgf_end_validity < srq_tmp.neve_creation_date_debut
                                    and not nvl(rmf.mgf_fee_start_day,'01/01/1999') > srq_tmp.id_neve_nav_date_fin
                                    and not nvl(rmf.mgf_fee_end_day,'31/12/2199') < srq_tmp.id_neve_nav_date_debut
                                    and not nvl(rmf.mgf_setup_date,'01/01/1999') > srq_tmp.id_neve_nav_date_fin
                                    and not nvl(rmf.mgf_last_settl_date,'31/12/2199') < srq_tmp.id_neve_nav_date_debut
                                join owb_dwh.nav_detailed_net_asset ndna on ndna.key_nav_sequence=nnu.key_nav_sequence
                                join owb_dwh.ref_instrument ri on ri.key_ref_instrument=ndna.key_ref_instrument
                                    and ndna.id_ndna_stock='AD1'
                                    and ndna.id_ndna_pos_status_1='STAVAL\NOR'
                                    and ndna.id_ndna_pos_status_2='STALIG\PROPRE'
                                    and ndna.key_ref_fungibility_codif=0
                                    and ri.id_ins_category in 'TRES'
                                    and ri.ins_sub_category in 'NATCTR\FGES'
                                    and substr(ri.id_ins_code,1,4) in('F110','F104')
                                    and ri.id_ins_code=rmf.mgf_cash_account
                                where
                                     (qc.date_fin_compart is null or qc.date_fin_compart>=?)
                                )srq1
                            )srq2
                        )srq3
                    where
                        incr_fee_par_part_desc=1
                    )srq4 on srq4.id_structure=srq5.ref_id_structure
                        and srq4.date_campagne=srq5.ref_date_campagne
                        and srq4.type_commission=srq5.ref_type_commission
                        and srq4.id_fnd_code=srq5.ref_id_fnd_code
                        and srq4.groupe_part=srq5.ref_groupe_part
                )srq6
            where
                /*Eliminer les parts non alimentées et garder inconditionnellement la part P pour F110 et F104 et la part K pour F104*/
                nb_fees_par_ref_groupe_part>0
                /*Forcer des parts fictives pour _P0_02*/
                or (ref_id_structure='_P0_02' and ref_groupe_part='Class P')
                or (ref_id_structure='_P0_02' and ref_groupe_part='Class K' and ref_type_commission='F104')
            )srq7
        where 
            /*En-tête de page*/
            (niveau='N0'and rupture_note_asc=1)
            /*Titre de la note*/
            or (niveau='N1'and rupture_note_asc=1)
            /*Phrase d'introduction*/
            or (niveau='N2'and rupture_tableau_asc=1)
            /*En-tête de tableau*/
            or (niveau='N3'and ref_position=1)
            /*En-tête de tableau (continued)*/
            or (niveau='N4'and ref_position=1)
            /*Niveau détail*/
            or (niveau='N5' and id_col>case when rupture_compartiment_asc=1 then 0 else 1 end)
            /*Pied de tableau*/
            or (niveau='N6')-- and id_ligne_desc=1)
        )srq9
    )srq10
where
    1=1
    and not (niveau='N6'and rupture_section_desc>1)
order by
     id_ligne
     ,id_colonne]; ORA-01843: not a valid month


org.springframework.dao.DataIntegrityViolationException: PreparedStatementCallback; SQL [/* Amundi EN - Notes des management fees */
select 
    id_section
    ,niveau
    ,id_ligne id_groupe
    ,id_ligne
    ,id_colonne
    ,'FEES_RATES_'||niveau||'L'||id_ligne||'C'||id_colonne nom_bloc
    /*Valeur Bloc*/
    ,decode(niveau
        ,'N0',replace(to_char(last_day(ref_date_campagne),'dd/mm/yy','nls_date_language=english'),' ') /*En-tête de page - Date rapport*/
        ,'N1',null /*Titre de la note*/
        ,'N2',to_char(last_day(ref_date_campagne),'dd ','nls_date_language=english')
               ||trim(to_char(ref_date_campagne,'Month','nls_date_language=english'))
               ||to_char(ref_date_campagne,' yyyy','nls_date_language=english') 
        ,'N3',ref_groupe_part /*En-tête de tableau*/
        ,'N4',ref_groupe_part /*En-tête de tableau (continued)*/
        ,'N5',case /*Niveau détail*/
                  when id_colonne=1 then ref_fnd_lng_description 
                  else 
                      case
                          when mgf_rate is null or mgf_rate=0 then '*'
                          else to_char(mgf_rate,'FM9G999G999G999G999G999G990D00'||nb_dec_significatives,'NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''. ')||'%'
                          end
                  end 
        ,'N6',null /*Pied de tableau*/
           ) as valeur_bloc
    /*TEMPLATE*/
    ,'FEES_RATES_'||niveau
                 || case when niveau in 'N2' then '_'||ref_type_commission end
                 || case when niveau in ('N3','N4') then '_C'||to_char(nb_colonnes + 1,'FM00') end
                 || case when niveau in 'N5' then '_C'||to_char(nb_colonnes,'FM00')
                        ||case 
                              when nb_colonnes > 10 and length(ref_fnd_lng_description) > 60 then '_L2' 
                              when nb_colonnes = 10 and length(ref_fnd_lng_description) > 90 then '_L2' 
                              when nb_colonnes > 5 and length(ref_fnd_lng_description) > 140 then '_L2' 
                              when nb_colonnes > 0 and length(ref_fnd_lng_description) > 150 then '_L2' 
                              else '_L1' 
                              end
                          end template
    ,substr(niveau,2,1) row_level
    /*Données de DATA_STORAGE*/
    /*DESCRIPTION_BLOC*/
    ,decode(niveau
        ,'N0','En-tête de page - Date rapport'
        ,'N1','Titre de la note'
        ,'N2','Phrase d''introduction'
        ,'N3','En-tête de tableau avec nom des parts'
        ,'N4','En-tête de tableau avec nom des parts (continued)'
        ,'N5','Données détail'
        ,'N6','Pied de tableau'
            ) as description_bloc
from
    (
    select
        row_number() over(partition by ref_type_commission order by id_ligne desc,rupture_note_desc)rupture_section_desc
        ,row_number() over(partition by ref_type_commission,niveau,ref_position,id_ligne order by rupture_note_asc )id_colonne
        ,sum(1) over(partition by ref_type_commission,niveau,ref_position,id_ligne)nb_colonnes
        ,srq9.*
    from
        (
        select
            dense_rank() over(order by id_section,niveau,ref_position) id_ligne
            ,dense_rank() over(order by id_section desc,niveau desc,ref_position desc) id_ligne_desc
            ,case
                when round(mgf_rate*1000,0)=0 then '00'
                when round(mgf_rate*100,0)=0 then '0'
                else''
                end nb_dec_significatives
            ,srq8.*
            ,srq7.*
        from
            (
            /*En-tête de page*/
            select 'N0' as niveau, 1 as id_col from dual
            union
            /*Titre de la note*/
            select 'N1', 1 from dual
            union
            /*Phrase d'introduction*/
            select 'N2', 1 from dual
            union
            /*En-tête de tableau - 15 parts max*/
            select 'N3', 1 from dual
            union
            /*En-tête de tableau (continued) - 15 parts max*/
            select 'N4', 1 from dual
            union
            /*Niveau détail*/
            select 'N5', 1 from dual union select 'N5', 2 from dual
            union
            /*Pied de tableau*/
            select 'N6', 1 from dual
            )srq8
            ,
            (
            select
                    row_number() over(order by ref_type_commission desc,ref_position,ref_groupe_part,mgf_fee_start_day,mgf_end_validity) rupture_note_asc
                    ,row_number() over(order by ref_type_commission asc,ref_position desc,ref_groupe_part desc,mgf_fee_start_day desc,mgf_end_validity desc) rupture_note_desc
                    ,row_number() over(partition by ref_type_commission order by ref_position,ref_groupe_part,mgf_fee_start_day,mgf_end_validity) rupture_tableau_asc
                    ,row_number() over(partition by ref_type_commission order by ref_position desc,ref_groupe_part desc,mgf_fee_start_day desc,mgf_end_validity desc) rupture_tableau_desc
                    ,row_number() over(partition by ref_type_commission,ref_position order by ref_groupe_part,mgf_fee_start_day,mgf_end_validity) rupture_compartiment_asc
                    ,row_number() over(partition by ref_type_commission,ref_position order by ref_groupe_part desc,mgf_fee_start_day desc,mgf_end_validity desc) rupture_compartiment_desc
                ,srq6.*
            from

                                    and not nvl(rmf.mgf_last_settl_date,'31/12/2199') < srq_tmp.id_neve_nav_date_debut
                                join owb_dwh.nav_detailed_net_asset ndna on ndna.key_nav_sequence=nnu.key_nav_sequence
                                join owb_dwh.ref_instrument ri on ri.key_ref_instrument=ndna.key_ref_instrument

                                    and ndna.id_ndna_pos_status_1='STAVAL\NOR'
                                    and ndna.id_ndna_pos_status_2='STALIG\PROPRE'

                                    and ri.id_ins_category in 'TRES'
