Caused by: org.springframework.dao.DataIntegrityViolationException: PreparedStatementCallback; SQL [/* Amundi EN - Notes des management fees */
select 
    id_section
    ,niveau
    ,id_ligne id_groupe
    ,id_ligne
    ,id_colonne
    ,'FEES_RATES_'||niveau||'L'||id_ligne||'C'||id_colonne nom_bloc
    /*Valeur Bloc*/
    ,decode(niveau
        ,'N0',replace(to_char(last_day(ref_date_campagne),'dd/mm/yy','nls_date_language=english'),' ') /*En-tête de page - Date rapport*/
        ,'N1',null /*Titre de la note*/
        ,'N2',to_char(last_day(ref_date_campagne),'dd ','nls_date_language=english')
               ||trim(to_char(ref_date_campagne,'Month','nls_date_language=english'))
               ||to_char(ref_date_campagne,' yyyy','nls_date_language=english') 
        ,'N3',ref_groupe_part /*En-tête de tableau*/
        ,'N4',ref_groupe_part /*En-tête de tableau (continued)*/
        ,'N5',case /*Niveau détail*/
                  when id_colonne=1 then ref_fnd_lng_description 
                  else 
                      case
                          when mgf_rate is null or mgf_rate=0 then '*'
                          else to_char(mgf_rate,'FM9G999G999G999G999G999G990D00'||nb_dec_significatives,'NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''. ')||'%'
                          end
                  end 
        ,'N6',null /*Pied de tableau*/
           ) as valeur_bloc
    /*TEMPLATE*/
    ,'FEES_RATES_'||niveau
                 || case when niveau in 'N2' then '_'||ref_type_commission end
                 || case when niveau in ('N3','N4') then '_C'||to_char(nb_colonnes + 1,'FM00') end
                 || case when niveau in 'N5' then '_C'||to_char(nb_colonnes,'FM00')
                        ||case 
                              when nb_colonnes > 10 and length(ref_fnd_lng_description) > 60 then '_L2' 
                              when nb_colonnes = 10 and length(ref_fnd_lng_description) > 90 then '_L2' 
                              when nb_colonnes > 5 and length(ref_fnd_lng_description) > 140 then '_L2' 
                              when nb_colonnes > 0 and length(ref_fnd_lng_description) > 150 then '_L2' 
                              else '_L1' 
                              end
                          end template
    ,substr(niveau,2,1) row_level
    /*Données de DATA_STORAGE*/
    /*DESCRIPTION_BLOC*/
    ,decode(niveau
        ,'N0','En-tête de page - Date rapport'
        ,'N1','Titre de la note'
        ,'N2','Phrase d''introduction'
        ,'N3','En-tête de tableau avec nom des parts'
        ,'N4','En-tête de tableau avec nom des parts (continued)'
        ,'N5','Données détail'
        ,'N6','Pied de tableau'
            ) as description_bloc
from
    (
    select
        row_number() over(partition by ref_type_commission order by id_ligne desc,rupture_note_desc)rupture_section_desc
        ,row_number() over(partition by ref_type_commission,niveau,ref_position,id_ligne order by rupture_note_asc )id_colonne
        ,sum(1) over(partition by ref_type_commission,niveau,ref_position,id_ligne)nb_colonnes
        ,srq9.*
    from
        (
        select
            dense_rank() over(order by id_section,niveau,ref_position) id_ligne
            ,dense_rank() over(order by id_section desc,niveau desc,ref_position desc) id_ligne_desc
            ,case
                when round(mgf_rate*1000,0)=0 then '00'
                when round(mgf_rate*100,0)=0 then '0'
                else''
                end nb_dec_significatives
            ,srq8.*
            ,srq7.*
        from
            (
            /*En-tête de page*/
            select 'N0' as niveau, 1 as id_col from dual
            union
            /*Titre de la note*/
            select 'N1', 1 from dual
            union
            /*Phrase d'introduction*/
            select 'N2', 1 from dual
            union
            /*En-tête de tableau - 15 parts max*/
            select 'N3', 1 from dual
            union
            /*En-tête de tableau (continued) - 15 parts max*/
            select 'N4', 1 from dual
            union
            /*Niveau détail*/
            select 'N5', 1 from dual union select 'N5', 2 from dual
            union
            /*Pied de tableau*/
            select 'N6', 1 from dual
            )srq8
            ,
            (
            select
                    row_number() over(order by ref_type_commission desc,ref_position,ref_groupe_part,mgf_fee_start_day,mgf_end_validity) rupture_note_asc
                    ,row_number() over(order by ref_type_commission asc,ref_position desc,ref_groupe_part desc,mgf_fee_start_day desc,mgf_end_validity desc) rupture_note_desc
                    ,row_number() over(partition by ref_type_commission order by ref_position,ref_groupe_part,mgf_fee_start_day,mgf_end_validity) rupture_tableau_asc
                    ,row_number() over(partition by ref_type_commission order by ref_position desc,ref_groupe_part desc,mgf_fee_start_day desc,mgf_end_validity desc) rupture_tableau_desc
                    ,row_number() over(partition by ref_type_commission,ref_position order by ref_groupe_part,mgf_fee_start_day,mgf_end_validity) rupture_compartiment_asc
                    ,row_number() over(partition by ref_type_commission,ref_position order by ref_groupe_part desc,mgf_fee_start_day desc,mgf_end_validity desc) rupture_compartiment_desc
                ,srq6.*
            from
                (
                select
                    case when sum(mgf_rate)over(partition by ref_id_structure,ref_groupe_part)>0 then 1 end nb_fees_par_ref_groupe_part
                    ,srq5.*
                    ,srq4.*
                from
                    (
                     select
                        *
                     from
                        (select ? ref_id_structure,last_day(?)ref_date_campagne from dual)
                        ,
                        (
                        select 'F110' ref_type_commission,1 id_section from dual
                        union
                        select 'F104',2 id_section from dual
                        )
                        ,
                        (
                        select 
                            row_number()over(order by qasgc.position) ref_position
                            ,qasgc.id_fnd_code ref_id_fnd_code
                            ,fnd_lng_description ref_fnd_lng_description
                        from qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc
                        join qxp_compartiment qc on qc.id_fnd_code=qasgc.id_fnd_code
                        where
                            id_structure = ?
                            and id_gabarit = ?
                            and (qc.date_fin_compart is null or qc.date_fin_compart>=?)
                        )
                        ,
                        (
                        select 'Class A' ref_groupe_part from dual 
                        union 
                        select 'Class B' from dual union select 'Class C' from dual union select 'Class D' from dual union select 'Class E' from dual
                        union
                        select 'Class F' from dual union select 'Class G' from dual union select 'Class H' from dual union select 'Class I' from dual union select 'Class J' from dual
                        union
                        select 'Class K' from dual union select 'Class L' from dual union select 'Class M' from dual union select 'Class N' from dual union select 'Class O' from dual
                        union
                        select 'Class P' from dual union select 'Class Q' from dual union select 'Class R' from dual union select 'Class S' from dual union select 'Class T' from dual
                        union
                        select 'Class U' from dual union select 'Class V' from dual union select 'Class W' from dual union select 'Class W1' from dual union select 'Class X' from dual
                        union
                        select 'Class Y' from dual union select 'Class Z' from dual
                        )
                    )srq5
                left join
                    (
                    select
                        srq3.*
                    from
                        (    
                        select
                            /*Identifiant dernier taux en vigueur*/
                            row_number()over(partition by id_structure, position,groupe_part,type_commission order by mgf_end_validity desc)incr_fee_par_part_desc
                            /*Identifie les changements de taux en cours d'exercice par part*/
                            ,count(*)over(partition by id_structure, position,groupe_part)
                                - count(*)over(partition by id_structure, position,groupe_part,type_commission,mgf_rate)nb_doublons_fee 
                            /*Détermine le nombre de types de commissions dans la structure*/
                            ,case
                                /*Si pas de F104 alors une seule commission*/
                                when sum(case when type_commission in 'F104' and mgf_rate<>0 then 1 end)over() > 0
                                then 2
                                else 1
                                end nb_type_commisions
                            ,srq2.*
                        from
                            (
                            select
                                case substr(trim(unit_lng_description),7,2)
                                    when 'W1' then substr(trim(unit_lng_description),1,8)
                                    else substr(trim(unit_lng_description),1,7)
                                    end groupe_part
                                ,substr(id_mgf_fee_type,1,4) type_commission
                                ,srq1.*
                            from
                                (
                                /*Requete brute GP3*/
                                select
                                    last_day(?)date_campagne
                                    ,qg.id_type_rapport
                                    ,qs.id_structure
                                    ,qs.libelle_long libelle_long_structure
                                    ,qasgc.position
                                    ,rf.id_fnd_code
                                    ,qc.date_fin_compart
                                    ,srq_tmp.id_neve_nav_date_debut id_neve_nav_date
                                    ,nvl(qc.fnd_lng_description,qasgc.id_fnd_code||' - #Libellé compartiment absent#')fnd_lng_description
                                    ,rf.fnd_inv_policy
                                    ,rf.fnd_currency
                                    ,ru.unit_id_ins_code
                                    ,ru.id_unit_code
                                    ,ru.unit_sht_description
                                    ,ru.unit_lng_description
                                    ,rmf.id_mgf_fee_type
                                    ,rmf.mgf_fee_cur
                                    ,rmf.mgf_rate
                                    ,rmf.mgf_rate_frequency
                                    ,rmf.mgf_fee_sequence
                                    ,rmf.mgf_fee_start_day
                                    ,rmf.id_mgf_start_validity
                                    ,rmf.mgf_end_validity
                                from
                                    qxp.qxp_structure qs
                                join qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc on qs.id_structure=qasgc.id_structure
                                    and qasgc.id_structure = ?
                                    and qasgc.id_gabarit = ?
                                join qxp.qxp_gabarit qg on qg.id_gabarit=qasgc.id_gabarit
                                join owb_dwh.ref_fund rf on qasgc.id_fnd_code=rf.id_fnd_code
                                         and rf.fnd_end_validity='31/12/2199'
                                join qxp.qxp_compartiment qc on qc.id_fnd_code=qasgc.id_fnd_code
                                join
                                    (
                                    /*Eléments première et dernière VL*/
                                    select
                                        id_fnd_code
                                        ,fnd_last_fiscal_year_end
                                        ,key_nav_sequence_debut
                                        ,ne.id_neve_nav_date id_neve_nav_date_debut
                                        ,ne.neve_creation_date neve_creation_date_debut
                                        ,key_nav_sequence_fin
                                        ,id_neve_nav_date_fin
                                        ,neve_creation_date_fin
                                    from
                                        (
                                        /*Eléments de derniere VL et pointeur de première VL*/
                                        select
                                            rf.id_fnd_code
                                            ,min(ne2.key_nav_sequence)key_nav_sequence_debut
                                            ,ne.key_nav_sequence key_nav_sequence_fin
                                            ,rf.fnd_last_fiscal_year_end
                                            ,ne.id_neve_nav_date id_neve_nav_date_fin
                                            ,ne.neve_creation_date neve_creation_date_fin
                                       from
                                            (
                                            /*Pointeur de dernière VL*/
                                            select
                                                max(ne.key_nav_sequence)key_nav_sequence_max
                                            from
                                                qxp.qxp_structure qs
                                                join qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc on qs.id_structure=qasgc.id_structure
                                                    and qasgc.id_structure = ?
                                                    and qasgc.id_gabarit = ?
                                                join owb_dwh.nav_event ne on ne.neve_fund_code=qasgc.id_fnd_code
                                                    and ne.id_neve_nav_date <= last_day(?)
                                                    and ne.id_neve_nav_date > add_months(last_day(?),-24)
                                                    and ne.id_neve_nav_sort in 'OFF'
                                                    and ne.id_neve_nav_type in 'MAIN'
                                                    and ne.neve_validity_status = 'Y'
                                                group by
                                                    ne.neve_fund_code
                                            )srq_tmp3
                                        join owb_dwh.nav_event ne on ne.key_nav_sequence=srq_tmp3.key_nav_sequence_max
                                        join owb_dwh.ref_fund rf on rf.key_ref_fund=ne.key_ref_fund
                                        join owb_dwh.nav_event ne2 on ne2.neve_fund_code=rf.id_fnd_code
                                            and ne2.id_neve_nav_date between 
                                                                        nvl(rf.fnd_last_fiscal_year_end,add_months(ne.id_neve_nav_date,-24))
                                                                        and ne.id_neve_nav_date
                                            and ne2.id_neve_nav_stock=ne.id_neve_nav_stock
                                            and ne2.id_neve_nav_type in 'MAIN'
                                            and ne2.id_neve_nav_sort in 'OFF'
                                            and ne2.neve_validity_status = 'Y'
                                        group by
                                            rf.id_fnd_code
                                            ,rf.fnd_last_fiscal_year_end
                                            ,ne.id_neve_nav_date
                                            ,ne.neve_creation_date
                                            ,ne.key_nav_sequence
                                        )srq_tmp2
                                    join owb_dwh.nav_event ne on ne.key_nav_sequence=srq_tmp2.key_nav_sequence_debut
                                    )srq_tmp on rf.id_fnd_code=srq_tmp.id_fnd_code
                                join owb_dwh.nav_net_unit nnu on nnu.key_nav_sequence=srq_tmp.key_nav_sequence_fin
                                        and nnu.nnuv_currency_fx=1
                                join owb_dwh.ref_unit ru2 on ru2.key_ref_unit=nnu.key_ref_unit
                                join owb_dwh.ref_unit ru on ru.id_unit_fund_code=ru2.id_unit_fund_code
                                        and ru.id_unit_code=ru2.id_unit_code
                                        and ru.unit_end_validity='31/12/2199'
                                join owb_dwh.ref_management_fee rmf on rmf.id_mgf_fund_code=srq_tmp.id_fnd_code
                                    and substr(rmf.id_mgf_fee_type,1,4) in ('F110','F104')
                                    and substr(rmf.mgf_dedicated_object,6)=ru.id_unit_code
                                    and not rmf.id_mgf_start_validity > srq_tmp.neve_creation_date_fin
                                    and not rmf.mgf_end_validity < srq_tmp.neve_creation_date_debut
                                    and not nvl(rmf.mgf_fee_start_day,'01/01/1999') > srq_tmp.id_neve_nav_date_fin
                                    and not nvl(rmf.mgf_fee_end_day,'31/12/2199') < srq_tmp.id_neve_nav_date_debut
                                    and not nvl(rmf.mgf_setup_date,'01/01/1999') > srq_tmp.id_neve_nav_date_fin
                                    and not nvl(rmf.mgf_last_settl_date,'31/12/2199') < srq_tmp.id_neve_nav_date_debut
                                join owb_dwh.nav_detailed_net_asset ndna on ndna.key_nav_sequence=nnu.key_nav_sequence
                                join owb_dwh.ref_instrument ri on ri.key_ref_instrument=ndna.key_ref_instrument
                                    and ndna.id_ndna_stock='AD1'
                                    and ndna.id_ndna_pos_status_1='STAVAL\NOR'
                                    and ndna.id_ndna_pos_status_2='STALIG\PROPRE'
                                    and ndna.key_ref_fungibility_codif=0
                                    and ri.id_ins_category in 'TRES'
                                    and ri.ins_sub_category in 'NATCTR\FGES'
                                    and substr(ri.id_ins_code,1,4) in('F110','F104')
                                    and ri.id_ins_code=rmf.mgf_cash_account
                                where
                                     (qc.date_fin_compart is null or qc.date_fin_compart>=?)
                                )srq1
                            )srq2
                        )srq3
                    where
                        incr_fee_par_part_desc=1
                    )srq4 on srq4.id_structure=srq5.ref_id_structure
                        and srq4.date_campagne=srq5.ref_date_campagne
                        and srq4.type_commission=srq5.ref_type_commission
                        and srq4.id_fnd_code=srq5.ref_id_fnd_code
                        and srq4.groupe_part=srq5.ref_groupe_part
                )srq6
            where
                /*Eliminer les parts non alimentées et garder inconditionnellement la part P pour F110 et F104 et la part K pour F104*/
                nb_fees_par_ref_groupe_part>0
                /*Forcer des parts fictives pour _P0_02*/
                or (ref_id_structure='_P0_02' and ref_groupe_part='Class P')
                or (ref_id_structure='_P0_02' and ref_groupe_part='Class K' and ref_type_commission='F104')
            )srq7
        where 
            /*En-tête de page*/
            (niveau='N0'and rupture_note_asc=1)
            /*Titre de la note*/
            or (niveau='N1'and rupture_note_asc=1)
            /*Phrase d'introduction*/
            or (niveau='N2'and rupture_tableau_asc=1)
            /*En-tête de tableau*/
            or (niveau='N3'and ref_position=1)
            /*En-tête de tableau (continued)*/
            or (niveau='N4'and ref_position=1)
            /*Niveau détail*/
            or (niveau='N5' and id_col>case when rupture_compartiment_asc=1 then 0 else 1 end)
            /*Pied de tableau*/
            or (niveau='N6')-- and id_ligne_desc=1)
        )srq9
    )srq10
where
    1=1
    and not (niveau='N6'and rupture_section_desc>1)
order by
     id_ligne
     ,id_colonne]; ORA-01843: not a valid month

      when srq.niveau_base = 10 and srq.info = 'VL' and srq.col = 3 then srq.devise_diffusion

      when srq.niveau_base = 3 and srq.info = 'DATE'then 'STATAMV2_N3'
      when srq.niveau_base = 4 and srq.info = 'DATER'then 'STATAMV2_N3B'
      when srq.niveau_base = 10 then 'STATAMV2_N10'
      when srq.niveau_base = 20 then 'STATAMV2_N20'
      end as "TEMPLATE"

,Case When srq.niveau_base = 2 then 1
      When srq.niveau_base = 4 then 3
      else srq.niveau_base end as ROW_LEVEL
      
,1 AS ID_SECTION      

from

    (Select
    pres1.ID_STRUCTURE
    ,pres1.POSITION
    ,pres1.CODE_PTF
    ,pres1.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
    ,pres1.DEVISE_PTF
    ,pres1.DATE_FIN_COMPART 
    ,pres1.num_date
    ,pres1.date_rapport
    ,pres1.CODE_PART
    ,pres1.CODE_ISIN
    ,pres1.first_part
    ,pres1.DEVISE_PART
    ,pres1.devise_diffusion
    ,pres1.Shadow
    ,pres1.NbDevPart
    ,pres1.num_dev_diff_part
    ,pres1.num_lib_part
    ,pres1.LIBELLE_RAPPORT
    ,pres1.niveau_base
    ,pres1.info
    ,pres1.col
    ,donnees.CODE_PTF as code_ptf_mbd
    ,donnees.DEVISE_PTF as devise_ptf_mbd
    ,donnees.CODE_PART as code_part_mbd
    ,donnees.ID_RUBRIQUE
    ,donnees.DEVISE_PART as devise_part_mbd
    ,donnees.devise_diffusion as devise_diff_mbd
    ,donnees.num_dev_diff_part as num_dev_diff_part_mbd
    ,donnees.GROUPE
    ,donnees.VALEUR_AFFICHAGE
    ,pres1.Presence
    
    from
      (
      Select
      pres.ID_STRUCTURE
      ,pres.POSITION
      ,pres.CODE_PTF
      ,pres.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
      ,pres.DEVISE_PTF
      ,pres.DATE_FIN_COMPART 
      ,pres.Presence_port
      ,pres.num_date
      ,pres.date_rapport
      ,pres.CODE_PART
      ,pres.CODE_ISIN
      ,pres.first_part
      ,pres.DEVISE_PART
      ,pres.devise_diffusion
      ,pres.Shadow
      ,pres.NbDevPart
      -- Modification des position de devises de diffusion
      ,case when pres.info = 'VL' then pres.num_dev_diff_part else 1 end as num_dev_diff_part  
    
      ,pres.num_lib_part
      ,pres.LIBELLE_RAPPORT
      ,pres.niveau_base
      ,pres.info
      ,pres.col
            
      ,case when pres.niveau_base = 1 and pres.info = 'LIB_PTF' and pres.num_date = 1 and pres.num_dev_diff_part = 1 and pres.col = 0
                                      and pres.first_part = pres.LIBELLE_RAPPORT and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'
    
            when pres.niveau_base = 2 and pres.info = 'LIB_PTFR' and pres.num_date = 1 and pres.num_dev_diff_part = 1 and pres.col = 0
                                      and pres.first_part = pres.LIBELLE_RAPPORT and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'
            -- on prend toutes les colonnes pour gerer les libellés Share ou Units !!!
            when pres.niveau_base = 3 and pres.info = 'DATE' and pres.num_date = 1 and pres.num_dev_diff_part = 1 and pres.col in (0,1,2,3,4,5)
                                      and pres.first_part = pres.LIBELLE_RAPPORT and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'
            when pres.niveau_base = 3 and pres.info = 'DATE' and pres.num_date = 2 and pres.num_dev_diff_part = 1 and pres.col in (2)
                                      and pres.first_part = pres.LIBELLE_RAPPORT and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'                                   
            when pres.niveau_base = 3 and pres.info = 'DATE' and pres.num_date = 3 and pres.num_dev_diff_part = 1 and pres.col in (3)
                                      and pres.first_part = pres.LIBELLE_RAPPORT and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'
    
            when pres.niveau_base = 4 and pres.info = 'DATER' and pres.num_date = 1 and pres.num_dev_diff_part = 1 and pres.col in (0,1,2,3,4,5)
                                      and pres.first_part = pres.LIBELLE_RAPPORT and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'
            when pres.niveau_base = 4 and pres.info = 'DATER' and pres.num_date = 2 and pres.num_dev_diff_part = 1 and pres.col in (2)
                                      and pres.first_part = pres.LIBELLE_RAPPORT and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'                                   
            when pres.niveau_base = 4 and pres.info = 'DATER' and pres.num_date = 3 and pres.num_dev_diff_part = 1 and pres.col in (3)
                                      and pres.first_part = pres.LIBELLE_RAPPORT and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'
    
            when pres.niveau_base = 10 and pres.info = 'VL' and pres.num_date = 1 and pres.col in (0,1,3,4)then 'X'
            when pres.niveau_base = 10 and pres.info = 'PARTS' and pres.num_date = 1 and pres.col in (2)then 'X'
            when pres.niveau_base = 10 and pres.info = 'VL' and pres.num_date = 2 and pres.col in (5)then 'X'
            when pres.niveau_base = 10 and pres.info = 'VL' and pres.num_date = 3 and pres.col in (6)then 'X'
            -- and pres.num_dev_diff_part = 1
    
            when pres.niveau_base = 20 and pres.info = 'NAV' and pres.num_date = 1 and pres.col in (0,1)
                                      and pres.DEVISE_PART = pres.devise_diffusion and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'
            when pres.niveau_base = 20 and pres.info = 'NAV' and pres.num_date = 2 and pres.col in (2)
                                      and pres.DEVISE_PART = pres.devise_diffusion and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'
            when pres.niveau_base = 20 and pres.info = 'NAV' and pres.num_date = 3 and pres.col in (3)
                                      and pres.DEVISE_PART = pres.devise_diffusion and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'
            end as Presence
      
      from
      (
      --------------------------- Cartesien Mise en place Tableau Debut
      Select
      parts.ID_STRUCTURE
      ,parts.POSITION
      ,parts.CODE_PTF
      ,parts.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
      ,parts.DEVISE_PTF
      ,parts.DATE_FIN_COMPART 
      ,parts.Presence_port
      ,dat.num_date
      ,dat.date_rapport
      ,Case when niveau.info = 'NAV' then 'NAV' else parts.CODE_PART end as Code_Part
      ,parts.CODE_ISIN
      ,parts.first_part
      ,parts.DEVISE_PART
      ,parts.devise_diffusion
      ,parts.Shadow
      ,parts.NbDevPart
      ,parts.num_dev_diff_part
      ,parts.num_lib_part
      -- ,parts.LIBELLE_RAPPORT
      ,Case when niveau.info = 'NAV' then 'ZZZ_NAV' else parts.LIBELLE_RAPPORT end as LIBELLE_RAPPORT
      ,niveau.niveau_base
      ,niveau.info
      ,index_col.col

      from
      (
        Select
          asgc.ID_STRUCTURE
          ,asgc.POSITION
          ,srq_part.CODE_PTF
          ,case when slb.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION is null then 'Mettre à jour le fichier des libelles' else slb.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION  end as FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
          ,srq_part.DEVISE_PTF
          ,first_value(srq_part.LIBELLE_RAPPORT) over (partition by srq_part.CODE_PTF order by srq_part.LIBELLE_RAPPORT rows between unbounded preceding and unbounded following) as first_part
          ,dense_rank()over(partition by srq_part.CODE_PTF order by srq_part.LIBELLE_RAPPORT,srq_part.CODE_PART) as num_lib_part
          ,srq_part.CODE_PART
          ,srq_part.CODE_ISIN
          ,srq_part.DEVISE_PART
          ,srq_part.devise_diffusion
          ,srq_part.Shadow
          ,count(srq_part.DEVISE_PART)over(partition by srq_part.CODE_PTF,srq_part.CODE_PART) as NbDevPart
          ,dense_rank()over(partition by srq_part.CODE_PTF,srq_part.CODE_PART,srq_part.DEVISE_PART order by srq_part.devise_diffusion) as num_dev_diff_part
          ,srq_part.LIBELLE_RAPPORT
          ,slb.DATE_FIN_COMPART 
          ,Case when slb.DATE_FIN_COMPART < to_date(?) then 'X' 
              Else null end as Presence_port
    
          From
          ( 
          Select distinct
            fichier.id_structure
            ,MBD.CODE_PTF
            ,MBD.DEVISE_PTF
            ,MBD.CODE_PART
            ,MBD.LIBELLE_PART as LIBELLE_RAPPORT
            ,substr(MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE,3,5) as DEVISE_PART
            ,MBD.DEVISE_PART as devise_diffusion
            ,MBD.TECHNIQUE_2 as CODE_ISIN
            ,MBD.TECHNIQUE_1 as Shadow
            ,MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
            ,Case when max(MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT)over(partition by MBD.CODE_PTF,MBD.CODE_PART) = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT then 'X' end as Good_label
          from
          qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD
              join 
               (select distinct
                  fic.id_structure
                  ,max(fic.ID_CHARGEMENT)over(partition by fic.DATE_RAPPORT) as ID_CHARGEMENT
                  ,fic.date_rapport
                  from 
                   qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX fic
                   join (Select
                  row_number() over (order by srqdat.DDate) as num_date
                  ,srqdat.DDate
                  from
                  (
                  (select 
                   -- last_day(:p_date_echeance) as DDate
                      to_date(?) as DDate
                      from dual
                  )
                  union
                  (
                  Select distinct
                      last_day(qs.date_echeance) as DDate
                       from
                       qxp.qxp_suivi qs
                       join qxp.qxp_asso_suivi_parametres qasp on qs.id_suivi = qasp.id_suivi
                       where            
                       qs.id_fnd_code = ?
                       and qs.id_type_rapport = 1
                       and qs.date_echeance <= add_months(to_date(?),-4)
                       and qs.date_echeance >= add_months(to_date(?),-28)
                       and qasp.id_parametre = 2
                  )
                  )srqdat
                   ) gabdate on fic.DATE_RAPPORT = gabdate.DDate --and fic.ID_GABARIT = gabdate.ID_GABARIT 
                   join qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD ON fic.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
                where 
                 fic.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                 and MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'STATS'
                 )fichier on fichier.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
           where 
               MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'STATS' 
               and MBD.GROUPE = 'VL'
               and MBD.TECHNIQUE_1 not in ('Tech')
           )srq_part  
          join qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc on srq_part.CODE_PTF = asgc.ID_FND_CODE 
          left join qxp_compartiment slb on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = slb.ID_FND_CODE 
          left join qxp.qxp_sup_mapping qsm on qsm.code_mapping_cible=asgc.id_fnd_code
              and qsm.type_mapping='MASTER-FEEDERS'
          where
          asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
          and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?  
          and srq_part.Good_label = 'X'
          and qsm.code_mapping_cible is null
              )parts,        
              (Select
              srq.ID_CHARGEMENT
              ,row_number() over (order by srq.date_rapport desc) as num_date
              ,srq.date_rapport
              from
              (
              select distinct
                      max(fic.ID_CHARGEMENT)over(partition by fic.DATE_RAPPORT) as ID_CHARGEMENT
                      ,fic.date_rapport
                      from 
                       qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX fic
                       join (Select
                      row_number() over (order by srqdat.DDate) as num_date
                      ,srqdat.DDate
                      from
                      (
                      (select 
                          -- last_day(:p_date_echeance) as DDate
                          to_date(?) as DDate
                          from dual
                      )
                      union
                      (
                      Select distinct
                          last_day(qs.date_echeance) as DDate
                           from
                           qxp.qxp_suivi qs
                           join qxp.qxp_asso_suivi_parametres qasp on qs.id_suivi = qasp.id_suivi
                           where            
                           qs.id_fnd_code = ?
                           and qs.id_type_rapport = 1
                           and qs.date_echeance <= add_months(to_date(?),-4)
                           and qs.date_echeance >= add_months(to_date(?),-28)
                           and qasp.id_parametre = 2
                      )
                      )srqdat
                       ) gabdate on fic.DATE_RAPPORT = gabdate.DDate
                       join qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD ON fic.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
                    where 
                     fic.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                     and MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'STATS'
              )srq     
              ) dat,        
                  (
              select 1 as niveau_base ,'LIB_PTF' as info from dual
              union  select 2 as niveau_base ,'LIB_PTFR' as info from dual
              union  select 3 as niveau_base ,'DATE' as info from dual
              union  select 4 as niveau_base ,'DATER' as info from dual
              union  select 10 as niveau_base ,'VL' as info from dual
              union  select 10 as niveau_base ,'PARTS' as info from dual
              union  select 20 as niveau_base ,'NAV' as info from dual
                  )niveau    ,
              -----  7 Colonnes par page    
                  (
              select 0 as col from dual
              union  select 1 as col from dual
              union  select 2 as col from dual 
              union  select 3 as col from dual
              union  select 4 as col from dual
              union  select 5 as col from dual 
              union  select 6 as col from dual
                  )index_col    
                   
      --------------------------- Cartesien Mise en place Tableau Fin    
      )pres
--     where 
--     pres.Presence_port is null
    
    )pres1
    left join
    ---- Restitution des données en base : debut
        ( 
     Select
          srq_mbd.date_rapport
          ,srq_mbd.ID_CHARGEMENT
          ,srq_mbd.ID_TABLEAU
          ,srq_mbd.CODE_PTF
          ,case when srq_mbd.GROUPE = 'NAV' then 'NAV' else srq_mbd.CODE_PART end as CODE_PART
     --     ,srq_mbd.CODE_PART
          ,srq_mbd.ID_RUBRIQUE
          ,srq_mbd.GROUPE
          ,srq_mbd.VALEUR
          ,srq_mbd.DEVISE_PTF
          ,srq_mbd.DEVISE_PART
          ,srq_mbd.devise_diffusion
--          ,srq_mbd.doublon
          ,srq_mbd.CODE_ISIN
          ,case when srq_mbd.GROUPE = 'VL' then 
                     dense_rank()over(partition by srq_mbd.CODE_PTF,srq_mbd.GROUPE,srq_mbd.CODE_PART order by srq_mbd.devise_diffusion) 
                     else 1 end as num_dev_diff_part
          ,srq_mbd.LIBELLE_PART as LIBELLE_RAPPORT
          ,srq_mbd.VALEUR_AFFICHAGE
        from
        ( Select
          fichier.date_rapport
          ,MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
          ,MBD.ID_TABLEAU
          ,MBD.CODE_PTF
          ,MBD.CODE_FUSION
          ,MBD.CODE_PART
          ,MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE
          ,MBD.GROUPE
          ,MBD.VALEUR
          ,MBD.DEVISE_PTF
          ,MBD.DEVISE_PART
          ,case when substr(MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A'then substr(MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE,3,5) else MBD.DEVISE_PART end as devise_diffusion
--          ,case when MBD.GROUPE = 'VL' and substr(MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE,3,5) <> MBD.DEVISE_PART then 'X'end as doublon
          ,MBD.LIBELLE_PART
          ,MBD.VALEUR_AFFICHAGE
          ,MBD.TECHNIQUE_1 
          ,MBD.TECHNIQUE_2 as CODE_ISIN
          
          from
          qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD
              join 
               (select distinct
                  max(fic.ID_CHARGEMENT)over(partition by fic.DATE_RAPPORT) as ID_CHARGEMENT
                  ,fic.date_rapport
                  from 
                   qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX fic
                   join (Select
                      row_number() over (order by srqdat.DDate) as num_date
                      ,srqdat.DDate
                      from
                      (
                      (select 
                          -- last_day(:p_date_echeance) as DDate
                          to_date(?) as DDate
                          from dual
                      )
                      union
                      (
                      Select distinct
                          last_day(qs.date_echeance) as DDate
                           from
                           qxp.qxp_suivi qs
                           join qxp.qxp_asso_suivi_parametres qasp on qs.id_suivi = qasp.id_suivi
                           where            
                           qs.id_fnd_code = ?
                           --and qs.id_gabarit = :p_id_gabarit
                           and qs.id_type_rapport = 1
                           and qs.date_echeance <= add_months(to_date(?),-4)
                           and qs.date_echeance >= add_months(to_date(?),-28)
                           and qasp.id_parametre = 2
                      )
                      )srqdat
                   ) gabdate on fic.DATE_RAPPORT = gabdate.DDate --and fic.ID_GABARIT = gabdate.ID_GABARIT 
                   join qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD ON fic.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
                where 
                 fic.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                 and MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'STATS'
                 )fichier on fichier.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
           where 
           MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'STATS'
           and MBD.TECHNIQUE_1 not in ('Tech')
        )srq_mbd   
--       where 
--       srq_mbd.doublon is null
     
        )donnees on pres1.CODE_PTF = donnees.CODE_PTF
               and pres1.date_rapport = donnees.date_rapport 
               and pres1.info = donnees.GROUPE  
               and pres1.code_part = donnees.code_part
               and pres1.num_dev_diff_part = donnees.num_dev_diff_part
     
     ---- Restitution des données en base : Fin
     where
     pres1.Presence = 'X'

)srq 
 
left join ( select 
            lplp.id_structure
            ,lplp.id_groupe as Fcp_Sicav
            from
            qxp.QXP_SUP_LUX_PARAM_LIB_PART lplp
            where 
            lplp.id_structure = ?)Type_Struct on Type_Struct.id_structure = srq.id_structure
 
     ----where
     ----srq.POSITION > 68
 
 ORDER BY 
srq.POSITION
,srq.LIBELLE_RAPPORT
,srq.num_lib_part
,srq.niveau_base
,Case when srq.info = 'PARTS' then dense_rank()over(partition by srq.CODE_PTF,srq.info,srq.CODE_PART order by srq.devise_diffusion) else srq.num_dev_diff_part end
--,srq.num_dev_diff_part
,srq.num_date
,srq.col]; ORA-01830: date format picture ends before converting entire input string


org.springframework.dao.DataIntegrityViolationException: PreparedStatementCallback; SQL [/* MBD Amundi Ex Pio - Statistiques 20201210 */

---- Version de requete pour les 62 premières POSITIONs de compartiments de la structure et du gabarit

-- 20201202 : projet nouvelle presentation Stats Amundi
-- integration des data de SG Market dans la requete de generation
-- ajout de la gestion du libellé en fonction FCP / SICAV 

Select

srq.ID_STRUCTURE
,Type_Struct.Fcp_Sicav
,srq.POSITION
,srq.CODE_PTF
,srq.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
,srq.DEVISE_PTF
,srq.DATE_FIN_COMPART 
,srq.num_date
,srq.date_rapport
,srq.CODE_PART
,srq.CODE_ISIN
,srq.first_part
,srq.DEVISE_PART
,srq.devise_diffusion
,srq.Shadow
,srq.NbDevPart
-- Gestion de l'affichage du nombre de part sur une part Shadow.
,Case when srq.info = 'PARTS' then dense_rank()over(partition by srq.CODE_PTF,srq.info,srq.CODE_PART order by srq.devise_diffusion) else srq.num_dev_diff_part end as num_dev_diff_part2
,srq.num_dev_diff_part
,srq.num_lib_part
,srq.LIBELLE_RAPPORT
,srq.niveau_base
,srq.info
,srq.col
,srq.code_ptf_mbd
,srq.devise_ptf_mbd
,srq.code_part_mbd
,srq.ID_RUBRIQUE
,srq.devise_part_mbd
,srq.devise_diff_mbd
,srq.num_dev_diff_part_mbd
,srq.GROUPE
,srq.VALEUR_AFFICHAGE
,srq.presence
,case when srq.info in ('VL','PARTS') then srq.niveau_base + srq.num_lib_part + 
      Case when srq.info = 'PARTS' then dense_rank()over(partition by srq.CODE_PTF,srq.info,srq.CODE_PART order by srq.devise_diffusion) else srq.num_dev_diff_part end *2
      when srq.info in ('NAV') then 99 else srq.niveau_base end as ID_GROUPE
      
,case when srq.info in ('VL','PARTS') then srq.niveau_base + srq.num_lib_part + 
      Case when srq.info = 'PARTS' then dense_rank()over(partition by srq.CODE_PTF,srq.info,srq.CODE_PART order by srq.devise_diffusion) else srq.num_dev_diff_part end *2
      when srq.info in ('NAV') then 99 else srq.niveau_base end as ID_LIGNE

,'STAT_S'||srq.POSITION||srq.CODE_PART||srq.num_lib_part||srq.devise_diffusion||'L'||case when srq.info in ('VL','PARTS') then srq.niveau_base + srq.num_dev_diff_part else srq.niveau_base end
||'C'||srq.col||'D'||srq.num_date||'_'||case when srq.CODE_PTF is null then 'XXX'else srq.CODE_PTF end  as Nom_Bloc

,Case when srq.niveau_base in (1) and srq.info = 'LIB_PTF' then srq.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
      when srq.niveau_base in (2) and srq.info = 'LIB_PTFR' then srq.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION

      when srq.niveau_base = 3 and srq.info = 'DATE' and srq.num_date = 1 and srq.col = 0 and Type_Struct.Fcp_Sicav = 'FCP' then 'Number of units'
      when srq.niveau_base = 3 and srq.info = 'DATE' and srq.num_date = 1 and srq.col = 0 and Type_Struct.Fcp_Sicav = 'SICAV' then 'Number of shares'
      when srq.niveau_base = 3 and srq.info = 'DATE' and srq.num_date = 1 and srq.col in (1,2,3) and Type_Struct.Fcp_Sicav = 'FCP' then 'NAV per unit'
      when srq.niveau_base = 3 and srq.info = 'DATE' and srq.num_date = 1 and srq.col in (1,2,3) and Type_Struct.Fcp_Sicav = 'SICAV' then 'NAV per share'
      when srq.niveau_base = 3 and srq.info = 'DATE' and srq.num_date = 1 and srq.col in (4,5) then To_char(last_day(srq.date_rapport),'DD/MM/YY')
      when srq.niveau_base = 3 and srq.info = 'DATE' and srq.num_date > 1 then To_char(last_day(srq.date_rapport),'DD/MM/YY')
     
      when srq.niveau_base = 4 and srq.info = 'DATER' and srq.num_date = 1 and srq.col = 0 and Type_Struct.Fcp_Sicav = 'FCP' then 'Number of units'
      when srq.niveau_base = 4 and srq.info = 'DATER' and srq.num_date = 1 and srq.col = 0 and Type_Struct.Fcp_Sicav = 'SICAV' then 'Number of shares'
      when srq.niveau_base = 4 and srq.info = 'DATER' and srq.num_date = 1 and srq.col in (1,2,3) and Type_Struct.Fcp_Sicav = 'FCP' then 'NAV per unit'
      when srq.niveau_base = 4 and srq.info = 'DATER' and srq.num_date = 1 and srq.col in (1,2,3) and Type_Struct.Fcp_Sicav = 'SICAV' then 'NAV per share'
      when srq.niveau_base = 4 and srq.info = 'DATER' and srq.num_date = 1 and srq.col in (4,5) then To_char(last_day(srq.date_rapport),'DD/MM/YY')
      when srq.niveau_base = 4 and srq.info = 'DATER' and srq.num_date > 1 then To_char(last_day(srq.date_rapport),'DD/MM/YY')
    
      when srq.niveau_base = 10 and srq.info = 'VL' and srq.col = 0 then srq.LIBELLE_RAPPORT
      when srq.niveau_base = 10 and srq.info = 'VL' and srq.col = 1 then srq.CODE_ISIN 
      when srq.niveau_base = 10 and srq.info = 'PARTS' and srq.col = 2 then NVL(srq.VALEUR_AFFICHAGE,'-') -- ??:(
      when srq.niveau_base = 10 and srq.info = 'VL' and srq.col = 3 then srq.devise_diffusion
      when srq.niveau_base = 10 and srq.info = 'VL' and srq.col in (4,5,6) then NVL(srq.VALEUR_AFFICHAGE,'-') 

      when srq.niveau_base = 20 and srq.info = 'NAV' and srq.col = 0 then srq.DEVISE_PTF
      when srq.niveau_base = 20 and srq.info = 'NAV' and srq.col not in (0)  then NVL(srq.VALEUR_AFFICHAGE,'-')

      end as Valeur_Bloc
      
,case when srq.niveau_base = 1 and srq.info = 'LIB_PTF' then 'STATAMV2_N1' 
      when srq.niveau_base = 2 and srq.info = 'LIB_PTFR'then 'STATAMV2_N1B'
      when srq.niveau_base = 3 and srq.info = 'DATE'then 'STATAMV2_N3'
      when srq.niveau_base = 4 and srq.info = 'DATER'then 'STATAMV2_N3B'
      when srq.niveau_base = 10 then 'STATAMV2_N10'
      when srq.niveau_base = 20 then 'STATAMV2_N20'
      end as "TEMPLATE"

,Case When srq.niveau_base = 2 then 1
      When srq.niveau_base = 4 then 3
      else srq.niveau_base end as ROW_LEVEL
      
,1 AS ID_SECTION      

from

    (Select
    pres1.ID_STRUCTURE
    ,pres1.POSITION
    ,pres1.CODE_PTF
    ,pres1.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
    ,pres1.DEVISE_PTF
    ,pres1.DATE_FIN_COMPART 
    ,pres1.num_date
    ,pres1.date_rapport
    ,pres1.CODE_PART
    ,pres1.CODE_ISIN
    ,pres1.first_part
    ,pres1.DEVISE_PART
    ,pres1.devise_diffusion
    ,pres1.Shadow
    ,pres1.NbDevPart
    ,pres1.num_dev_diff_part
    ,pres1.num_lib_part
    ,pres1.LIBELLE_RAPPORT
    ,pres1.niveau_base
    ,pres1.info
    ,pres1.col
    ,donnees.CODE_PTF as code_ptf_mbd
    ,donnees.DEVISE_PTF as devise_ptf_mbd
    ,donnees.CODE_PART as code_part_mbd
    ,donnees.ID_RUBRIQUE
    ,donnees.DEVISE_PART as devise_part_mbd
    ,donnees.devise_diffusion as devise_diff_mbd
    ,donnees.num_dev_diff_part as num_dev_diff_part_mbd
    ,donnees.GROUPE
    ,donnees.VALEUR_AFFICHAGE
    ,pres1.Presence
    
    from
      (
      Select
      pres.ID_STRUCTURE
      ,pres.POSITION
      ,pres.CODE_PTF
      ,pres.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
      ,pres.DEVISE_PTF
      ,pres.DATE_FIN_COMPART 
      ,pres.Presence_port
      ,pres.num_date
      ,pres.date_rapport
      ,pres.CODE_PART
      ,pres.CODE_ISIN
      ,pres.first_part
      ,pres.DEVISE_PART
      ,pres.devise_diffusion
      ,pres.Shadow
      ,pres.NbDevPart
      -- Modification des position de devises de diffusion
      ,case when pres.info = 'VL' then pres.num_dev_diff_part else 1 end as num_dev_diff_part  
    
      ,pres.num_lib_part
      ,pres.LIBELLE_RAPPORT
      ,pres.niveau_base
      ,pres.info
      ,pres.col
            
      ,case when pres.niveau_base = 1 and pres.info = 'LIB_PTF' and pres.num_date = 1 and pres.num_dev_diff_part = 1 and pres.col = 0
                                      and pres.first_part = pres.LIBELLE_RAPPORT and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'
    
            when pres.niveau_base = 2 and pres.info = 'LIB_PTFR' and pres.num_date = 1 and pres.num_dev_diff_part = 1 and pres.col = 0
                                      and pres.first_part = pres.LIBELLE_RAPPORT and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'
            -- on prend toutes les colonnes pour gerer les libellés Share ou Units !!!
            when pres.niveau_base = 3 and pres.info = 'DATE' and pres.num_date = 1 and pres.num_dev_diff_part = 1 and pres.col in (0,1,2,3,4,5)
                                      and pres.first_part = pres.LIBELLE_RAPPORT and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'
            when pres.niveau_base = 3 and pres.info = 'DATE' and pres.num_date = 2 and pres.num_dev_diff_part = 1 and pres.col in (2)
                                      and pres.first_part = pres.LIBELLE_RAPPORT and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'                                   
            when pres.niveau_base = 3 and pres.info = 'DATE' and pres.num_date = 3 and pres.num_dev_diff_part = 1 and pres.col in (3)
                                      and pres.first_part = pres.LIBELLE_RAPPORT and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'
    
            when pres.niveau_base = 4 and pres.info = 'DATER' and pres.num_date = 1 and pres.num_dev_diff_part = 1 and pres.col in (0,1,2,3,4,5)
                                      and pres.first_part = pres.LIBELLE_RAPPORT and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'
            when pres.niveau_base = 4 and pres.info = 'DATER' and pres.num_date = 2 and pres.num_dev_diff_part = 1 and pres.col in (2)
                                      and pres.first_part = pres.LIBELLE_RAPPORT and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'                                   
            when pres.niveau_base = 4 and pres.info = 'DATER' and pres.num_date = 3 and pres.num_dev_diff_part = 1 and pres.col in (3)
                                      and pres.first_part = pres.LIBELLE_RAPPORT and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'
    
            when pres.niveau_base = 10 and pres.info = 'VL' and pres.num_date = 1 and pres.col in (0,1,3,4)then 'X'
            when pres.niveau_base = 10 and pres.info = 'PARTS' and pres.num_date = 1 and pres.col in (2)then 'X'
            when pres.niveau_base = 10 and pres.info = 'VL' and pres.num_date = 2 and pres.col in (5)then 'X'
            when pres.niveau_base = 10 and pres.info = 'VL' and pres.num_date = 3 and pres.col in (6)then 'X'
            -- and pres.num_dev_diff_part = 1
    
            when pres.niveau_base = 20 and pres.info = 'NAV' and pres.num_date = 1 and pres.col in (0,1)
                                      and pres.DEVISE_PART = pres.devise_diffusion and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'
            when pres.niveau_base = 20 and pres.info = 'NAV' and pres.num_date = 2 and pres.col in (2)
                                      and pres.DEVISE_PART = pres.devise_diffusion and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'
            when pres.niveau_base = 20 and pres.info = 'NAV' and pres.num_date = 3 and pres.col in (3)
                                      and pres.DEVISE_PART = pres.devise_diffusion and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'
            end as Presence
      
      from
      (
      --------------------------- Cartesien Mise en place Tableau Debut
      Select
      parts.ID_STRUCTURE
      ,parts.POSITION
      ,parts.CODE_PTF
      ,parts.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
      ,parts.DEVISE_PTF
      ,parts.DATE_FIN_COMPART 
      ,parts.Presence_port
      ,dat.num_date
      ,dat.date_rapport
      ,Case when niveau.info = 'NAV' then 'NAV' else parts.CODE_PART end as Code_Part
      ,parts.CODE_ISIN
      ,parts.first_part
      ,parts.DEVISE_PART
      ,parts.devise_diffusion
      ,parts.Shadow
      ,parts.NbDevPart
      ,parts.num_dev_diff_part
      ,parts.num_lib_part
      -- ,parts.LIBELLE_RAPPORT
      ,Case when niveau.info = 'NAV' then 'ZZZ_NAV' else parts.LIBELLE_RAPPORT end as LIBELLE_RAPPORT
      ,niveau.niveau_base
      ,niveau.info
      ,index_col.col

      from
      (
        Select
          asgc.ID_STRUCTURE
          ,asgc.POSITION
          ,srq_part.CODE_PTF
          ,case when slb.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION is null then 'Mettre à jour le fichier des libelles' else slb.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION  end as FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
          ,srq_part.DEVISE_PTF
          ,first_value(srq_part.LIBELLE_RAPPORT) over (partition by srq_part.CODE_PTF order by srq_part.LIBELLE_RAPPORT rows between unbounded preceding and unbounded following) as first_part
          ,dense_rank()over(partition by srq_part.CODE_PTF order by srq_part.LIBELLE_RAPPORT,srq_part.CODE_PART) as num_lib_part
          ,srq_part.CODE_PART
          ,srq_part.CODE_ISIN
          ,srq_part.DEVISE_PART
          ,srq_part.devise_diffusion
          ,srq_part.Shadow
          ,count(srq_part.DEVISE_PART)over(partition by srq_part.CODE_PTF,srq_part.CODE_PART) as NbDevPart
          ,dense_rank()over(partition by srq_part.CODE_PTF,srq_part.CODE_PART,srq_part.DEVISE_PART order by srq_part.devise_diffusion) as num_dev_diff_part
          ,srq_part.LIBELLE_RAPPORT
          ,slb.DATE_FIN_COMPART 
          ,Case when slb.DATE_FIN_COMPART < to_date(?) then 'X' 
              Else null end as Presence_port
    
          From
          ( 
          Select distinct
            fichier.id_structure
            ,MBD.CODE_PTF
            ,MBD.DEVISE_PTF
            ,MBD.CODE_PART
            ,MBD.LIBELLE_PART as LIBELLE_RAPPORT
            ,substr(MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE,3,5) as DEVISE_PART
            ,MBD.DEVISE_PART as devise_diffusion
            ,MBD.TECHNIQUE_2 as CODE_ISIN
            ,MBD.TECHNIQUE_1 as Shadow
            ,MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
            ,Case when max(MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT)over(partition by MBD.CODE_PTF,MBD.CODE_PART) = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT then 'X' end as Good_label
          from
          qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD
              join 
               (select distinct
                  fic.id_structure
                  ,max(fic.ID_CHARGEMENT)over(partition by fic.DATE_RAPPORT) as ID_CHARGEMENT
                  ,fic.date_rapport
                  from 
                   qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX fic
                   join (Select
                  row_number() over (order by srqdat.DDate) as num_date
                  ,srqdat.DDate
                  from
                  (
                  (select 
                   -- last_day(:p_date_echeance) as DDate
                      to_date(?) as DDate
                      from dual
                  )
                  union
                  (
                  Select distinct
                      last_day(qs.date_echeance) as DDate
                       from
                       qxp.qxp_suivi qs
                       join qxp.qxp_asso_suivi_parametres qasp on qs.id_suivi = qasp.id_suivi
                       where            
                       qs.id_fnd_code = ?
                       and qs.id_type_rapport = 1
                       and qs.date_echeance <= add_months(to_date(?),-4)
                       and qs.date_echeance >= add_months(to_date(?),-28)
                       and qasp.id_parametre = 2
                  )
                  )srqdat
                   ) gabdate on fic.DATE_RAPPORT = gabdate.DDate --and fic.ID_GABARIT = gabdate.ID_GABARIT 
                   join qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD ON fic.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
                where 
                 fic.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                 and MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'STATS'
                 )fichier on fichier.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
           where 
               MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'STATS' 
               and MBD.GROUPE = 'VL'
               and MBD.TECHNIQUE_1 not in ('Tech')
           )srq_part  
          join qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc on srq_part.CODE_PTF = asgc.ID_FND_CODE 
          left join qxp_compartiment slb on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = slb.ID_FND_CODE 
          left join qxp.qxp_sup_mapping qsm on qsm.code_mapping_cible=asgc.id_fnd_code
              and qsm.type_mapping='MASTER-FEEDERS'
          where
          asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
          and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?  
          and srq_part.Good_label = 'X'
          and qsm.code_mapping_cible is null
              )parts,        
              (Select
              srq.ID_CHARGEMENT
              ,row_number() over (order by srq.date_rapport desc) as num_date
              ,srq.date_rapport
              from
              (
              select distinct
                      max(fic.ID_CHARGEMENT)over(partition by fic.DATE_RAPPORT) as ID_CHARGEMENT
                      ,fic.date_rapport
                      from 
                       qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX fic
                       join (Select
                      row_number() over (order by srqdat.DDate) as num_date
                      ,srqdat.DDate
                      from
                      (
                      (select 
                          -- last_day(:p_date_echeance) as DDate
                          to_date(?) as DDate
                          from dual
                      )
                      union
                      (
                      Select distinct
                          last_day(qs.date_echeance) as DDate
                           from
                           qxp.qxp_suivi qs
                           join qxp.qxp_asso_suivi_parametres qasp on qs.id_suivi = qasp.id_suivi
                           where            
                           qs.id_fnd_code = ?
                           and qs.id_type_rapport = 1
                           and qs.date_echeance <= add_months(to_date(?),-4)
                           and qs.date_echeance >= add_months(to_date(?),-28)
                           and qasp.id_parametre = 2
                      )
                      )srqdat
                       ) gabdate on fic.DATE_RAPPORT = gabdate.DDate
                       join qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD ON fic.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
                    where 
                     fic.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                     and MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'STATS'
              )srq     
              ) dat,        
                  (
              select 1 as niveau_base ,'LIB_PTF' as info from dual
              union  select 2 as niveau_base ,'LIB_PTFR' as info from dual
              union  select 3 as niveau_base ,'DATE' as info from dual
              union  select 4 as niveau_base ,'DATER' as info from dual
              union  select 10 as niveau_base ,'VL' as info from dual
              union  select 10 as niveau_base ,'PARTS' as info from dual
              union  select 20 as niveau_base ,'NAV' as info from dual
                  )niveau    ,
              -----  7 Colonnes par page    
                  (
              select 0 as col from dual
              union  select 1 as col from dual
              union  select 2 as col from dual 
              union  select 3 as col from dual
              union  select 4 as col from dual
              union  select 5 as col from dual 
              union  select 6 as col from dual
                  )index_col    
                   
      --------------------------- Cartesien Mise en place Tableau Fin    
      )pres
--     where 
--     pres.Presence_port is null
    
    )pres1
    left join
    ---- Restitution des données en base : debut
        ( 
     Select
          srq_mbd.date_rapport
          ,srq_mbd.ID_CHARGEMENT
          ,srq_mbd.ID_TABLEAU
          ,srq_mbd.CODE_PTF
          ,case when srq_mbd.GROUPE = 'NAV' then 'NAV' else srq_mbd.CODE_PART end as CODE_PART
     --     ,srq_mbd.CODE_PART
          ,srq_mbd.ID_RUBRIQUE
          ,srq_mbd.GROUPE
          ,srq_mbd.VALEUR
          ,srq_mbd.DEVISE_PTF
          ,srq_mbd.DEVISE_PART
          ,srq_mbd.devise_diffusion
--          ,srq_mbd.doublon
          ,srq_mbd.CODE_ISIN
          ,case when srq_mbd.GROUPE = 'VL' then 
                     dense_rank()over(partition by srq_mbd.CODE_PTF,srq_mbd.GROUPE,srq_mbd.CODE_PART order by srq_mbd.devise_diffusion) 
                     else 1 end as num_dev_diff_part
          ,srq_mbd.LIBELLE_PART as LIBELLE_RAPPORT
          ,srq_mbd.VALEUR_AFFICHAGE
        from
        ( Select
          fichier.date_rapport
          ,MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
          ,MBD.ID_TABLEAU
          ,MBD.CODE_PTF
          ,MBD.CODE_FUSION
          ,MBD.CODE_PART
          ,MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE
          ,MBD.GROUPE
          ,MBD.VALEUR
          ,MBD.DEVISE_PTF
          ,MBD.DEVISE_PART
          ,case when substr(MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A'then substr(MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE,3,5) else MBD.DEVISE_PART end as devise_diffusion
--          ,case when MBD.GROUPE = 'VL' and substr(MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE,3,5) <> MBD.DEVISE_PART then 'X'end as doublon
          ,MBD.LIBELLE_PART
          ,MBD.VALEUR_AFFICHAGE
          ,MBD.TECHNIQUE_1 
          ,MBD.TECHNIQUE_2 as CODE_ISIN
          
          from
          qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD
              join 
               (select distinct
                  max(fic.ID_CHARGEMENT)over(partition by fic.DATE_RAPPORT) as ID_CHARGEMENT
                  ,fic.date_rapport
                  from 
                   qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX fic
                   join (Select
                      row_number() over (order by srqdat.DDate) as num_date
                      ,srqdat.DDate
                      from
                      (
                      (select 
                          -- last_day(:p_date_echeance) as DDate
                          to_date(?) as DDate
                          from dual
                      )
                      union
                      (
                      Select distinct
                          last_day(qs.date_echeance) as DDate
                           from
                           qxp.qxp_suivi qs
                           join qxp.qxp_asso_suivi_parametres qasp on qs.id_suivi = qasp.id_suivi
                           where            
                           qs.id_fnd_code = ?
                           --and qs.id_gabarit = :p_id_gabarit
                           and qs.id_type_rapport = 1
                           and qs.date_echeance <= add_months(to_date(?),-4)
                           and qs.date_echeance >= add_months(to_date(?),-28)
                           and qasp.id_parametre = 2
                      )
                      )srqdat
                   ) gabdate on fic.DATE_RAPPORT = gabdate.DDate --and fic.ID_GABARIT = gabdate.ID_GABARIT 
                   join qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD ON fic.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
                where 
                 fic.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                 and MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'STATS'
                 )fichier on fichier.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
           where 
           MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'STATS'
           and MBD.TECHNIQUE_1 not in ('Tech')
        )srq_mbd   
--       where 
--       srq_mbd.doublon is null
     
        )donnees on pres1.CODE_PTF = donnees.CODE_PTF
               and pres1.date_rapport = donnees.date_rapport 
               and pres1.info = donnees.GROUPE  
               and pres1.code_part = donnees.code_part
               and pres1.num_dev_diff_part = donnees.num_dev_diff_part
     
     ---- Restitution des données en base : Fin
     where
     pres1.Presence = 'X'

)srq 
 
left join ( select 
            lplp.id_structure
            ,lplp.id_groupe as Fcp_Sicav
            from
            qxp.QXP_SUP_LUX_PARAM_LIB_PART lplp
            where 
            lplp.id_structure = ?)Type_Struct on Type_Struct.id_structure = srq.id_structure
 
     ----where
     ----srq.POSITION > 68
 
 ORDER BY 
srq.POSITION
,srq.LIBELLE_RAPPORT
,srq.num_lib_part
,srq.niveau_base
,Case when srq.info = 'PARTS' then dense_rank()over(partition by srq.CODE_PTF,srq.info,srq.CODE_PART order by srq.devise_diffusion) else srq.num_dev_diff_part end
--,srq.num_dev_diff_part
,srq.num_date
,srq.col]; ORA-01830: date format picture ends before converting entire input string

    ,pres1.LIBELLE_RAPPORT
    ,pres1.niveau_base
    ,pres1.info
    ,pres1.col
    ,donnees.CODE_PTF as code_ptf_mbd
    ,donnees.DEVISE_PTF as devise_ptf_mbd
    ,donnees.CODE_PART as code_part_mbd
    ,donnees.ID_RUBRIQUE
    ,donnees.DEVISE_PART as devise_part_mbd
    ,donnees.devise_diffusion as devise_diff_mbd
    ,donnees.num_dev_diff_part as num_dev_diff_part_mbd
    ,donnees.GROUPE
    ,donnees.VALEUR_AFFICHAGE
    ,pres1.Presence
    
    from
      (
      Select
      pres.ID_STRUCTURE
      ,pres.POSITION
      ,pres.CODE_PTF
      ,pres.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
      ,pres.DEVISE_PTF
      ,pres.DATE_FIN_COMPART 
      ,pres.Presence_port
      ,pres.num_date
      ,pres.date_rapport
      ,pres.CODE_PART
      ,pres.CODE_ISIN
      ,pres.first_part
      ,pres.DEVISE_PART
      ,pres.devise_diffusion
      ,pres.Shadow
      ,pres.NbDevPart
      -- Modification des position de devises de diffusion
      ,case when pres.info = 'VL' then pres.num_dev_diff_part else 1 end as num_dev_diff_part  
    
      ,pres.num_lib_part
      ,pres.LIBELLE_RAPPORT
      ,pres.niveau_base
      ,pres.info
      ,pres.col
            
      ,case when pres.niveau_base = 1 and pres.info = 'LIB_PTF' and pres.num_date = 1 and pres.num_dev_diff_part = 1 and pres.col = 0
                                      and pres.first_part = pres.LIBELLE_RAPPORT and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'
    
            when pres.niveau_base = 2 and pres.info = 'LIB_PTFR' and pres.num_date = 1 and pres.num_dev_diff_part = 1 and pres.col = 0
                                      and pres.first_part = pres.LIBELLE_RAPPORT and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'
            -- on prend toutes les colonnes pour gerer les libellés Share ou Units !!!
            when pres.niveau_base = 3 and pres.info = 'DATE' and pres.num_date = 1 and pres.num_dev_diff_part = 1 and pres.col in (0,1,2,3,4,5)
                                      and pres.first_part = pres.LIBELLE_RAPPORT and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'
            when pres.niveau_base = 3 and pres.info = 'DATE' and pres.num_date = 2 and pres.num_dev_diff_part = 1 and pres.col in (2)
                                      and pres.first_part = pres.LIBELLE_RAPPORT and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'                                   
            when pres.niveau_base = 3 and pres.info = 'DATE' and pres.num_date = 3 and pres.num_dev_diff_part = 1 and pres.col in (3)
                                      and pres.first_part = pres.LIBELLE_RAPPORT and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'
    
            when pres.niveau_base = 4 and pres.info = 'DATER' and pres.num_date = 1 and pres.num_dev_diff_part = 1 and pres.col in (0,1,2,3,4,5)
                                      and pres.first_part = pres.LIBELLE_RAPPORT and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'
            when pres.niveau_base = 4 and pres.info = 'DATER' and pres.num_date = 2 and pres.num_dev_diff_part = 1 and pres.col in (2)
                                      and pres.first_part = pres.LIBELLE_RAPPORT and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'                                   
            when pres.niveau_base = 4 and pres.info = 'DATER' and pres.num_date = 3 and pres.num_dev_diff_part = 1 and pres.col in (3)
                                      and pres.first_part = pres.LIBELLE_RAPPORT and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'
    
            when pres.niveau_base = 10 and pres.info = 'VL' and pres.num_date = 1 and pres.col in (0,1,3,4)then 'X'
            when pres.niveau_base = 10 and pres.info = 'PARTS' and pres.num_date = 1 and pres.col in (2)then 'X'
            when pres.niveau_base = 10 and pres.info = 'VL' and pres.num_date = 2 and pres.col in (5)then 'X'
            when pres.niveau_base = 10 and pres.info = 'VL' and pres.num_date = 3 and pres.col in (6)then 'X'
            -- and pres.num_dev_diff_part = 1
    
            when pres.niveau_base = 20 and pres.info = 'NAV' and pres.num_date = 1 and pres.col in (0,1)
                                      and pres.DEVISE_PART = pres.devise_diffusion and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'
            when pres.niveau_base = 20 and pres.info = 'NAV' and pres.num_date = 2 and pres.col in (2)
                                      and pres.DEVISE_PART = pres.devise_diffusion and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'
            when pres.niveau_base = 20 and pres.info = 'NAV' and pres.num_date = 3 and pres.col in (3)
                                      and pres.DEVISE_PART = pres.devise_diffusion and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'
            end as Presence
      
      from
      (
      --------------------------- Cartesien Mise en place Tableau Debut
      Select
      parts.ID_STRUCTURE
      ,parts.POSITION
      ,parts.CODE_PTF
      ,parts.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
      ,parts.DEVISE_PTF
      ,parts.DATE_FIN_COMPART 
      ,parts.Presence_port
      ,dat.num_date
      ,dat.date_rapport
      ,Case when niveau.info = 'NAV' then 'NAV' else parts.CODE_PART end as Code_Part
      ,parts.CODE_ISIN
      ,parts.first_part
      ,parts.DEVISE_PART
      ,parts.devise_diffusion
      ,parts.Shadow
      ,parts.NbDevPart
      ,parts.num_dev_diff_part
      ,parts.num_lib_part
      -- ,parts.LIBELLE_RAPPORT
      ,Case when niveau.info = 'NAV' then 'ZZZ_NAV' else parts.LIBELLE_RAPPORT end as LIBELLE_RAPPORT
      ,niveau.niveau_base
      ,niveau.info
      ,index_col.col

      from
      (
        Select
          asgc.ID_STRUCTURE
          ,asgc.POSITION
          ,srq_part.CODE_PTF
          ,case when slb.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION is null then 'Mettre à jour le fichier des libelles' else slb.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION  end as FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
          ,srq_part.DEVISE_PTF
          ,first_value(srq_part.LIBELLE_RAPPORT) over (partition by srq_part.CODE_PTF order by srq_part.LIBELLE_RAPPORT rows between unbounded preceding and unbounded following) as first_part
          ,dense_rank()over(partition by srq_part.CODE_PTF order by srq_part.LIBELLE_RAPPORT,srq_part.CODE_PART) as num_lib_part
          ,srq_part.CODE_PART
          ,srq_part.CODE_ISIN
          ,srq_part.DEVISE_PART
          ,srq_part.devise_diffusion
          ,srq_part.Shadow
          ,count(srq_part.DEVISE_PART)over(partition by srq_part.CODE_PTF,srq_part.CODE_PART) as NbDevPart
          ,dense_rank()over(partition by srq_part.CODE_PTF,srq_part.CODE_PART,srq_part.DEVISE_PART order by srq_part.devise_diffusion) as num_dev_diff_part
          ,srq_part.LIBELLE_RAPPORT
          ,slb.DATE_FIN_COMPART 
          ,Case when slb.DATE_FIN_COMPART < to_date(?) then 'X' 
              Else null end as Presence_port
    
          From
          ( 
          Select distinct
            fichier.id_structure
            ,MBD.CODE_PTF
            ,MBD.DEVISE_PTF
            ,MBD.CODE_PART
            ,MBD.LIBELLE_PART as LIBELLE_RAPPORT
            ,substr(MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE,3,5) as DEVISE_PART
            ,MBD.DEVISE_PART as devise_diffusion
            ,MBD.TECHNIQUE_2 as CODE_ISIN
            ,MBD.TECHNIQUE_1 as Shadow
            ,MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
            ,Case when max(MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT)over(partition by MBD.CODE_PTF,MBD.CODE_PART) = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT then 'X' end as Good_label
          from
          qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD
              join 
               (select distinct
                  fic.id_structure
                  ,max(fic.ID_CHARGEMENT)over(partition by fic.DATE_RAPPORT) as ID_CHARGEMENT
                  ,fic.date_rapport
                  from 
                   qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX fic
                   join (Select
                  row_number() over (order by srqdat.DDate) as num_date
                  ,srqdat.DDate
                  from
                  (
                  (select 
                   -- last_day(:p_date_echeance) as DDate
                      to_date(?) as DDate
                      from dual
                  )
                  union
                  (
                  Select distinct
                      last_day(qs.date_echeance) as DDate
                       from
                       qxp.qxp_suivi qs
                       join qxp.qxp_asso_suivi_parametres qasp on qs.id_suivi = qasp.id_suivi
                       where            
                       qs.id_fnd_code = ?
                       and qs.id_type_rapport = 1
                       and qs.date_echeance <= add_months(to_date(?),-4)
                       and qs.date_echeance >= add_months(to_date(?),-28)
                       and qasp.id_parametre = 2
                  )
                  )srqdat
                   ) gabdate on fic.DATE_RAPPORT = gabdate.DDate --and fic.ID_GABARIT = gabdate.ID_GABARIT 
                   join qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD ON fic.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
                where 
                 fic.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                 and MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'STATS'
                 )fichier on fichier.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
           where 
               MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'STATS' 
               and MBD.GROUPE = 'VL'
               and MBD.TECHNIQUE_1 not in ('Tech')
           )srq_part  
          join qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc on srq_part.CODE_PTF = asgc.ID_FND_CODE 
          left join qxp_compartiment slb on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = slb.ID_FND_CODE 
          left join qxp.qxp_sup_mapping qsm on qsm.code_mapping_cible=asgc.id_fnd_code
              and qsm.type_mapping='MASTER-FEEDERS'
          where
          asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
          and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?  
          and srq_part.Good_label = 'X'
          and qsm.code_mapping_cible is null
              )parts,        
              (Select
              srq.ID_CHARGEMENT
              ,row_number() over (order by srq.date_rapport desc) as num_date
              ,srq.date_rapport
              from
              (
              select distinct
                      max(fic.ID_CHARGEMENT)over(partition by fic.DATE_RAPPORT) as ID_CHARGEMENT
                      ,fic.date_rapport
                      from 
                       qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX fic
                       join (Select
                      row_number() over (order by srqdat.DDate) as num_date
                      ,srqdat.DDate
                      from
                      (
                      (select 
                          -- last_day(:p_date_echeance) as DDate
                          to_date(?) as DDate
                          from dual
                      )
                      union
                      (
                      Select distinct
                          last_day(qs.date_echeance) as DDate
                           from
                           qxp.qxp_suivi qs
                           join qxp.qxp_asso_suivi_parametres qasp on qs.id_suivi = qasp.id_suivi
                           where            
                           qs.id_fnd_code = ?
                           and qs.id_type_rapport = 1
                           and qs.date_echeance <= add_months(to_date(?),-4)
                           and qs.date_echeance >= add_months(to_date(?),-28)
                           and qasp.id_parametre = 2
                      )
                      )srqdat
                       ) gabdate on fic.DATE_RAPPORT = gabdate.DDate
                       join qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD ON fic.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
                    where 
                     fic.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                     and MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'STATS'
              )srq     
              ) dat,        
                  (
              select 1 as niveau_base ,'LIB_PTF' as info from dual
              union  select 2 as niveau_base ,'LIB_PTFR' as info from dual
              union  select 3 as niveau_base ,'DATE' as info from dual
              union  select 4 as niveau_base ,'DATER' as info from dual
              union  select 10 as niveau_base ,'VL' as info from dual
              union  select 10 as niveau_base ,'PARTS' as info from dual
              union  select 20 as niveau_base ,'NAV' as info from dual
                  )niveau    ,
              -----  7 Colonnes par page    
                  (
              select 0 as col from dual
              union  select 1 as col from dual
              union  select 2 as col from dual 
              union  select 3 as col from dual
              union  select 4 as col from dual
              union  select 5 as col from dual 
              union  select 6 as col from dual
                  )index_col    
                   
      --------------------------- Cartesien Mise en place Tableau Fin    
      )pres
--     where 
--     pres.Presence_port is null
    
    )pres1
    left join
    ---- Restitution des données en base : debut
        ( 
     Select
          srq_mbd.date_rapport
          ,srq_mbd.ID_CHARGEMENT
          ,srq_mbd.ID_TABLEAU
          ,srq_mbd.CODE_PTF
          ,case when srq_mbd.GROUPE = 'NAV' then 'NAV' else srq_mbd.CODE_PART end as CODE_PART
     --     ,srq_mbd.CODE_PART
          ,srq_mbd.ID_RUBRIQUE
          ,srq_mbd.GROUPE
          ,srq_mbd.VALEUR

                     dense_rank()over(partition by srq_mbd.CODE_PTF,srq_mbd.GROUPE,srq_mbd.CODE_PART order by srq_mbd.devise_diffusion) 
                     else 1 end as num_dev_diff_part

        ( Select
          fichier.date_rapport
          ,MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
          ,MBD.ID_TABLEAU

          ,MBD.LIBELLE_PART

                  max(fic.ID_CHARGEMENT)over(partition by fic.DATE_RAPPORT) as ID_CHARGEMENT
                  ,fic.date_rapport
                  from 
                   qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX fic
                   join (Select
                      row_number() over (order by srqdat.DDate) as num_date
                      ,srqdat.DDate
                      from
                      (
                      (select 
                          -- last_day(:p_date_echeance) as DDate
                          to_date(?) as DDate
                          from dual
                      )
                      union
                      (
                      Select distinct
                          last_day(qs.date_echeance) as DDate
                           from
                           qxp.qxp_suivi qs
                           join qxp.qxp_asso_suivi_parametres qasp on qs.id_suivi = qasp.id_suivi
                           where            
                           qs.id_fnd_code = ?
                           --and qs.id_gabarit = :p_id_gabarit
                           and qs.id_type_rapport = 1
                           and qs.date_echeance <= add_months(to_date(?),-4)
                           and qs.date_echeance >= add_months(to_date(?),-28)
                           and qasp.id_parametre = 2
                      )
                      )srqdat
                   ) gabdate on fic.DATE_RAPPORT = gabdate.DDate --and fic.ID_GABARIT = gabdate.ID_GABARIT 
                   join qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD ON fic.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
                where 
                 fic.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                 and MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'STATS'
                 )fichier on fichier.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
           where 
           MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'STATS'
           and MBD.TECHNIQUE_1 not in ('Tech')
        )srq_mbd   
--       where 
--       srq_mbd.doublon is null
     
        )donnees on pres1.CODE_PTF = donnees.CODE_PTF
               and pres1.date_rapport = donnees.date_rapport 
               and pres1.info = donnees.GROUPE  
               and pres1.code_part = donnees.code_part
               and pres1.num_dev_diff_part = donnees.num_dev_diff_part
     
     ---- Restitution des données en base : Fin
     where
     pres1.Presence = 'X'

)srq

            lplp.id_structure
            ,lplp.id_groupe as Fcp_Sicav
            from
            qxp.QXP_SUP_LUX_PARAM_LIB_PART lplp

     ----srq.POSITION > 68
