,srq.presence
,case when srq.info in ('VL','PARTS') then srq.niveau_base + srq.num_lib_part + 
      Case when srq.info = 'PARTS' then dense_rank()over(partition by srq.CODE_PTF,srq.info,srq.CODE_PART order by srq.devise_diffusion) else srq.num_dev_diff_part end *2
      when srq.info in ('NAV') then 99 else srq.niveau_base end as ID_GROUPE
      
,case when srq.info in ('VL','PARTS') then srq.niveau_base + srq.num_lib_part + 
      Case when srq.info = 'PARTS' then dense_rank()over(partition by srq.CODE_PTF,srq.info,srq.CODE_PART order by srq.devise_diffusion) else srq.num_dev_diff_part end *2
      when srq.info in ('NAV') then 99 else srq.niveau_base end as ID_LIGNE

,'STAT_S'||srq.POSITION||srq.CODE_PART||srq.num_lib_part||srq.devise_diffusion||'L'||case when srq.info in ('VL','PARTS') then srq.niveau_base + srq.num_dev_diff_part else srq.niveau_base end
||'C'||srq.col||'D'||srq.num_date||'_'||case when srq.CODE_PTF is null then 'XXX'else srq.CODE_PTF end  as Nom_Bloc

,Case when srq.niveau_base in (1) and srq.info = 'LIB_PTF' then srq.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
      when srq.niveau_base in (2) and srq.info = 'LIB_PTFR' then srq.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION

      when srq.niveau_base = 3 and srq.info = 'DATE' and srq.num_date = 1 and srq.col = 0 and Type_Struct.Fcp_Sicav = 'FCP' then 'Number of units'
      when srq.niveau_base = 3 and srq.info = 'DATE' and srq.num_date = 1 and srq.col = 0 and Type_Struct.Fcp_Sicav = 'SICAV' then 'Number of shares'
      when srq.niveau_base = 3 and srq.info = 'DATE' and srq.num_date = 1 and srq.col in (1,2,3) and Type_Struct.Fcp_Sicav = 'FCP' then 'NAV per unit'
      when srq.niveau_base = 3 and srq.info = 'DATE' and srq.num_date = 1 and srq.col in (1,2,3) and Type_Struct.Fcp_Sicav = 'SICAV' then 'NAV per share'
      when srq.niveau_base = 3 and srq.info = 'DATE' and srq.num_date = 1 and srq.col in (4,5) then To_char(last_day(srq.date_rapport),'DD/MM/YY')
      when srq.niveau_base = 3 and srq.info = 'DATE' and srq.num_date > 1 then To_char(last_day(srq.date_rapport),'DD/MM/YY')
     
      when srq.niveau_base = 4 and srq.info = 'DATER' and srq.num_date = 1 and srq.col = 0 and Type_Struct.Fcp_Sicav = 'FCP' then 'Number of units'
      when srq.niveau_base = 4 and srq.info = 'DATER' and srq.num_date = 1 and srq.col = 0 and Type_Struct.Fcp_Sicav = 'SICAV' then 'Number of shares'
      when srq.niveau_base = 4 and srq.info = 'DATER' and srq.num_date = 1 and srq.col in (1,2,3) and Type_Struct.Fcp_Sicav = 'FCP' then 'NAV per unit'
      when srq.niveau_base = 4 and srq.info = 'DATER' and srq.num_date = 1 and srq.col in (1,2,3) and Type_Struct.Fcp_Sicav = 'SICAV' then 'NAV per share'
      when srq.niveau_base = 4 and srq.info = 'DATER' and srq.num_date = 1 and srq.col in (4,5) then To_char(last_day(srq.date_rapport),'DD/MM/YY')
      when srq.niveau_base = 4 and srq.info = 'DATER' and srq.num_date > 1 then To_char(last_day(srq.date_rapport),'DD/MM/YY')
    
      when srq.niveau_base = 10 and srq.info = 'VL' and srq.col = 0 then srq.LIBELLE_RAPPORT
      when srq.niveau_base = 10 and srq.info = 'VL' and srq.col = 1 then srq.CODE_ISIN 
      when srq.niveau_base = 10 and srq.info = 'PARTS' and srq.col = 2 then NVL(srq.VALEUR_AFFICHAGE,'-') -- ??:(
      when srq.niveau_base = 10 and srq.info = 'VL' and srq.col = 3 then srq.devise_diffusion
      when srq.niveau_base = 10 and srq.info = 'VL' and srq.col in (4,5,6) then NVL(srq.VALEUR_AFFICHAGE,'-') 

      when srq.niveau_base = 20 and srq.info = 'NAV' and srq.col = 0 then srq.DEVISE_PTF
      when srq.niveau_base = 20 and srq.info = 'NAV' and srq.col not in (0)  then NVL(srq.VALEUR_AFFICHAGE,'-')

      end as Valeur_Bloc
      
,case when srq.niveau_base = 1 and srq.info = 'LIB_PTF' then 'STATAMV2_N1' 
      when srq.niveau_base = 2 and srq.info = 'LIB_PTFR'then 'STATAMV2_N1B'
      when srq.niveau_base = 3 and srq.info = 'DATE'then 'STATAMV2_N3'
      when srq.niveau_base = 4 and srq.info = 'DATER'then 'STATAMV2_N3B'
      when srq.niveau_base = 10 then 'STATAMV2_N10'
      when srq.niveau_base = 20 then 'STATAMV2_N20'
      end as "TEMPLATE"

,Case When srq.niveau_base = 2 then 1
      When srq.niveau_base = 4 then 3
      else srq.niveau_base end as ROW_LEVEL
      
,1 AS ID_SECTION      

from

    (Select
    pres1.ID_STRUCTURE
    ,pres1.POSITION
    ,pres1.CODE_PTF
    ,pres1.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
    ,pres1.DEVISE_PTF
    ,pres1.DATE_FIN_COMPART 
    ,pres1.num_date
    ,pres1.date_rapport
    ,pres1.CODE_PART
    ,pres1.CODE_ISIN
    ,pres1.first_part
    ,pres1.DEVISE_PART
    ,pres1.devise_diffusion
    ,pres1.Shadow
    ,pres1.NbDevPart
    ,pres1.num_dev_diff_part
    ,pres1.num_lib_part
    ,pres1.LIBELLE_RAPPORT
    ,pres1.niveau_base
    ,pres1.info
    ,pres1.col
    ,donnees.CODE_PTF as code_ptf_mbd
    ,donnees.DEVISE_PTF as devise_ptf_mbd
    ,donnees.CODE_PART as code_part_mbd
    ,donnees.ID_RUBRIQUE
    ,donnees.DEVISE_PART as devise_part_mbd
    ,donnees.devise_diffusion as devise_diff_mbd
    ,donnees.num_dev_diff_part as num_dev_diff_part_mbd
    ,donnees.GROUPE
    ,donnees.VALEUR_AFFICHAGE
    ,pres1.Presence
    
    from
      (
      Select
      pres.ID_STRUCTURE
      ,pres.POSITION
      ,pres.CODE_PTF
      ,pres.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
      ,pres.DEVISE_PTF
      ,pres.DATE_FIN_COMPART 
      ,pres.Presence_port
      ,pres.num_date
      ,pres.date_rapport
      ,pres.CODE_PART
      ,pres.CODE_ISIN
      ,pres.first_part
      ,pres.DEVISE_PART
      ,pres.devise_diffusion
      ,pres.Shadow
      ,pres.NbDevPart
      -- Modification des position de devises de diffusion
      ,case when pres.info = 'VL' then pres.num_dev_diff_part else 1 end as num_dev_diff_part  
    
      ,pres.num_lib_part
      ,pres.LIBELLE_RAPPORT
      ,pres.niveau_base
      ,pres.info
      ,pres.col
            
      ,case when pres.niveau_base = 1 and pres.info = 'LIB_PTF' and pres.num_date = 1 and pres.num_dev_diff_part = 1 and pres.col = 0
                                      and pres.first_part = pres.LIBELLE_RAPPORT and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'
    
            when pres.niveau_base = 2 and pres.info = 'LIB_PTFR' and pres.num_date = 1 and pres.num_dev_diff_part = 1 and pres.col = 0
                                      and pres.first_part = pres.LIBELLE_RAPPORT and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'
            -- on prend toutes les colonnes pour gerer les libellés Share ou Units !!!
            when pres.niveau_base = 3 and pres.info = 'DATE' and pres.num_date = 1 and pres.num_dev_diff_part = 1 and pres.col in (0,1,2,3,4,5)
                                      and pres.first_part = pres.LIBELLE_RAPPORT and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'
            when pres.niveau_base = 3 and pres.info = 'DATE' and pres.num_date = 2 and pres.num_dev_diff_part = 1 and pres.col in (2)
                                      and pres.first_part = pres.LIBELLE_RAPPORT and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'                                   
            when pres.niveau_base = 3 and pres.info = 'DATE' and pres.num_date = 3 and pres.num_dev_diff_part = 1 and pres.col in (3)
                                      and pres.first_part = pres.LIBELLE_RAPPORT and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'
    
            when pres.niveau_base = 4 and pres.info = 'DATER' and pres.num_date = 1 and pres.num_dev_diff_part = 1 and pres.col in (0,1,2,3,4,5)
                                      and pres.first_part = pres.LIBELLE_RAPPORT and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'
            when pres.niveau_base = 4 and pres.info = 'DATER' and pres.num_date = 2 and pres.num_dev_diff_part = 1 and pres.col in (2)
                                      and pres.first_part = pres.LIBELLE_RAPPORT and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'                                   
            when pres.niveau_base = 4 and pres.info = 'DATER' and pres.num_date = 3 and pres.num_dev_diff_part = 1 and pres.col in (3)
                                      and pres.first_part = pres.LIBELLE_RAPPORT and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'
    
            when pres.niveau_base = 10 and pres.info = 'VL' and pres.num_date = 1 and pres.col in (0,1,3,4)then 'X'
            when pres.niveau_base = 10 and pres.info = 'PARTS' and pres.num_date = 1 and pres.col in (2)then 'X'
            when pres.niveau_base = 10 and pres.info = 'VL' and pres.num_date = 2 and pres.col in (5)then 'X'
            when pres.niveau_base = 10 and pres.info = 'VL' and pres.num_date = 3 and pres.col in (6)then 'X'
            -- and pres.num_dev_diff_part = 1
    
            when pres.niveau_base = 20 and pres.info = 'NAV' and pres.num_date = 1 and pres.col in (0,1)
                                      and pres.DEVISE_PART = pres.devise_diffusion and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'
            when pres.niveau_base = 20 and pres.info = 'NAV' and pres.num_date = 2 and pres.col in (2)
                                      and pres.DEVISE_PART = pres.devise_diffusion and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'
            when pres.niveau_base = 20 and pres.info = 'NAV' and pres.num_date = 3 and pres.col in (3)
                                      and pres.DEVISE_PART = pres.devise_diffusion and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'
            end as Presence
      
      from
      (
      --------------------------- Cartesien Mise en place Tableau Debut
      Select
      parts.ID_STRUCTURE
      ,parts.POSITION
      ,parts.CODE_PTF
      ,parts.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
      ,parts.DEVISE_PTF
      ,parts.DATE_FIN_COMPART 
      ,parts.Presence_port
      ,dat.num_date
      ,dat.date_rapport
      ,Case when niveau.info = 'NAV' then 'NAV' else parts.CODE_PART end as Code_Part
      ,parts.CODE_ISIN
      ,parts.first_part
      ,parts.DEVISE_PART
      ,parts.devise_diffusion
      ,parts.Shadow
      ,parts.NbDevPart
      ,parts.num_dev_diff_part
      ,parts.num_lib_part
      -- ,parts.LIBELLE_RAPPORT
      ,Case when niveau.info = 'NAV' then 'ZZZ_NAV' else parts.LIBELLE_RAPPORT end as LIBELLE_RAPPORT
      ,niveau.niveau_base
      ,niveau.info
      ,index_col.col

      from
      (
        Select
          asgc.ID_STRUCTURE
          ,asgc.POSITION
          ,srq_part.CODE_PTF
          ,case when slb.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION is null then 'Mettre à jour le fichier des libelles' else slb.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION  end as FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
          ,srq_part.DEVISE_PTF
          ,first_value(srq_part.LIBELLE_RAPPORT) over (partition by srq_part.CODE_PTF order by srq_part.LIBELLE_RAPPORT rows between unbounded preceding and unbounded following) as first_part
          ,dense_rank()over(partition by srq_part.CODE_PTF order by srq_part.LIBELLE_RAPPORT,srq_part.CODE_PART) as num_lib_part
          ,srq_part.CODE_PART
          ,srq_part.CODE_ISIN
          ,srq_part.DEVISE_PART
          ,srq_part.devise_diffusion
          ,srq_part.Shadow
          ,count(srq_part.DEVISE_PART)over(partition by srq_part.CODE_PTF,srq_part.CODE_PART) as NbDevPart
          ,dense_rank()over(partition by srq_part.CODE_PTF,srq_part.CODE_PART,srq_part.DEVISE_PART order by srq_part.devise_diffusion) as num_dev_diff_part
          ,srq_part.LIBELLE_RAPPORT
          ,slb.DATE_FIN_COMPART 
          ,Case when slb.DATE_FIN_COMPART < to_date(?) then 'X' 
              Else null end as Presence_port
    
          From
          ( 
          Select distinct
            fichier.id_structure
            ,MBD.CODE_PTF
            ,MBD.DEVISE_PTF
            ,MBD.CODE_PART
            ,MBD.LIBELLE_PART as LIBELLE_RAPPORT
            ,substr(MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE,3,5) as DEVISE_PART
            ,MBD.DEVISE_PART as devise_diffusion
            ,MBD.TECHNIQUE_2 as CODE_ISIN
            ,MBD.TECHNIQUE_1 as Shadow
            ,MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
            ,Case when max(MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT)over(partition by MBD.CODE_PTF,MBD.CODE_PART) = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT then 'X' end as Good_label
          from
          qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD
              join 
               (select distinct
                  fic.id_structure
                  ,max(fic.ID_CHARGEMENT)over(partition by fic.DATE_RAPPORT) as ID_CHARGEMENT
                  ,fic.date_rapport
                  from 
                   qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX fic
                   join (Select
                  row_number() over (order by srqdat.DDate) as num_date
                  ,srqdat.DDate
                  from
                  (
                  (select 
                   -- last_day(:p_date_echeance) as DDate
                      to_date(?) as DDate
                      from dual
                  )
                  union
                  (
                  Select distinct
                      last_day(qs.date_echeance) as DDate
                       from
                       qxp.qxp_suivi qs
                       join qxp.qxp_asso_suivi_parametres qasp on qs.id_suivi = qasp.id_suivi
                       where            
                       qs.id_fnd_code = ?
                       and qs.id_type_rapport = 1
                       and qs.date_echeance <= add_months(to_date(?),-4)
                       and qs.date_echeance >= add_months(to_date(?),-28)
                       and qasp.id_parametre = 2
                  )
                  )srqdat
                   ) gabdate on fic.DATE_RAPPORT = gabdate.DDate --and fic.ID_GABARIT = gabdate.ID_GABARIT 
                   join qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD ON fic.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
                where 
                 fic.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                 and MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'STATS'
                 )fichier on fichier.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
           where 
               MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'STATS' 
               and MBD.GROUPE = 'VL'
               and MBD.TECHNIQUE_1 not in ('Tech')
           )srq_part  
          join qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc on srq_part.CODE_PTF = asgc.ID_FND_CODE 
          left join qxp_compartiment slb on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = slb.ID_FND_CODE 
          left join qxp.qxp_sup_mapping qsm on qsm.code_mapping_cible=asgc.id_fnd_code
              and qsm.type_mapping='MASTER-FEEDERS'
          where
          asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
          and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?  
          and srq_part.Good_label = 'X'
          and qsm.code_mapping_cible is null
              )parts,        
              (Select
              srq.ID_CHARGEMENT
              ,row_number() over (order by srq.date_rapport desc) as num_date
              ,srq.date_rapport
              from
              (
              select distinct
                      max(fic.ID_CHARGEMENT)over(partition by fic.DATE_RAPPORT) as ID_CHARGEMENT
                      ,fic.date_rapport
                      from 
                       qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX fic
                       join (Select
                      row_number() over (order by srqdat.DDate) as num_date
                      ,srqdat.DDate
                      from
                      (
                      (select 
                          -- last_day(:p_date_echeance) as DDate
                          to_date(?) as DDate
                          from dual
                      )
                      union
                      (
                      Select distinct
                          last_day(qs.date_echeance) as DDate
                           from
                           qxp.qxp_suivi qs
                           join qxp.qxp_asso_suivi_parametres qasp on qs.id_suivi = qasp.id_suivi
                           where            
                           qs.id_fnd_code = ?
                           and qs.id_type_rapport = 1
                           and qs.date_echeance <= add_months(to_date(?),-4)
                           and qs.date_echeance >= add_months(to_date(?),-28)
                           and qasp.id_parametre = 2
                      )
                      )srqdat
                       ) gabdate on fic.DATE_RAPPORT = gabdate.DDate
                       join qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD ON fic.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
                    where 
                     fic.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                     and MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'STATS'
              )srq     
              ) dat,        
                  (
              select 1 as niveau_base ,'LIB_PTF' as info from dual
              union  select 2 as niveau_base ,'LIB_PTFR' as info from dual
              union  select 3 as niveau_base ,'DATE' as info from dual
              union  select 4 as niveau_base ,'DATER' as info from dual
              union  select 10 as niveau_base ,'VL' as info from dual
              union  select 10 as niveau_base ,'PARTS' as info from dual
              union  select 20 as niveau_base ,'NAV' as info from dual
                  )niveau    ,
              -----  7 Colonnes par page    
                  (
              select 0 as col from dual
              union  select 1 as col from dual
              union  select 2 as col from dual 
              union  select 3 as col from dual
              union  select 4 as col from dual
              union  select 5 as col from dual 
              union  select 6 as col from dual
                  )index_col    
                   
      --------------------------- Cartesien Mise en place Tableau Fin    
      )pres
--     where 
--     pres.Presence_port is null
    
    )pres1
    left join
    ---- Restitution des données en base : debut
        ( 
     Select
          srq_mbd.date_rapport
          ,srq_mbd.ID_CHARGEMENT
          ,srq_mbd.ID_TABLEAU
          ,srq_mbd.CODE_PTF
          ,case when srq_mbd.GROUPE = 'NAV' then 'NAV' else srq_mbd.CODE_PART end as CODE_PART
     --     ,srq_mbd.CODE_PART
          ,srq_mbd.ID_RUBRIQUE
          ,srq_mbd.GROUPE
          ,srq_mbd.VALEUR
          ,srq_mbd.DEVISE_PTF
          ,srq_mbd.DEVISE_PART
          ,srq_mbd.devise_diffusion
--          ,srq_mbd.doublon
          ,srq_mbd.CODE_ISIN
          ,case when srq_mbd.GROUPE = 'VL' then 
                     dense_rank()over(partition by srq_mbd.CODE_PTF,srq_mbd.GROUPE,srq_mbd.CODE_PART order by srq_mbd.devise_diffusion) 
                     else 1 end as num_dev_diff_part
          ,srq_mbd.LIBELLE_PART as LIBELLE_RAPPORT
          ,srq_mbd.VALEUR_AFFICHAGE
        from
        ( Select
          fichier.date_rapport
          ,MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
          ,MBD.ID_TABLEAU
          ,MBD.CODE_PTF
          ,MBD.CODE_FUSION
          ,MBD.CODE_PART
          ,MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE
          ,MBD.GROUPE
          ,MBD.VALEUR
          ,MBD.DEVISE_PTF
          ,MBD.DEVISE_PART
          ,case when substr(MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A'then substr(MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE,3,5) else MBD.DEVISE_PART end as devise_diffusion
--          ,case when MBD.GROUPE = 'VL' and substr(MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE,3,5) <> MBD.DEVISE_PART then 'X'end as doublon
          ,MBD.LIBELLE_PART
          ,MBD.VALEUR_AFFICHAGE
          ,MBD.TECHNIQUE_1 
          ,MBD.TECHNIQUE_2 as CODE_ISIN
          
          from
          qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD
              join 
               (select distinct
                  max(fic.ID_CHARGEMENT)over(partition by fic.DATE_RAPPORT) as ID_CHARGEMENT
                  ,fic.date_rapport
                  from 
                   qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX fic
                   join (Select
                      row_number() over (order by srqdat.DDate) as num_date
                      ,srqdat.DDate
                      from
                      (
                      (select 
                          -- last_day(:p_date_echeance) as DDate
                          to_date(?) as DDate
                          from dual
                      )
                      union
                      (
                      Select distinct
                          last_day(qs.date_echeance) as DDate
                           from
                           qxp.qxp_suivi qs
                           join qxp.qxp_asso_suivi_parametres qasp on qs.id_suivi = qasp.id_suivi
                           where            
                           qs.id_fnd_code = ?
                           --and qs.id_gabarit = :p_id_gabarit
                           and qs.id_type_rapport = 1
                           and qs.date_echeance <= add_months(to_date(?),-4)
                           and qs.date_echeance >= add_months(to_date(?),-28)
                           and qasp.id_parametre = 2
                      )
                      )srqdat
                   ) gabdate on fic.DATE_RAPPORT = gabdate.DDate --and fic.ID_GABARIT = gabdate.ID_GABARIT 
                   join qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD ON fic.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
                where 
                 fic.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                 and MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'STATS'
                 )fichier on fichier.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
           where 
           MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'STATS'
           and MBD.TECHNIQUE_1 not in ('Tech')
        )srq_mbd   
     
        )donnees on pres1.CODE_PTF = donnees.CODE_PTF
               and pres1.date_rapport = donnees.date_rapport 
               and pres1.info = donnees.GROUPE  
               and pres1.code_part = donnees.code_part
               and pres1.num_dev_diff_part = donnees.num_dev_diff_part
     
     ---- Restitution des données en base : Fin
     where
     pres1.Presence = 'X'

)srq 
 
left join ( select 
            lplp.id_structure
            ,lplp.id_groupe as Fcp_Sicav
            from
            qxp.QXP_SUP_LUX_PARAM_LIB_PART lplp
            where 
            lplp.id_structure = ?)Type_Struct on Type_Struct.id_structure = srq.id_structure
 
 where 1=1    
	and    
        (
        srq.POSITION = 71 and NUM_LIB_PART > 2 /*Compartiment et part de départ*/
        or(srq.POSITION = 71 and srq.niveau_base=1 and srq.info= 'LIB_PTF') 
            or (srq.POSITION = 71 and srq.niveau_base=2 and srq.info= 'LIB_PTFR') /*Reprise du nom du compartiment*/
        or (srq.POSITION = 71 and srq.niveau_base=3 and srq.info = 'DATE') 
            or (srq.POSITION = 71 and srq.niveau_base=4 and srq.info = 'DATER') /*Reprise des entetes du compartiment*/
        or (srq.POSITION =71 and LIBELLE_RAPPORT='ZZZ_NAV') /*Totalisations du compartiment*/
        or srq.POSITION > 70 /*Données suivantes*/
        )
 
 ORDER BY 
srq.POSITION
,srq.LIBELLE_RAPPORT
,srq.num_lib_part
,srq.niveau_base
,Case when srq.info = 'PARTS' then dense_rank()over(partition by srq.CODE_PTF,srq.info,srq.CODE_PART order by srq.devise_diffusion) else srq.num_dev_diff_part end
--,srq.num_dev_diff_part
,srq.num_date

Select

srq.ID_STRUCTURE
,Type_Struct.Fcp_Sicav
,srq.POSITION
,srq.CODE_PTF
,srq.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
,srq.DEVISE_PTF
,srq.DATE_FIN_COMPART 
,srq.num_date
,srq.date_rapport
,srq.CODE_PART
,srq.CODE_ISIN
,srq.first_part
,srq.DEVISE_PART
,srq.devise_diffusion
,srq.Shadow
,srq.NbDevPart
-- Gestion de l'affichage du nombre de part sur une part Shadow.
,Case when srq.info = 'PARTS' then dense_rank()over(partition by srq.CODE_PTF,srq.info,srq.CODE_PART order by srq.devise_diffusion) else srq.num_dev_diff_part end as num_dev_diff_part2
,srq.num_dev_diff_part
,srq.num_lib_part
,srq.LIBELLE_RAPPORT
,srq.niveau_base
,srq.info
,srq.col
,srq.code_ptf_mbd
,srq.devise_ptf_mbd
,srq.code_part_mbd
,srq.ID_RUBRIQUE
,srq.devise_part_mbd
,srq.devise_diff_mbd
,srq.num_dev_diff_part_mbd
,srq.GROUPE
,srq.VALEUR_AFFICHAGE
,srq.presence
,case when srq.info in ('VL','PARTS') then srq.niveau_base + srq.num_lib_part + 
      Case when srq.info = 'PARTS' then dense_rank()over(partition by srq.CODE_PTF,srq.info,srq.CODE_PART order by srq.devise_diffusion) else srq.num_dev_diff_part end *2
      when srq.info in ('NAV') then 99 else srq.niveau_base end as ID_GROUPE
      
,case when srq.info in ('VL','PARTS') then srq.niveau_base + srq.num_lib_part + 
      Case when srq.info = 'PARTS' then dense_rank()over(partition by srq.CODE_PTF,srq.info,srq.CODE_PART order by srq.devise_diffusion) else srq.num_dev_diff_part end *2
      when srq.info in ('NAV') then 99 else srq.niveau_base end as ID_LIGNE

,'STAT_S'||srq.POSITION||srq.CODE_PART||srq.num_lib_part||srq.devise_diffusion||'L'||case when srq.info in ('VL','PARTS') then srq.niveau_base + srq.num_dev_diff_part else srq.niveau_base end
||'C'||srq.col||'D'||srq.num_date||'_'||case when srq.CODE_PTF is null then 'XXX'else srq.CODE_PTF end  as Nom_Bloc

,Case when srq.niveau_base in (1) and srq.info = 'LIB_PTF' then srq.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
      when srq.niveau_base in (2) and srq.info = 'LIB_PTFR' then srq.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION

      when srq.niveau_base = 3 and srq.info = 'DATE' and srq.num_date = 1 and srq.col = 0 and Type_Struct.Fcp_Sicav = 'FCP' then 'Number of units'
      when srq.niveau_base = 3 and srq.info = 'DATE' and srq.num_date = 1 and srq.col = 0 and Type_Struct.Fcp_Sicav = 'SICAV' then 'Number of shares'
      when srq.niveau_base = 3 and srq.info = 'DATE' and srq.num_date = 1 and srq.col in (1,2,3) and Type_Struct.Fcp_Sicav = 'FCP' then 'NAV per unit'
      when srq.niveau_base = 3 and srq.info = 'DATE' and srq.num_date = 1 and srq.col in (1,2,3) and Type_Struct.Fcp_Sicav = 'SICAV' then 'NAV per share'
      when srq.niveau_base = 3 and srq.info = 'DATE' and srq.num_date = 1 and srq.col in (4,5) then To_char(last_day(srq.date_rapport),'DD/MM/YY')
      when srq.niveau_base = 3 and srq.info = 'DATE' and srq.num_date > 1 then To_char(last_day(srq.date_rapport),'DD/MM/YY')
     
      when srq.niveau_base = 4 and srq.info = 'DATER' and srq.num_date = 1 and srq.col = 0 and Type_Struct.Fcp_Sicav = 'FCP' then 'Number of units'
      when srq.niveau_base = 4 and srq.info = 'DATER' and srq.num_date = 1 and srq.col = 0 and Type_Struct.Fcp_Sicav = 'SICAV' then 'Number of shares'
      when srq.niveau_base = 4 and srq.info = 'DATER' and srq.num_date = 1 and srq.col in (1,2,3) and Type_Struct.Fcp_Sicav = 'FCP' then 'NAV per unit'
      when srq.niveau_base = 4 and srq.info = 'DATER' and srq.num_date = 1 and srq.col in (1,2,3) and Type_Struct.Fcp_Sicav = 'SICAV' then 'NAV per share'
      when srq.niveau_base = 4 and srq.info = 'DATER' and srq.num_date = 1 and srq.col in (4,5) then To_char(last_day(srq.date_rapport),'DD/MM/YY')
      when srq.niveau_base = 4 and srq.info = 'DATER' and srq.num_date > 1 then To_char(last_day(srq.date_rapport),'DD/MM/YY')
    
      when srq.niveau_base = 10 and srq.info = 'VL' and srq.col = 0 then srq.LIBELLE_RAPPORT
      when srq.niveau_base = 10 and srq.info = 'VL' and srq.col = 1 then srq.CODE_ISIN 
      when srq.niveau_base = 10 and srq.info = 'PARTS' and srq.col = 2 then NVL(srq.VALEUR_AFFICHAGE,'-') -- ??:(
      when srq.niveau_base = 10 and srq.info = 'VL' and srq.col = 3 then srq.devise_diffusion
      when srq.niveau_base = 10 and srq.info = 'VL' and srq.col in (4,5,6) then NVL(srq.VALEUR_AFFICHAGE,'-') 

      when srq.niveau_base = 20 and srq.info = 'NAV' and srq.col = 0 then srq.DEVISE_PTF
      when srq.niveau_base = 20 and srq.info = 'NAV' and srq.col not in (0)  then NVL(srq.VALEUR_AFFICHAGE,'-')

      end as Valeur_Bloc
      
,case when srq.niveau_base = 1 and srq.info = 'LIB_PTF' then 'STATAMV2_N1' 
      when srq.niveau_base = 2 and srq.info = 'LIB_PTFR'then 'STATAMV2_N1B'
      when srq.niveau_base = 3 and srq.info = 'DATE'then 'STATAMV2_N3'
      when srq.niveau_base = 4 and srq.info = 'DATER'then 'STATAMV2_N3B'
      when srq.niveau_base = 10 then 'STATAMV2_N10'
      when srq.niveau_base = 20 then 'STATAMV2_N20'
      end as "TEMPLATE"

,Case When srq.niveau_base = 2 then 1
      When srq.niveau_base = 4 then 3
      else srq.niveau_base end as ROW_LEVEL
      
,1 AS ID_SECTION

                                      and pres.first_part = pres.LIBELLE_RAPPORT and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'

                                      and pres.DEVISE_PART = pres.devise_diffusion and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'
            when pres.niveau_base = 20 and pres.info = 'NAV' and pres.num_date = 2 and pres.col in (2)
                                      and pres.DEVISE_PART = pres.devise_diffusion and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'

                                      and pres.DEVISE_PART = pres.devise_diffusion and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'

      ,index_col.col

      (
        Select
          asgc.ID_STRUCTURE
          ,asgc.POSITION
          ,srq_part.CODE_PTF
          ,case when slb.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION is null then 'Mettre à jour le fichier des libelles' else slb.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION  end as FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
          ,srq_part.DEVISE_PTF
          ,first_value(srq_part.LIBELLE_RAPPORT) over (partition by srq_part.CODE_PTF order by srq_part.LIBELLE_RAPPORT rows between unbounded preceding and unbounded following) as first_part
          ,dense_rank()over(partition by srq_part.CODE_PTF order by srq_part.LIBELLE_RAPPORT,srq_part.CODE_PART) as num_lib_part
          ,srq_part.CODE_PART

          ,srq_part.LIBELLE_RAPPORT
          ,slb.DATE_FIN_COMPART 
          ,Case when slb.DATE_FIN_COMPART < to_date(?) then 'X' 
              Else null end as Presence_port
    
          From
          ( 
          Select distinct
            fichier.id_structure
            ,MBD.CODE_PTF
            ,MBD.DEVISE_PTF
            ,MBD.CODE_PART
            ,MBD.LIBELLE_PART as LIBELLE_RAPPORT
            ,substr(MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE,3,5) as DEVISE_PART
            ,MBD.DEVISE_PART as devise_diffusion
            ,MBD.TECHNIQUE_2 as CODE_ISIN
            ,MBD.TECHNIQUE_1 as Shadow
            ,MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
            ,Case when max(MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT)over(partition by MBD.CODE_PTF,MBD.CODE_PART) = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT then 'X' end as Good_label
          from
          qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD
              join 
               (select distinct
                  fic.id_structure
                  ,max(fic.ID_CHARGEMENT)over(partition by fic.DATE_RAPPORT) as ID_CHARGEMENT
                  ,fic.date_rapport
                  from 
                   qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX fic
                   join (Select
                  row_number() over (order by srqdat.DDate) as num_date
                  ,srqdat.DDate
                  from
                  (
                  (select 
                   -- last_day(:p_date_echeance) as DDate
                      to_date(?) as DDate
                      from dual
                  )
                  union
                  (
                  Select distinct
                      last_day(qs.date_echeance) as DDate
                       from
                       qxp.qxp_suivi qs
                       join qxp.qxp_asso_suivi_parametres qasp on qs.id_suivi = qasp.id_suivi
                       where            
                       qs.id_fnd_code = ?
                       and qs.id_type_rapport = 1
                       and qs.date_echeance <= add_months(to_date(?),-4)
                       and qs.date_echeance >= add_months(to_date(?),-28)
                       and qasp.id_parametre = 2
                  )
                  )srqdat
                   ) gabdate on fic.DATE_RAPPORT = gabdate.DDate --and fic.ID_GABARIT = gabdate.ID_GABARIT 
                   join qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD ON fic.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
                where 
                 fic.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                 and MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'STATS'
                 )fichier on fichier.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
           where 
               MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'STATS' 
               and MBD.GROUPE = 'VL'
               and MBD.TECHNIQUE_1 not in ('Tech')
           )srq_part  
          join qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc on srq_part.CODE_PTF = asgc.ID_FND_CODE 
          left join qxp_compartiment slb on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = slb.ID_FND_CODE 
          left join qxp.qxp_sup_mapping qsm on qsm.code_mapping_cible=asgc.id_fnd_code
              and qsm.type_mapping='MASTER-FEEDERS'
          where
          asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
          and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?  
          and srq_part.Good_label = 'X'
          and qsm.code_mapping_cible is null
              )parts,        
              (Select
              srq.ID_CHARGEMENT
              ,row_number() over (order by srq.date_rapport desc) as num_date
              ,srq.date_rapport
              from
              (
              select distinct
                      max(fic.ID_CHARGEMENT)over(partition by fic.DATE_RAPPORT) as ID_CHARGEMENT
                      ,fic.date_rapport
                      from 
                       qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX fic
                       join (Select
                      row_number() over (order by srqdat.DDate) as num_date
                      ,srqdat.DDate
                      from
                      (
                      (select 
                          -- last_day(:p_date_echeance) as DDate
                          to_date(?) as DDate
                          from dual
                      )
                      union
                      (
                      Select distinct
                          last_day(qs.date_echeance) as DDate
                           from
                           qxp.qxp_suivi qs
                           join qxp.qxp_asso_suivi_parametres qasp on qs.id_suivi = qasp.id_suivi
                           where            
                           qs.id_fnd_code = ?
                           and qs.id_type_rapport = 1
                           and qs.date_echeance <= add_months(to_date(?),-4)
                           and qs.date_echeance >= add_months(to_date(?),-28)
                           and qasp.id_parametre = 2
                      )
                      )srqdat
                       ) gabdate on fic.DATE_RAPPORT = gabdate.DDate
                       join qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD ON fic.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
                    where 
                     fic.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                     and MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'STATS'
              )srq     
              ) dat,        
                  (
              select 1 as niveau_base ,'LIB_PTF' as info from dual
              union  select 2 as niveau_base ,'LIB_PTFR' as info from dual
              union  select 3 as niveau_base ,'DATE' as info from dual
              union  select 4 as niveau_base ,'DATER' as info from dual
              union  select 10 as niveau_base ,'VL' as info from dual
              union  select 10 as niveau_base ,'PARTS' as info from dual
              union  select 20 as niveau_base ,'NAV' as info from dual
                  )niveau    ,
              -----  7 Colonnes par page    
                  (
              select 0 as col from dual
              union  select 1 as col from dual
              union  select 2 as col from dual 
              union  select 3 as col from dual
              union  select 4 as col from dual
              union  select 5 as col from dual 
              union  select 6 as col from dual
                  )index_col    
                   
      --------------------------- Cartesien Mise en place Tableau Fin    
      )pres
--     where 
--     pres.Presence_port is null
    
    )pres1
    left join
    ---- Restitution des données en base : debut
        ( 
     Select
          srq_mbd.date_rapport
          ,srq_mbd.ID_CHARGEMENT
          ,srq_mbd.ID_TABLEAU
          ,srq_mbd.CODE_PTF
          ,case when srq_mbd.GROUPE = 'NAV' then 'NAV' else srq_mbd.CODE_PART end as CODE_PART
     --     ,srq_mbd.CODE_PART
          ,srq_mbd.ID_RUBRIQUE
          ,srq_mbd.GROUPE
          ,srq_mbd.VALEUR
          ,srq_mbd.DEVISE_PTF

          ,srq_mbd.devise_diffusion
--          ,srq_mbd.doublon
          ,srq_mbd.CODE_ISIN

                     dense_rank()over(partition by srq_mbd.CODE_PTF,srq_mbd.GROUPE,srq_mbd.CODE_PART order by srq_mbd.devise_diffusion) 
                     else 1 end as num_dev_diff_part
          ,srq_mbd.LIBELLE_PART as LIBELLE_RAPPORT
          ,srq_mbd.VALEUR_AFFICHAGE
        from
        ( Select
          fichier.date_rapport
          ,MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
          ,MBD.ID_TABLEAU
          ,MBD.CODE_PTF
          ,MBD.CODE_FUSION
          ,MBD.CODE_PART
          ,MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE

          ,MBD.DEVISE_PART

          ,MBD.LIBELLE_PART

          ,MBD.TECHNIQUE_2 as CODE_ISIN

          qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD
              join 
               (select distinct
                  max(fic.ID_CHARGEMENT)over(partition by fic.DATE_RAPPORT) as ID_CHARGEMENT
                  ,fic.date_rapport
                  from 
                   qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX fic
                   join (Select
                      row_number() over (order by srqdat.DDate) as num_date
                      ,srqdat.DDate
                      from
                      (
                      (select 
                          -- last_day(:p_date_echeance) as DDate
                          to_date(?) as DDate
                          from dual
                      )
                      union
                      (
                      Select distinct
                          last_day(qs.date_echeance) as DDate
                           from
                           qxp.qxp_suivi qs
                           join qxp.qxp_asso_suivi_parametres qasp on qs.id_suivi = qasp.id_suivi
                           where            
                           qs.id_fnd_code = ?
                           --and qs.id_gabarit = :p_id_gabarit
                           and qs.id_type_rapport = 1
                           and qs.date_echeance <= add_months(to_date(?),-4)
                           and qs.date_echeance >= add_months(to_date(?),-28)
                           and qasp.id_parametre = 2
                      )
                      )srqdat
                   ) gabdate on fic.DATE_RAPPORT = gabdate.DDate --and fic.ID_GABARIT = gabdate.ID_GABARIT 
                   join qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD ON fic.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
                where 
                 fic.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                 and MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'STATS'
                 )fichier on fichier.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
           where 
           MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'STATS'
           and MBD.TECHNIQUE_1 not in ('Tech')
        )srq_mbd   
     
        )donnees on pres1.CODE_PTF = donnees.CODE_PTF
               and pres1.date_rapport = donnees.date_rapport 
               and pres1.info = donnees.GROUPE  
               and pres1.code_part = donnees.code_part
               and pres1.num_dev_diff_part = donnees.num_dev_diff_part
     
     ---- Restitution des données en base : Fin
     where
     pres1.Presence = 'X'

)srq 
 
left join ( select 
            lplp.id_structure
            ,lplp.id_groupe as Fcp_Sicav
            from
            qxp.QXP_SUP_LUX_PARAM_LIB_PART lplp
            where 
            lplp.id_structure = ?)Type_Struct on Type_Struct.id_structure = srq.id_structure
 
 where 1=1    
	and    
        (
        srq.POSITION = 71 and NUM_LIB_PART > 2 /*Compartiment et part de départ*/
        or(srq.POSITION = 71 and srq.niveau_base=1 and srq.info= 'LIB_PTF') 
            or (srq.POSITION = 71 and srq.niveau_base=2 and srq.info= 'LIB_PTFR') /*Reprise du nom du compartiment*/
        or (srq.POSITION = 71 and srq.niveau_base=3 and srq.info = 'DATE') 
            or (srq.POSITION = 71 and srq.niveau_base=4 and srq.info = 'DATER') /*Reprise des entetes du compartiment*/
        or (srq.POSITION =71 and LIBELLE_RAPPORT='ZZZ_NAV') /*Totalisations du compartiment*/
        or srq.POSITION > 70 /*Données suivantes*/
        )
 
 ORDER BY 
srq.POSITION
,srq.LIBELLE_RAPPORT
,srq.num_lib_part
,srq.niveau_base
,Case when srq.info = 'PARTS' then dense_rank()over(partition by srq.CODE_PTF,srq.info,srq.CODE_PART order by srq.devise_diffusion) else srq.num_dev_diff_part end
--,srq.num_dev_diff_part
,srq.num_date
,srq.col]; ORA-01830: date format picture ends before converting entire input string

      when srq.info in ('NAV') then 99 else srq.niveau_base end as ID_GROUPE
      
,case when srq.info in ('VL','PARTS') then srq.niveau_base + srq.num_lib_part + 
      Case when srq.info = 'PARTS' then dense_rank()over(partition by srq.CODE_PTF,srq.info,srq.CODE_PART order by srq.devise_diffusion) else srq.num_dev_diff_part end *2
      when srq.info in ('NAV') then 99 else srq.niveau_base end as ID_LIGNE

,'STAT_S'||srq.POSITION||srq.CODE_PART||srq.num_lib_part||srq.devise_diffusion||'L'||case when srq.info in ('VL','PARTS') then srq.niveau_base + srq.num_dev_diff_part else srq.niveau_base end
||'C'||srq.col||'D'||srq.num_date||'_'||case when srq.CODE_PTF is null then 'XXX'else srq.CODE_PTF end  as Nom_Bloc

,Case when srq.niveau_base in (1) and srq.info = 'LIB_PTF' then srq.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
      when srq.niveau_base in (2) and srq.info = 'LIB_PTFR' then srq.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION

      when srq.niveau_base = 3 and srq.info = 'DATE' and srq.num_date = 1 and srq.col = 0 and Type_Struct.Fcp_Sicav = 'FCP' then 'Number of units'
      when srq.niveau_base = 3 and srq.info = 'DATE' and srq.num_date = 1 and srq.col = 0 and Type_Struct.Fcp_Sicav = 'SICAV' then 'Number of shares'
      when srq.niveau_base = 3 and srq.info = 'DATE' and srq.num_date = 1 and srq.col in (1,2,3) and Type_Struct.Fcp_Sicav = 'FCP' then 'NAV per unit'
      when srq.niveau_base = 3 and srq.info = 'DATE' and srq.num_date = 1 and srq.col in (1,2,3) and Type_Struct.Fcp_Sicav = 'SICAV' then 'NAV per share'
      when srq.niveau_base = 3 and srq.info = 'DATE' and srq.num_date = 1 and srq.col in (4,5) then To_char(last_day(srq.date_rapport),'DD/MM/YY')
      when srq.niveau_base = 3 and srq.info = 'DATE' and srq.num_date > 1 then To_char(last_day(srq.date_rapport),'DD/MM/YY')
     
      when srq.niveau_base = 4 and srq.info = 'DATER' and srq.num_date = 1 and srq.col = 0 and Type_Struct.Fcp_Sicav = 'FCP' then 'Number of units'
      when srq.niveau_base = 4 and srq.info = 'DATER' and srq.num_date = 1 and srq.col = 0 and Type_Struct.Fcp_Sicav = 'SICAV' then 'Number of shares'
      when srq.niveau_base = 4 and srq.info = 'DATER' and srq.num_date = 1 and srq.col in (1,2,3) and Type_Struct.Fcp_Sicav = 'FCP' then 'NAV per unit'
      when srq.niveau_base = 4 and srq.info = 'DATER' and srq.num_date = 1 and srq.col in (1,2,3) and Type_Struct.Fcp_Sicav = 'SICAV' then 'NAV per share'
      when srq.niveau_base = 4 and srq.info = 'DATER' and srq.num_date = 1 and srq.col in (4,5) then To_char(last_day(srq.date_rapport),'DD/MM/YY')
      when srq.niveau_base = 4 and srq.info = 'DATER' and srq.num_date > 1 then To_char(last_day(srq.date_rapport),'DD/MM/YY')
    
      when srq.niveau_base = 10 and srq.info = 'VL' and srq.col = 0 then srq.LIBELLE_RAPPORT
      when srq.niveau_base = 10 and srq.info = 'VL' and srq.col = 1 then srq.CODE_ISIN 
      when srq.niveau_base = 10 and srq.info = 'PARTS' and srq.col = 2 then NVL(srq.VALEUR_AFFICHAGE,'-') -- ??:(
      when srq.niveau_base = 10 and srq.info = 'VL' and srq.col = 3 then srq.devise_diffusion
      when srq.niveau_base = 10 and srq.info = 'VL' and srq.col in (4,5,6) then NVL(srq.VALEUR_AFFICHAGE,'-') 

      when srq.niveau_base = 20 and srq.info = 'NAV' and srq.col = 0 then srq.DEVISE_PTF
      when srq.niveau_base = 20 and srq.info = 'NAV' and srq.col not in (0)  then NVL(srq.VALEUR_AFFICHAGE,'-')

      end as Valeur_Bloc
      
,case when srq.niveau_base = 1 and srq.info = 'LIB_PTF' then 'STATAMV2_N1' 
      when srq.niveau_base = 2 and srq.info = 'LIB_PTFR'then 'STATAMV2_N1B'
      when srq.niveau_base = 3 and srq.info = 'DATE'then 'STATAMV2_N3'
      when srq.niveau_base = 4 and srq.info = 'DATER'then 'STATAMV2_N3B'
      when srq.niveau_base = 10 then 'STATAMV2_N10'
      when srq.niveau_base = 20 then 'STATAMV2_N20'
      end as "TEMPLATE"

,Case When srq.niveau_base = 2 then 1
      When srq.niveau_base = 4 then 3
      else srq.niveau_base end as ROW_LEVEL
      
,1 AS ID_SECTION      

from

    (Select
    pres1.ID_STRUCTURE
    ,pres1.POSITION
    ,pres1.CODE_PTF
    ,pres1.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
    ,pres1.DEVISE_PTF
    ,pres1.DATE_FIN_COMPART 
    ,pres1.num_date
    ,pres1.date_rapport
    ,pres1.CODE_PART
    ,pres1.CODE_ISIN
    ,pres1.first_part
    ,pres1.DEVISE_PART
    ,pres1.devise_diffusion
    ,pres1.Shadow
    ,pres1.NbDevPart
    ,pres1.num_dev_diff_part
    ,pres1.num_lib_part
    ,pres1.LIBELLE_RAPPORT
    ,pres1.niveau_base
    ,pres1.info
    ,pres1.col
    ,donnees.CODE_PTF as code_ptf_mbd
    ,donnees.DEVISE_PTF as devise_ptf_mbd
    ,donnees.CODE_PART as code_part_mbd
    ,donnees.ID_RUBRIQUE
    ,donnees.DEVISE_PART as devise_part_mbd
    ,donnees.devise_diffusion as devise_diff_mbd
    ,donnees.num_dev_diff_part as num_dev_diff_part_mbd
    ,donnees.GROUPE
    ,donnees.VALEUR_AFFICHAGE
    ,pres1.Presence
    
    from
      (
      Select
      pres.ID_STRUCTURE
      ,pres.POSITION
      ,pres.CODE_PTF
      ,pres.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
      ,pres.DEVISE_PTF
      ,pres.DATE_FIN_COMPART 
      ,pres.Presence_port
      ,pres.num_date
      ,pres.date_rapport
      ,pres.CODE_PART
      ,pres.CODE_ISIN
      ,pres.first_part
      ,pres.DEVISE_PART
      ,pres.devise_diffusion
      ,pres.Shadow
      ,pres.NbDevPart
      -- Modification des position de devises de diffusion
      ,case when pres.info = 'VL' then pres.num_dev_diff_part else 1 end as num_dev_diff_part  
    
      ,pres.num_lib_part
      ,pres.LIBELLE_RAPPORT
      ,pres.niveau_base
      ,pres.info
      ,pres.col
            
      ,case when pres.niveau_base = 1 and pres.info = 'LIB_PTF' and pres.num_date = 1 and pres.num_dev_diff_part = 1 and pres.col = 0
                                      and pres.first_part = pres.LIBELLE_RAPPORT and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'
    
            when pres.niveau_base = 2 and pres.info = 'LIB_PTFR' and pres.num_date = 1 and pres.num_dev_diff_part = 1 and pres.col = 0
                                      and pres.first_part = pres.LIBELLE_RAPPORT and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'
            -- on prend toutes les colonnes pour gerer les libellés Share ou Units !!!
            when pres.niveau_base = 3 and pres.info = 'DATE' and pres.num_date = 1 and pres.num_dev_diff_part = 1 and pres.col in (0,1,2,3,4,5)
                                      and pres.first_part = pres.LIBELLE_RAPPORT and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'
            when pres.niveau_base = 3 and pres.info = 'DATE' and pres.num_date = 2 and pres.num_dev_diff_part = 1 and pres.col in (2)
                                      and pres.first_part = pres.LIBELLE_RAPPORT and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'                                   
            when pres.niveau_base = 3 and pres.info = 'DATE' and pres.num_date = 3 and pres.num_dev_diff_part = 1 and pres.col in (3)
                                      and pres.first_part = pres.LIBELLE_RAPPORT and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'
    
            when pres.niveau_base = 4 and pres.info = 'DATER' and pres.num_date = 1 and pres.num_dev_diff_part = 1 and pres.col in (0,1,2,3,4,5)
                                      and pres.first_part = pres.LIBELLE_RAPPORT and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'
            when pres.niveau_base = 4 and pres.info = 'DATER' and pres.num_date = 2 and pres.num_dev_diff_part = 1 and pres.col in (2)
                                      and pres.first_part = pres.LIBELLE_RAPPORT and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'                                   
            when pres.niveau_base = 4 and pres.info = 'DATER' and pres.num_date = 3 and pres.num_dev_diff_part = 1 and pres.col in (3)
                                      and pres.first_part = pres.LIBELLE_RAPPORT and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'
    
            when pres.niveau_base = 10 and pres.info = 'VL' and pres.num_date = 1 and pres.col in (0,1,3,4)then 'X'
            when pres.niveau_base = 10 and pres.info = 'PARTS' and pres.num_date = 1 and pres.col in (2)then 'X'
            when pres.niveau_base = 10 and pres.info = 'VL' and pres.num_date = 2 and pres.col in (5)then 'X'
            when pres.niveau_base = 10 and pres.info = 'VL' and pres.num_date = 3 and pres.col in (6)then 'X'
            -- and pres.num_dev_diff_part = 1
    
            when pres.niveau_base = 20 and pres.info = 'NAV' and pres.num_date = 1 and pres.col in (0,1)
                                      and pres.DEVISE_PART = pres.devise_diffusion and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'
            when pres.niveau_base = 20 and pres.info = 'NAV' and pres.num_date = 2 and pres.col in (2)
                                      and pres.DEVISE_PART = pres.devise_diffusion and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'
            when pres.niveau_base = 20 and pres.info = 'NAV' and pres.num_date = 3 and pres.col in (3)
                                      and pres.DEVISE_PART = pres.devise_diffusion and pres.num_lib_part = 1 then 'X'
            end as Presence
      
      from
      (
      --------------------------- Cartesien Mise en place Tableau Debut
      Select
      parts.ID_STRUCTURE
      ,parts.POSITION
      ,parts.CODE_PTF
      ,parts.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
      ,parts.DEVISE_PTF
      ,parts.DATE_FIN_COMPART 
      ,parts.Presence_port
      ,dat.num_date
      ,dat.date_rapport
      ,Case when niveau.info = 'NAV' then 'NAV' else parts.CODE_PART end as Code_Part
      ,parts.CODE_ISIN
      ,parts.first_part
      ,parts.DEVISE_PART
      ,parts.devise_diffusion
      ,parts.Shadow
      ,parts.NbDevPart
      ,parts.num_dev_diff_part
      ,parts.num_lib_part
      -- ,parts.LIBELLE_RAPPORT
      ,Case when niveau.info = 'NAV' then 'ZZZ_NAV' else parts.LIBELLE_RAPPORT end as LIBELLE_RAPPORT
      ,niveau.niveau_base
      ,niveau.info
      ,index_col.col

      from
      (
        Select
          asgc.ID_STRUCTURE
          ,asgc.POSITION
          ,srq_part.CODE_PTF
          ,case when slb.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION is null then 'Mettre à jour le fichier des libelles' else slb.FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION  end as FND_LNG_DESCRIPTION
          ,srq_part.DEVISE_PTF
          ,first_value(srq_part.LIBELLE_RAPPORT) over (partition by srq_part.CODE_PTF order by srq_part.LIBELLE_RAPPORT rows between unbounded preceding and unbounded following) as first_part
          ,dense_rank()over(partition by srq_part.CODE_PTF order by srq_part.LIBELLE_RAPPORT,srq_part.CODE_PART) as num_lib_part
          ,srq_part.CODE_PART
          ,srq_part.CODE_ISIN
          ,srq_part.DEVISE_PART
          ,srq_part.devise_diffusion
          ,srq_part.Shadow
          ,count(srq_part.DEVISE_PART)over(partition by srq_part.CODE_PTF,srq_part.CODE_PART) as NbDevPart
          ,dense_rank()over(partition by srq_part.CODE_PTF,srq_part.CODE_PART,srq_part.DEVISE_PART order by srq_part.devise_diffusion) as num_dev_diff_part
          ,srq_part.LIBELLE_RAPPORT
          ,slb.DATE_FIN_COMPART 
          ,Case when slb.DATE_FIN_COMPART < to_date(?) then 'X' 
              Else null end as Presence_port
    
          From
          ( 
          Select distinct
            fichier.id_structure
            ,MBD.CODE_PTF
            ,MBD.DEVISE_PTF
            ,MBD.CODE_PART
            ,MBD.LIBELLE_PART as LIBELLE_RAPPORT
            ,substr(MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE,3,5) as DEVISE_PART
            ,MBD.DEVISE_PART as devise_diffusion
            ,MBD.TECHNIQUE_2 as CODE_ISIN
            ,MBD.TECHNIQUE_1 as Shadow
            ,MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
            ,Case when max(MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT)over(partition by MBD.CODE_PTF,MBD.CODE_PART) = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT then 'X' end as Good_label
          from
          qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD
              join 
               (select distinct
                  fic.id_structure
                  ,max(fic.ID_CHARGEMENT)over(partition by fic.DATE_RAPPORT) as ID_CHARGEMENT
                  ,fic.date_rapport
                  from 
                   qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX fic
                   join (Select
                  row_number() over (order by srqdat.DDate) as num_date
                  ,srqdat.DDate
                  from
                  (
                  (select 
                   -- last_day(:p_date_echeance) as DDate
                      to_date(?) as DDate
                      from dual
                  )
                  union
                  (
                  Select distinct
                      last_day(qs.date_echeance) as DDate
                       from
                       qxp.qxp_suivi qs
                       join qxp.qxp_asso_suivi_parametres qasp on qs.id_suivi = qasp.id_suivi
                       where            
                       qs.id_fnd_code = ?
                       and qs.id_type_rapport = 1
                       and qs.date_echeance <= add_months(to_date(?),-4)
                       and qs.date_echeance >= add_months(to_date(?),-28)
                       and qasp.id_parametre = 2
                  )
                  )srqdat
                   ) gabdate on fic.DATE_RAPPORT = gabdate.DDate --and fic.ID_GABARIT = gabdate.ID_GABARIT 
                   join qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD ON fic.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
                where 
                 fic.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                 and MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'STATS'
                 )fichier on fichier.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
           where 
               MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'STATS' 
               and MBD.GROUPE = 'VL'
               and MBD.TECHNIQUE_1 not in ('Tech')
           )srq_part  
          join qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp asgc on srq_part.CODE_PTF = asgc.ID_FND_CODE 
          left join qxp_compartiment slb on asgc.ID_FND_CODE = slb.ID_FND_CODE 
          left join qxp.qxp_sup_mapping qsm on qsm.code_mapping_cible=asgc.id_fnd_code
              and qsm.type_mapping='MASTER-FEEDERS'
          where
          asgc.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
          and asgc.ID_GABARIT = ?  
          and srq_part.Good_label = 'X'
          and qsm.code_mapping_cible is null
              )parts,        
              (Select
              srq.ID_CHARGEMENT
              ,row_number() over (order by srq.date_rapport desc) as num_date
              ,srq.date_rapport
              from
              (
              select distinct
                      max(fic.ID_CHARGEMENT)over(partition by fic.DATE_RAPPORT) as ID_CHARGEMENT
                      ,fic.date_rapport
                      from 
                       qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX fic
                       join (Select
                      row_number() over (order by srqdat.DDate) as num_date
                      ,srqdat.DDate
                      from
                      (
                      (select 
                          -- last_day(:p_date_echeance) as DDate
                          to_date(?) as DDate
                          from dual
                      )
                      union
                      (
                      Select distinct
                          last_day(qs.date_echeance) as DDate
                           from
                           qxp.qxp_suivi qs
                           join qxp.qxp_asso_suivi_parametres qasp on qs.id_suivi = qasp.id_suivi
                           where            
                           qs.id_fnd_code = ?
                           and qs.id_type_rapport = 1
                           and qs.date_echeance <= add_months(to_date(?),-4)
                           and qs.date_echeance >= add_months(to_date(?),-28)
                           and qasp.id_parametre = 2
                      )
                      )srqdat
                       ) gabdate on fic.DATE_RAPPORT = gabdate.DDate
                       join qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD ON fic.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
                    where 
                     fic.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                     and MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'STATS'
              )srq     
              ) dat,        
                  (
              select 1 as niveau_base ,'LIB_PTF' as info from dual
              union  select 2 as niveau_base ,'LIB_PTFR' as info from dual
              union  select 3 as niveau_base ,'DATE' as info from dual
              union  select 4 as niveau_base ,'DATER' as info from dual
              union  select 10 as niveau_base ,'VL' as info from dual
              union  select 10 as niveau_base ,'PARTS' as info from dual
              union  select 20 as niveau_base ,'NAV' as info from dual
                  )niveau    ,
              -----  7 Colonnes par page    
                  (
              select 0 as col from dual
              union  select 1 as col from dual
              union  select 2 as col from dual 
              union  select 3 as col from dual
              union  select 4 as col from dual
              union  select 5 as col from dual 
              union  select 6 as col from dual
                  )index_col    
                   
      --------------------------- Cartesien Mise en place Tableau Fin    
      )pres
--     where 
--     pres.Presence_port is null
    
    )pres1
    left join
    ---- Restitution des données en base : debut
        ( 
     Select
          srq_mbd.date_rapport
          ,srq_mbd.ID_CHARGEMENT
          ,srq_mbd.ID_TABLEAU
          ,srq_mbd.CODE_PTF
          ,case when srq_mbd.GROUPE = 'NAV' then 'NAV' else srq_mbd.CODE_PART end as CODE_PART
     --     ,srq_mbd.CODE_PART
          ,srq_mbd.ID_RUBRIQUE
          ,srq_mbd.GROUPE
          ,srq_mbd.VALEUR
          ,srq_mbd.DEVISE_PTF
          ,srq_mbd.DEVISE_PART
          ,srq_mbd.devise_diffusion
--          ,srq_mbd.doublon
          ,srq_mbd.CODE_ISIN
          ,case when srq_mbd.GROUPE = 'VL' then 
                     dense_rank()over(partition by srq_mbd.CODE_PTF,srq_mbd.GROUPE,srq_mbd.CODE_PART order by srq_mbd.devise_diffusion) 
                     else 1 end as num_dev_diff_part
          ,srq_mbd.LIBELLE_PART as LIBELLE_RAPPORT
          ,srq_mbd.VALEUR_AFFICHAGE
        from
        ( Select
          fichier.date_rapport
          ,MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
          ,MBD.ID_TABLEAU
          ,MBD.CODE_PTF
          ,MBD.CODE_FUSION
          ,MBD.CODE_PART
          ,MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE
          ,MBD.GROUPE
          ,MBD.VALEUR
          ,MBD.DEVISE_PTF
          ,MBD.DEVISE_PART
          ,case when substr(MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE,1,1)= 'A'then substr(MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE,3,5) else MBD.DEVISE_PART end as devise_diffusion
--          ,case when MBD.GROUPE = 'VL' and substr(MBD.ID_RUBRIQUE,3,5) <> MBD.DEVISE_PART then 'X'end as doublon
          ,MBD.LIBELLE_PART
          ,MBD.VALEUR_AFFICHAGE
          ,MBD.TECHNIQUE_1 
          ,MBD.TECHNIQUE_2 as CODE_ISIN
          
          from
          qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD
              join 
               (select distinct
                  max(fic.ID_CHARGEMENT)over(partition by fic.DATE_RAPPORT) as ID_CHARGEMENT
                  ,fic.date_rapport
                  from 
                   qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX fic
                   join (Select
                      row_number() over (order by srqdat.DDate) as num_date
                      ,srqdat.DDate
                      from
                      (
                      (select 
                          -- last_day(:p_date_echeance) as DDate
                          to_date(?) as DDate
                          from dual
                      )
                      union
                      (
                      Select distinct
                          last_day(qs.date_echeance) as DDate
                           from
                           qxp.qxp_suivi qs
                           join qxp.qxp_asso_suivi_parametres qasp on qs.id_suivi = qasp.id_suivi
                           where            
                           qs.id_fnd_code = ?
                           --and qs.id_gabarit = :p_id_gabarit
                           and qs.id_type_rapport = 1
                           and qs.date_echeance <= add_months(to_date(?),-4)
                           and qs.date_echeance >= add_months(to_date(?),-28)
                           and qasp.id_parametre = 2
                      )
                      )srqdat
                   ) gabdate on fic.DATE_RAPPORT = gabdate.DDate --and fic.ID_GABARIT = gabdate.ID_GABARIT 
                   join qxp.QXP_IMPORT_LUX_DATA MBD ON fic.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
                where 
                 fic.ID_STRUCTURE = ?
                 and MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'STATS'
                 )fichier on fichier.ID_CHARGEMENT = MBD.ID_CHARGEMENT
           where 
           MBD.ID_TABLEAU = 'STATS'
           and MBD.TECHNIQUE_1 not in ('Tech')
        )srq_mbd   
     
        )donnees on pres1.CODE_PTF = donnees.CODE_PTF
               and pres1.date_rapport = donnees.date_rapport 
               and pres1.info = donnees.GROUPE  
               and pres1.code_part = donnees.code_part
               and pres1.num_dev_diff_part = donnees.num_dev_diff_part
     
     ---- Restitution des données en base : Fin
     where
     pres1.Presence = 'X'

)srq 
 
left join ( select 
            lplp.id_structure
            ,lplp.id_groupe as Fcp_Sicav
            from
            qxp.QXP_SUP_LUX_PARAM_LIB_PART lplp
            where 
            lplp.id_structure = ?)Type_Struct on Type_Struct.id_structure = srq.id_structure
 
 where 1=1    
	and    
        (
        srq.POSITION = 71 and NUM_LIB_PART > 2 /*Compartiment et part de départ*/
        or(srq.POSITION = 71 and srq.niveau_base=1 and srq.info= 'LIB_PTF') 
            or (srq.POSITION = 71 and srq.niveau_base=2 and srq.info= 'LIB_PTFR') /*Reprise du nom du compartiment*/
        or (srq.POSITION = 71 and srq.niveau_base=3 and srq.info = 'DATE') 
            or (srq.POSITION = 71 and srq.niveau_base=4 and srq.info = 'DATER') /*Reprise des entetes du compartiment*/
        or (srq.POSITION =71 and LIBELLE_RAPPORT='ZZZ_NAV') /*Totalisations du compartiment*/
        or srq.POSITION > 70 /*Données suivantes*/
        )
 
 ORDER BY 
srq.POSITION
,srq.LIBELLE_RAPPORT
,srq.num_lib_part
,srq.niveau_base
,Case when srq.info = 'PARTS' then dense_rank()over(partition by srq.CODE_PTF,srq.info,srq.CODE_PART order by srq.devise_diffusion) else srq.num_dev_diff_part end
--,srq.num_dev_diff_part
,srq.num_date

2026-06-27T07:18:36.291+05:30 ERROR 15080 --- [quark-engine-service] [nio-8080-exec-2] [b81aaabf5ef12b37f8da9614b6d9dc8f-413ffd0b28168757] c.s.s.a.q.e.i.d.i.DynamicQueryPortImpl   : DynamicQueryPort SQL execution failed: PreparedStatementCallback; SQL [/* Amundi Fund EN - Notes des dividendes */
select
    niveau--,rupture_compartiment_desc,rupture_class_desc,rupture_compartiment_asc,rupture_class_asc
    ,id_ligne id_groupe
    ,id_ligne
    ,row_number() over(partition by id_ligne order by id_colonne_tmp)id_colonne
    ,'DIST_N'||replace(niveau,'N')||'L'||id_ligne||'C'||id_colonne_tmp nom_bloc
    /*Valeur Bloc*/
    ,decode(niveau||'-'||id_colonne_tmp
            ,'N00-1','##'
            ,'N01-1',null
            ,'N01b-1',null
            ,'N02-1',case when rupture_compartiment_asc =1 then fnd_lng_description||nvl2(date_fin_compart,'*',null) end
            ,'N02-2',case 
                        when rupture_class_asc =1 then 
                            case
                                when id_structure in '_P0_05' then initcap(unit_lng_description)
                                else unit_lng_description 
                                end
                        end
            ,'N02-3',case when rupture_class_asc =1 then dvd_settl_cur end
            ,'N02-4',case when rupture_class_asc =1 then unit_id_ins_code end
            ,'N02-5',to_char(id_dvd_ex_date,'dd/mm/yyyy','nls_date_language=english')
            ,'N02-6',to_char(dvd_value_date,'dd/mm/yyyy','nls_date_language=english')
            ,'N02-7',to_char(dvd_net_unit,'FM9G999G999G999G999G999G990D0000','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''. ')
           ) as valeur_bloc
     ,'DIST_'||niveau
             ||case
                  when niveau='N02' then
                      /*Détermine le modèle du template pour affichage des filets de rupture*/
                      case
                          when rupture_compartiment_desc=1 and rupture_class_desc=1 then '_M3'
                              ||case
                                    when rupture_compartiment_asc=1 and rupture_class_asc=1 then '_1'
                                    when rupture_compartiment_asc>1 and rupture_class_asc=1 then '_2'
                                    when rupture_compartiment_asc>1 and rupture_class_asc>1 then '_3'
                                    end
                          when rupture_compartiment_desc>1 and rupture_class_desc=1 then  '_M2'
                              ||case
                                    when rupture_compartiment_asc=1 and rupture_class_asc=1 then '_1'
                                    when rupture_compartiment_asc>1 and rupture_class_asc=1 then '_2'
                                    when rupture_compartiment_asc>1 and rupture_class_asc>1 then '_3'
                                    end
                          when rupture_compartiment_desc>1 and rupture_class_desc>1 then  '_M1'
                              ||case
                                    when rupture_compartiment_asc=1 and rupture_class_asc=1 then '_1'
                                    when rupture_compartiment_asc>1 and rupture_class_asc=1 then '_2'
                                    when rupture_compartiment_asc>1 and rupture_class_asc>1 then '_3'
                                    end
                          end
                  end as "TEMPLATE"
     ,case
        when (niveau ='N02' and rupture_class_asc=2 and rupture_class_desc=1)
             or (niveau ='N02' and rupture_compartiment_asc=2 and rupture_compartiment_desc=1) then 1
        end row_level
     /*Données de DATA_STORAGE*/
     /*DESCRIPTION_BLOC*/
     ,decode(niveau||'-'||id_colonne_tmp
            ,'N00-1','Titre de la note'
            ,'N01-1','Entete de colonnes'
            ,'N01b-1','Entete de colonnes - Page break'
            ,'N02-1','Détail - Nom de compartiment'
            ,'N02-2','Détail - Nom de part'
            ,'N02-3','Détail - Devise'
            ,'N02-4','Détail - Code ISIN'
            ,'N02-5','Détail - Dates de détachement'
            ,'N02-6','Détail - Dates de paiement'
            ,'N02-7','Détail - Dividende unitaire'
            ) as description_bloc
     /*INFO_BLOC*/    
    ,'[ga]'||?||'[/ga]'
         ||'[st]'||id_structure||'[/st]'
         ||'[dt]'||?||'[/dt]'
         ||'[fd]'||
         case
             when niveau in ('N02') then id_fnd_code
             end ||'[/fd]'
         ||'[tl][/tl]'
         ||'[tb]DIV_DIST[/tb]'
         ||'[co]'||id_colonne_tmp||'[/co]'
         ||'[li]'||id_ligne||'[/li]'
         ||'[gr]'||id_ligne||'[/gr]'
         ||'[ni]'||niveau||'[/ni]'
         ||'[vb][/vb]'
        ||'[ic][/ic]'
            as info_bloc
from
    (
    select
        dense_rank() over(order by niveau, rupture_tableau_asc) id_ligne
        ,srq4.*
        ,srq3.*
    from
        (
        /*Titre de la note*/
        select 'N00' as niveau, 1 as id_colonne_tmp from dual
        union
        /*Entête tableau*/
        select 'N01', 1 from dual 
        union
        /*Entête tableau - Page break*/
        select 'N01b', 1 from dual 
        union
        /*Ligne détail*/
        select 'N02', 1 from dual union select 'N02', 2 from dual union select 'N02', 3 from dual union select 'N02', 4 from dual union select 'N02', 5 from dual union select 'N02', 6 from dual union select 'N02', 7 from dual
        )srq4
        ,
        (
        select
            row_number() over(partition by srq2.id_structure order by srq2.position,srq2.unit_lng_description,srq2.dvd_settl_cur,srq2.id_dvd_ex_date,srq2.dvd_value_date) rupture_tableau_asc
            ,row_number() over(partition by srq2.position order by srq2.unit_lng_description,srq2.dvd_settl_cur,srq2.id_dvd_ex_date,srq2.dvd_value_date) rupture_compartiment_asc
            ,row_number() over(partition by srq2.position order by srq2.unit_lng_description desc,srq2.dvd_settl_cur desc,srq2.id_dvd_ex_date desc,srq2.dvd_value_date desc) rupture_compartiment_desc
            ,row_number() over(partition by srq2.position, srq2.unit_lng_description order by srq2.dvd_settl_cur,srq2.id_dvd_ex_date,srq2.dvd_value_date) rupture_class_asc
            ,row_number() over(partition by srq2.position, srq2.unit_lng_description order by srq2.dvd_settl_cur desc,srq2.id_dvd_ex_date desc,srq2.dvd_value_date desc) rupture_class_desc
            ,srq2.*
        from
            (
            select
                srq1.id_structure
                ,srq1.libelle_long libelle_long_structure
                ,srq1.id_fnd_code
                ,srq1.fnd_lng_description
                ,srq1.position
                ,srq1.date_fin_compart
                ,srq1.fnd_currency
                ,srq1.id_neve_nav_date
                ,srq1.id_dvd_unit
                ,srq1.unit_id_ins_code
                ,srq1.unit_sht_description
                ,srq1.unit_lng_description
                ,srq1.id_dvd_ex_date
                ,srq1.dvd_value_date
                ,srq1.dvd_net_unit
                ,srq1.dvd_settl_cur
            from
                (
                select
                    srq0.id_structure
                    ,srq0.libelle_long
                    ,srq0.id_fnd_code
                    ,srq0.position
                    ,srq0.date_fin_compart
                    ,srq0.fnd_lng_description
                    ,srq0.id_neve_nav_date
                    ,srq0.fnd_currency
                    ,srq0.id_dvd_dividend_number
                    ,srq0.id_dvd_unit
                    ,srq0.dvd_settl_cur
                    ,srq0.dvd_net_unit
                    ,srq0.dvd_net_total
                    ,srq0.id_dvd_ex_date
                    ,srq0.dvd_value_date
                    ,srq0.dvd_nature
                    ,srq0.unit_id_ins_code
                    ,srq0.unit_sht_description
                    ,srq0.unit_lng_description
                from
                    (
                    /*Requete brute GP3*/
                    select
                        qs.id_structure
                        ,qs.libelle_long
                        ,qasgc.position
                        ,rf.id_fnd_code
                        ,qc.date_fin_compart
                        ,srq_tmp.id_neve_nav_date_debut id_neve_nav_date
                        ,nvl(replace(qc.fnd_lng_description,qs.libelle_long||' - '),qasgc.id_fnd_code||' - #Libellé compartiment absent#')fnd_lng_description
                        ,rf.fnd_inv_policy
                        ,rf.fnd_currency
                        ,hfd.*
                        ,ru.unit_id_ins_code
                        ,ru.unit_sht_description
                        ,replace(replace(replace(replace(upper(trim(ru.unit_lng_description)),'CLASS '),'  ',' '),'( ','('),' )',')') unit_lng_description
                        ,ru.unit_lng_description unit_lng_description_old
-- select * 
                    from
                        qxp.qxp_structure qs
                    join qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc on qs.id_structure=qasgc.id_structure
                        and qasgc.id_structure = ?
                        and qasgc.id_gabarit = ?
                    join qxp.qxp_gabarit qg on qg.id_gabarit=qasgc.id_gabarit
                    join owb_dwh.ref_fund rf on qasgc.id_fnd_code=rf.id_fnd_code
                             and rf.fnd_end_validity='31/12/2199'
                    left join qxp.qxp_compartiment qc on qc.id_fnd_code=qasgc.id_fnd_code
                    join owb_dwh.his_fund_dividend hfd on qasgc.id_fnd_code=hfd.id_dvd_fund_code
                    join owb_dwh.ref_unit ru on hfd.id_dvd_fund_code=ru.id_unit_fund_code
                            and hfd.id_dvd_unit=ru.id_unit_code
                            and ru.unit_end_validity='31/12/2199'
                    join
                        (
                        select
                            srq_tmp2.id_fnd_code
                            ,max(srq_tmp2.id_neve_nav_date_debut)id_neve_nav_date_debut
                            ,max(srq_tmp2.id_neve_nav_date_fin)id_neve_nav_date_fin
                        from
                            (
                            select
                                rf.id_fnd_code
                                ,rf.fnd_last_fiscal_year_end+1 id_neve_nav_date_debut
                                ,max(ne.id_neve_nav_date) over(partition by rf.id_fnd_code) id_neve_nav_date_fin
                            from
                                qxp.qxp_structure qs
                                join qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc on qs.id_structure=qasgc.id_structure
                                     and qasgc.id_structure = ?
                                     and qasgc.id_gabarit = ?
                                join owb_dwh.ref_fund rf on qasgc.id_fnd_code=rf.id_fnd_code
                                join owb_dwh.nav_event ne on rf.key_ref_fund=ne.key_ref_fund
                                     and ne.id_neve_nav_date <= last_day(?)
                                     and ne.id_neve_nav_date > add_months(last_day(?),-24)
                                     and ne.id_neve_nav_type in ('MAIN','CLOT')
                                     and ne.id_neve_nav_sort in ('CLOT','OFF')
                                     and ne.neve_validity_status = 'Y'
                            )srq_tmp2
                        group by
                            srq_tmp2.id_fnd_code
                        )srq_tmp on rf.id_fnd_code=srq_tmp.id_fnd_code
                                 and hfd.id_dvd_ex_date >= srq_tmp.id_neve_nav_date_debut
                                 and hfd.id_dvd_ex_date <= srq_tmp.id_neve_nav_date_fin
                where
                    (qc.date_fin_compart is null or qc.date_fin_compart>
                          case
                              when qg.id_type_rapport=1 then last_day(add_months(?,-12))
                              when qg.id_type_rapport=2 then last_day(add_months(?,-6))
                              end
                    )
                    /*and dvd_net_fund_total<>0*/
                    and dvd_net_unit<>0
                     )srq0
                )srq1
            )srq2
        )srq3
        where 
           (
           /*Titre de la note*/
           (niveau='N00' and rupture_tableau_asc=1)
           /*Entête tableau*/
           or (niveau='N01' and rupture_tableau_asc=1)
           /*Entête tableau - Page break*/
           or (niveau='N01b' and rupture_tableau_asc=1)
           /*Ligne détail*/
           or 
               (
                   (niveau='N02' and not(rupture_compartiment_asc >1 and id_colonne_tmp=1))
                        and
                   (niveau='N02' and not(rupture_class_asc >1 and id_colonne_tmp in (2,3,4)))
               )
           )
    )

select
    niveau--,rupture_compartiment_desc,rupture_class_desc,rupture_compartiment_asc,rupture_class_asc
    ,id_ligne id_groupe
    ,id_ligne
    ,row_number() over(partition by id_ligne order by id_colonne_tmp)id_colonne
    ,'DIST_N'||replace(niveau,'N')||'L'||id_ligne||'C'||id_colonne_tmp nom_bloc
    /*Valeur Bloc*/
    ,decode(niveau||'-'||id_colonne_tmp
            ,'N00-1','##'
            ,'N01-1',null
            ,'N01b-1',null
            ,'N02-1',case when rupture_compartiment_asc =1 then fnd_lng_description||nvl2(date_fin_compart,'*',null) end
            ,'N02-2',case 
                        when rupture_class_asc =1 then 
                            case
                                when id_structure in '_P0_05' then initcap(unit_lng_description)
                                else unit_lng_description 
                                end
                        end
            ,'N02-3',case when rupture_class_asc =1 then dvd_settl_cur end
            ,'N02-4',case when rupture_class_asc =1 then unit_id_ins_code end
            ,'N02-5',to_char(id_dvd_ex_date,'dd/mm/yyyy','nls_date_language=english')
            ,'N02-6',to_char(dvd_value_date,'dd/mm/yyyy','nls_date_language=english')
            ,'N02-7',to_char(dvd_net_unit,'FM9G999G999G999G999G999G990D0000','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''. ')
           ) as valeur_bloc
     ,'DIST_'||niveau
             ||case
                  when niveau='N02' then
                      /*Détermine le modèle du template pour affichage des filets de rupture*/
                      case
                          when rupture_compartiment_desc=1 and rupture_class_desc=1 then '_M3'
                              ||case
                                    when rupture_compartiment_asc=1 and rupture_class_asc=1 then '_1'
                                    when rupture_compartiment_asc>1 and rupture_class_asc=1 then '_2'
                                    when rupture_compartiment_asc>1 and rupture_class_asc>1 then '_3'
                                    end
                          when rupture_compartiment_desc>1 and rupture_class_desc=1 then  '_M2'
                              ||case
                                    when rupture_compartiment_asc=1 and rupture_class_asc=1 then '_1'
                                    when rupture_compartiment_asc>1 and rupture_class_asc=1 then '_2'
                                    when rupture_compartiment_asc>1 and rupture_class_asc>1 then '_3'
                                    end
                          when rupture_compartiment_desc>1 and rupture_class_desc>1 then  '_M1'
                              ||case
                                    when rupture_compartiment_asc=1 and rupture_class_asc=1 then '_1'
                                    when rupture_compartiment_asc>1 and rupture_class_asc=1 then '_2'
                                    when rupture_compartiment_asc>1 and rupture_class_asc>1 then '_3'
                                    end
                          end
                  end as "TEMPLATE"
     ,case
        when (niveau ='N02' and rupture_class_asc=2 and rupture_class_desc=1)
             or (niveau ='N02' and rupture_compartiment_asc=2 and rupture_compartiment_desc=1) then 1
        end row_level
     /*Données de DATA_STORAGE*/
     /*DESCRIPTION_BLOC*/
     ,decode(niveau||'-'||id_colonne_tmp
            ,'N00-1','Titre de la note'
            ,'N01-1','Entete de colonnes'
            ,'N01b-1','Entete de colonnes - Page break'
            ,'N02-1','Détail - Nom de compartiment'

         ||'[fd]'||
