from
    (
    select
        dense_rank() over(order by niveau, rupture_tableau_asc) id_ligne
        ,srq4.*
        ,srq3.*
    from
        (
        /*Titre de la note*/
        select 'N00' as niveau, 1 as id_colonne_tmp from dual
        union
        /*Entête tableau*/
        select 'N01', 1 from dual 
        union
        /*Entête tableau - Page break*/
        select 'N01b', 1 from dual 
        union
        /*Ligne détail*/
        select 'N02', 1 from dual union select 'N02', 2 from dual union select 'N02', 3 from dual union select 'N02', 4 from dual union select 'N02', 5 from dual union select 'N02', 6 from dual union select 'N02', 7 from dual
        )srq4
        ,
        (
        select
            row_number() over(partition by srq2.id_structure order by srq2.position,srq2.unit_lng_description,srq2.dvd_settl_cur,srq2.id_dvd_ex_date,srq2.dvd_value_date) rupture_tableau_asc
            ,row_number() over(partition by srq2.position order by srq2.unit_lng_description,srq2.dvd_settl_cur,srq2.id_dvd_ex_date,srq2.dvd_value_date) rupture_compartiment_asc
            ,row_number() over(partition by srq2.position order by srq2.unit_lng_description desc,srq2.dvd_settl_cur desc,srq2.id_dvd_ex_date desc,srq2.dvd_value_date desc) rupture_compartiment_desc
            ,row_number() over(partition by srq2.position, srq2.unit_lng_description order by srq2.dvd_settl_cur,srq2.id_dvd_ex_date,srq2.dvd_value_date) rupture_class_asc
            ,row_number() over(partition by srq2.position, srq2.unit_lng_description order by srq2.dvd_settl_cur desc,srq2.id_dvd_ex_date desc,srq2.dvd_value_date desc) rupture_class_desc

                    join qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc on qs.id_structure=qasgc.id_structure

                        and qasgc.id_gabarit = ?

                             and rf.fnd_end_validity='31/12/2199'

                            and hfd.id_dvd_unit=ru.id_unit_code
                            and ru.unit_end_validity='31/12/2199'

                            ,max(srq_tmp2.id_neve_nav_date_fin)id_neve_nav_date_fin
                        from

                                ,rf.fnd_last_fiscal_year_end+1 id_neve_nav_date_debut
                                ,max(ne.id_neve_nav_date) over(partition by rf.id_fnd_code) id_neve_nav_date_fin
                            from
                                qxp.qxp_structure qs
                                join qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc on qs.id_structure=qasgc.id_structure

                                     and qasgc.id_gabarit = ?

                                     and ne.id_neve_nav_date <= last_day(?)

select
    niveau--,rupture_compartiment_desc,rupture_class_desc,rupture_compartiment_asc,rupture_class_asc
    ,id_ligne id_groupe
    ,id_ligne
    ,row_number() over(partition by id_ligne order by id_colonne_tmp)id_colonne
    ,'DIST_N'||replace(niveau,'N')||'L'||id_ligne||'C'||id_colonne_tmp nom_bloc
    /*Valeur Bloc*/
    ,decode(niveau||'-'||id_colonne_tmp
            ,'N00-1','##'
            ,'N01-1',null
            ,'N01b-1',null
            ,'N02-1',case when rupture_compartiment_asc =1 then fnd_lng_description||nvl2(date_fin_compart,'*',null) end
            ,'N02-2',case 
                        when rupture_class_asc =1 then 
                            case
                                when id_structure in '_P0_05' then initcap(unit_lng_description)
                                else unit_lng_description 
                                end
                        end
            ,'N02-3',case when rupture_class_asc =1 then dvd_settl_cur end
            ,'N02-4',case when rupture_class_asc =1 then unit_id_ins_code end
            ,'N02-5',to_char(id_dvd_ex_date,'dd/mm/yyyy','nls_date_language=english')
            ,'N02-6',to_char(dvd_value_date,'dd/mm/yyyy','nls_date_language=english')
            ,'N02-7',to_char(dvd_net_unit,'FM9G999G999G999G999G999G990D0000','NLS_NUMERIC_CHARACTERS = ''. ')
           ) as valeur_bloc
     ,'DIST_'||niveau
             ||case
                  when niveau='N02' then
                      /*Détermine le modèle du template pour affichage des filets de rupture*/
                      case
                          when rupture_compartiment_desc=1 and rupture_class_desc=1 then '_M3'
                              ||case
                                    when rupture_compartiment_asc=1 and rupture_class_asc=1 then '_1'
                                    when rupture_compartiment_asc>1 and rupture_class_asc=1 then '_2'
                                    when rupture_compartiment_asc>1 and rupture_class_asc>1 then '_3'
                                    end
                          when rupture_compartiment_desc>1 and rupture_class_desc=1 then  '_M2'
                              ||case
                                    when rupture_compartiment_asc=1 and rupture_class_asc=1 then '_1'
                                    when rupture_compartiment_asc>1 and rupture_class_asc=1 then '_2'
                                    when rupture_compartiment_asc>1 and rupture_class_asc>1 then '_3'
                                    end
                          when rupture_compartiment_desc>1 and rupture_class_desc>1 then  '_M1'
                              ||case
                                    when rupture_compartiment_asc=1 and rupture_class_asc=1 then '_1'
                                    when rupture_compartiment_asc>1 and rupture_class_asc=1 then '_2'
                                    when rupture_compartiment_asc>1 and rupture_class_asc>1 then '_3'
                                    end
                          end
                  end as "TEMPLATE"
     ,case
        when (niveau ='N02' and rupture_class_asc=2 and rupture_class_desc=1)
             or (niveau ='N02' and rupture_compartiment_asc=2 and rupture_compartiment_desc=1) then 1
        end row_level
     /*Données de DATA_STORAGE*/
     /*DESCRIPTION_BLOC*/
     ,decode(niveau||'-'||id_colonne_tmp
            ,'N00-1','Titre de la note'
            ,'N01-1','Entete de colonnes'
            ,'N01b-1','Entete de colonnes - Page break'
            ,'N02-1','Détail - Nom de compartiment'
            ,'N02-2','Détail - Nom de part'
            ,'N02-3','Détail - Devise'
            ,'N02-4','Détail - Code ISIN'
            ,'N02-5','Détail - Dates de détachement'
            ,'N02-6','Détail - Dates de paiement'
            ,'N02-7','Détail - Dividende unitaire'
            ) as description_bloc
     /*INFO_BLOC*/    
    ,'[ga]'||?||'[/ga]'
         ||'[st]'||id_structure||'[/st]'
         ||'[dt]'||?||'[/dt]'
         ||'[fd]'||
         case
             when niveau in ('N02') then id_fnd_code
             end ||'[/fd]'
         ||'[tl][/tl]'
         ||'[tb]DIV_DIST[/tb]'
         ||'[co]'||id_colonne_tmp||'[/co]'
         ||'[li]'||id_ligne||'[/li]'
         ||'[gr]'||id_ligne||'[/gr]'
         ||'[ni]'||niveau||'[/ni]'
         ||'[vb][/vb]'
        ||'[ic][/ic]'
            as info_bloc
from
    (
    select
        dense_rank() over(order by niveau, rupture_tableau_asc) id_ligne
        ,srq4.*
        ,srq3.*
    from
        (
        /*Titre de la note*/
        select 'N00' as niveau, 1 as id_colonne_tmp from dual
        union
        /*Entête tableau*/
        select 'N01', 1 from dual 
        union
        /*Entête tableau - Page break*/
        select 'N01b', 1 from dual 
        union
        /*Ligne détail*/
        select 'N02', 1 from dual union select 'N02', 2 from dual union select 'N02', 3 from dual union select 'N02', 4 from dual union select 'N02', 5 from dual union select 'N02', 6 from dual union select 'N02', 7 from dual
        )srq4
        ,
        (
        select
            row_number() over(partition by srq2.id_structure order by srq2.position,srq2.unit_lng_description,srq2.dvd_settl_cur,srq2.id_dvd_ex_date,srq2.dvd_value_date) rupture_tableau_asc
            ,row_number() over(partition by srq2.position order by srq2.unit_lng_description,srq2.dvd_settl_cur,srq2.id_dvd_ex_date,srq2.dvd_value_date) rupture_compartiment_asc
            ,row_number() over(partition by srq2.position order by srq2.unit_lng_description desc,srq2.dvd_settl_cur desc,srq2.id_dvd_ex_date desc,srq2.dvd_value_date desc) rupture_compartiment_desc
            ,row_number() over(partition by srq2.position, srq2.unit_lng_description order by srq2.dvd_settl_cur,srq2.id_dvd_ex_date,srq2.dvd_value_date) rupture_class_asc
            ,row_number() over(partition by srq2.position, srq2.unit_lng_description order by srq2.dvd_settl_cur desc,srq2.id_dvd_ex_date desc,srq2.dvd_value_date desc) rupture_class_desc
            ,srq2.*
        from
            (
            select
                srq1.id_structure
                ,srq1.libelle_long libelle_long_structure
                ,srq1.id_fnd_code
                ,srq1.fnd_lng_description
                ,srq1.position
                ,srq1.date_fin_compart
                ,srq1.fnd_currency
                ,srq1.id_neve_nav_date
                ,srq1.id_dvd_unit
                ,srq1.unit_id_ins_code
                ,srq1.unit_sht_description
                ,srq1.unit_lng_description
                ,srq1.id_dvd_ex_date
                ,srq1.dvd_value_date
                ,srq1.dvd_net_unit
                ,srq1.dvd_settl_cur
            from
                (
                select
                    srq0.id_structure
                    ,srq0.libelle_long
                    ,srq0.id_fnd_code
                    ,srq0.position
                    ,srq0.date_fin_compart
                    ,srq0.fnd_lng_description
                    ,srq0.id_neve_nav_date
                    ,srq0.fnd_currency
                    ,srq0.id_dvd_dividend_number
                    ,srq0.id_dvd_unit
                    ,srq0.dvd_settl_cur
                    ,srq0.dvd_net_unit
                    ,srq0.dvd_net_total
                    ,srq0.id_dvd_ex_date
                    ,srq0.dvd_value_date
                    ,srq0.dvd_nature
                    ,srq0.unit_id_ins_code
                    ,srq0.unit_sht_description
                    ,srq0.unit_lng_description
                from
                    (
                    /*Requete brute GP3*/
                    select
                        qs.id_structure
                        ,qs.libelle_long
                        ,qasgc.position
                        ,rf.id_fnd_code
                        ,qc.date_fin_compart
                        ,srq_tmp.id_neve_nav_date_debut id_neve_nav_date
                        ,nvl(replace(qc.fnd_lng_description,qs.libelle_long||' - '),qasgc.id_fnd_code||' - #Libellé compartiment absent#')fnd_lng_description
                        ,rf.fnd_inv_policy
                        ,rf.fnd_currency
                        ,hfd.*
                        ,ru.unit_id_ins_code
                        ,ru.unit_sht_description
                        ,replace(replace(replace(replace(upper(trim(ru.unit_lng_description)),'CLASS '),'  ',' '),'( ','('),' )',')') unit_lng_description
                        ,ru.unit_lng_description unit_lng_description_old
-- select * 
                    from
                        qxp.qxp_structure qs
                    join qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc on qs.id_structure=qasgc.id_structure
                        and qasgc.id_structure = ?
                        and qasgc.id_gabarit = ?
                    join qxp.qxp_gabarit qg on qg.id_gabarit=qasgc.id_gabarit
                    join owb_dwh.ref_fund rf on qasgc.id_fnd_code=rf.id_fnd_code
                             and rf.fnd_end_validity='31/12/2199'
                    left join qxp.qxp_compartiment qc on qc.id_fnd_code=qasgc.id_fnd_code
                    join owb_dwh.his_fund_dividend hfd on qasgc.id_fnd_code=hfd.id_dvd_fund_code
                    join owb_dwh.ref_unit ru on hfd.id_dvd_fund_code=ru.id_unit_fund_code
                            and hfd.id_dvd_unit=ru.id_unit_code
                            and ru.unit_end_validity='31/12/2199'
                    join
                        (
                        select
                            srq_tmp2.id_fnd_code
                            ,max(srq_tmp2.id_neve_nav_date_debut)id_neve_nav_date_debut
                            ,max(srq_tmp2.id_neve_nav_date_fin)id_neve_nav_date_fin
                        from
                            (
                            select
                                rf.id_fnd_code
                                ,rf.fnd_last_fiscal_year_end+1 id_neve_nav_date_debut
                                ,max(ne.id_neve_nav_date) over(partition by rf.id_fnd_code) id_neve_nav_date_fin
                            from
                                qxp.qxp_structure qs
                                join qxp.qxp_asso_struct_gabarit_comp qasgc on qs.id_structure=qasgc.id_structure
                                     and qasgc.id_structure = ?
                                     and qasgc.id_gabarit = ?
                                join owb_dwh.ref_fund rf on qasgc.id_fnd_code=rf.id_fnd_code
                                join owb_dwh.nav_event ne on rf.key_ref_fund=ne.key_ref_fund
                                     and ne.id_neve_nav_date <= last_day(?)
                                     and ne.id_neve_nav_date > add_months(last_day(?),-24)
                                     and ne.id_neve_nav_type in ('MAIN','CLOT')
                                     and ne.id_neve_nav_sort in ('CLOT','OFF')
                                     and ne.neve_validity_status = 'Y'
                            )srq_tmp2
                        group by
                            srq_tmp2.id_fnd_code
                        )srq_tmp on rf.id_fnd_code=srq_tmp.id_fnd_code
                                 and hfd.id_dvd_ex_date >= srq_tmp.id_neve_nav_date_debut
                                 and hfd.id_dvd_ex_date <= srq_tmp.id_neve_nav_date_fin
                where
                    (qc.date_fin_compart is null or qc.date_fin_compart>
                          case
                              when qg.id_type_rapport=1 then last_day(add_months(?,-12))
                              when qg.id_type_rapport=2 then last_day(add_months(?,-6))
                              end
                    )
                    /*and dvd_net_fund_total<>0*/
                    and dvd_net_unit<>0
                     )srq0
                )srq1
            )srq2
        )srq3
        where 
           (
           /*Titre de la note*/
           (niveau='N00' and rupture_tableau_asc=1)
           /*Entête tableau*/
           or (niveau='N01' and rupture_tableau_asc=1)
           /*Entête tableau - Page break*/
           or (niveau='N01b' and rupture_tableau_asc=1)
           /*Ligne détail*/
           or 
               (
                   (niveau='N02' and not(rupture_compartiment_asc >1 and id_colonne_tmp=1))
                        and
                   (niveau='N02' and not(rupture_class_asc >1 and id_colonne_tmp in (2,3,4)))
               )
           )
    )
--where (id_ligne > 1623 and id_ligne <=3303 and niveau in ('N02')) or niveau in ('N01','N01b')
where (id_ligne > 1565 and niveau in ('N02')) or niveau in ('N01','N01b')

order by
     id_ligne
     ,niveau
     ,id_colonne
]; ORA-01843: not a valid month
